subject: Join us for our Town Hall
body:
Join us for our Town Hall this Saturday

| [ ](http://www.nick4wa.com/?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=town_hall_f1901&n=1)

Peter, Join us this Saturday for our next town hall! Nicolaus is making time to be available for everyone. Every other Saturday just like this one Nicolaus will be online ready to talk with you! All you have to do is join, it's that easy. You can **[Click Here](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=xn-kgymPfMQdPdQo69RJKgeqoq-Ya5bTaMfW9oT0nrih1zxdvyyfPpprUZrY4z0qMgqD5xMu1O9SFnwwC90_S3RMRDTrK62MjwSCxCRWKTEEdPApUoyPgHJPrvPn3RPIQvk0tr7x_mvI2NIA8AAizn-oKMwNff3yYeAw26MDRFNoK7XHcCwTclSqDLYqcPLayr_qS3-vraY5k3D5SV1u7KnmgOChIXwJ14G6KvhTl1NOkolo9MxnKji5TDZr9s1AwhiCZwaShi0l47q1W4Av_BLPHc9HCEzc3E_Iqb2vgXOBfay09I72M_3mOx9tOCUPKYZlJcsRBWUdVVH4MoEmxoSBWufbT9qQmRjYRlPJMjHvw1wnzO-Udd7slkugE2mO&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=town_hall_f1901&n=2)** to join on Saturday or you can **[RSVP right now](https://www.nick4wa.com/townhall_20220219?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=town_hall_f1901&n=3)**. We will send out a reminder email to you so you don't forget to join the call! Nicolaus is the most available candidate on the ballot and he will stay that way even after being elected! **Share this email with everyone you know; everyone is invited.** Join from home or anywhere you currently are! body:
| | Want to FIRE Pelosi? **Text FIRE to 21818** to help House Republicans take back the House for the American People.
---
| | | Hello Patriot,

I am reaching out with an URGENT NOTICE. **You failed to renew your 2022 Membership and it has LAPSED. **
---
| | | [RENEW NOW](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=714eb33582bd4d209cf69dd56910bb1c&_e=MtPNsd19eCukUhYge21-6HhuyFA-X9kCdHMX1oU009muajTMFVrFtTTA_1vgtKyeggyBKBY8uveys0t-sjCCYuQZImr-GTIDy8QeRtJ_jXbOaIVFIXCGXAY-JIbArSAb_QqHVsFM2f-biBapsxhpwfhi_5UnLJbZ1BqIYc6Bc1GF4yq5jq5u0zjY83k6JLe1ly6hdK-j85AE1uzoYxu-4kczkQ7uVLnP0lWU9383uVR2pAZaiMBNawpPzFWTC-QjTvvqw0K-AQNwX3fAUlcWktiRgDTVVEjnBDNmpu6i_DI6eUWURdCSLzPUSQJChJiIn15tfrROcT9GJkutLl-k9z0TzfVUQ_6IcwbzpQ0pd11EBa_hl8XtcmIbi_QtQu75UNdHHkSZImqUyUqpRjSibN_0ZxJZhO92iQYwQcGsBI80P1WMJgCN6riCjlr9xqaVrocGMhfsWKbwIi_azkHhEhlgJGwOCtNuJSO2Abn3aszwzEax6MVbbuB2FUbg2fEqK5IFC6i6fceQ_A4ztz1J0fjNXclCTXFkSJhxtMH-FUVT6Gy1WVPTn8jHoykJy2L992s2sp8bc94lattxhYKohQ%3D%3D "Generic Button")
---
Dan Crenshaw was upset to not see your name on our 2022 Membership list. He asked me to reach out to you personally to **extend an exclusive membership deadline till 11:59 PM TONIGHT for you. **

**[Will you answer Dan Crenshaw's plea and renew your 2022 Membership?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=714eb33582bd4d209cf69dd56910bb1c&_e=MtPNsd19eCukUhYge21-6HhuyFA-X9kCdHMX1oU009muajTMFVrFtTTA_1vgtKyeggyBKBY8uveys0t-sjCCYuQZImr-GTIDy8QeRtJ_jXbOaIVFIXCGXAY-JIbArSAb_QqHVsFM2f-biBapsxhpwfhi_5UnLJbZ1BqIYc6Bc1GF4yq5jq5u0zjY83k6JLe1ly6hdK-j85AE1uzoYxu-4kczkQ7uVLnP0lWU9383uVR2pAZaiMBNawpPzFWTC-QjTvvqw0K-AQNwX3fAUlcWktiRgDTVVEjnBDNmpu6i_DI6eUWURdCSLzPUSQJChJiIn15tfrROcT9GJkutLl-k9z0TzfVUQ_6IcwbzpQ0pd10bqsW3Iu8s9yrf9AM5c1pDg6k071ShcQ776i6ihwl8RVGGAQto1eApQ82pdZqaIlc-j8XBLn1AKl2p0qbJOPZ_NaJQROUqsL3TK4MaVfK-sfCETdKeH9OjSMrfbxE-uitsA5DtopRwyxyKCyE-h22DeugzJGVsbTlkCCsAntRKDVBLx55YrOOjIeCpIM5iukUyxNZtUb4cCXS8lP5QFbqiaLRV6m2MW7cAzUiqxZXrTA%3D%3D "Will you answer Dan Crenshaw's plea and renew your 2022 Membership? ")**

As Crenshaw said, renewing your membership is one of the most important things you can do to help House Republicans win back the Majority in 2022.

I don't know about you, but I am fed up with Speaker Pelosi and her Radical Left Minions. They are destroying this country with their COVID Mandates, free speech bans, and open borders. We must hold Pelosi accountable and get her FIRED in 2022.

**[We can't do it without you though. That's why I NEED you to renew your 2022 Membership before TONIGHT'S 11:59 PM extended deadline.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=714eb33582bd4d209cf69dd56910bb1c&_e=MtPNsd19eCukUhYge21-6HhuyFA-X9kCdHMX1oU009muajTMFVrFtTTA_1vgtKyeggyBKBY8uveys0t-sjCCYuQZImr-GTIDy8QeRtJ_jXbOaIVFIXCGXAY-JIbArSAb_QqHVsFM2f-biBapsxhpwfhi_5UnLJbZ1BqIYc6Bc1GF4yq5jq5u0zjY83k6JLe1ly6hdK-j85AE1uzoYxu-4kczkQ7uVLnP0lWU9383uVR2pAZaiMBNawpPzFWTC-QjTvvqw0K-AQNwX3fAUlcWktiRgDTVVEjnBDNmpu6i_DI6eUWURdCSLzPUSQJChJiIn15tfrROcT9GJkutLl-k9z0TzfVUQ_6IcwbzpQ0pd12gBq5tPZmB51oFPuwnN_jfcmBzK7O1e-wNDnqrzl__YjUcmNg_wtZ0FrwwvxMaI6fkNbZUpbBI6SMm2TLlfrbHNNhSfFZTlbViAv1aH7i4ifGhjxkb7geZMWWgR_On8AK_TnvgMHs7yWb6GfWLjNWfO43gi6QvEGHS3dPVuAZ7_19sv-ZzxN6iLHkfZJx5rHi7e36h14dAa3N89pHg5TSMwiL1nvpRPWmJgokIHZMl_g%3D%3D "We can't do it without you though. That's why I NEED you to renew your 2022 Membership before the extended February 15th, 11:59 PM deadline. ")**

You are _crucial_ in this fight.

body:
You’ve been invited:
| **Team, Senator Ossoff’s birthday is TODAY!**

[We want to make sure he has the BEST birthday ever — so you’ve been invited to sign our card before it closes at 5,000 signatures!](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Ossoff_Birthday/?refcode=VPP_20220216_EMCARD_E3_T0_AC&t=6&akid=1282%2E878179%2EYheRnX) | [SIGN THE CARD FOR SENATOR OSSOFF!](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Ossoff_Birthday/?refcode=VPP_20220216_EMCARD_E3_T0_AC&t=7&akid=1282%2E878179%2EYheRnX)

Fellow American,

We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below:

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8161f2a563ad4abe8011db70810a86ab&_e=CvedVfkk_T7Kb2yV8U3Ew5qR0F_dSqGhwu3yvK9l0aE0LkJ9UjAgOMl7wFH2MlmXYkuphtRCKkd69YvTYj9rgFttAYDV-LvyqfKHYuTORYZuChrpjC-TRsTOl4LvG2xDXhRjwlpfLdXmD73I8ap9ZGx3GqjqbNuzu68BJ_Ga4ealaGvD3VzIicrYghye72WCY1j0g4fLm3Shjt5Cul9c5sDP-Yjp37bRCJj9-pVpYNR8RqzZtHNJcnoxolwLa97ZCG-PGixOILpp2s9XPhbfVsYpfoGFnXOsC_cxaA_pqER6IJJut8P4PpX6UPpsBWSPDieSp7t5h4duz4P6Z7GW1Nxp50m8hj4uuAjc5foyt0K3zvHx8_Wo4K8JlEk_qE_Bzu6iMePsyyeAUDJF_WnytNuGaXEe6TAguK9u85cCJ9KwnlHQa70iJGaLjeN_VKx8YqHJ4WoeK4q5qpziICrZTQ%3D%3D)
That's right - NBC News reported that a recent poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%!

While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider:
1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than eight months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8.
2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%.
3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race.

clean_body: Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. | Fellow American, We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below: That's right - NBC News reported that a recent poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%! While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider: 1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than eight months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8. 2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%. 3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race. We need 500 donations before midnight tonight to keep pace with this week's goal. If polls are this tight eight months out from Election Day, then we fully expect this race is going to be a grueling fight to the finish. Even NBC News, which is not known for their fair and balanced reporting, acknowledges that this is going to be one of the MOST COMPETITIVE RACES IN THE NATION. We've already seen the Democrats use this poll to motivate their supporters and raise more money, so there is no time to waste. Please donate $3 or more to our campaign right now. Thank you for your support, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Scare tactics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We can’t afford to fall short right now.
#
Derek,
Our team will never use cheap tricks or scare tactics to try to get you to donate. We believe email is an important tool to authentically communicate with our supporters about what’s happening with this campaign.
Basically, we’re always going to tell you the truth — even if it isn’t pretty.
So believe us when we say: We fell short of our mid-month goal.
And not just by a few hundred dollars, but by a few _thou$and._
**[Please, if you can afford it, make a donation today towards John Fetterman’s campaign for Senate so we can win this race and protect our Democratic Senate majority.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44193?refcode=ema20220216-4616&t=1&akid=4616%2E434096%2EGBI1sr)** 🙏
Listen: We know we ask a lot. We know that you receive a lot of emails from this campaign. But we wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t urgent.
**We’re less than 100 days from our primary election, Derek.** That might seem like a long time to go, but it’s not.
Not when one of our Democratic opponents has a super PAC raising $8 MILLION to help him win our primary.
Not when the GOP and their super PACs are flooding the airwaves with over $32.5 million worth of TV and radio ads.
**Not when there is so much on the line.**
**[Your donation couldn’t be more crucial to maintain our campaign momentum than it is today. Please, make a donation of $5 today to help us close the gap and meet our goal.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44193?refcode=ema20220216-4616&t=2&akid=4616%2E434096%2EGBI1sr)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44193?refcode=em20220216-4616&amount=5&t=21&akid=4616%2E434096%2EGBI1sr)**
We know we can do this with your support. Please give what you can today to help John win this primary.
—Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220216-4616-footer&t=22&refcode2=4616_434096_GBI1sr&akid=4616%2E434096%2EGBI1sr)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

clean_body: Watch my new ad here! | Friends, President Trump made it clear on day one – they’re bringing drugs, they’re bringing crime, and we can stop it all by BUILDING A WALL. Joe Biden speaks a different language. He’s opening our borders, sending tax dollars to illegals, and allowing violent gangs free access to our cities. WATCH BELOW Here’s some plain English: JOE BIDEN IS A FAILURE. He’s embarrassing our country, and I’m going to stop him – because the Career Politicians won’t. | Career Politicians have failed Alabama and failed America for far too long. Congressman Mo Brooks and Chief of Staff Katie Boyd Britt enabled spineless, incompetent leaders like Joe Biden. I’ve actually fought for our country before, and I’m ready to do so again. I’m signing up for one more tour of duty. \- Mike Durant, Black Hawk Down PAID FOR BY DURANT FOR SENATE Not authorized by any other candidate. Peter –

Our team has grown so much since we launched this campaign, and following this groundswell of support I wanted to take a moment to reintroduce myself:

**I’m Michele Rayner. I’m a state representative, public defender and civil rights lawyer, and a proud queer Black woman. I’ve dedicated my career to serving our community, and now I’m taking our fight for justice to new heights by running for Congress.**

[This race won’t be easy, but that’s never discouraged me from doing the right thing for Florida. To win, we’re going to need a strong community of supporters – will you sign on to join us today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41886780/330765249/1757724077?refcode=MRFC_20220216_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTNlMWRlZC04YzhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LG1db_fuRX2w8yKjVToSfC515GgWWMLykL1q3UkFPhc=&emci=2d2fbfb2-a48e-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=ba3e1ded-8c8f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=34271788) | [1,000 SIGNATURE GOAL: ENDORSE MICHELE RAYNER FOR CONGRESS TODAY »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41886781/330765250/1757724077?refcode=MRFC_20220216_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTNlMWRlZC04YzhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LG1db_fuRX2w8yKjVToSfC515GgWWMLykL1q3UkFPhc=&emci=2d2fbfb2-a48e-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=ba3e1ded-8c8f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=34271788)

Growing up my dad always told me “Help others. Do the right thing. And most importantly always keep your head up high.” And that’s just what I've done.

When I served as a public defender and civil rights attorney, I fought for those who needed a voice.

As a state representative, I've spoken truth to power and I continue to stand up to Republicans who try to bully us into submission. _Because here in Florida, there’s just so much on the line:_

**When people in our district are working two or three jobs to make ends meet,** _we need leadership who understands the struggle._

**When people in our district depend on social security and Medicare,**_we need leadership willing to protect these vital social services._

**When people in our district are confronted with the devastating effects of climate change,**_we need leadership ready to take immediate action._

**When people in our district are just one hospital bill away from total bankruptcy,**_we need leadership willing to transform our health care system._

People need someone who just won’t give up. That’s what my family taught me and that’s why I'm running for Congress.

[I’m going all in for the people of Pinellas County, Peter. Not the powerful, not the big corporations, but the people just like you and me. Together, we can deliver real results for the people of Florida, not the same old band-aid solutions that barely get us by. Please, join 999 other supporters today by endorsing my Democratic campaign »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41886782/330765251/1757724077?refcode=MRFC_20220216_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTNlMWRlZC04YzhmLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LG1db_fuRX2w8yKjVToSfC515GgWWMLykL1q3UkFPhc=&emci=2d2fbfb2-a48e-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=ba3e1ded-8c8f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=34271788)

name: Glenn Grothman
subject: Biden's crack team
disclaimer_text: paid for by taxpayers
body:
[](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qlkjjjt-yddjllujiu-r/) Fellow Republican, Joe Biden seems to think he has a crack team, but their latest policy rollout is just down right crazy.The Biden administration is funding 'harm-reduction' kits for drug users. The best part? It's paid for by taxpayers. [_**Do you think our tax dollars should go to addicts for drug kits?**_](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qlkjjjt-yddjllujiu-j/) [](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qlkjjjt-yddjllujiu-t/) [No - I OPPOSE taxpayer-funded drug kits](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qlkjjjt-yddjllujiu-i/) [Yes - I SUPPORT taxpayer-funded drug kits](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qlkjjjt-yddjllujiu-d/) Across the nation and here in Wisconsin, crime is on the rise.
* In Milwaukee, violent criminals are out on the streets thanks to scandalously low bail from liberal prosecutors.
* Around the country, law enforcement is under attack thanks to the Democrats' "Defund the Police" efforts.
* And now, criminals are living the high life _(at your expense)_ with liberal policies like free drug supplies!

[_**I look forward to seeing your response to my poll.**_](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qlkjjjt-yddjllujiu-h/) Thank you,
Glenn Grothman [](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qlkjjjt-yddjllujiu-k/) | Glenn Grothman for Congress
P.O. Box 1215
Fond du Lac, WI 54936 You are receiving this email because you expressed an interest in Glenn Grothman [Unsubscribe](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-u-qlkjjjt-yddjllujiu-u/)

---
| | | Hey there,

Like you, I’m tired of the cult-like behavior of the extreme right-wing and Congressman Scott Fitzgerald that prefer to try to undo the 2020 election rather than work to improve everyday Americans’ lives today and into the future. I’m working tirelessly to replace him so we finally have a leader in our district listening to all of us and working to foster a strong middle class.

**I am dedicated to unifying and leading, with concrete plans to make the 5th Congressional District a place where all families can have a shot at the American Dream.**

[Join me on Tuesday, March 1st at the Drunk Uncle](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=64e91d4db0&e=356c0699dd) in West Allis for a Meet & Greet to support my campaign, with entertainment by the Riverwest Aces!
---
| [ ](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=d50558554e&e=356c0699dd)
---
| [Tuesday, March 1st from 5:30 pm - 7:00 pm
The Drunk Uncle
902 S 68th St, West Allis, WI 53219](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=4aed8550a9&e=356c0699dd)
Come meet me and hear my plans for our district and state, because the era of polarization and extreme party solidarity has to come to an end. [RSVP HERE.](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=b93dcc83b8&e=356c0699dd)

I am working to make sure that every American family has the opportunity to enjoy the American Dream, and with your support we **CAN** do it!
---

---
| I hope to see you there!

Mike Van Someren

Team Taylor

It's up to us to do everything we can to make sure the **future** for Black Marylanders is bright and ensure that Black communities are safe, just, and strong. As we continue to celebrate Black History Month, it's important to remember that Black History is happening now -- and I'm proud to say it's happening with this ticket and with this campaign. **So, let's make history -- together. **
---
Candace Hollingsworth _Former Mayor of Hyattsville_ _Candidate for Lieutenant Governor_

subject: Challenged - Please Read
body:
*** Charlie's campaign has been challenged by entrenched Republicans. *** | Bookwalter Fights Challenge to Candidacy Charles Bookwalter&rsqu
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.tcharlesbookwalter.com/so/60Ny5BZWW/c?w=Jjq4w_8PSJjW5p6RO9ZCL7HCN8btitQxT3ZK_5UGIo4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGNoYXJsZXNib29rd2FsdGVyLmNvbS9zby82ME55NUJaV1c_bGFuZ3VhZ2VUYWc9ZW4iLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJhZjZiZjA1ZC0yZjQ2LTQzZDYtODdlMi00NDhjMmQ4NTkxOTAifQ)_**
---
| | |
---
| | Patriot BulletinBookwalter for Congress
---
| | ***Charlie's campaign has been challenged by entrenched Republicans.***
---
|
---
| | Bookwalter Fights Challenge to CandidacyCharles Bookwalter’s candidacy for Indiana District 4 House seat is being challenged by two members of the Republican Party. Newly amended Indiana Code 3-8-2-7 (effective 1/1/2022) states that would-be candidates for U.S. Congress who wish to run on a major party ticket must file a declaration stating they “affiliate” with that party, by virtue of their having either voted for that party in the last two primaries in which the candidate voted, or by attaching the certification of that party’s Chair for the County of the candidate’s residence that the candidate is a member of the party. Prior to its amendment this year, candidates were required to have voted in only the most recent primary of the party with which they claim affiliation. Candidate Charles Bookwalter is in this position, but Deborah Ottinger, the GOP Chair for Boone County, where Bookwalter resides, refused to certify that he is a member of the Republican Party, even after Bookwalter presented her with an affidavit attesting to his lifelong record of supporting the party, and his sincere belief in the Republican Party’s core values. Bookwalter filed his candidacy after being advised to do so by Indiana Elections Division staff. On February 10, challenges to Bookwalter’s candidacy were filed by Danville attorney Greg Irby, who serves as Vice Chair of the Hendricks County Republican Party, and Greencastle City Councilor Cody Eckert, who is a former Senior Legislative Assistant for the Indiana House of Representatives. The Indiana Elections Division will hold a hearing at 1:30pm on Friday, February 18 to adjudicate the challenges. The hearing is open to the public at Indiana Government Center, South Conference Rooms A and B. 402 W Washington St, Indianapolis IN 46204. If one or more of the challenges is upheld, Bookwalter plans to seek an order from the court allowing him to remain on the ballot, on the basis that I.C. 3-8-2-7(a)(4), as amended, unconstitutionally burdens his rights, and the rights of voters, under the First and Fourteenth Amendments.
---
| |
---
| | Freedom Convoy\- Stop the Steal -Friday, February 18 at 12:30pmIndiana State House Charles and other candidates who have been challenged will be speaking at this rally, organized by Gabe Whitely for State Representative. Following the rally, the hearing is open to the public at Indiana Government Center, South Conference Rooms A and B. 402 W Washington St, Indianapolis IN 46204. We would appreciate your support!
---

name: Larry Elder
subject: I wasn’t ready for this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR AMERICA
body:
We started a movement, fellow patriot, and now we’re going to put it to work for the American people! | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=81d6600910264c3d90e9ff3c4e3c2aa8&_e=OPTBV-66IrbuRmbG3f6WZpIWE-fiiLnT5JLD21Ta45r52lXTXvgGCRGPI0UYx7bA9--f9PKrhWfRZxlArpLVhpV5Ek-FyoyGA_xyMGGKSBhho2IZlDjLyc6LusqzRl5k1f9DtrdmRLXIheKfCZ1nBE_3S2RcjJUMIQI5jRSjnJk7DQAczDu6WX3FNk6TPCXs5ozUovJEHIPimvmHtMygKlBFyEGRC_kA7LvGs3PNPwW8UJ1f7r1Gz8bDSccA5SZMT9_TtCluLaDdTov02zHx_zxRIQPw1S1Vnda783ag7ez5FikMg0WZFY2yQDK7-CieEL1bq7A1-zQabWRBl5A80Ox88VFr2PC3mJspWK3zc5r4wnuqqkoyWxn_BdjF5oC5iv8wQFOzNL_MoPkFvP8-LWMG92AZpjCEiT9Xo47FMZr2c2FYNgJiOFaKD3G8zVnZ)
---
Fellow patriot,

When I launched my 2021 campaign for Governor of California against Gavin Newsom, I was ready for the tough fight to come. But what I wasn’t ready for was the overwhelming support I received from all over the country.

**We started a movement, fellow patriot, and now we’re going to put it to work for the American people!**

As you probably saw, I launched [**Elder for America PAC**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=81d6600910264c3d90e9ff3c4e3c2aa8&_e=OPTBV-66IrbuRmbG3f6WZpIWE-fiiLnT5JLD21Ta45r52lXTXvgGCRGPI0UYx7bA9--f9PKrhWfRZxlArpLVhpV5Ek-FyoyGA_xyMGGKSBhho2IZlDjLyc6LusqzRl5k1f9DtrdmRLXIheKfCZ1nBE_3S2RcjJUMIQI5jRSjnJk7DQAczDu6WX3FNk6TPCXs5ozUovJEHIPimvmHtMygKm2lIMhS68OO_taIUGfolYj1fDWBJkxPb6-B5_NMT4lwBPdcQ3kQ5RuIlKfj6I0sNY1NqGQa72gBBxTSX3Wz8C5nJXBcXrh2FXexRrRnj3uGn_hIP6F-NKoiNidGRKvcf-8KajwnH95AVOij0z2GCdE0rZerogevyUK3YDOCTOAXos77mfm0oUEodN3fuNocyXIDisj4tKPo_uwXRBAIjwLIWC0uDntBnF-jPWfAkPOg) last month to support Republican candidates in target races around the country to help win back the House and Senate.

[**HELP LARRY ELDER SAVE AMERICA -> **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=81d6600910264c3d90e9ff3c4e3c2aa8&_e=OPTBV-66IrbuRmbG3f6WZpIWE-fiiLnT5JLD21Ta45r52lXTXvgGCRGPI0UYx7bA9--f9PKrhWfRZxlArpLVhpV5Ek-FyoyGA_xyMGGKSBhho2IZlDjLyc6LusqzRl5k1f9DtrdmRLXIheKfCZ1nBE_3S2RcjJUMIQI5jRSjnJk7DQAczDu6WX3FNk6TPCXs5ozUovJEHIPimvmHtMygKsj1sMfkVFeWN2ESABpFWqDr2dy_fA1ocv5B99bg_EHN5-l2NtwQeL6k-BrQMk1hw20CoXjht-rXsBiokPjURxPvOcoHE5qeVSvNMLvIWqETDYuLYK6H8mmDSkcOBoOhhXDSHDdUFcs9LfoeJYGvUNdjUNh8s71dFdb2pl2wePqW5yeb9kikcdj94mNgI5zyYqzlaIerWfUayCiVqRXQZ9PzhVxucnkMLfPsO25giwdQ)
But it doesn’t stop there. Along with winning back Congress, Elder for America PAC is going to take on these fights at the local level:
1. Campaign for school choice.
2. Campaign against Critical Race Theory.
3. Campaign to get rid of soft-on-crime District Attorneys.
4. Campaign against early release of violent criminals.

[**If these are fights you can get behind, then I urge you to join me. Please take $25, $50 or more right now and put it in the Elder for America tip jar because, fellow patriot, WE’VE GOT A COUNTRY TO SAVE!**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=81d6600910264c3d90e9ff3c4e3c2aa8&_e=OPTBV-66IrbuRmbG3f6WZpIWE-fiiLnT5JLD21Ta45r52lXTXvgGCRGPI0UYx7bA9--f9PKrhWfRZxlArpLVhpV5Ek-FyoyGA_xyMGGKSBhho2IZlDjLyc6LusqzRl5k1f9DtrdmRLXIheKfCZ1nBE_3S2RcjJUMIQI5jRSjnJk7DQAczDu6WX3FNk6TPCXs5ozUovJEHIPimvmHtMygKll10sBUF33LacTa1tn2khY4qICohfn0gL5pzol22DtHMEu9NSvOiouRriP_kbD_WoDzKLYontqZypA_FatDDeJKRL81ti4QC1e8xedBhCH3TPgV8fbe_jfuuO14KtUAlxxoLJ_5_ZfZFFen8ywPb-5D3guNMU8R4Zf6N3Z5t_sdV14os4MkN7BGP4yeNAE-fYFV5-VLgMmRFqOhLgji-kUBBBvQWoMyq3BJV9PECwfI)

clean_body: We started a movement, fellow patriot, and now we’re going to put it to work for the American people! | Fellow patriot, When I launched my 2021 campaign for Governor of California against Gavin Newsom, I was ready for the tough fight to come. But what I wasn’t ready for was the overwhelming support I received from all over the country. We started a movement, fellow patriot, and now we’re going to put it to work for the American people! As you probably saw, I launched last month to support Republican candidates in target races around the country to help win back the House and Senate. But it doesn’t stop there. Along with winning back Congress, Elder for America PAC is going to take on these fights at the local level: 1. Campaign for school choice. 2. Campaign against Critical Race Theory. 3. Campaign to get rid of soft-on-crime District Attorneys. 4. Campaign against early release of violent criminals. Thanks, Larry Elder | PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR AMERICA Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee www.elderforamerica.com Don't want to receive any more of our emails:

name: Steve Chabot
subject: The Key to Saving the World
body:
We face these 5 challenges... No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-truudua-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-truudua-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-truudua-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [The Key to Saving the World](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-truudua-kujkulhluu-j/)
In this week's blog, I discuss the five principal challenges we face on the international scene, and what to do about them. Let me know what you think. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-truudua-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-truudua-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Dire Times](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-truudua-kujkulhluu-d/)
Is Putin going to invade Ukraine? Read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-truudua-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-truudua-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Is Hillary Running for President Again?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-truudua-kujkulhluu-u/)
Joe Biden's been a disaster. Kamala Harris is a disaster. So who's going to be the Democrat nominee for President in 2024. Hillary again? Read about it in this week's blog. And how about those Bengals!!! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-truudua-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-truudua-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [10 Things Republicans are FOR](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-truudua-kujkulhluu-n/)
In a speech recently, Joe Biden dared Republicans to give him one thing they were FOR. In this week's blog, I give him 10. Now that I have announced, the Left is seizing every opportunity to destroy me politically. Just recently, I found out my democrat opponents raised $12 MILLION to take me out and USA Today just listed this race as one of the top races to watch. Peter, I'm not kidding when I say this Senate race will determine whether or not we take back control of the Senate. _**[I'm kindly asking, would you consider providing financial support to my ongoing fight for freedom? The price of freedom is high, but I know with your help, we can counter the Left's lies and distortions.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a05c7a116e4e457b9d3aa7b1a2f72df6&_e=B1Qdodoi5L4cazu2P1z4t8moQRmZiDK8VaEA2L-hMt70swHKg34RgH5e9ufmjtHovnpCXI0OTrIKVgQDK3zfHLy9TJzwciAY-RbGk0oJkm07ieZLL8rv7-iPgNKWpp5UNbGRjE4Plu9TQTnS8jHtW0MR7TZbgHEiOu0kEyADL2QTnlcI_CD1D6MdNlZEXlxPYMaffFYVaHyufj6UrlZ4YC3FwP54QjO_lkFDD8krMhT3YFQLO_CQhBCp1UdAGFUvoL5EbNVjA22UXsZZOB_a5t1yKzhN4EZ6TIly-f4T7htiTKp_4vyv1w_6aN9sxxD2CQ_uZi7odqD-Sg1u5Oy-5kRo__mxsRn58e9KejcTvauobGkmnsAko7rCiN65Yrv36dBJ5LRnxKMDYdiZJUHOqIZ9X-bTdUyslHluqn7CAxEHzj5gC_CufPkJ2sKF3aXthQvspj1TN_MdS6iyXgMYj78_Eb2ks5RJOld3JEWFbJA%3D "I’m kindly asking, would you consider providing financial support to my ongoing fight for freedom? | Peter, It’s Ron Johnson.

I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate.

I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster.

This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to **SAVE AMERICA** from the Democrats.

##

## Idahoans, like the rest of America, have a clear choice to make about the direction of our state: Are we going to continue down the road to socialism or are we going to embrace American values?
##

Critical Race Theory and its socialist tentacles have infiltrated every institution of our society: school, the military, corporations, media outlets, the legal system, and every level of government. Ironically, CRT is being funded by you as you pay your taxes, support non-profit organizations, and do business with "woke" companies.
Seven out of eight of the Idaho State Board of Education members are appointed by the Governor. As Governor I intend to put an end to CRT in Idaho. I will only call board members who pledge to affirm the findings and recommendations of President Trump's 1776 Commission.

# Principles Above Politics
---
|
---
| |
We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets, growth in the size of government. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us.
It's time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It's time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept.

Patriot,

When I was in the White House, America had a President who put our Nation FIRST every single day. For the first time in a long time, power was taken from Washington and given BACK to the American People.

Unfortunately, Joe Biden and the rest of the Washington SWAMP are working overtime to undo everything my administration accomplished. _Mark my words, America will be put FIRST again, but only with the help of my most loyal supporters._

You've always been a trusted ally, Patriot, which is why I want to offer you something very exclusive.

This is the year we TAKE AMERICA BACK from the Left, so**I've decided to dedicate a wall at my office for a select group of donors** who choose to step up at this critical time.

I want to give you **PRIORITY ACCESS** to get your name permanently engraved on the**Official 2022 Trump Donor Wall**. Space is extremely limited. This could be your only chance.

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Everything great I’ve ever done is because of loyal Patriots like YOU
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee of Save America and Make America Great Again PAC
body:
Join the ranks | I could not wait a minute longer to send you this email. While millions of Americans are...
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59579941:JHbRY9ENG:m:1:3298722022:06312245152AF369AC98029DDF38F019:r)

Peter,

I could not wait a minute longer to send you this email.

While millions of Americans are realizing that Joe Biden and the radical Left have brought our nation to the brink of ruin, I am working day and night to SAVE OUR NATION.

Everything great I've ever done is because of loyal Patriots like YOU, which is why I am pleased to invite you to join my _**[Inner Friend Circle.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59579941:JHbRY9ENG:m:1:3298722022:06312245152AF369AC98029DDF38F019:r)**_

The select few in my Inner Friend Circle will be exposed to confidential information _\- information that I trust will not be shared with anyone else -_ and are the ones I will rely on to tell me the TRUTH.

I am only inviting a very small number of Patriots to join. Invitations do not come around often, Peter, so please do not take this lightly.

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Reject Biden's Open Borders
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee
body:
Biden's border crisis is out of control, and states like Florida are taking a stand against the Administration's reckless policy
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2bpr9ovhdtt7vllus54bn3ssiind1dfkgi86gto_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uljb3c5k65obco37m3irfc31ejhjap37m1p6aclgs1i6cd74s5jmepr361h6cs77q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfchlcoq69d9k6up78phlc2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or1clg69pb3c5gm49fg)

|
---
| | | Friend, this is Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis.

_**[I sued Biden over his brazen disregard for our immigration laws.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znq1tbd2a5bbb6sd0t1sn0ud3bl6nem2r3n16cl0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1ieaor1c5h2bs "I just sued Biden over his brazen disregard for our immigration laws.")**_

Biden's border crisis is out of control, and states like Florida are taking a stand against the Administration's reckless policy of open borders and mass illegal immigration.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8aesed77cmo52b5re813aodkflc5pd5gavjur3o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c1ieaor1c5h2bs)
---
While the Biden Administration restricts your rights, wastes your money, and forces draconian mandates on its citizens, illegal migrants are being given a free pass on all of the above. name: Mike Pompeo
subject: Keep this between the two of us...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3inym--fgxr-4qqlpo5&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|
| | | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3inym-1yq45-4qqlpo9/)
---

_I’m sure you get a lot of emails, but this is so critically important. _

I’m going to let you in on a secret. It’s something I’ve picked up while traveling across the country over the past year.

See, 2021 was the year where Democrats showed America their true colors. We saw that they are uninterested in addressing the issues that really matter to hard working Americans. Instead, they only want to focus on their far-Left agenda dictated by people like AOC, Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren.

**But, things are about to change in a BIG way.**

2022 is going to be the year of the RED WAVE. The American people have seen ENOUGH from the radical Left, and they are ready to kick the Democrats out of power.

Nowhere is that more important than in the U.S. Senate. The current Senate is divided between 50 Republicans and 50 Democrats. Kamala Harris is the tie breaking vote. **[If Republicans can flip just ONE seat in November, we can take control of the Senate and stop Joe Biden’s radical agenda in its tracks.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3inym-1yq46-4qqlpo0/ "Republicans can flip just ONE seat in November, we can take control of the Senate and stop Joe Biden’s radical agenda in its tracks. ")**

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3inym-1yq47-4qqlpo1/)
---

The momentum is on our side. The Red Wave is building, but we cannot take anything for granted.

**I’m a fighter, and I’m not going to stop fighting for what I believe in.** That’s what I learned at West Point and during my time serving in the Army. It’s exactly what I did as your Secretary of State. Now, I’m bringing that same fighting spirit to my mission to help Republicans retake control of the Senate.

**[That’s where you come in. I’m asking you to make a quick contribution to help Republicans retake the Senate. Can you chip in $25 right now to help us kick the Democrats out of power?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3inym-1yq48-4qqlpo2/ "That’s where you come in. I’m asking you to make a quick contribution to help Republicans retake the Senate. Can you chip in $25 right now to help us kick the Democrats out of power?")**

When I served as President Trump’s CIA Director and Secretary of State, we showed that conservatives can actually deliver results for the American people. Now, we just need to put America First conservatives back in power, and your contribution can help me do just that.

---
| | [CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3inym-1yq49-4qqlpo3/)
---

**[We cannot afford to come up short in this mission. I’m personally asking you to donate $25 right now to support our efforts to flip the Senate RED.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3inym-1yq4a-4qqlpo3/ "We cannot afford to come up short in this mission. I’m personally asking you to donate $25 right now to support our efforts to flip the Senate RED. ")**

With your help, we can change things in a BIG way and turn our country around.

Are you with me?

-Mike

---
| |
Help Champion American Values: Text **CHAMPION** to **29910**

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3inym-1yq4b-4qqlpo4/ "PompeoEmailFooter")
---

**A SPECIAL NOTE FROM MIKE POMPEO**

With the Freedom Fund, I am supporting candidates across America who will defend the freedoms and values that make America great. From Iowa to Texas to California, I’m supporting principled conservatives who we can count on to keep their promises and deliver results. But our efforts will only be successful if we have the financial resources necessary to counter the big bucks flowing into the Democrat campaigns.

**[If you love America and refuse to let the Democrats turn the American dream into a socialist nightmare, then I need YOU to step up right away with an emergency donation to our Freedom Fund.

](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3inym-1yq4c-4qqlpo5/ "If you love America and refuse to let the Democrats turn the American dream into a socialist nightmare, then I need YOU to step up right away with an emergency donation to our Freedom Fund.")**

body:
# **Stay Informed, Stay In the Fight**
**NEW** THIS IS YOUR COUNTRY, an explosive new podcast hosted by former Trump White House adviser Paige Willey, has just launched from Firebrand. **TUNE IN WEEKLY** Drawing on her experience in Washington, Paige delivers a deep dive into the dysfunction facing our country and outlines the way forward to restore our nation's promise. Americans deserve a champion. The country we love is slipping away.**LISTEN NOW! **[Apple Podcasts](https://americanfirebrand.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bjyikyk-ihhjkhtyud-r/) [Spotify ](https://americanfirebrand.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bjyikyk-ihhjkhtyud-y/) | **New Podcast **
# A Strange Time in America
**February 15th** Americans are suffering the consequences of failed leadership. Those in charge--blessed with the opportunity to take this nation to new heights of prosperity and achievement--have treated it so poorly. The interests of the American people go unrepresented in Washington at great detriment to our country and its future. [Watch Now](https://americanfirebrand.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bjyikyk-ihhjkhtyud-j/)
---

**New Podcast **
# MAGA is Not a Cult of Personality
**February 15th **Molly discusses the civil war in the Republican Party between uniparty Republicans and the MAGA movement, and she explains why we can support Trump for President in 2024 despite his sometimes poor endorsements. [Watch Now](https://americanfirebrand.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bjyikyk-ihhjkhtyud-t/)

subject: About Tony Evers' Speech Last Night
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
Peter, last night, Tony Evers delivered the annual State of the State speech in Madison. Let's make it his last.
Hi Peter,**Last night, Tony Evers delivered the annual State of the State speech in Madison. Let's make it his last. **Not ONCE did he address the rising violent crime occurring throughout our state. We need to elect a Governor who will make it a priority to keep our communities safe!The Democrats have repeatedly failed to address the increase in crime across the country. We must take action._**It is critical that we elect conservatives up and down the ballot at every level of government.** From the U.S. Senate and the House to the Governor and the Wisconsin State Legislature -- it is going to take all of us to ensure we elect Republicans across the board._ [Help Us Fight Back](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zdrdrut-idtjvlhlh-r/) **Wisconsin is going to be a top target for radical far-left groups who will pour millions into electing Democrats statewide. We can't stand idly by. We must fight back.** Thanks,Bryan
**--
Bryan Steil**
Congressman [Donate Now](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zdrdrut-idtjvlhlh-y/) [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zdrdrut-idtjvlhlh-j/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zdrdrut-idtjvlhlh-t/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zdrdrut-idtjvlhlh-i/) [ Forward ](https://steilforwisconsininc.forwardtomyfriend.com/j-idtjvlhlh-C89B6A88-zdrdrut-l-h) | PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC

name: American Action News
subject: A work of unsurpassed beauty
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrld0r1mngphsogb4dk3ts1iee0059vruea6svp8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chg66ob6chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf5djgsopb6sb5c1pm5db16gob2cbjmeoj2db4eloratjlccp31cr1m9h6dctkm3jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8qmcc5n6dhmfchjcoob1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
| | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqm6ol7mipncqu4q2637mir57b6srjuvgt7ea0c0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chg66ob6chh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3gahervc6mpu1nkfds0nuot31vrhi0msh4r4ng8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chg66ob6chh2bs)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv75pakotd8imeou3bpnbtolrl91qnbu4qifj930_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chg66ob6chh2bs)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

clean_body: While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons. King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others? Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King” examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel. | | This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link: By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum. | | | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying “The David Story.” Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College P.S. # Peter,

Being Pro-Life isn't enough... We need elected leaders who will stand up and FIGHT for the lives of the unborn against the radical socialists who rally behind abortion as a form of birth control. Hundreds of Oklahomans flooded the streets of Oklahoma City last week in protest of this unethical, disgusting practice, to give voice to the millions of unborn babies who are murdered in the United States each year. [Abortion is murder, Peter. Click here to support my campaign and fight for a nationwide ban on abortion >>>](https://em.dahmforsenate.com/e3t/Btc/W3+113/d2rzSS04/VWSBmH488KNfN7QJ-_-2gv5LW8Ny6Rt4FFLFpN2jjSx13lLBmV1-WJV7CgFMZW5Ymj857xH5W3W80txXX3NrNbvW2HDfQG1tZK_6W3b7RQ923nz4dN5_NxZ_BgqXWN2C-_9RqmLbNW6k9pDR5xsw9jW5Wr2Z41wJrjYN4gRx8rvpgZrW3rccxk47RMc8W7BRnSh5t19M-N3LQRV0Fh00pF8zz0VvqY-WW8S6TC259JHbdW2fdDt-3jBzMfW36v8Xw8mGvBXW2lBLfQ8Yyp6BW5mBmkl75d58CW8tv9M-67mtKKW1CcWf_2bKKp2W6J2xYM4sxZV5W6Dk_4x5r5Wcs34bN1)

I proudly stand with everyone who came out to support abolishing abortion... Last month I filed three bills in the Oklahoma Senate designed to protect the lives of the unborn and defund Planned Parenthood: SB 612 \- Creates a new law prohibiting abortions in Oklahoma unless required to save the life of a pregnant woman in a medical emergency SB 723 \- Classifies violations of the Heartbeat Informed Consent Act as unprofessional conduct for doctors and prohibits any physician from obtaining or renewing their license to practice medicine in Oklahoma if they violate the Act SB 584 \- Prohibits the use of state funds or funds of a political subdivision to be made available to Planned Parenthood Federation of America We need fewer RINOs in Washington who talk the talk, and more proven conservative fighters who will walk the walk... My record speaks for itself. When elected to the US Senate, I will continue to fight for the lives of the unborn...and, together, we will overturn _Roe v. Wade_. [Can we count on your support? ](https://em.dahmforsenate.com/e3t/Btc/W3+113/d2rzSS04/VWSBmH488KNfN7QJ-_-2gv5LW8Ny6Rt4FFLFpN2jjSx13lLBmV1-WJV7CgMmKW75BX5n2w4Q32VQPvbW3l3z4lW7B5_6Q6N--ZRN5bDQjt344x_W2GYjZs5-9Vj9W6nsbQz16qVYWW3KshRX5st-vmW7g5lH92M86PqVVKTk01ftXkdW5BPJk_2ZXxhPMY76b6GwTV2W12W6k37yW2H4W9jJjBJ76CBjFW3xCpjL92Rj_KW3Wtz548qnkqlW1HCrr85GpnhVVmm7Vj35gtzcVVcTbC78G_qJW34Bbq_58B6QxW3Nhj183G_CdvW36cZPz6Q3s0GW5Czh4h3wWCC-3cdJ1)

name: Andy Beshear
subject: There is no Kentucky history without Black history
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Peter,

February is Black History Month – a time to recognize and celebrate the profound contributions Black Americans have made to our country.

There is no Kentucky history without Black history. For centuries, Black Kentuckians have helped pave the way and shaped not only our Commonwealth's history, but American history.

Charles Young was born into slavery in Mays Lick and went on to become a pioneer soldier who was the highest-ranking Black officer in the military when he was medically discharged. Mary E. Britton grew up in Lexington during the Civil War and was a teacher, activist, and first Black female doctor in Kentucky. Moneta Sleet Jr. made history as the first Black man to win the Pulitzer in photography. And Muhammad Ali broke barriers to become the greatest boxer of all time.

While we honor and celebrate the achievements of Black Americans this month, we also commit to working toward a more just and equitable Commonwealth.

As governor, I'm working to address racial inequity in COVID-19 vaccine administration, increase access to health insurance, implement changes to our education system that would help prioritize Black students, and more.

I hope you'll join me this month in honoring the remarkable Black Americans who have made the Bluegrass State what it is today and commit to the fight for a more just and equitable world where every person is treated with dignity and respect.

Thank you,

Andy

PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
Andy Beshear for Governor
PO Box 4278
Louisville, KY 40204
United States
If you no longer wish to receive emails from us, you can unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/85da9a72-428f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/671d0647-0290-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzFkMDY0Ny0wMjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jV0a7_9xPkf0X8cneVpDhIuL_z1T1vvlZ52WbzgMjNg=&id=102280162 .

name: Rebecca Parson
subject: Request from National Nurses United
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rebecca for Washington
body:
| | | Hi there, Below is a request from National Nurses United. Please sign the petition and show my opponent Derek Kilmer that we want him to stop taking big pharma, hospital, and health insurance money! Thank you, -Rebecca ParsonCandidate for Congress, WA-06 ***** **Rep. Kilmer Must Stop Taking Big Pharma, Hospital, and Health Insurance Money**
**PLEASE CLICK HERE TO SIGN THE PETITION:** [https://act.medicare4all.org/signup/pop-kilmer/](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41905014/330821354/1893428263?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDFkMDY0Ny0wMjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a1nCZtMqnJ4DxStcP-llSfbTaBIUqUenkVyiTuK8its=&emci=d8d85603-948f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=7d1d0647-0290-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=8222569) Please join us by signing the online petition to pressure Rep. Derek Kilmer (WA-6) to take the pledge to put:
**PATIENTS OVER PROFITS ! ** We're over a quarter of the way to our goal of 1,000 signatures! Add your name to help put us over the top! In March, Rep. Pramila Jayapal reintroduced the **Medicare for All Act of 2021** in the House of Representatives. This bill, HR 1976, will guarantee universal, comprehensive health care to everyone! Rep. Kilmer does NOT support **Medicare for All**. Rep. Kilmer is one of the top recipients of campaign contributions from health insurance, pharmaceutical, and hospital corporations. We're asking him to pledge to reject donations from the healthcare industry. [https://patientsoverprofits.org./](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41905018/330821357/-2110892946?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDFkMDY0Ny0wMjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a1nCZtMqnJ4DxStcP-llSfbTaBIUqUenkVyiTuK8its=&emci=d8d85603-948f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=7d1d0647-0290-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=8222569) **Our goal is 1,000 signatures!**
Once we reach our goal, we'll organize a press event and everyone who signed the petition will be invited to participate when we deliver it to Rep. Kilmer's office (taking into account public health considerations at that time). name: Natalie Monteiro
subject: Friend, how’re you doing?
body:
| |
Friend, **As we head into the 2022 midterms together, I wanted to check in with our community to see how you’re doing and let you know what NextGen Pennsylvania has coming up.****** At NextGen, our work would be impossible without the continued efforts and support of our volunteers, such as yourself, at local levels across the country. And as you continue to mobilize and organize your communities, we want to make this clear: **Our priority is making sure our volunteers feel supported, heard, and empowered.** That’s why I’m checking in today to make sure you’re prioritizing your mental and physical health. When there’s so much happening in our country, and the world, it can feel overwhelming. **We want to make sure that the work we’re doing together to achieve real change is accessible for our volunteers’ daily lives.** As this year continues and we keep up our impact in Pennsylvania, make sure to check in on yourself. This work can be hard,**but we’re here to support you and make our efforts as sustainable as possible.**
Speaking of our work, we’ve got some great events coming up for our community — and I’d love to see you there! Next Tuesday, February 22, from 6:30–7:30 p.m. ET, **we’ll be holding a NextGen PA Friendbank, where we use our personal phones to text our friends and family and get them ready for midterms.** **[Act now: Sign up to join us at our Friendbank to help mobilize your friends and family!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41905041/330821378/-1399216145?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDFkMDY0Ny0wMjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eX2Wn3KPR1-UDp-GCKB7j2ZGxaEltQQnb_12r0Z1bfw=&emci=a46ad213-7c8f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=641d0647-0290-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=6787172)** We are so grateful for your continued support, efforts, and talents that are helping build a Pennsylvania that represents and reflects all of us. **Sign up now for our NextGen PA Friendbank to make sure your friends are in the know about the upcoming elections and our future events.** | [Sign up ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41905046/330821384/1094396375?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDFkMDY0Ny0wMjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eX2Wn3KPR1-UDp-GCKB7j2ZGxaEltQQnb_12r0Z1bfw=&emci=a46ad213-7c8f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=641d0647-0290-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=6787172 "CTA Button")

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Please, take a minute to read this message about our path forward.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=VkbkGjQgNMMCAiZD82iX1kR1%2B7SsMCWi&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
In just a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a Founding Election Year Donor to my must-win Senate race - but first, I want to tell you about the stakes in this midterm election and why your support today is so crucial.
As you may know, the Senate is divided by a 50-50 margin, which means Democrats don't even have a real majority. This Senate split is the reason that we haven't been able to make progress on more of President Biden's full agenda yet - **and the only path toward progress is defending and _expanding_ our Senate majority.**
Of course, National Republicans are ready to spend millions to take back Senate control for Mitch McConnell - and they've placed a target on my seat, Friend. In the past week, two new aggressive and resourced GOP challengers have come out of the woodwork to run against me and flip our state back to McConnell's win column.
**I don 't want to worry you, Friend, but I need you to know that I can only win this race if I have an incredibly strong grassroots movement behind me. That's why I've set a goal to secure 1,000 Founding Election Year Donors before tomorrow's critical fundraising deadline. [Can I count on you to contribute $5 or more now to become a Founding Election Year Donor and protect this Senate seat from extremist Republicans?](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1134-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
[ ](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1134-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
We have seen what the extremist Republican Party is capable of, Friend. Just last week, the Republican National Committee called the Jan. 6 attack on the U.S. Capitol **" legitimate political discourse."**
**This November, these same extremists are going to spend millions to regain Senate control.** If they flip the Senate, they will try to block the president's entire agenda, further strengthen their domination over the courts, and damage our democracy beyond repair. This is only about consolidating power for them.
My life's work has been about serving - serving the people of Connecticut and serving our nation. Serving you. America is an idea and an ideal. It must be protected and championed. I will always fight _for_ it, and _never_ stop defending it.
**That 's why I urgently need your support today, Friend. As the Republican Party tries to defeat me, it's up to this grassroots movement to defend our democracy from Mitch McConnell and the return of Trumpism. We must meet the urgency of this moment, and I need all hands on deck. **
[Please, Friend, can you donate $5 or more to become a Founding Election Year Donor? I can't fight back against Republican attacks or keep our Democratic Senate control without your help. ](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1134-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
Thank you for stepping up during critical moments like this one.
- Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=X8uK2nCZuQk3BFG6xtwMsER1%2B7SsMCWi&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: V. Demings
subject: I want to share some great news with you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
The Senate majority is on the line
| |
---
Friend, I'm thrilled to share some great news:

Even with far-right outside groups dumping millions into Florida and GOP leaders like the chair of the RNC attacking me _personally_ , **the polls show me neck and neck with Marco Rubio.**
**But here's the problem:** This is shaping up to be the most expensive Senate race in history, and national Republicans are about to start their first attack ad blitz against me. Floridians will be hammered with lies when they turn on their TVs – and I know this barrage is just the beginning of what's in store.
What happens in Florida will decide Senate control, so Republicans and their dark money allies will do everything they possibly can to defeat me. **And right now, my fundraising numbers are stalling at the worst possible moment. ****As of 1:30 p.m., I'm still $7,000 short of tonight's midnight grassroots goal. **

**I'm getting worried that I won't have enough resources to counter the GOP's lies without an urgent groundswell of grassroots support. **
[**So with the Senate majority on the line, I have to ask again before my critical midnight deadline: Will you rush $5 or more right now to help me defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and expand our Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41906426/330826979/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2426-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2YxNjNmNC0wMjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QDRDrXtC7VfVYvFSV-5BzrKilzr-tJu6TZ2ylpYKN9I=)

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: This is treason...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz
body:
Dear Peter,

**They spied on President Trump!**

Hillary Clinton, the Democrats, and the Deep State operatives in the government all conspired to spy on a sitting U.S. President.

That's called **_TREASON!_**

And when Republicans take back control of the U.S. House this November, I will do everything in my power to make sure the guilty parties pay. [_**HELP ME MAKE THEM PAY
CHIP IN $17.76 TODAY!**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59663091:WaLMvPHDN:m:1:2365227053:73BC9680E9B0D526F35369D308825E97:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59663091:WaLMvPHDN:m:1:2365227053:73BC9680E9B0D526F35369D308825E97:r) **No wonder the radical left is trying to expel me from Congress!**

That's right. Left-wing organizations are moving to have me expelled using January 6 as a reason.

Because they don't want us to find out the truth behind January 6 and what really happened that day.

But they aren't content with just trying to have me expelled.

_They 've also filed lawsuits, claiming that I should be removed from office because I am_:
---
• Speaking up about election fraud.• Speaking out that the January 6 rally was NOT an insurrection.• Speaking for the constitutional rights of the political prisoners being held in horrible conditions by a corrupt court system.
_You see, I don 't just talk the talk. That's what RINOs do_.

I understand that the role of Congress is to support and defend the Constitution of the United States.

**And that does NOT mean spying on the President of the nation! In the White House!**

Maybe rather than worry about some blue-collar worker who trespassed at the Capitol on January 6, the Biden DOJ should be investigating Hillary Clinton and all those who spied on Donald Trump.

When Republicans take back the House, I will make it my mission to hold Hillary and anyone who committed treason responsible and makes them pay for their crimes.

**_But to do that, I must make sure I am still in Congress._**

**[I hope you will join me in this all-important fight with a contribution right away of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 $1,000, or even $2,900](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59663091:WaLMvPHDN:m:1:2365227053:73BC9680E9B0D526F35369D308825E97:r).** [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59663091:WaLMvPHDN:m:1:2365227053:73BC9680E9B0D526F35369D308825E97:r) **Because I 'm not just facing reelection, I'm facing expulsion.**

And I've got to have the resources necessary to fight back.

Even though the Democrats only have a small majority, I can't count on the RINOs like Liz Cheney to vote against expelling me.

So, I know I am in for a real fight.

_As always, I 'm fighting the radical left, the media, Big Tech, and RINOs and neocons in my own party_.

That's why I must have your help right away.

**[So please, make that contribution to my campaign at once.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59663091:WaLMvPHDN:m:1:2365227053:73BC9680E9B0D526F35369D308825E97:r).**

Together we can stop the forces that want to silence and remove me and stop the investigations into what really happened on January 6.

[_**HELP ME MAKE THEM PAY

clean_body: Dear Peter, They spied on President Trump! Hillary Clinton, the Democrats, and the Deep State operatives in the government all conspired to spy on a sitting U.S. President. That's called TREASON! And when Republicans take back control of the U.S. House this November, I will do everything in my power to make sure the guilty parties pay. No wonder the radical left is trying to expel me from Congress! That's right. Left-wing organizations are moving to have me expelled using January 6 as a reason. Because they don't want us to find out the truth behind January 6 and what really happened that day. But they aren't content with just trying to have me expelled. They 've also filed lawsuits, claiming that I should be removed from office because I am: • Speaking up about election fraud.• Speaking out that the January 6 rally was NOT an insurrection.• Speaking for the constitutional rights of the political prisoners being held in horrible conditions by a corrupt court system. You see, I don 't just talk the talk. That's what RINOs do. I understand that the role of Congress is to support and defend the Constitution of the United States. And that does NOT mean spying on the President of the nation! In the White House! Maybe rather than worry about some blue-collar worker who trespassed at the Capitol on January 6, the Biden DOJ should be investigating Hillary Clinton and all those who spied on Donald Trump. When Republicans take back the House, I will make it my mission to hold Hillary and anyone who committed treason responsible and makes them pay for their crimes. But to do that, I must make sure I am still in Congress. . Because I 'm not just facing reelection, I'm facing expulsion. And I've got to have the resources necessary to fight back. Even though the Democrats only have a small majority, I can't count on the RINOs like Liz Cheney to vote against expelling me. So, I know I am in for a real fight. As always, I 'm fighting the radical left, the media, Big Tech, and RINOs and neocons in my own party. That's why I must have your help right away. . Together we can stop the forces that want to silence and remove me and stop the investigations into what really happened on January 6. body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41908047/330834058/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI4MTlmZjk4LTA3OTAtZWMxMS1hNTA3LTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=xCYFuPBmZD8sRd6Q1_wGJ1h6RluafeNBM8BcSawN6aw=&emci=e85848e4-3f8f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=b819ff98-0790-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=16335001) Two years ago at a campaign rally in Nevada, Donald Trump launched into a senseless rant about Americans facing the daunting issue of having to flush their toilets over 15 times.

**Now it makes sense, team.**

The reason that Donald was having issues with his toilets not flushing is because he had a nasty habit of shoving official documents down the drain and clogging White House toilets. We feel terrible for the White House plumbers who had to deal with these disgusting tantrums through the four years of the administration, **but we feel even worse for our democracy.**

**Now we know that from 2016 to 2020, tens, potentially hundreds of government documents were lost to the swirl of a toilet bowl.** This is unacceptable, and thankfully, we now have a president in power who will defend our institutions, transparency, and our toilets.

But with the Treason Caucus still in power, there's no guarantee that we won't get another toilet flushing traitor in the White House and that future criminals will be held accountable.

**[Will you rush a donation of $1 or even $5 to help us meet our mid-month goal of $10,000 and unseat the Treason Caucus in November? clean_body: Two years ago at a campaign rally in Nevada, Donald Trump launched into a senseless rant about Americans facing the daunting issue of having to flush their toilets over 15 times. Now it makes sense, team. The reason that Donald was having issues with his toilets not flushing is because he had a nasty habit of shoving official documents down the drain and clogging White House toilets. We feel terrible for the White House plumbers who had to deal with these disgusting tantrums through the four years of the administration, but we feel even worse for our democracy. Now we know that from 2016 to 2020, tens, potentially hundreds of government documents were lost to the swirl of a toilet bowl. This is unacceptable, and thankfully, we now have a president in power who will defend our institutions, transparency, and our toilets. But with the Treason Caucus still in power, there's no guarantee that we won't get another toilet flushing traitor in the White House and that future criminals will be held accountable. = Thank you, Team Never Again Marjorie Taylor Greene, Paul Gosar, Lauren Boebert, Madison Cawthorn, Louie Gohmert, Mo Brooks, Andy Biggs. Those are just a few of the Republicans in Congress that Never Again PAC is working to defend our democracy from. Help us hold them accountable by chipping in $5 or more today. | = Thank you for supporting Never Again PAC as we continue our fight against American fascism and corruption. We are building a war chest to vote out the nation's most dangerous elected officials and hold them accountable for their acts of treason. = Never Again PAC will hold these most dangerous and radical elected officials accountable by building a war chest to support ongoing rapid response efforts in 2022 and beyond. Through advertising, grassroots & digital organizing in targeted members’ districts, at a time in the cycle when other political organizations have historically not spent resources, will ensure our resources will in fact go further, our message will be heard more clearly, and our targets will feel the pressure immediately. = For generations people have risked everything seeking refuge on American shores to escape the very same sorts of political violence that took place at the U.S. Capitol on January 6th –– and every generation has an opportunity to make investments to protect this democracy –– it is time to do our part. = PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC Never Again PAC PO Box 2153 Purcellville, VA 20134 United States

It’s official, Peter.

**Yesterday, at the New York State Democratic Convention, I was honored to receive an official nomination for attorney general.**

I have spent every moment of my time as your attorney general fighting to defend the rights of the voiceless and vulnerable – even against some of the most powerful forces in the nation. I’ve taken fights to Big Pharma for their role in the opioid crisis, held corrupt politicians accountable, and protected Americans' right to choose – **because I refuse to be bought or intimidated.**

It would be the honor of my career to serve as New York’s attorney general for another four years, but I can’t do this alone. **That’s why we set a goal to receive at least 1,000 donations before midnight tonight. **

**[With Election Day mere months away, it’s absolutely critical that we hit every fundraising goal between now and then. Can I count on you to chip in $25 right now to help us meet our 1,000 donations goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41908077/330834308/-39856258?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk352-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTk3YjZkYy0wNzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=juX4bB2hNbOT8ZjoJ3SKTtlucCgpCWThv8U94BI0Bew=)**

Together we made history in 2018 when I became the first Black woman to be elected to hold statewide office. **And now, we have the opportunity to make history again by getting me re-elected.**

But, Peter, I didn’t run for attorney general to make history – I ran because I knew that I had the grit and determination needed to make a positive difference for New York. And I’m running for re-election because I’m not done fighting for the vulnerable and voiceless.

It’s why I decided to run for Congress in 2020, and it’s why I’m still focused on the fight to move our state forward. **This year, we have a real opportunity to defeat one of the self-serving Republican Autocrats holding Missouri back: Ann Wagner.** Voters are fed up with out of touch officeholders, and they’re looking for someone who will prioritize them and their neighbor’s needs over their own political career. **That's why I'm proud to endorse my friend, Trish Gunby, in her campaign to defeat Ann Wagner. ** As I traveled the campaign trail during my race, Rep. clean_body: Peter, You know that I don’t pull any punches when it comes to fighting for what’s right. It’s why I decided to run for Congress in 2020, and it’s why I’m still focused on the fight to move our state forward. This year, we have a real opportunity to defeat one of the self-serving Republican Autocrats holding Missouri back: Ann Wagner. Voters are fed up with out of touch officeholders, and they’re looking for someone who will prioritize them and their neighbor’s needs over their own political career. That's why I'm proud to endorse my friend, Trish Gunby, in her campaign to defeat Ann Wagner. As I traveled the campaign trail during my race, Rep. Gunby and I met time and again in town halls and Zoom rooms. We spoke about what it would take for this state and its people to thrive: crucial work like protecting labor unions, strengthening our education system, and safeguarding abortion rights. From those conversations, it was clear that Trish is wholly devoted to true public service: the kind that doesn’t always garner headlines, but gets things done. = This is exactly how we create a better future for our state. We bring back a standard of humble, results-driven leadership that prioritizes the people. And we do it by showing up, day in and day out, for everyone.So, meet Trish — I promise you will not be disappointed. Trish has what it takes to win back this district for everyone who has been left behind. Onward, Lindsey Simmons = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = Trish Gunby for Congress PO Box 430114 Saint Louis, MO 63143 United States Paid for by Trish Gunby for Congress

## We ask for $5 often, but do you know why?
Because it was thousands of $5 donations that helped Republicans win in Virginia. $5 donations gave us the win in the Ohio, Texas, and Louisiana Congressional Races.
# **Your $5 is POWERFUL!**
**Let's show the nation that Illinois can win too!** To some, it may be breakfast or a cup of coffee, but to us, it’s what fuels this campaign and the campaigns of many others who are fighting for us across America. If we plan to take the House and Senate majorities this year, then we are going to need as many people as possible chipping in $5 whenever they can. Which is why we have to ask:
## Would you be willing to chip in $5 or $10, one time or monthly, in order to Keep America First?

subject: re: Our EXTENDED offer
body:
Did you miss my last email? Our mid-month deadline has been extended until TONIGHT at 11:59 PM.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6c8reo3p0fpda8a36kh0190r3ogqagl9k3n4p80_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chi6cor2cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sbicaor8d3gm2o72oplmlgn1ohkmhrmccpnchgj8dr66uq76o3kepj70ptm6ooefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3ap5lm3g7cor664ob6p9nm2qmash5u)
Fellow Conservative, _Did you miss my last email?_

_**Our mid-month deadline has been extended until TONIGHT at 11:59 PM.**_

When we didn’t meet our goal, I was _extremely_ worried.

**The Democrats are breaking fundraising records _every single month._**

We need to meet _every single goal_ if we’re going to keep up. _**Failure is not an option.**_

**There are just HOURS TO GO until our new, EXTENDED, deadline, and if we give up this opportunity, we might as well give up control of the Senate in November.**

**[Pitch in before 11:59 PM TONIGHT so we can meet our EXTENDED mid-month deadline and TAKE BACK THE SENATE from the liberal Democrats.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq640p73liq873tu34l17dsok14cinrudf2s4vk0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chi6cor2cth2bs)**

[**PITCH IN $10**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp430o0h180hv8alqbadgqe06nrmcm2bpnop87c0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chi6cor2cth2bs) [**PITCH IN $25**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zac4rhup75ir5k335cavv7711hsvulov77moajg8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chi6cor2cth2bs) [**PITCH IN $50**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjcmva4arl73udhja3dq4mgh0vn1s4r1bf67hb5o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chi6cor2cth2bs) [**PITCH IN $100**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0pna9919bqdea73m2uksr2u1qok5gh5glh7rfa0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chi6cor2cth2bs) [**PITCH IN $250**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoa0kdhhrualqo23n0iulvbpt8r72h29dnj2upao_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chi6cor2cth2bs) [**PITCH IN OTHER AMOUNT**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zddq4kp314vv94f1s4hbvv5qnmklifgf8rv1cg20_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chi6cor2cth2bs) Thank you,

Rick Scott Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Taking back the U.S. Senate is no small task. 5 Republicans are retiring, and we must win all those races and one more. Thank you for your ongoing support of me and Senate Republicans.

body:
So Far I've Signed 55,000+ COVID19 Religious Exemption Forms... And They Are Working! On September 9, 2021, former Vice President Joe Biden declared
