---
## So Far I've Signed 55,000+ COVID19 Religious Exemption Forms... And They Are Working!
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4024523.3469.1.60b92f0e2626c7f5188189a1891dc4f9) Great report from an individual who received a signed COVID19 Religious Exemption form from Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
On September 9, 2021, former Vice President Joe Biden declared **WAR** on the Freedoms we have as Americans.
He issued a "mandate" requiring companies with more than 100 employees to force the COVID19 Vaccine upon their employees.
The night Biden issued the "mandate" was the same night I held a [**#LahmeyerForSenate**](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4024523.3470.1.01d75ef595e79792cc2d963a183296a1) rally in Tulsa, OK with **Senator Wendy Rogers**.
At that rally I promised to fight back, and I did. Click here watch that [promise](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4024523.3471.1.a8b7d0d03532d74474b4f05c5b510d34).
The following day, I launched the **NO VACCINE MANDATE** [petition](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4024523.3472.1.c5e21dc1359b425f35ce7cd057d1cce1) that over 100,000 people have signed at [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/nomandate](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4024523.3473.1.67e19958c1fdbb6edc65028adb32f50c)
I also included a [COVID19 Religious Exemption Form](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4024523.3474.1.ecad14ac966b228ca80a6e2e99efc3d5) that is totally FREE to download.
Since September 10, 2021, I have signed OVER 55,000 of those exemptions as the Pastor of [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4024523.3475.1.91ec0b230c09dc6599e79bd02f2c8563) in Tulsa, OK and thousands of people have been able to keep their jobs without getting the jab.
Promise Made, Promise Kept!
When I arrive in DC here are **three promises** of what I will do on day one:
**1.** Sponsor legislation to cut off all federal funding to any school district in America that teaches **Critical Race Theory**.
**2.** Sponsor legislation to **ban Chinese Nationalists from purchasing American farmland**. Currently, Chinese Nationalists have purchased over 300,000 acres of Oklahoma farmland. We cannot allow this.
**3.** Continue to go after the greatest mass-murderer of our generation, **Anthony Fauci**. I believe that Fauci needs to be FIRED, ARRESTED and CONVICTED of crimes against humanity.
I need your help in this fight:
Share the [NO VACCINE MANDATE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4024523.3476.1.881f2dc1b4cd808a9041d83e42663396) petition link w/5 people right now and inform them they can download the COVID19 Religious Form to fight back!
Text them this link to sign the petition and download the exemption: [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/nomandate](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4024523.3477.1.a08f8b4edac28104d57b50de4c017936)
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4024523.3478.1.1c15c7b8ea4746757fdfdeaf352db6c3), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4024523.3479.1.13a7edc0b1c064903bc26902bb99ad8c), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4024523.3480.1.ddbc2978422ab1e34264ee1b7d17a87c), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4024523.3481.1.c52158f7a24782237a6734abfe96a157), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4024523.3482.1.8cc077740d0b77e7065272692ecd7541)).

Did you miss Marco Rubio’s email on Wednesday?

He and I are trying to make one thing very clear to you: **Chuck Schumer’s cronies are working day and night to defeat state legislators in battleground races across the country. **

_If they succeed, EVERYTHING is at risk._

Democrats are trying to completely eliminate President Trump’s conservative state majorities, and I’m nervous to say this, but it may be working.
**State Republicans just FELL SHORT of the major goal yesterday. This was about to set them back months, but I’ve come up with a 2 step plan for them to reach their goal.**
1.) **The deadline is now extended for 24 hours.**
2.) **The prior 3X MATCH is now increased to a 5X MATCH.**
**This plan will ONLY work, though, if every patriot reading this chips in $25 right now.** If everyone follows along with this plan, State Republicans and Trump Allies will just BARELY reach their goal!

**[So, can I count on you?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ipy0-1ys8p-4qqlpo5/ "So, can I count on you?")**

---

Democrats are currently launching vicious attacks against State Republicans in CRITICAL battleground states across the country, Fellow Conservative, and if they don’t have the funds to fight back, they won’t stand a chance in November.

If every single grassroots supporter steps up right now, then Democrats lose.

---

---

Please, step up today, Fellow Conservative. The only thing standing between total defeat for President Trump’s State Allies and victory in November is YOU!

Thank you,
U.S. Senator Marsha Blackburn

Hi friend,

Elect candidates who do too!

Peter, When we go to the ballot box, we cast our votes based on the policies we believe our leaders are going to make. President Biden promised to help cancel at least $10,000 in student debt per borrower.

Barrier To Entry PAC’s videographer and partner in crime, Sean, went viral on Twitter for his tweet about his personal struggle with student debt:
[](hhttps://secure.actblue.com/donate/bte-mnc-email?refcode=220217_FR_cancelstudentdebt
_IMG) **Agreed Sean...How TF is this legal?! How could we not be outraged?!**

Now, Democrats in Washington are twiddling their thumbs and prolonging the relief thousands of Americans need.

People are suffering. Our economy is creating a bleak future for young Americans and Americans in debt from the pandemic. Especially communities of colors.

Senator Elizabeth Warren is calling on President Biden to cancel $50,000 per borrower which would “jump-start our economy and begin to narrow the racial wealth gap.”

**This would give 36 million Americans __complete__ debt relief.**

Now, more than ever, we need leaders who will support cancellation of student loan debt and fight for our administration to make this a reality. Too many Americans are drowning in debt and the suffering must stop.

Barrier To Entry PAC supports candidates and community leaders who feel the same way. We are backing up these candidates to make sure their campaigns win and they can ensure student debt is canceled. ******[If you could, donate today to help us elect leaders like Jessica Mason who will fight for us and make this important issue a priority.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41911077/330850126/-2038882143?refcode=220217_FR_cancelstudentdebt_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEwMDA4MWU5LTExOTAtZWMxMS1hNTA3LTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2zNo9DcSPbynnEaSUj8RFrtN_aXKeeugNgLhQNTV7jg=)****** ****_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_**** | | ************[**$10 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41911078/330850131/1300596418?refcode=220217_FR_cancelstudentdebt

clean_body: Elect candidates who do too! | | | logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEwMDA4MWU5LTExOTAtZWMxMS1hNTA3LTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2zNo9DcSPbynnEaSUj8RFrtNaXKeeugNgLhQNTV7jg= Peter, When we go to the ballot box, we cast our votes based on the policies we believe our leaders are going to make. President Biden promised to help cancel at least $10,000 in student debt per borrower. Barrier To Entry PAC’s videographer and partner in crime, Sean, went viral on Twitter for his tweet about his personal struggle with student debt: h IMG Agreed Sean...How TF is this legal?! How could we not be outraged?! Now, Democrats in Washington are twiddling their thumbs and prolonging the relief thousands of Americans need. People are suffering. Our economy is creating a bleak future for young Americans and Americans in debt from the pandemic. Especially communities of colors. Senator Elizabeth Warren is calling on President Biden to cancel $50,000 per borrower which would “jump-start our economy and begin to narrow the racial wealth gap.” This would give 36 million Americans complete debt relief. Now, more than ever, we need leaders who will support cancellation of student loan debt and fight for our administration to make this a reality. Too many Americans are drowning in debt and the suffering must stop. Barrier To Entry PAC supports candidates and community leaders who feel the same way. name: Mark Kelly
subject: Humbly asking for your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
This is going to be one of the closest Senate races of the year.
#
Good morning, Peter, Mark Kelly here.
I’m writing to you today to humbly ask if you can make a contribution to ensure we reach our February deadline. This is a big one, and we can’t come up short.
If you understand the stakes of this election and are ready to chip in today, you can use this link:
**[Please contribute $5 to my re-election campaign and Senator Durbin by clicking here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41911652/330852744/-667471242?refcode=dd_em_220217_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzQ2Y2IwNy0xMzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jsZPy6GXF73FhBAg4SvxsGnpN5_hfIH6enIlZlEWjqM=)**

name: Terry Shilling
subject: Trans radicals are coming for your kids!
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
| Fellow Patriot,I know your time is valuable, so I'll get straight to the point.Woke progressive educators, including radical trans activists, are continuing to accelerate their efforts to use schools to sexualize and indoctrinate our kids!Making matters worse, they're trying to hide their extremist plans from you. These disgusting creeps don't think that your children belong to you...**...they believe your kids belong to THEM!**[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.) I'm writing to you today because I know you agree that this leftwing madness MUST END immediately.That's why [I'm urging you to make your voice heard today by standing with American Principles Project](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-VgGp9SBQ) in the fight to protect our kids!**[Can I count on you to make a generous gift of $25, $50, $100 or more right now to support our crucial work ahead of the 2022 midterm elections?](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)** My name is Terry Schilling, and I'm the President of American Principles Project.My wife Katie and I are the proud parents of five amazing kids - and I'm excited to share that our sixth is on the way!Nothing, and I mean NOTHING, is more important to me than my kids, my wife, and my personal relationship with God.So, when it comes to fighting the Left's anti-family extremism: **I AM ALL IN!** I know you are too, so you'll be excited to hear that as the ONLY pro-family organization in America engaging directly in campaigns and elections...**...American Principles Project continues to rack up MAJOR victory after MAJOR victory in states across our great nation!** Just last year in Virginia, with the support of our 300,000-plus members and activists, APP played a key role in helping to:[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
* **Defeat** the radical, far-Left COVID tyrants at the ballot box, AND

* **Turn** Virginia RED for the first time in more than a decade!

And as I write, our team is preparing a **2022 National Battle Plan** to massively expand our winning model to critical swing Senate and House races across the country ahead of the November midterm elections._But American Principles Project is a nonprofit, so our team WILL NOT succeed without amazing patriots like you generously supporting our work._**[That's why I hope I can count on you to stand with me and my team now by making your best donation of $25, $50, $100 or more right away!](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._-CsJShvX7AHcNLxp2x0A)** The sad truth is...pro-family forces have been missing-in-action in this battle.The result has been disastrous as woke progressives have grown more and more comfortable attacking the family and our conservative values.And it's why radical trans activists and far-Left extremists continue to make it harder for good and decent parents like me and you to raise our kids!**_Did you know that American parents are losing custody of their children, with growing frequency, for refusing to cave to Leftist demands to mutilate their genitals and allow them to sexually transition to the opposite gender?_****This is even happening in conservative states like Texas!** Call me crazy, but I believe that children can't consent to sex, which means...**...kids also CANNOT consent to sex changes!** It really is that simple.And if you agree with this commonsense, conservative belief, I urge you to stand with American Principles Project today and [help us fight this leftwing lunacy](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._os5lcgEKkbLPrHWi_PsQ).**[Can I count on you to support APP's work to expand our 2022 National Battle Plan project to swing Senate and House races across the country ahead of November's midterms with a generous donation today?](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-09BzXhAhQFmVidA)**| | | | [Donate $25](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
| | | [Donate $50](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._9l7TMpsRDoA)
---
| | | [Donate $100](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._DA)
---
Thank you in advance for supporting American Principles Project!
Fighting to protect our kids,
Terry Schilling
American Principles Project
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)

| | | | [Donate Today!](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-tJeWzg)
---

P.O. Box 523692, Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMDQ4LTFmMGQ1YmYxMjUxYTRlNDlhM2QwOTViM2IzM2Y0MWZiIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/q3am37MKenIOW24XERfUQQ) to unsubscribe.

body:

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41912918/330857990/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220217-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220217-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220217&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=15&refcode2=a1f8af22-1590-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWY4YWYyMi0xNTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qOl5NRD_Zlbw2YQlVLejaWHJoiWWlrKLxhBfDtW2xAE=)

| Peter, **I am so excited to share with you that this morning, Michelle Siri and I officially filed to run for Governor and Lt. Governor of Maryland for the 2022 Democratic Gubernatorial Primary Election. ** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41912919/330857991/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220217-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220217-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220217&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=15&refcode2=a1f8af22-1590-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWY4YWYyMi0xNTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qOl5NRD_Zlbw2YQlVLejaWHJoiWWlrKLxhBfDtW2xAE=) We couldn’t have made it to this moment without supporters like you, Peter. We are so grateful for your support, and I look forward to what we will accomplish together in the coming months — from getting more ads on air to hosting events with key coalitions to putting up yard signs in front yards across the state. But that takes resources, and I’m counting on all of you to help me do this. _**[Will you help us seize the momentum of this moment by pitching in today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41912920/330857992/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220217-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220217-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220217&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=15&refcode2=a1f8af22-1590-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWY4YWYyMi0xNTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qOl5NRD_Zlbw2YQlVLejaWHJoiWWlrKLxhBfDtW2xAE=)**_ I’ll be honest, Peter, this is a surreal moment for me. As a kid whose life was saved by public school teachers, the only reason I am here today is because I was lucky enough to get the right support from the right public institutions at an indescribably difficult time when both of my parents passed away. **My whole life has unfolded against the odds, and the opportunities that led me to this exact moment, filing to put my name on the ballot, are not only how I am able to run for office, but also why I am running to be Maryland’s next Democratic Governor.** My story represents the promise of progress that is possible when we invest in state government and public institutions as transformative forces for good. This race for governor is our chance to break down barriers to opportunity and create a future for our state where every Marylander has an equal opportunity to succeed — but it's going to take all of us to make it happen. **Now that Michelle and I have officially filed our paperwork to be on the ballot, we're launching our Promise to Progress Tour across the state to continue to share our vision with Marylanders and to build this progressive movement from the ground up.** People are living their day to day lives and might not know there's a gubernatorial election this year – so we’ve got to spread the word, and I need your help to do it. _**[Can you chip in what you can today towards our Official Promise to Progress Fund so that Michelle and I have the resources to reach voters all the way from Dorchester County to Allegany County to Baltimore City and build a winning coalition of voters committed to a more just state?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41912921/330857993/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220217-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220217-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220217&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=15&refcode2=a1f8af22-1590-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWY4YWYyMi0xNTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qOl5NRD_Zlbw2YQlVLejaWHJoiWWlrKLxhBfDtW2xAE=)**_ | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41912922/330857994/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220217-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220217-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220217&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=15&refcode2=a1f8af22-1590-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWY4YWYyMi0xNTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qOl5NRD_Zlbw2YQlVLejaWHJoiWWlrKLxhBfDtW2xAE=)

**With your support, I know we can unite to do what’s right for Marylanders and lead our state forward on the path to a brighter, more just future.**
Thank you for being a part of this journey with me,
John King

name: Gary Black
subject: Why won’t Herschel Walker debate?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/b87100689915cc46/e997272b5e62c75cc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
# **Friend — One week ago, I called on Herschel Walker to do three things to prove he is a viable candidate for U.S. Senate. **

---
1. Answer questions about the issues and incidents in his past.

2. Commit to three Republican primary debates.

3. Open his secretive campaign events to the public and talk about the issues.

Since then, Herschel hasn’t said a word. He’s stayed in hiding. **That’s not acceptable. Every candidate for office must be held to this standard. We MUST have this conversation now, before the Republican primary in May. ** Otherwise... we could needlessly hand the Democrats the U.S. Senate again. [**If you want Herschel Walker to debate, will you let him know? SIGN our petition here.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/b87100689915cc46/45dd7920cb1f8f27c3d6b838967d376c/37793) Too much is at stake to put forward a candidate who stays in hiding.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/b87100689915cc46/e75846a2bdfbf258c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black
---
[**TELL HERSCHEL TO DEBATE »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/b87100689915cc46/c2e5a61c5104226ac3d6b838967d376c/37793)

---
_**Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:**_ I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $23 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/b87100689915cc46/0174adebd945a816c3d6b838967d376c/37793)

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Freedom is Thriving in Florida
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=5c9da7d0d2531a7cc72f2fd67da0f30a0e8cd29c3ad57d22b6b2ba4e9571f733e715e7303d978d9066c3b37489842237c59d9f50b6f59b8d8055057be9f0b0472b5a0205efa7934b

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=a1cab70c3a6500be508a17263c4ed0d293e5d013a430fca1e1b95d5e7333b15f988d1fb7700dce7d2b854c75b5f1883e1192f03b742bd144

The great state of Florida is THRIVING, Peter.

The recipe for our success is a simple one:

✅ Outright rejected the ineffective and authoritarian policies of the Biden-Harris-Fauci administration and protected freedom

✅ Kept businesses open and workers in jobs

✅ Respected the individual liberty of all Floridians to make decisions for themselves and protected them from intrusive mandates

And it turns out lifting people up works out a whole hell of a lot better than locking people down.

But as Democrats revert to more of the same with their failed mandates and lockdowns, Florida continues reaching new heights and serving as a light of hope for people across America.

The dishonest corporate media might continue to smear me, but the proof is in the numbers. Florida has more new business formations than any state in America, our tourism is surpassing pre-pandemic levels and people from around the country are fleeing high-crime, Faucian dystopias to move down and enjoy the sunshine and freedom in Florida.

While Biden and Fauci continue their pattern of flip-flopping and ineptitude, we’ll continue following our recipe for success that has made Florida the model of America.

Sincerely,

Ron DeSantis

| | Hi there — I’m Kaitlyn, Deputy Communications Director for Digital Strategy on Sonia’s campaign for Governor. I joined this team because Sonia has spent her career fighting for people whose voices aren’t usually heard, and I know that when she’s elected, she will deliver the urgent change that working people need now. I’m proud to be a part of this team — and wanted to take a moment to talk to you directly about what we’ve been up to and why your grassroots support is so important to us. During the past week, Sonia’s been fired up, attending caucuses across the state. She’s met with folks from Belmont to Lenox, Holyoke to Newton, talking about what really matters: education, delivering a Green New Deal for Massachusetts, affordable housing, and closing the racial wealth divide. Now that the field for governor is a two-person race, this election will give voters a clear choice. And we know this much: Massachusetts is ready for bold, transformative leadership. This means it’s never been more important to deliver for working families, and I know Sonia will act with the vision and urgency this moment demands to do exactly that. [_**If you’re ready to invest in a bold, progressive Massachusetts, chip in $15 now. Let’s show how strong this grassroots movement is.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41913742/330861141/-1275523729?refcode=em_20220217_f_k_intro&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Njk2YTE1Ny0xYTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rY9nKrbvFRL603sjoKLRp2M8ieFE5wsxtnVO9Vr1UTc=) This will be a long, hard fight. But I know that with your support we’ll be able to elect Sonia as the next Governor of Massachusetts. [_**Chip in $15 or whatever you can to help power this grassroots movement.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41913743/330861142/-1275523729?refcode=em_20220217_f_k_intro&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Njk2YTE1Ny0xYTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rY9nKrbvFRL603sjoKLRp2M8ieFE5wsxtnVO9Vr1UTc=) Thanks for being a part of this fight, Kaitlyn

name: Team Benson
subject: Check out the op-ed Jocelyn co-wrote on democracy
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Elections and voting rights are under assault around the country, and Congress has failed to pass substantial legislation stopping these anti-democratic attacks.

Jocelyn is leading the national conversation on the important work states can do to save our democracy. Check out the op-ed she co-authored that appeared in The Hill and feel free to share it with your friends and family. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=021722]
Congress failed to pass voting rights legislation but we can still save our democracy By Jocelyn Benson, Joanna Lydgate, and Christine Todd Whitman

The battle over the 2020 election may be behind us, but the war over our nation’s democracy is escalating. In just the first month of 2022, Congress failed to advance federal election reform, Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis (R) tried to set a trend with his proposed “election police force,” and election deniers lined up to fill election administration offices up and down the ballot. In fact, one of those deniers — a state senatorial candidate in Michigan — urged supporters to “show up armed” at the polls.

The threat to our nation’s democracy is the most critical and urgent issue of our time. While the inability to pass critical protections at the federal level is disheartening, as three veteran public servants with decades of experience in the states, we still see a path forward for free and fair elections.
Elections are national events that are led and run by the states. Democracy prevailed in 2020 because in the face of lies, threats and intimidation, state and local leaders on both sides of the aisle did the right thing. They can and will do so again in 2022, 2024 and beyond — but only if we can develop a nonpartisan, pro-democracy coalition to support them.

We are heading into this election year fully aware of the lengths to which bad actors will go to seize power. The anti-democracy playbook is simple: Change the rules and change the referees, in order to change the results. Democracy can survive this challenging moment, as it has so many times throughout history, if we, as Americans, are willing to put in the work to protect it.
e
That means pushing pro-democracy policies in state houses across the country, even as we oppose bills that seek to hijack our elections and suppress the vote. There are opportunities in red and blue states alike to improve access to the ballot box and strengthen our elections. In the last several years, Kentucky, Nevada, Michigan and others moved to expand the freedom to vote, including provisions on vote-by-mail and drop boxes.
The legislative work is only possible if we continue to support the work of state and local officials. They are upholding the will of American voters and promoting the truth under intense pressure and unprecedented threats. With extreme candidates who promote lies about our elections running for positions across our country, it’s never been more important to elect leaders from both sides of the aisle who respect the rule of law and the will of the voters.

secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=021722 [secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=021722]
Our trusted, nonpartisan election officials also need support from the Department of Justice (DOJ). Unlike in 2020, the U.S. Department of Justice is poised to be a powerful ally in the fight to protect democracy. The DOJ has made it a priority to protect the public servants who oversee our elections, and it is absolutely critical that the DOJ now delivers on that promise. The first arrests made in Texas and Nevada for election-related threats are the kind of action we need.

On the legal side, in 2020, we saw a groundswell of legal experts, nonprofits and pro bono law firms step up to prevent President Trump from overturning the election. If 2021 was any indication, lawyers will continue to play an integral role in keeping our system of checks and balances intact. Many organizations are already taking action to protect our election integrity, including States United.

Finally, we must continue to fight for justice and truth when it comes to the deadly insurrection at the U.S. Capitol on Jan. 6, 2021. Accountability is a strong deterrent, and it can come from the states. In Fulton County, Georgia, District Attorney Fani Willis just got the green light for a special grand jury to continue her probe into the call Trump placed to Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger urging the official to “find” more votes for him. Novel efforts such as the one by District of Columbia Attorney General Karl Racine to hold the Proud Boys and the Oath Keepers responsible for the attack on the Capitol can shine a spotlight on bad actors and drain their coffers. Investigations of attempts to send fake electors or to rig elections in the states must also continue.

There are no shortcuts to saving democracy. It’s a battle we must wage daily, on many fronts. This work will not be defined by one victory, one defeat, one election or one bill. It is rooted in the sustained, informed engagement of citizens and leaders committed to lifting every voice, protecting every vote and holding our elected leaders accountable. As we enter another intense year, the question is not whether we will prevail, but how. That starts with the states.

[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]

clean_body: Our campaign is powered by supporters like you. | Peter - From the beginning, this campaign has been fueled by the incredible support of individuals like you. That is why we set a donor goal this week, instead of a money goal. We know this campaign is strong because of the number of people in Wisconsin (and beyond!) that share our mission. Here is where we are at: GOAL: 250 donors by midnight tomorrow DONATIONS IN THE DOOR: = DONATIONS NEEDED TO REACH GOAL: 56 to go We are 48 days into election year and are proud of all this team has accomplished. With your help, Deb can continue connecting with voters in western Wisconsin to listen and learn about the issues impacting them most. Today is the perfect time to make your first donation, if you can, and help us reach this important goal. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = We can’t thank you enough, Team McGrath | Deb McGrath is an Army Veteran, former CIA officer, and mother of three running for Congress in WI-03. She’s fighting for affordable health care, good-paying jobs, and common prosperity. Deb served our country for over four decades from all over the world. Now she’s being called to serve her hometown and western Wisconsin in Congress. name: Derek Marshall
subject: 100% people-powered
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
We’re over halfway through the month, which means we have to take a hard look at our finances. **We’re doing well, but we need to do better if we’re going to stay on track to reach our second monthly goal of Election Year.** I know you probably get a lot of asks for donations, but here’s why ours is different:
**My opponent Jay Obernolte has millions and millions of dollars to his name, which means he can self-finance his campaign,** thanks to the very same problematic campaign finance rules that we’ll take on once I’m in Congress.
Millionaires and billionaires shouldn’t be able to self-fund campaigns or accept hundreds of thousands of dollars from corporate special elections. **Money influences every aspect of our elections, and that’s why it’s so important that we can raise a competitive amount from our own grassroots base. **
**[Will you chip in today and contribute to our monthly goal? It’s crucial that we can reach our target and challenge Obernolte on a more level playing field. Our average amount given is just $30–will you match it today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41915971/330870219/-431919476?refcode=2-17&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjY0YmQ5YS0xZjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2F-l07YsfCBDtdKCxfqnGVx0Lqu6uYiFXlJJIX17gkw=)**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41915974/330870220/-431919476?refcode=2-17&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjY0YmQ5YS0xZjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2F-l07YsfCBDtdKCxfqnGVx0Lqu6uYiFXlJJIX17gkw=)

We know that raising a competitive amount of resources won’t be easy, but we’re already proving we have what it takes.**We’ve worked incredibly hard and raised over $400,000 to date on a 100% people-powered campaign.**
We’re so close to our goal, and reaching it would mean we stay on track for our 2022 budget. Why’s that so important? Because everything that will help us win this race—from field to political to comms—costs money, and a lot of it.**We need to stay strong.**
**[If you can spare a donation right now, your contribution could help us reach our goal. Will you consider contributing our average amount of just $30 right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41915975/330870221/-431919476?refcode=2-17&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjY0YmQ5YS0xZjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2F-l07YsfCBDtdKCxfqnGVx0Lqu6uYiFXlJJIX17gkw=)**

In solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**
Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We're suing twitter and we need your help
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59587366:6-62P9EMN:m:1:3253819041:A4CA6F48B2B8AF2F818659B566C4D88A:r) Dear Peter, I'm not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. My team at the Center for American Liberty has recently uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with Big Tech corporations like Facebook and Twitter to de-platform and silence conservatives like you and me. **In other words, we 've caught big government using tax-payer funding to silence their political opponents.** And if someone does not immediately stand up against this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. That's why we launched a lawsuit against Twitter, U.S. Senator Alex Padilla, and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties - _and we need your help to win._ **[Will you join us in our lawsuit against Twitter and Sen. Padilla and help defend the First Amendment?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59587366:6-62P9EMN:m:1:3253819041:A4CA6F48B2B8AF2F818659B566C4D88A:r)** Let me explain... Like millions of Americans after the 2020 presidential election, conservative activist Rogan O'Handley took to Twitter to express his concerns about the dubious election procedures and skepticism of the results. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59587366:6-62P9EMN:m:1:3253819041:A4CA6F48B2B8AF2F818659B566C4D88A:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59587366:6-62P9EMN:m:1:3253819041:A4CA6F48B2B8AF2F818659B566C4D88A:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59587366:6-62P9EMN:m:1:3253819041:A4CA6F48B2B8AF2F818659B566C4D88A:r) Shortly after the election, many of Rogan's tweets were removed by Twitter and his account was permanently suspended for "violating the government's rules about election integrity." _Hopefully, I don 't need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs or opinions is a gross violation of the First Amendment. _ But it gets much worse... When Rogan tried to figure out why he was censored, he found that bureaucrats working for then-California Secretary of State, Alex Padilla, had explicitly instructed officials at Twitter to silence him. You see, Alex Padilla was being considered to fill Kamala Harris' vacated seat in the U.S. Senate - and he was afraid that Rogan's tweets would hurt his image and chances of being appointed. **So, the office of Alex Padilla immediately instructed his press secretary to contact Twitter and shut Rogan up.** **From:** California Secretary of State Communications Department **To:** Twitter **Date:** Tuesday, November 17th, 2020 at 12:31 PM Hi, We wanted to flag this Twitter post: [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59587366:6-62P9EMN:m:1:3253819041:A4CA6F48B2B8AF2F818659B566C4D88A:r) From user @DC_Draino. In this post user claims California of being a culprit of voter fraud, and ignores the fact that we do audit votes. This is a blatant disregard to how our voting process works and creates disinformation and distrust among the general public. Twitter then flagged the post as misinformation, deleted it, and -- a few weeks later -- permanently banned Rogan from the their site. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59587366:6-62P9EMN:m:1:3253819041:A4CA6F48B2B8AF2F818659B566C4D88A:r) That's why my team and I at the Center for America Liberty are suing Twitter, now-Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberals for their involvement in this blatant assault on the First Amendment. But the only way we can take on the deep pockets and deep connections of these tyrants is with the help of patriotic Americans like you. clean_body: Dear Peter, I'm not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. My team at the Center for American Liberty has recently uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with Big Tech corporations like Facebook and Twitter to de-platform and silence conservatives like you and me. In other words, we 've caught big government using tax-payer funding to silence their political opponents. And if someone does not immediately stand up against this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. That's why we launched a lawsuit against Twitter, U.S. Senator Alex Padilla, and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties - and we need your help to win. Let me explain... Like millions of Americans after the 2020 presidential election, conservative activist Rogan O'Handley took to Twitter to express his concerns about the dubious election procedures and skepticism of the results. Shortly after the election, many of Rogan's tweets were removed by Twitter and his account was permanently suspended for "violating the government's rules about election integrity." Hopefully, I don 't need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs or opinions is a gross violation of the First Amendment. But it gets much worse... When Rogan tried to figure out why he was censored, he found that bureaucrats working for then-California Secretary of State, Alex Padilla, had explicitly instructed officials at Twitter to silence him. You see, Alex Padilla was being considered to fill Kamala Harris' vacated seat in the U.S. Senate - and he was afraid that Rogan's tweets would hurt his image and chances of being appointed. So, the office of Alex Padilla immediately instructed his press secretary to contact Twitter and shut Rogan up. From: California Secretary of State Communications Department To: Twitter Date: Tuesday, November 17th, 2020 at 12:31 PM Hi, We wanted to flag this Twitter post: From user @DCDraino. In this post user claims California of being a culprit of voter fraud, and ignores the fact that we do audit votes. This is a blatant disregard to how our voting process works and creates disinformation and distrust among the general public. Twitter then flagged the post as misinformation, deleted it, and -- a few weeks later -- permanently banned Rogan from the their site. name: Hendrell Remus
subject: Church + State = Bill Lee’s Theocracy
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning]

Peter,

Our Founding Fathers warned against a day like today — a day where the Separation of Church and State is under threat. In the First Amendment, the no establishment clause prohibits the government from any involvement in religion, from favoring one religious view over another, or even favoring religion over non-belief.

Preventing the government from interfering in religion is a crucial principle of religious freedom. But Bill Lee wants to strip all of that away. He is trying to build a theocracy in Tennessee by replacing our public schools with private, far-right Hillsdale College charters, in order to indoctrinate our kids with an anti-science, anti-historic curriculum.

We have to push back — our only recourse is to replace Bill Lee at the ballot box in a resounding defeat. Can you chip in now to help us build a team capable of going up against his money machine? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_250]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]

Thomas Jefferson and James Madison knew what would happen — they knew that without separating church from state there could be no true religious liberty. We must fight to preserve and expand upon the truly free union envisioned by our Founders. You can bet that Tennessee Democrats will always fight to preserve and expand upon freedom of religion.

But we can’t do it alone — can you chip in now to help us defeat Bill Lee’s radical agenda to use taxpayer money to replace our public schools with far-right, private charters? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning]

Yours in the fight,

Hendrell Remus
he/him

| | Hi Friends,

I need your full support on 19 Feb at the VFW Post 3433, 10154 Bell Wright Road, Summerville, SC. I need the set up team to be there are 5PM, for banners and rehearsal. Order of events, Prayer, Pledge of Allegiance, National Anthem, MC introduces Elmer, then Ingrid, Questions. Security will be in place and everyone will have name tags. Table for donations, selling Centurion gear. It will be a great event and time to get to know the constituents. This weekend we also have the [Southeastern Wildlife Exposition (SEWE)](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=24bc2c3577&e=bb02dd73bf) event, please email back if you plan on attending so we can tell you where the link up point is. Centurion team will be in full force. Our team is growing with dedicated Patriots who want to send a real Conservative woman warrior to Congress that represents America and family values. God Bless.

Go to the campaign **[Events](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=cb3b045b29&e=bb02dd73bf)** page for details.
---
| | **ACTIONS NEEDED TODAY (FULL FORCE) :
1\. Communicate with the Campaign. We need to know if you're showing up.
2\. Host a House Party.
3\. Sign up for Door Knocking. **

Thank you all!
Ingrid Centurion

| | Derek, Earlier this month, Mark learned he had received a 100% rating from the Leadership Conference on Civil and Human Rights. It was a tremendous honor; but he isn’t resting on his rating. He is working hard to build support for bills that are fundamental to protecting voting rights and advancing civil and human rights for all. [_**But we need to be honest — if Republicans take back control of the Senate, work on these issues will grind to a halt. Chip in $5 to protect the Senate majority in 2022.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41916428/330871773/-446345407?refcode=mw_em_220217_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2YxZGYyYi0yMjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oyRl_74zeLQtdK6TOEALHTjE-aSYhV45pt4Vt3rMUI4=) Mark has not given up on passing much needed voting rights reforms that will protect the integrity of our elections and make it easier for people to vote. subject: AZ women's right to choose is at stake >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Delina DiSanto for Congress Delina DiSanto for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41916790/330874367/-1092009436?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzc4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDNlZjhjYy0yMzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RqjvHWWXfAUJZUSYAuWLS4bkjJd6xq_cVadYtC5j2yo=&emci=f7e91dec-578f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=4d3ef8cc-2390-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=29183203)
---
| | **Last night, the Arizona State Senate passed a bill that would outlaw abortions after 15 weeks of pregnancy, regardless of rape or incest. ** As it stands today, this Mississippi-style measure is unconstitutional under the precedent set by _Roe v Wade_. However, the Supreme Court will have the opportunity to overturn Roe this spring — _despite_ the fact that most Americans believe reproductive decisions should remain between a woman and her doctor. On top of this, Arizona's new law would disproportionately impact women who do not have the means to travel to Democratic states without strict restrictions on abortions. As the next Congresswoman of Arizona's 1st Congressional district, I will work tirelessly to pass legislation like the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ , to ensure that women’s reproductive rights are protected not just in Arizona, but across the country. [**However, I need your help to make that happen. clean_body: | | | | | Last night, the Arizona State Senate passed a bill that would outlaw abortions after 15 weeks of pregnancy, regardless of rape or incest. As it stands today, this Mississippi-style measure is unconstitutional under the precedent set by Roe v Wade. However, the Supreme Court will have the opportunity to overturn Roe this spring — despite the fact that most Americans believe reproductive decisions should remain between a woman and her doctor. On top of this, Arizona's new law would disproportionately impact women who do not have the means to travel to Democratic states without strict restrictions on abortions. As the next Congresswoman of Arizona's 1st Congressional district, I will work tirelessly to pass legislation like the Women’s Health Protection Act , to ensure that women’s reproductive rights are protected not just in Arizona, but across the country. = | | = = = = = = Thank you, – Delina DiSanto | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Delina DiSanto for Congress Delina DiSanto for Congress PO Box 4809 Cave Creek, AZ 85327 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Amanda Makki
subject: What do mullets and inflation have in common?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amanda Makki For Congress
body:
In 1982, E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial was released, Michael Jackson's Thriller album debuted, and Joe Biden was in his 9th year as a Senator. | [](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=23496731ff7c4b12bff625850854a524&_e=RuE0gzxMuuaSgYla3kNP9Pwh4yWXY9n3EaeoLReQrGKScdKOWTBN70DNZx-32iEr64ktftEbsWmh_jFHFgAHuK87PCCCSCCaVT-svztq_b85UfRBhfame0cs9uXgrZdJVAzLim0h3UmunkUO4pb4sxsO7CKsDbVttCMUbuRXDgvmJy3SDvRaSTUiP4vOOm7y1UvYHc7h5j04_HtjL-7Yqm9eC0F4gSs0e01qmMVz7gSzFxE-8Yd1t9sT12yR66v7N1AoPR-IZt-Ri-h4qnJAaUsqc-r32umBcrL_mxnTzpi_nddALo6oXmGXXjFTRcMA8jhwAJpN99YdMmunQU60JkCggOkyO9mle5uU9XskjEyzMTi1EbF1f12XLUvEO4bSm5lHRdC7qtXAmk5_17LeITjvOoC3UttFZsI0dTlUTas%3D)
---
Peter -

**The last time inflation was this high, mullets were unironically in style.**

In 1982,_E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial_ was released, Michael Jackson's _Thriller_ album debuted, Joe Biden was in his 9th year as a Senator, **and inflation was 7%.**

Now 2022, inflation is expected to hit a whopping 7.2% by March! **Biden's tax and spend ideology has driven inflation to a 40 year high, and it's showing no signs of stopping.**

The prices of gas, housing, electricity, cars, and almost everything else is skyrocketing. Life is becoming alarmingly more expensive for the American middle class. The dollar doesn't go as far as it did even just two years ago.

With rising inflation combined with labor shortages, supply chain issues, and total economic uncertainty, **it's hard to believe that Biden and the Left have the interests of everyday Americans at heart.**

Democrats hold the House by a slim margin, and Republicans only need to take a few seats to regain the Majority. _Democrats have no idea how to run this country and a conservative majority is the only thing that can set our nation back on track._

In November, Republicans will take back the 13th Congressional District seat being vacated by turncoat Charlie Crist. **But we need to make sure a strong conservative takes that seat.**

I'm the right Republican for this seat, but I need your help to make it to Washington. [**Can you chip in just a few dollars to help my campaign for Congress in Florida?**](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=23496731ff7c4b12bff625850854a524&_e=RuE0gzxMuuaSgYla3kNP9Pwh4yWXY9n3EaeoLReQrGKScdKOWTBN70DNZx-32iEr64ktftEbsWmh_jFHFgAHuK87PCCCSCCaVT-svztq_b85UfRBhfame0cs9uXgrZdJVAzLim0h3UmunkUO4pb4sxsO7CKsDbVttCMUbuRXDgvmJy3SDvRaSTUiP4vOOm7y1UvYHc7h5j04_HtjL-7YqnAHAbgvRvHkZRX-MdyKxTPqpTVOMpYb1EpESKkbedPXRMEa_9wIethLGsJv8ZuXk3boGpsqtilqWev3FK-r0w-4dXTWxA8FIo4ZfFXhK-9UDi2BkaoFxCBcK4GTY6VTh-FkZ8Z1urRmRfae3vLQbjkw4Q9x_2N519Qdb9ejtTjGm89HLt-RUH6v342YEvFR5lIuh0oXsKRxlQDF_TqV5M0%3D)

[** ****DONATE TODAY**](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=23496731ff7c4b12bff625850854a524&_e=RuE0gzxMuuaSgYla3kNP9Pwh4yWXY9n3EaeoLReQrGKScdKOWTBN70DNZx-32iEr64ktftEbsWmh_jFHFgAHuK87PCCCSCCaVT-svztq_b85UfRBhfame0cs9uXgrZdJVAzLim0h3UmunkUO4pb4sxsO7CKsDbVttCMUbuRXDgvmJy3SDvRaSTUiP4vOOm7y1UvYHc7h5j04_HtjL-7Yqj5t1IMA1UE8j0yBJd2oR4NmVT3Z5fpAWnCIZ-fUXRXlu_idt7UB1AbDt63fdyXrGTAbVX9HgrfRDR_YP8m5-SyI4FWnxWb_02qfaTvEBVpBZBl__9G_FI_1edU01yxKHLgdEhG2k0OXm7FvLTUJF4MN5jV-00XoEGmoa66N5uF8EGAcBI6JgW-3JrdTmbXf2sLKtk4hYSQ9630BsW2lz78%3D)
The reality is that this election could be our last chance to save this nation from the Left's destruction. I will not stand by and let the radical-Leftist agenda destroy our home

[**If you are with me, let me know by standing up and fighting alongside me today. Please, pitch in $15, $25 or anything you can spare right now to help me win.**](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=23496731ff7c4b12bff625850854a524&_e=RuE0gzxMuuaSgYla3kNP9Pwh4yWXY9n3EaeoLReQrGKScdKOWTBN70DNZx-32iEr64ktftEbsWmh_jFHFgAHuK87PCCCSCCaVT-svztq_b85UfRBhfame0cs9uXgrZdJVAzLim0h3UmunkUO4pb4sxsO7CKsDbVttCMUbuRXDgvmJy3SDvRaSTUiP4vOOm7y1UvYHc7h5j04_HtjL-7YqivT5LESZRCDDJXtbgO7VB8x0UCyvdq_D8HseR1fgiNxa5fqFbFoLQNb8MtNcGe8vNdOJdDtufrpyJ8Nk-CHweSLLq5wVAdxLqxW2XWSmpTM3RsPOkf933fhdUnzEvWPk2RwH1sNI1krPq7VALC879-q8W1oF-7jvifpjTPflemLFfL9FpVfFswiHBv2U65IgLuZWb6UZDk2IkYCCkK4IvA%3D)

**Amanda Makki**

| Hoosier Republican,

The floundering of Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Nancy Pelosi’s far-left agenda isn’t stopping National Democrats from trying to pick up more seats in the U.S. House.

In fact, they have one of our districts in their sights.

We’ve seen what Democrats in the U.S. House are capable of delivering for Hoosiers—record inflation, higher crime, and lower wages—and we’ve seen how it impacts us.

We can’t let this madness continue!

Hoosier Republican, help us fight back and keep National Democrats out of Indiana. For as little as $5 a month, you can play an integral part in making sure Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Nancy Pelosi’s far-left agenda never crosses the mighty Ohio and never reaches the Wabash.

clean_body: National Democrats are targeting our Indiana. Help us fight back! Read more >> | | | | | | | Hoosier Republican, The floundering of Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Nancy Pelosi’s far-left agenda isn’t stopping National Democrats from trying to pick up more seats in the U.S. House. In fact, they have one of our districts in their sights. We’ve seen what Democrats in the U.S. House are capable of delivering for Hoosiers—record inflation, higher crime, and lower wages—and we’ve seen how it impacts us. We can’t let this madness continue! Hoosier Republican, help us fight back and keep National Democrats out of Indiana. For as little as $5 a month, you can play an integral part in making sure Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Nancy Pelosi’s far-left agenda never crosses the mighty Ohio and never reaches the Wabash. | "BECOME A SUSTAINING DONOR >>" | | Thank you so much for standing up for conservative values in our great state and our country. name: Kelly Schulz
subject: It's time to put our children first.
body:
| | | |
---
[](https://u21639199.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=DRhu97MwZOafZz0axKBSuHM4TyUiRDjO7WRT-2Bn4igr193XMreDNS7fl2A4g9SL86aSEebIwnZHSfw4lz1-2Bd6tcZOe9CoLq3tMbGLZTmy-2F6Y-3DdAmb_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6nu7as-2BDt4G-2BrDRpQnhQsSTTRtab7Za4SBXTSL8W4Sq6FpgUW1J45yzIwS7ewjuWazdFiWdWekt9DdcQotZ0CGPALlkwRlPU-2BzTHe-2BB4gPPP0Jb8n2sKm2D6RUrYNL618Tn87UbhSK8c9bLmw4hVIM2-2Beq7hC3-2BI1iLLnWzNFty-2FEWvAhzuHJFwnouFc5EQf7WN3bVfF1AU7t4AW-2BusA9JUoHlQ3xyVBwJuOcaD0aYcFvgsFQy5dUjudf6OqFJssP39-2FvUdqySUdvi6ZQrn9iTzPDBXZ7z8iQpPlCJCVmdKqfg0HycrIhQIbMuYY3V-2FguUEwpsjhTfHLEIVeRzH-2BYjNKCUQofWfdWkCmcDghDuVr2l4v31G8Ef3plWJM5XLutRJZVsGlmoq0cM2fse2Ls8Mk6HvDw-2F1pMue6k4J1T7D7G1y2d7-2B3KGNotUSXFJ2DE6UmPmDDcaHbC12pUV0vkvMjjp-2F2qj4hApCBD9va50RbeZW2QxE0DOl5Tq8kKCtOYmx7oh-2FynzIzQ1uTfQkXMJxJ-2FNS57k1DQAywKzSIVgoSp1OE2mpDEZORe149u6YK5epqRLgWRhZe10nC5d2BMCnVs7Pw-2FlxSuwUIktVt8t1nqgukJSzOSmbOPe5YH9mCOWnCh3JZ64THNiCIWy8pPFxzMJxrcr-2FcdkKwJdpNxIQlIGXyE10F9TgqXjiB244QLLyAfGKZ0A7HoOmvx27LbbJRbyazoZSleEI6pJVsxCzwVGsHb3XvUVF28MCQlaqyz0i541vyRrUPXg-2B5Z81dXm3wGvORGbjnFPPUoebcgILXKEX4j1ry4UPXVd5xGVvN1Kk6IEVVamr-2F-2Biyh5NntM4g-3D-3D)
---
---
Dear Friend,

Taking responsibility away from parents and forcing healthy children to wear masks is wrong, and it's long past time for this to end statewide. I commend the Anne Arundel County Board of Education for showing the rest of the state what [**real leadership looks like**](https://u21639199.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=DRhu97MwZOafZz0axKBSuCyF-2FlHR83dYwJ6V2vsG6ejQ-2B-2F9VHFLrQi8h1Shbd0gS67GrcwVEDOGVAp5wAdFDcT4Fdryo4KEaJBf0D-2BI7QmOUw9-2F34Kua52UwcdDkGRbwK8o4I3W7QP-2FHHpzxaew2-2FA-3D-3DHn-4_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6nu7as-2BDt4G-2BrDRpQnhQsSTTRtab7Za4SBXTSL8W4Sq6FpgUW1J45yzIwS7ewjuWazdFiWdWekt9DdcQotZ0CGPALlkwRlPU-2BzTHe-2BB4gPPP0Jb8n2sKm2D6RUrYNL618Tn87UbhSK8c9bLmw4hVIM2-2Beq7hC3-2BI1iLLnWzNFty-2FEWvAhzuHJFwnouFc5EQf7WN3bVfF1AU7t4AW-2BusA9JUoHlQ3xyVBwJuOcaD0aYcFvgsFQy5dUjudf6OqFJssP39-2FvUdqySUdvi6ZQrn9iTzPDBXZ7z8iQpPlCJCVmdKqfg0HycrIhQIbMuYY3V-2FguUEwpsjhTfHLEIVeRzH-2BYjNKCUQofWfdWkCmcDghDuVr2l4v31G8Ef3plWJM5XLutRJZVsGlmoq0cM2fse2Ls8Mk6HvDw-2F1pMue6k4J1T7D7G1y2d7-2B3KGNotUSXFJ2DE6UmPmDDcaHbC12pUV0vkvMjjp-2F2qj4hApCBD9va50RbeZW2QxE0DOl5Tq8kKCtOYmx7oh-2FynzIzQ1uTfQkXMJxJ-2FNS57k1DQAywKzSIVgoSp1OE2mpDEZORe149u6YK5epqRLgWRhZe10nC5d2BMCnVs7Pw-2FlxSuwUIktVt8t1nqgukJSzOSmbOPe5YH9mCOWnCh3JZ64THNiCIWy8pPFxzMJxrcr-2FcdkKwJdpNxIQldggEuI-2FG2h793WX9Msa-2B2HNnr3KFP4cXJrR-2FkJHy9LQ3S-2F6V5v-2FYXtig7O-2Bn68SEXvY7JJ6byNjUM72-2Fygk63o5sFMsNG2vN1NfdZj5FleBgckBXqpHPuzHO9CuykkSBPTkFS8neZBWi59M7j0zBsSGGCSZOiptfiVKrOVHZcxQ-3D-3D) and standing up for families and students.

Over the last two years, our children have suffered far beyond what was ever necessary and we will be dealing with the negative consequences of virtual learning, school closures, and forced masking for years to come.

Imposing a top-down mandate that takes decisions away from parents and puts them in the hands of government bureaucrats is never the right answer. _Parents and students should be empowered to make their own personal decisions about their health._

The State Board of Education and other school systems need to listen to the growing outcry of parents and drop the mask requirements that they have put in place. **It's time to put our children first.**
---

Last week, we also released our [**Parental Bill of Rights**](https://u21639199.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=DRhu97MwZOafZz0axKBSuDNoVyMDsxS45AUXX7w2aPudYbeiat-2BTuvYFUZEfR-2F87JFWGeT5hgBaRIc0Pg8DxQYU2OcD45JIGf7awplpG7jnRle2SvcGqxdOX00q-2BBhMfnaM-2BYTYcUzE9ugGCbiWjag-3D-3DwIJo_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6nu7as-2BDt4G-2BrDRpQnhQsSTTRtab7Za4SBXTSL8W4Sq6FpgUW1J45yzIwS7ewjuWazdFiWdWekt9DdcQotZ0CGPALlkwRlPU-2BzTHe-2BB4gPPP0Jb8n2sKm2D6RUrYNL618Tn87UbhSK8c9bLmw4hVIM2-2Beq7hC3-2BI1iLLnWzNFty-2FEWvAhzuHJFwnouFc5EQf7WN3bVfF1AU7t4AW-2BusA9JUoHlQ3xyVBwJuOcaD0aYcFvgsFQy5dUjudf6OqFJssP39-2FvUdqySUdvi6ZQrn9iTzPDBXZ7z8iQpPlCJCVmdKqfg0HycrIhQIbMuYY3V-2FguUEwpsjhTfHLEIVeRzH-2BYjNKCUQofWfdWkCmcDghDuVr2l4v31G8Ef3plWJM5XLutRJZVsGlmoq0cM2fse2Ls8Mk6HvDw-2F1pMue6k4J1T7D7G1y2d7-2B3KGNotUSXFJ2DE6UmPmDDcaHbC12pUV0vkvMjjp-2F2qj4hApCBD9va50RbeZW2QxE0DOl5Tq8kKCtOYmx7oh-2FynzIzQ1uTfQkXMJxJ-2FNS57k1DQAywKzSIVgoSp1OE2mpDEZORe149u6YK5epqRLgWRhZe10nC5d2BMCnVs7Pw-2FlxSuwUIktVt8t1nqgukJSzOSmbOPe5YH9mCOWnCh3JZ64THNiCIWy8pPFxzMJxrcr-2FcdkKwJdpNxIQl-2Fwv9hY2J-2B-2BnokgSFlf9l7WAy6QaheXT5rnHTsVyqsuU2K7NwQv16Jmn-2FYa-2BHoWRB-2Fp-2FmEk91TyDR374NUwsJOrjua08pn8I5-2BnL3P4w-2FevOO47BfndlycYr57cAhM100suHjMLhIHKsMunr8-2FEzZSRTRYBlqCy-2BwfaNNUv9JqoQ-3D-3D). This is a blueprint to ensuring that every single child is given the best chance to succeed and my promise and commitment to both parents and students.

You can find out more information on this by visiting our website: [https://www.kellyschulzforgovernor.com/2022/02/10/kelly-schulz-releases-parental-bill-of-rights/ ](https://u21639199.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=DRhu97MwZOafZz0axKBSuDNoVyMDsxS45AUXX7w2aPudYbeiat-2BTuvYFUZEfR-2F87JFWGeT5hgBaRIc0Pg8DxQYU2OcD45JIGf7awplpG7jnRle2SvcGqxdOX00q-2BBhMfnaM-2BYTYcUzE9ugGCbiWjag-3D-3D7g4T_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6nu7as-2BDt4G-2BrDRpQnhQsSTTRtab7Za4SBXTSL8W4Sq6FpgUW1J45yzIwS7ewjuWazdFiWdWekt9DdcQotZ0CGPALlkwRlPU-2BzTHe-2BB4gPPP0Jb8n2sKm2D6RUrYNL618Tn87UbhSK8c9bLmw4hVIM2-2Beq7hC3-2BI1iLLnWzNFty-2FEWvAhzuHJFwnouFc5EQf7WN3bVfF1AU7t4AW-2BusA9JUoHlQ3xyVBwJuOcaD0aYcFvgsFQy5dUjudf6OqFJssP39-2FvUdqySUdvi6ZQrn9iTzPDBXZ7z8iQpPlCJCVmdKqfg0HycrIhQIbMuYY3V-2FguUEwpsjhTfHLEIVeRzH-2BYjNKCUQofWfdWkCmcDghDuVr2l4v31G8Ef3plWJM5XLutRJZVsGlmoq0cM2fse2Ls8Mk6HvDw-2F1pMue6k4J1T7D7G1y2d7-2B3KGNotUSXFJ2DE6UmPmDDcaHbC12pUV0vkvMjjp-2F2qj4hApCBD9va50RbeZW2QxE0DOl5Tq8kKCtOYmx7oh-2FynzIzQ1uTfQkXMJxJ-2FNS57k1DQAywKzSIVgoSp1OE2mpDEZORe149u6YK5epqRLgWRhZe10nC5d2BMCnVs7Pw-2FlxSuwUIktVt8t1nqgukJSzOSmbOPe5YH9mCOWnCh3JZ64THNiCIWy8pPFxzMJxrcr-2FcdkKwJdpNxIQkclIRBLenE5vKOJ31cOTg0mtua7cUcj8GLoy1vCWP2YScO-2FU4sl-2Ff63VANoUiTbwhIrYacpnvPco1dqt0ez2nEmoh-2BKdzpNYjWCpyZqYFhQb-2B4rlb5kuq3c7qSbVPK3FzyCZPqR7ZGFkFqunXzHxvY9x6vS-2FaA6Wzg-2BWhYnywpnA-3D-3D)

clean_body: | | | | Dear Friend, Taking responsibility away from parents and forcing healthy children to wear masks is wrong, and it's long past time for this to end statewide. I commend the Anne Arundel County Board of Education for showing the rest of the state what and standing up for families and students. Over the last two years, our children have suffered far beyond what was ever necessary and we will be dealing with the negative consequences of virtual learning, school closures, and forced masking for years to come. Imposing a top-down mandate that takes decisions away from parents and puts them in the hands of government bureaucrats is never the right answer. Parents and students should be empowered to make their own personal decisions about their health. The State Board of Education and other school systems need to listen to the growing outcry of parents and drop the mask requirements that they have put in place. It's time to put our children first. Last week, we also released our . This is a blueprint to ensuring that every single child is given the best chance to succeed and my promise and commitment to both parents and students. You can find out more information on this by visiting our website: | | Follow Us! | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | instagram.com/kellymschulz "Instagram" ---|---|--- Kelly Schulz P.O. Box 6528, Annapolis, MD 21401 Authority: Kelly Schulz for Governor, Inc. Treasurer: Sam Malhotra

subject: Please, friend

body:
We're fighting an uphill battle right now
| | |

I won't lie to you, friend. We're fighting an uphill battle right now. Let me explain:
_**FIRST,**_ Republicans realized that if I win this race, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to expand our Senate majority.
_**THEN,**_ polling showed me neck and neck with Marco Rubio, so national Republicans poured millions into Florida to stack the cards against me.
_**NOW,**_ Mitch McConnell's committee is launching the first of many attack ads to defeat me – and I'm falling dangerously short of my $10,000 grassroots fundraising goal. I need to make up the difference before midnight, friend.
Republicans are trying to buy this seat – no matter how much money it takes – and I desperately need more resources right now to compete with Rubio.
The last Florida Senate race was determined by _just_ over 10,000 votes, and my race is shaping up to be JUST as close. That means it could be YOUR single donation that allows us to knock on just enough doors, call just enough Floridians and reach out to just enough voters to win.
**[Please, friend, will you donate $5 to help me meet my midnight goal, flip Florida blue and expand our Senate majority? subject: This is an all-or-nothing race.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
Texans can’t afford another four years of politicians not representing them. |
#
---
Let us paint you a picture: For the last eight years, Dan Patrick has hurt Texas with his dangerous agenda. He’s gone after our public schools with a vengeance, tried to suppress the fundamental right to vote, attacked women’s rights, failed to act on climate change — the list goes on and on. Families across Texas have been left in the dust, while wealthy players make out like bandits. **That’s what makes this an all-or-nothing race. First it was a shameful "election audit" to overturn President Biden's victory, then a SLEW of voter suppression laws to silence our voices. Then the ultraconservative justices Trump put on the Supreme Court handed Arizona Republicans a HUGE win by defending their racist laws! Stacey and Michelle are fighting back for voting rights nationwide. But we have to stand with them here in Arizona – or everything we've fought for could be LOST. With time running out before our poll closes at midnight, we're still missing YOUR response, so please, friend – let us know where you stand NOW: SHOULD DEMOCRATS FIGHT BACK AGAINST EXTREMIST GOP ATTACKS ON OUR VOTING RIGHTS? | | | | DEADLINE 11:59 P.M. | COMPLETION RATE: 98.8% | YOUR RESPONSE PENDING Thank you, Team Lopez | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Marco Lopez for Governor PO Box 34672 Phoenix, AZ 85067 United States | | 2022 | Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez

name: NH Senate Republicans
subject: 2022 Legislative Priority Action Plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Senate Republican PAC, Jeb Bradley Chairman
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODg3NzE3OTE4MDY2NjExNzU2JmM9cjB2OSZlPTE5MjgmYj05MTIzMTYwNzAmZD1rM2gwajBw.t1jUwixvM8gVhwSrF0XF7SdKWEJuPDvFM1gGE-mADE4)
| | |
---
| [ ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODg3NzE3OTE4MDY2NjExNzU2JmM9cjB2OSZlPTE5MjgmYj05MTIzMTYwNzMmZD1sOHgyaTBn.g81VUmhnt8QAu0L4uA3QbWH7nBMhxVco36V_Gd55ke4)
---
---
| |
---
| Friends, This week, The New Hampshire Senate Republicans released our 2022 Legislative Priority Action Plan! Take a look below, and if you support our plan [please consider making a small $5, $25 or even $100 contribution to our campaign fund! (secure link)](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODg3NzE3OTE4MDY2NjExNzU2JmM9cjB2OSZlPTE5MjgmYj05MTIzMTYwNzYmZD10NmM5ajVt.fQ787Ry_cHthSVr4rVDPNu2zPNIK4bm7PCXeLvBbBmk) Thank you, NH Senate Republicans
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| **Keeping our families healthy and safe during the Covid 19 pandemic** While things are beginning to return to normalcy, the surge of new COVID cases this winter has shown us we are not out of the pandemic yet. Helping our working families during these challenging times continues to be our priority.
* Continue to work with Governor Sununu on distribution of future federal relief money for working families and Main Street businesses.
* Ensure sufficient dollars for the Attorney General’s lawsuit against the Biden mandates.

**Helping our working families** As we enter 2022, New Hampshire families are facing challenges on multiple fronts. Rising inflation threatens to make necessities like food and gas less affordable. The pandemic continues to bring worries about our health and safety. We need to ensure that we are creating policies that keep the interests of working Granite State families at the forefront.
* Provide additional education funding, if our budget picture allows, to further lower property taxes.
* Protect NH patients from high cost “balance billing” related to emergency services.
* Help NH families dealing/struggling with Alzheimer’s by expanding respite care.

---
---
| |
---
| | [>>> Chip in $5 to help working families](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODg3NzE3OTE4MDY2NjExNzU2JmM9cjB2OSZlPTE5MjgmYj05MTIzMTYwODImZD13NHU1bDNn.Z0RJgg0mp08BWkzkLZmbGKO629Y0uz8AAbx5ACUon70)
---
---
| |
---
| **Supporting our Main Street businesses**
Small businesses struggled mightily during the height of the pandemic. With federal grant money ending and continued labor shortages, it is imperative that we do what we can to help them rebound. Last year, we cut business taxes so that businesses were able to keep more of their own money and invest it back into their companies. We need to continue to cut unnecessary regulations and red tape and keep taxes low on small businesses.
* Continue to protect the gains we achieved on lowering business taxes and workers compensation costs.
* Lower health insurance costs through association health plans.

**Protecting taxpayers** In the fall of 2020, New Hampshire voters sent a clear message: They do not want higher property taxes and a new state income tax proposed by the Democrats. Senate Republicans kept our promise to stop any new broad-based tax and provided over $300M in property tax relief to New Hampshire families. In 2022, we plan to continue down the road of lower taxes so working families can keep more of their hard-earned money.
* Oppose spending proposals that would necessitate an income tax, sales tax, capital gains tax or any new taxes.
* Oppose donor town funding schemes.

---
---
| |
---
| | [>>> Chip in $5 to protect taxpayers](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODg3NzE3OTE4MDY2NjExNzU2JmM9cjB2OSZlPTE5MjgmYj05MTIzMTYwODgmZD1qOXY2ejF4.W8capd4D41suElavUWwyvWTDX6LRArvYqwA6J46leeE)
---
---
| |
---
| **Mental Health**
The pandemic has put a spotlight on our need for improving mental health services in the Granite State. Those who have never sought any therapeutic help have found that the stresses and consequences of the past two years have led them to seek help. We need to improve and increase access to and availability of these necessary services.
* Close Sununu Center and establish community-based options.
* Work with Governor to provide additional access for mental health beds including new facilities.
* Work with Governor Sununu on using ARPA funds for after school programs.

**Improving educational opportunity/input and giving parents a voice in their children’s education** Last year we passed New Hampshire’s innovative new statewide Education Freedom Account program to encourage school choice for low-income NH families. This year, we are going to continue to push for more school choice, as well as ensuring that parents’ voices in their children’s education are not silenced, but rather encouraged, and more importantly, listened to by local school boards.
* Protect school choice options for NH families.
* Support local school districts and lower property taxes with increased funding.
* Ensure that NH parents have the right to speak at their local school board meetings and have a say in their children’s curriculum.

---
---
| |
---
| | [>>> Chip in $5 to increase school choice](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODg3NzE3OTE4MDY2NjExNzU2JmM9cjB2OSZlPTE5MjgmYj05MTIzMTYwOTQmZD1mMnYyYjZt.AWhLbpE32KciaNYPBb5PQS0pE6klI1W2GcbBMXtpDiU)
---
---
| |
---
| **Keeping our streets and homes safe**
In New Hampshire we pride ourselves on consistently being named one of the safest states in the country. Unfortunately, we’ve seen a disturbing rise in crime throughout the country. We need to stop this trend before it spreads and ensure that New Hampshire remains the best place to live, work and raise a family.
* Ensure our bail system prevents violent criminals from further harming the public and ensure that individuals who have received bail, actually show up for their judicial proceeding.
* Improve notification after arrest of those on probation and parole.

**Ensuring honest elections** Honest and fair elections are the key to a healthy Democracy. We need to ensure that New Hampshire ballots are being cast only by New Hampshire residents and that the Democrats’ dangerous federal takeover of our elections is stopped before it takes root in our state and threatens our secure election process.
* Ensure voting is reserved for NH residents.
* Update and improve absentee ballots applications.
* Update and clarify NH’s campaign finance limits.
* Improve NH voters’ access to election information.

---
---
| |
---
| | [>>> Chip in $5 to ensure honest elections](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODg3NzE3OTE4MDY2NjExNzU2JmM9cjB2OSZlPTE5MjgmYj05MTIzMTYxMDAmZD1uOGE1djNq.uij8up-Jp-LrMdcumqACj7WiAO6AdG2VLFzMUhheNvc)
---
---
| |
---
| **Infrastructure Improvements** Strong infrastructure is paramount to a strong state economy, from repairing our roads and bridges to increasing broadband capacity in our rural communities. We need to ensure that our infrastructure money is spent efficiently on the most necessary projects.
* Develop a 10-year highway plan that partners with federal improvement projects while also identifying necessary state projects for transportation funding.
* Work with the Governor to implement an environmental infrastructure program funded through ARPA funds. Projects will include parks, dams, hatcheries and others.
* Work with the Governor to use ARPA funds to implement telecommunication improvements such as connectivity.
* Work with the Governor to use ARPA funds for regional communication equipment upgrades.
* Protect taxpayers from high public works construction costs.

**Energy & the Environment** Gas prices and the cost to heat our homes have risen markedly since the new administration took over in Washington. New Hampshire needs responsible state energy and environmental policies that look out for Granite State families.
* Require the Saint Gobain company to pay for remediation of PFAS pollution in Merrimack.
* Protect New Hampshire families from efforts to increase costs of energy, including electricity and home heating oil.
* Ensure New Hampshire cities and towns have the funding they need to improve water quality and repair or prevent contamination of their water supply.

---
---
| |
---
| | [>>> Chip in $5, $15 or $25 online](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODg3NzE3OTE4MDY2NjExNzU2JmM9cjB2OSZlPTE5MjgmYj05MTIzMTYxMDYmZD1mNWI5cTlu.OIL9htNpYng-TXMUvtclct2wJ2uBgZzJC_-ixaUuH-4)

This year, we are going to continue to push for more school choice, as well as ensuring that parents’ voices in their children’s education are not silenced, but rather encouraged, and more importantly, listened to by local school boards. Protect school choice options for NH families. Support local school districts and lower property taxes with increased funding. Ensure that NH parents have the right to speak at their local school board meetings and have a say in their children’s curriculum. | | | | | | | Keeping our streets and homes safe In New Hampshire we pride ourselves on consistently being named one of the safest states in the country. Unfortunately, we’ve seen a disturbing rise in crime throughout the country. We need to stop this trend before it spreads and ensure that New Hampshire remains the best place to live, work and raise a family. Ensure our bail system prevents violent criminals from further harming the public and ensure that individuals who have received bail, actually show up for their judicial proceeding. Improve notification after arrest of those on probation and parole. Ensuring honest elections Honest and fair elections are the key to a healthy Democracy. We need to ensure that New Hampshire ballots are being cast only by New Hampshire residents and that the Democrats’ dangerous federal takeover of our elections is stopped before it takes root in our state and threatens our secure election process. Ensure voting is reserved for NH residents. Update and improve absentee ballots applications. Update and clarify NH’s campaign finance limits. Improve NH voters’ access to election information. | | | | | | | Infrastructure Improvements Strong infrastructure is paramount to a strong state economy, from repairing our roads and bridges to increasing broadband capacity in our rural communities. We need to ensure that our infrastructure money is spent efficiently on the most necessary projects. Develop a 10-year highway plan that partners with federal improvement projects while also identifying necessary state projects for transportation funding. Work with the Governor to implement an environmental infrastructure program funded through ARPA funds. Projects will include parks, dams, hatcheries and others. Work with the Governor to use ARPA funds to implement telecommunication improvements such as connectivity. Work with the Governor to use ARPA funds for regional communication equipment upgrades. Protect taxpayers from high public works construction costs. Energy & the Environment Gas prices and the cost to heat our homes have risen markedly since the new administration took over in Washington. New Hampshire needs responsible state energy and environmental policies that look out for Granite State families. Require the Saint Gobain company to pay for remediation of PFAS pollution in Merrimack. Protect New Hampshire families from efforts to increase costs of energy, including electricity and home heating oil. * Ensure New Hampshire cities and towns have the funding they need to improve water quality and repair or prevent contamination of their water supply. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by the New Hampshire Senate Republican PAC, Jeb Bradley Chairman | | | NH Senate Republicans PAC | | P.O. Box 30, Concord NH 03302 United States | You received this email because you signed up on our website or at an event.

I have "A-RATINGS" from:
the conservative HERITAGE FOUNDATION.

I voted for 90 PERCENT of President Donald Trump's agenda. And I've introduced legislation to boost border security and STOP illegal immigration, protect your medical freedoms by ending Biden's unconstitutional vaccine mandate, and stop the relentless attacks on America's oil and gas industry.
I am the only member of Congress to introduce legislation that would BLOCK unconstitutional red flag laws. I introduced the Stop Unjust Red Flag Laws Act (H.R. 5417), which would prohibit federal funding of federal or state red flag laws.
I am a pro-life conservative who stands up for the rights of the unborn. I opposed federal funding of abortion clinics like Planned Parenthood, opposed taxpayer funding for abortion, and helped introduce the Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act.
