name: Tobias Read
subject: With Nick Kristof out, I need your help more than ever
body:
Today the Oregon Supreme Court issued their ruling precluding Nick Kristof from running for Governor.
---
| | Dear Peter, Today the Oregon Supreme Court issued their ruling precluding Nick Kristof from running for Governor. Nick has deep love for our great state. He and I are more similar than we are different, and I wish him well. I welcome his supporters to join our team because we share many of the same priorities: **we want leadership that will shake up the status quo.** **[The race is just me and Tina Kotek now, and that’s why it’s so critical that you join the campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41918347/330880499/-2045037038?refcode=em021722&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmIwMjY2Zi0yNzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u6h-WrhDCIyJT90g9jNznY36oscPTYfrLdWE96EOzDg=)** This is a critical moment for Oregon. Crime and homicides are skyrocketing, housing challenges and homelessness crises are out of control, parents are struggling to keep their kids in school and find daycare, teachers are exhausted by three years of Covid disruptions, and our largest employers are creating jobs elsewhere. As Speaker for 10 years, Tina Kotek set the state’s agenda on all of these issues, and now we’ve seen the results. The choice facing Oregon Democrats is whether or not we want more of the same. I know Nick Kristof and his supporters agree that we can’t afford that. I met with Nick at his farm in Yamhill some time ago, well before we became competing candidates for Governor. We talked about the challenges rural Oregonians are facing, and how so many people feel that their state government has left them behind. I’ve seen that first hand in my travels to far flung parts of Oregon that have been devastated by wildfires, or areas where families struggle to access the internet. So believe me when I tell you that I understand why Nick ran for Governor. **He and I share the same drive to cut through the red tape and get something done for rural Oregon. I know that we can do it with your help.** **[But first we have to get through this primary. Will you help us get there with a contribution today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41918348/330880500/-2045037038?refcode=em021722&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmIwMjY2Zi0yNzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u6h-WrhDCIyJT90g9jNznY36oscPTYfrLdWE96EOzDg=)** Stay safe,

---

---

* * *
| [DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41918349/330880501/-2045037038?refcode=footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmIwMjY2Zi0yNzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u6h-WrhDCIyJT90g9jNznY36oscPTYfrLdWE96EOzDg=)

name: Paxton's Patriots
subject: Taking Joe Biden to Court on Masks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ken Paxton Campaign
body:
Paxton's Patriots Daily Update February 17, 2022

|
---
**Paxton's Patriots Daily Update February 17, 2022**

**Paxton's Patriots Suggested Social Media Post With Clip to Share: **

**Post:** Ken Paxton has filed his 22nd lawsuit against Joe Biden and his rogue administration to end the virtue-signaling mask mandates for airplanes and airports. This mandate is an unconstitutional abuse of government power & Ken Paxton will always defend our rights.

name: Mike Gibbons
subject: Can’t afford another career politician
body:
The Biden economy continues to sink under the weight of its record inflation, rising prices, and declining growth. What is the Democrat’s solution? SPEND MORE MONEY.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018nEBYRos4qFgqQmN6JJDuPFdnsA9-tXqDiO4ZJ-IfQAmhHMttlA1pEAGRdeXHYL_SNszMIIsNAC_DQzWVRiGgvvOzEddBRbbv2IfWhrB-PbPs-ZsIoljg1dMb2wk2uS-TrRBjckLLhhWK-rA04yV3D09FmrqsHNn0DJrhzcc-98HsZxH9IR5Dg==&c=HY8gnoNYNBAFc4jA-ji058SMqp1_EA2kWz4FWrYM1xkqnSKfbVm1Hw==&ch=-5SqYvrMyUXBDqQu31HrJ41V863FFXor5hDavqyc-dPMZ1_WnidJRg==)
---
| Peter,
The Biden economy continues to sink under the weight of its record inflation, rising prices, and declining growth.
What is the Democrat's solution? SPEND MORE MONEY.
We need to send people to DC who have private sector experience and understand how the economy works. I'm not a politician. I'm a businessman.
I know the government can't keep spending money to solve all its problems. Yet the Biden administration has pushed our debt over $30 TRILLION.
Americans have had enough of the bankrupt Biden Administration and its failures on all fronts. America cannot continue to bear this reckless spending. We cannot wait until 2024 to take back the Senate and stop Biden's agenda.
Peter, you can help me stop them in 2022 by supporting my campaign.
[Conservatives must win in Ohio if we want to take back the Senate. Will you donate $20.22, $35, $50, or even $100 to our campaign today? Click here to donate >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018nEBYRos4qFgqQmN6JJDuPFdnsA9-tXqDiO4ZJ-IfQAmhHMttlA1pEAGRdeXHYL_SNszMIIsNAC_DQzWVRiGgvvOzEddBRbbv2IfWhrB-PbPs-ZsIoljg1dMb2wk2uS-TrRBjckLLhhWK-rA04yV3D09FmrqsHNn0DJrhzcc-98HsZxH9IR5Dg==&c=HY8gnoNYNBAFc4jA-ji058SMqp1_EA2kWz4FWrYM1xkqnSKfbVm1Hw==&ch=-5SqYvrMyUXBDqQu31HrJ41V863FFXor5hDavqyc-dPMZ1_WnidJRg==)
It's not the politicians who pay for their costly mistakes. It's the American people. Washington has already cost us enough. Can we really afford to let them continue?
Peter, I'm a pro-Trump businessman with a game plan for us to prosper again.
I know how to create jobs for Ohio because I've done it. Career politicians haven't. They've created a corrupt system that has led to back-room deals, special favors, and an out-of-control bureaucracy.
I promise to fix this mess in Washington D.C and get things done for Ohioans as their next US Senator.

clean_body: The Biden economy continues to sink under the weight of its record inflation, rising prices, and declining growth. What is the Democrat’s solution? SPEND MORE MONEY. | | | | | | == | Peter, The Biden economy continues to sink under the weight of its record inflation, rising prices, and declining growth. What is the Democrat's solution? SPEND MORE MONEY. We need to send people to DC who have private sector experience and understand how the economy works. I'm not a politician. I'm a businessman. I know the government can't keep spending money to solve all its problems. Yet the Biden administration has pushed our debt over $30 TRILLION. Americans have had enough of the bankrupt Biden Administration and its failures on all fronts. America cannot continue to bear this reckless spending. We cannot wait until 2024 to take back the Senate and stop Biden's agenda. Peter, you can help me stop them in 2022 by supporting my campaign. == It's not the politicians who pay for their costly mistakes. It's the American people. Washington has already cost us enough. Can we really afford to let them continue? Peter, I'm a pro-Trump businessman with a game plan for us to prosper again. I know how to create jobs for Ohio because I've done it. Career politicians haven't. They've created a corrupt system that has led to back-room deals, special favors, and an out-of-control bureaucracy. I promise to fix this mess in Washington D.C and get things done for Ohioans as their next US Senator. You can help me win this election by clicking below and donating today. == == == == == == == We have to elect people who understand how to turn the economy around and get things done. As Senator, I will work to fix this mess. Since the beginning of February, we’ve seen a significant drop-off in individual contributions from supporters. We pushed hard to reach our goal last month but that wasn’t the end of the fight. In fact, February brings us one step closer to Election Day which makes this goal all the more important. If we want to make this deficit up, I need your help raising $4,500 in the next three days. This mid-month goal is doable but it’s going to take all of us to get it done. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for helping my campaign reach its goal. Together, Susie Lee | | = If you'd like to support Susie Lee For Congress, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to remove yourself from our list, click | Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress Susie Lee for Congress 5130 S Fort Apache Rd Ste 215-382 Las Vegas, NV 89148 mailto:info@susieleeforcongress.com

| | OTTAWA, Canada - Almost all Canadian truckers are vaccinated and resent the protesters, whose shutdown of international borders has "had a very significant negative impact upon our professional driving community," according to Stephen Laskowski, the president of the Canadian Trucking Alliance. Yet, my opponent, Jack Bergman, supports this disruption, describing it as “push back” against “bureaucrats who hate individual freedom.”
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41920015/330888864/1280001822?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZThhZWJiNS0yYzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qz53CikY7uVWnvH94MK3kOMaB7ADXmffAJaTkD1pcbM=)
---
So who does Bergman support?
* Those who plan on overthrowing the Canadian government
* Those prepared to use violence to maintain a blockade
* Conspiracy theorists who have endorsed the QAnon movement, with their logos emblazoned on trucks
* Misguided people who called COVID-19 "the biggest political scam in history"
* Those who believe COVID vaccines facilitate the injection of 5G-enabled microchips into the population
* Neo-Nazi and Confederate flags flying at the rallies
* Signs and stickers pasted to telephone poles around the occupied area bear Trudeau's face, reading: "Wanted for crimes against humanity."
* Canada Unity organizers who stated to "go after the prime minister" for "corruption" and "fascism"
* The radical fringe
* Leaders of the convoy are not truckers themselves. Instead,**_far_** right-wing agitators.
* The demonstrations are not about vaccine mandates.

Instead, Mendocino said the core protesters as "a small number of individuals with a steely resolve, driven by an extreme ideology that would seek to overthrow the existing government.” “There have been those who have tried to characterize these illegal blockades [as being] about vaccines and mandates and fatigue with the pandemic,” said Mendocino. “That is not what is driving this movement right now. What is driving this movement is a very small, organized group that is driven by an ideology to overthrow the government.” **Bergman threatened our democracy on Jan 6th, and now he supports similar threats in Canada.** **This protest isn't about individual freedom, far from it. Citizens of Ottawa and the police do not want it to continue.** **Jack Bergman's message isn't the judgment I expect from a Representative. Disquieting, Disgusting, and Disturbing.**
---

That's why I'm reaching out to you before my next fundraising deadline at midnight tonight. We have the momentum, but we need grassroots resources to win: Can you donate $5 right now to defeat Sen. Grassley and protect our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41920187/330889905/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk683-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjMzZjhkZi0yYzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CPHYfveXUVl8Iri00z4GjyNT6pa5ipCGct4VYbNSbK8=)**

**But Republicans across the nation will be spending MILLIONS to take back the Senate and stop Democratic challengers like me. So, I'm going to need grassroots supporters like you to get this campaign across the finish line – $10, $20, $50 at a time.**
**With nearly two-thirds of Iowans ready for new leadership and Sen. Grassley facing record-high disapproval ratings, we have an unprecedented opportunity in Iowa. subject: Joe knows what it means to serve…
body:
Before Joe was swearing an oath to protect our community and our values as a Sheriff, he swore an oath to protect and defend this country in the United States Army.
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017kQ05BPx7Q7MgzKLaeteMMK-m1quGXWtbSWyY_d8Ios1uLRoR1f45Elje6Vm4Fqnu5GhmetJmF0N1MkbMCtmCAOBXd1defnchTV3wpJFV5mA8jTV96xSKCUFhxdRAeZ3Y7YN3s5k-meqJLh7cCTAP_Qp-Xo3y8NSs1PzyrzQ7zJkD7F4abu1EvpHD_j73JUEmCFSN33nbsU9n7y9wXh_cMREnQCbbe7V&c=z9hUnH1OJjkV-3gh83DMlBHOCyXWLPjg8EqBwBX3nAPKx-sZpsG-6Q==&ch=zpnlrawEroeEfnOuVvz1hz1nwj6lbP0hfu4Zb6WtzoYx-Jkjsq8thg==)

| Peter,
Before Joe was swearing an oath to protect our community and our values as a Sheriff, he swore an oath to protect and defend this country in the United States Army.
He's the only candidate in this race for Governor to take BOTH of those oaths - and that's why we know Joe means it when he says he's dedicated to keeping Nevada safe.
He's served us both as a Sheriff and as an Army soldier... And now Joe's ready to continue that service as the next Governor of the state of Nevada, working to improve our schools, improve our economy, and keep our communities SAFE!
Service is in Sheriff Joe's nature... [Will you help him put it to work as Governor?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017kQ05BPx7Q7MgzKLaeteMMK-m1quGXWtbSWyY_d8Ios1uLRoR1f45Elje6Vm4Fqnu5GhmetJmF0N1MkbMCtmCAOBXd1defnchTV3wpJFV5mA8jTV96xSKCUFhxdRAeZ3Y7YN3s5k-meqJLh7cCTAP_Qp-Xo3y8NSs1PzyrzQ7zJkD7F4abu1EvpHD_j73JUEmCFSN33nbsU9n7y9wXh_cMREnQCbbe7V&c=z9hUnH1OJjkV-3gh83DMlBHOCyXWLPjg8EqBwBX3nAPKx-sZpsG-6Q==&ch=zpnlrawEroeEfnOuVvz1hz1nwj6lbP0hfu4Zb6WtzoYx-Jkjsq8thg==)

subject: Don’t miss this upgrade opportunity

body:
| | | | Dear Patriot,

We would like to formally invite you to our new Platinum Membership Club.

This is an exclusive opportunity for top supporters like yourself, and it won't last long.

_**[Will you please accept this offer and upgrade your membership? Click here.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59581051:J5u7n9ECN:m:1:3299561967:A2D5E7B6B471BF0FCA07760CB9D60690:r "Will you please accept this offer and upgrade your membership? Click here.")**_

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59581051:J5u7n9ECN:m:1:3299561967:A2D5E7B6B471BF0FCA07760CB9D60690:r "PLATINUM
MEMBERSHIP UPGRADE YOUR 2022 MEMBERSHIP CARD")
---
| | | [UPGRADE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59581051:J5u7n9ECN:m:1:3299561967:A2D5E7B6B471BF0FCA07760CB9D60690:r "UPGRADE NOW")
---
Your support is crucial to our fight to win back the House Majority for Republicans in 2022.

Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden are raising millions of dollars from their liberal elite donors. In order to overcome their fundraising, we are calling on grassroots supporters like you to step up one more time.

You have the power to retire Nancy Pelosi as House Speaker, end Joe Biden's political agenda, and restore conservative leadership in Washington.

_**[Accept your Platinum Membership upgrade now to ensure victory for House Republicans.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59581051:J5u7n9ECN:m:1:3299561967:A2D5E7B6B471BF0FCA07760CB9D60690:r "Accept your Platinum Membership upgrade now to ensure victory for House Republicans.")**_

You will be issued a new wallet ID card soon after you accept your upgrade.

Thank you,

Platinum Club, the NRCC
---
| | | [UPGRADE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59581051:J5u7n9ECN:m:1:3299561967:A2D5E7B6B471BF0FCA07760CB9D60690:r "UPGRADE NOW")
---
| |
* * *

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59581052:J5u7n9ECN:m:1:3299561967:A2D5E7B6B471BF0FCA07760CB9D60690:r "Red Wave Image
Link")

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59581052:J5u7n9ECN:m:1:3299561967:A2D5E7B6B471BF0FCA07760CB9D60690:r "Can we count on
you to step up?")**
---
| | | [DONATE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59581052:J5u7n9ECN:m:1:3299561967:A2D5E7B6B471BF0FCA07760CB9D60690:r "Donate Button in Footer")
---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

---

**BREAKING NEWS:**
**Florida House PASSES a bill banning abortion after 15 weeks**
Friend, _I’m worried about what will happen to people in Florida if Gov. DeSantis remains in office._

Last month, Politico reported that DeSantis “broadly suggested support for any measure that limits access to abortion.” **And last night, Florida Republicans passed one of the most restrictive anti-choice laws in the country.**

We know that DeSantis will do whatever it takes to restrict reproductive rights. The past four years have shown his true colors, and I don’t want to find out what will happen if he wins reelection -- and then runs for president.

But I can’t defeat him on my own. No one can. Instead, it’ll take a huge, statewide movement to toss Gov. DeSantis out of office, which is why I’m writing this email.

**[I can’t stay silent on this, not when DeSantis and right-wing extremists are willing to take away Floridans’ freedoms in the dead of night. DeSantis remains in office. Last month, Politico reported that DeSantis “broadly suggested support for any measure that limits access to abortion.” And last night, Florida Republicans passed one of the most restrictive anti-choice laws in the country. We know that DeSantis will do whatever it takes to restrict reproductive rights. The past four years have shown his true colors, and I don’t want to find out what will happen if he wins reelection -- and then runs for president. But I can’t defeat him on my own. No one can. Instead, it’ll take a huge, statewide movement to toss Gov. body:
My gloves are off. I am so tired of obstructionism.

[**My gloves are coming off now that my fundraising blackout is over. If you don’t want to read another word of this email, will you help shoot us out of the gate with a $20 contribution right now? I am so tired of the obstructionism of our democracy. I cannot sugarcoat any of this: federal voting rights legislation has stalled with the threat of a filibuster. Today, my bill to expand voting rights legislation stalled with the New Mexico GOP obstruction.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41920749/330892946/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_220217FR1_OPPO_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_N_G1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2Q0ZmM2ZC0zMDkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Vu0CM4f16iw1ZW_F6X4IVOwS2ViJx_Ej2-BGF-FQYY=)

Maggie Toulouse Oliver

She's up for re-election in 2022, and we need to start building our grassroots movement to keep her seat safe. **Help Maggie protect our elections system and create a stronger democracy! subject: Liz Cheney charges Donald Trump!?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
GOP leadership is FURIOUS!
| **Team, Liz Cheney just made our day:** [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/stand_LC_PET_copy/?source=VPP_20220217_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=1279%2E878179%2E6BM3LR) While we don’t always agree with Liz Cheney, **we LOVE that she isn’t afraid to hold Trump accountable for his role in the January 6th insurrection.**

_But GOP leadership is FURIOUS._ They’re ramping up their attacks on Cheney to FORCE her off the Jan. 6th Commission and to let Trump get off scot-free. [Unless 35,000 good Democrats stand with Liz Cheney by MIDNIGHT, she could fold to far-right MAGA attacks – SIGN NOW TO STAND WITH LIZ CHENEY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/stand_LC_PET_copy/?source=VPP_20220217_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=1279%2E878179%2E6BM3LR) | [SIGN NOW: Stand with Liz Cheney »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/stand_LC_PET_copy/?source=VPP_20220217_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=1279%2E878179%2E6BM3LR)
---
* * *
Team, we’re DISGUSTED by the GOP’s leadership.

**FIRST:** Liz Cheney bravely spoke out and told Trump he’s FULLY RESPONSIBLE for the January 6th attacks on the U.S. Capitol. She’s _AMAZING!_

**THEN:** GOP leadership publicly PUNISHED Cheney in an attempt to silence her.

**NOW:** Liz Cheney is refusing to back down! Instead of bowing down to Trump, she’s following the FACTS!!
[**But she’s still facing brutal attacks – so we need 35,000 signatures to show Liz Cheney that we stand with her. Will you sign?** »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/stand_LC_PET_copy/?source=VPP_20220217_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=1279%2E878179%2E6BM3LR)
[SIGN NOW: Stand with Liz Cheney »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/stand_LC_PET_copy/?source=VPP_20220217_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=1279%2E878179%2E6BM3LR)
---
Thank you,

_VPP_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1279%2E878179%2E6BM3LR). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1279%2E878179%2E6BM3LR).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1279%2E878179%2E6BM3LR) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=1279%2E878179%2E6BM3LR). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=1279%2E878179%2E6BM3LR)

---
|
---
| Dear Patriot Mark Burns, I'm honored to have received Arizona GOP Chairwoman [Dr. Kelli Ward's](https://sender14.zohoinsights.com/ck/2d6f.327230a/ac2c8060-904a-11ec-bd24-525400103106/e2423c14adbe4ff891da294234efc0dfa9c556fb/2?e=4fHAKuczDb%2BgUaTyWWijKHWccpnITf%2Fdy8hyCnRgffs%3D "https://www.kelliward.com/") endorsement for Congress in SC's 4th district!
Kelli is a true America First warrior.
---
|
---
|
---
| **
****FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
PressTeam@MarkBurnsforCongress.com
202.374.7371
**AZ GOP Chairwoman Kelli Ward Endorses Trump's "Top Pastor" Mark Burns for Congress** **Greenville, SC ****– ** America First Arizona Republican Party Chairwoman Kelli Ward has endorsed Pastor Mark Burns for Congress in South Carolina's 4th Congressional District.

Ward, who recently won re-election as GOP Chairwoman in Arizona, is a vocal proponent of President Trump's America First agenda.

"Pastor Mark Burns represents so much about the appeal that President Trump’s America First Agenda has for ALL Americans," Ward said

"After witnessing his historic speech at the RNC convention in 2016, it’s clear why Pastor Burns is considered Trump’s Top Pastor by Time Magazine," she continued.

"South Carolinians and Americans nationwide need Mark Burns fighting for Donald Trump’s America First agenda and against the far-left communists and too-silent Republicans in Washington, D.C.," said the Arizona party chairwoman.

"I am proud to give Pastor Mark Burns my complete and total endorsement for U.S. House in South Carolina’s 4th district," Ward concluded.

Kelli Ward recently won reelection as Arizona's Republican Party chair despite a concerted, coordinated effort from the corporate media and the swampy elements from within the Republican Party to remove her. "Kelli Ward has sacrificed so much in the fight against the D.C. elites, going toe-to-toe with the John McCain swamp machine to fighting for President Trump's election in 2016 and 2020," Burns said in response to the endorsement.

"To have Kelli's support for my run for congress is humbling, and shows a clear shift in the direction the Republican Party is headed," Burns closed. _
__Pastor Mark Burns served as a surrogate for Donald Trump in 2016, is a well known pastor, speaker, and author, and is a national advocate for the America First movement. Burns has been endorsed by General Mike Flynn, _
---
|
---
|
# I BELIEVE:
* If we don't fix these elections NOW, America will be lost. Without open, honest, transparent elections, no other issue matters.

* If we don't fix these elections NOW, America will be lost

* Tyrannical Tech Oligarchs have taken over our constitutional republic, and they must be stopped.

* Life begins at conception.

* Marriage is defined as between one man and one woman.

* Our right to bear arms is INHERENT, given to us by God almighty -- NOT by any man.

* A big, beautiful wall should protect our Border.

* Our troops should protect America -- NOT foreign nations.

* The First Amendment is absolute: religious & political freedom are basic civil right, as it is the right to hold an opinion.

* Well funded police and the protection of the Rule of Law are imperative to civil society.

* Critical Race Theory is Communist, anti-white Racism.

* Vaccine and mask mandates are medical tyranny, and have no place in America.

* The Pelosi budget opens the door wide open to full-blown communism.

---
| [](https://sender14.zohoinsights.com/ck/2d6f.327230a/ac2c8060-904a-11ec-bd24-525400103106/f46db960f35506d08be116cdec3372235a9b6680/1?e=SOjWGDoXFIiL4NdxiGLZkaXIREiXHzet4oopw6lmBTY%3D "http://markburns.org/donate")
---
| **Please Go to[MarkBurns.org](http://Markburns.org "http://Markburns.org") and sign up to volunteer for my campaign, make a contribution, and join me in the fight to Save America.**

---
|
---
|
---

This race just got interesting, folks — **We are only 90 days away from the Democratic primary election. **Over the next three months, things are going to ramp up, and if we want Ashley to win the primary, we are going to have to hustle. No more zooms, no more boring cold calls. It’s time to roll up our sleeves and start writing postcards and holding text-a-thons, and take this campaign to the streets, with house parties, barbecues, fish fries, and good old-fashioned door knocking. | [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41920972/330893869/-1229619614?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220217threemonths_hj_full_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmMyNTdkZi0zMTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x81l4OH9FDFRLYO-YgTaiKw-IeBnAQykkYYeHf-Zzfg=)

Democratic voters in PA-01 can no longer afford to accept politics-as-usual if we are to win against the political dynasty of Brian Fitzpatrick, who cares more about his fellow Republicans in Washington than our values here in Pennsylvania.

clean_body: | = This race just got interesting, folks — We are only 90 days away from the Democratic primary election. Over the next three months, things are going to ramp up, and if we want Ashley to win the primary, we are going to have to hustle. No more zooms, no more boring cold calls. It’s time to roll up our sleeves and start writing postcards and holding text-a-thons, and take this campaign to the streets, with house parties, barbecues, fish fries, and good old-fashioned door knocking. | = This won’t be a typical campaign, because Ashley is not a typical candidate. Most candidates don’t drop the f-bomb in their campaign video [[watch by clicking here]](=). Democratic voters in PA-01 can no longer afford to accept politics-as-usual if we are to win against the political dynasty of Brian Fitzpatrick, who cares more about his fellow Republicans in Washington than our values here in Pennsylvania. But to build up a boots-on-the-ground operation, we need resources to hire staff, print palm cards, and have campaign swag made. (union shop only!) That’s where supporters like you come in: **= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = ** **= ** **** | **= = ** | **= = Thanks for all that you’ve done, and all that you will do to get this campaign fired up! Hannah Jeffrey, Team Ehasz | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District: to provide our communities with the services and opportunities they need to thrive, to create positive change, and to ensure the next generation will have a better future ahead of them. | = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army. name: Pro Life Update
subject: Free government requires informed citizens
body:
Hillsdale College was founded in 1844 with a mission to provide “all who wish to learn” the education necessary to preserve
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z708ac1qm5hv5f5bsurie9bcfr1bmd45sm9r8sr0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u5hbfdr0sppb1chheuoe1c3kshjjadb0s9r38pbic5qj5cj0mhj78pr56upb2s77q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfchlcoob5cr0c1p7ephhe2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or1cli6co37ctjm49fg)
| This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
---
Hillsdale College was founded in 1844 with a mission to provide “all who wish to learn” the education necessary to preserve the civil and religious liberties of America. They understood, like the founders of our great nation, that free government requires independent, virtuous, and knowledgeable citizens.
In 2011 Hillsdale launched its online courses program to extend this mission and to teach the core subjects of a Hillsdale education free of charge. Since that time, more than 2.8 million Americans have partnered with us in this effort.
Today, we’d like to invite you to study our nation’s founding documents—the documents that secure liberty for you and all Americans—absolutely free of charge.
Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen ‘09
Director of Online Learning, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---

name: Team Tom
subject: Your input
body:
We have the opportunity to make crucial inroads toward curbing the climate crisis in Maryland, and we want your input:
#

Team,

Climate change is the most pressing threat facing our world today, and we can feel the lasting effects right here in Maryland.

**Time is running out to save the cultural and economic treasures that make us proud to be Marylanders.** From temperatures rising one to two degrees Fahrenheit in the last decade to increased coastal and inland flooding to compounded personal health outcomes from pollution and extreme weather, we’re facing a _crisis-level_ threat.

Thankfully, we have the opportunity to make crucial inroads toward curbing the climate crisis in Maryland and regain our status as a leader in offshore wind. **With a robust investment in a green energy workforce, we can create thousands of jobs and become a unionized leader in manufacturing offshore wind turbines – a win-win for workers, businesses, and the environment.**

Knowing this, we want your input:
**How important is it to you that the next governor of Maryland build a green infrastructure, starting with creating clean energy jobs?**
Very Important
Somewhat Important
Not Very Important
Not At All Important
******[SUBMIT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41921192/330894872/-659660118?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzc1NTA5Ni0zMzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m0vQmdTdfcTi8onNIMvVtm-e7TbAfZAfv2x0ocYx0FE=&emci=5795dbc7-3290-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=2c755096-3390-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)******
Thank you for speaking up,

Team Tom

P.S. As Governor, Tom is committed to making immediate progress toward ensuring Maryland is at the forefront of climate action – starting with a focus on green energy jobs and environmental justice.

**[Read his Climate Plan here>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41921193/330894873/850846536?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzc1NTA5Ni0zMzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m0vQmdTdfcTi8onNIMvVtm-e7TbAfZAfv2x0ocYx0FE=&emci=5795dbc7-3290-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=2c755096-3390-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)**

**[Contribute $10 or whatever you can to help him get to Annapolis to fight for us>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41921194/330894874/1691752261?refcode=bpi-em-null-null-20220217-climatechangesurvey-null&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzc1NTA5Ni0zMzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m0vQmdTdfcTi8onNIMvVtm-e7TbAfZAfv2x0ocYx0FE=)**

******[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41921195/330894875/1691752261?refcode=bpi-em-null-null-20220217-climatechangesurvey-DB&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzc1NTA5Ni0zMzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m0vQmdTdfcTi8onNIMvVtm-e7TbAfZAfv2x0ocYx0FE=)******

name: Bud Pierce for Governor
subject: I am running to make Oregon Safe and Prosperous Again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bud Pierce for Oregon
body:
This is Dr. Bud Pierce, and I am running for Governor of Oregon to lead our great state back to a place that is safe and prosperous for Oregon’s citizens!
---
| | | | | | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sMLqXLc3RIbgGWTJfWzPBaK52LD2VmF2GXrvP0d4RX2Gir_3O7Qejvrp6gqG4lzkr-pOK46DiyApEhCUy9TvhCBoJSRMErxJ5cIWRJDIqgfDwHbZWdqcFUqWdKU_QLVDnpUkc501RMcmLsBCkRc_rtHSkKOSMFdycwkoCHSJ7d-oyTOAvJXqHJh4H91Q_m0pLFKsIKodbc0zabdcP4ScPQ==&c=HDZAxTuEKv63oCFF-N6CDD3vIeRj4r8xif1jutlZEzRxyA3QShamdA==&ch=vIOlK6ImNOtr4QQD_KvLtEs36hxGGIMuEXKq6cmvYR2IQ1QLADqA1Q==)
---
| Peter,
This is Dr. Bud Pierce, and I am running for Governor of Oregon to lead our great state back to a place that is safe and prosperous for Oregon's citizens!
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sMLqXLc3RIbgGWTJfWzPBaK52LD2VmF2GXrvP0d4RX2Gir_3O7Qejvrp6gqG4lzkr-pOK46DiyApEhCUy9TvhCBoJSRMErxJ5cIWRJDIqgfDwHbZWdqcFUqWdKU_QLVDnpUkc501RMcmLsBCkRc_rtHSkKOSMFdycwkoCHSJ7d-oyTOAvJXqHJh4H91Q_m0pLFKsIKodbc0zabdcP4ScPQ==&c=HDZAxTuEKv63oCFF-N6CDD3vIeRj4r8xif1jutlZEzRxyA3QShamdA==&ch=vIOlK6ImNOtr4QQD_KvLtEs36hxGGIMuEXKq6cmvYR2IQ1QLADqA1Q==)
---
| I watched with great sadness and anger this past year as lawless rioters harmed Oregonians and destroyed public and private property in our great city of Portland. These were not citizens protesting to improve our society; these were criminals bent on mayhem and destruction. Our elected leaders demoralized our law enforcement by not supporting them and by not holding people who committed crimes accountable for their actions. This has led to unsafe streets, boarded up windows, graffiti, and the exodus of businesses and citizens from our great city. Portland will only return to its former greatness when the streets are safe, public and private property are protected, and the homeless are off the streets and into shelters.
I watched with great sadness and anger this past year at the ever increasing numbers of homeless citizens in our capital city of Salem. For years, the homeless have camped along the rivers of Salem, but their increasing numbers led many of them to camp on public sidewalks, public parks, and on private property. The answer is public shelters, linked with wraparound services, and a refusal to continue to enable the self-destructive behaviors that many homeless people practice.
I watched with great sadness and anger this past year as thousands of Oregon's small businesses were forced to shut their doors to protect public health. Government has been very careful to support government services, large businesses, and individual citizens with subsidies to replace lost income. However, small businesses have been given very meager support, leading to business failures and great financial losses. Small businesses must be given a lifeline so that they are able to reopen as the pandemic ends, without their owners facing public ruin.
I watched with great sadness and anger this past year as many of Oregon's children spent the year receiving little in the way of education and training. Oregon's students already suffer in one of the poorest performing K-12 educational systems in our country. A too-short school year and poor instruction leads to some of the worst test scores in our nation. We need real educational reform with a standardized, sequential curriculum and a variety of public educational options with differing subject emphasis and structure. Students and parents must decide the best pathway for each student, and funding must follow the student in order to improve our poorly functioning K-12 educational system.
I stand ready to lead Oregonians in solving these problems, which have only worsened while we have been led by career politicians. Life has taught me how to lead in the challenging fields of medicine, business, and philanthropy. Real leadership is learned in the trenches of life, not in a life of elected political office. As your Governor, I pledge to you that our streets will be safe, your property will be protected, the homeless will be off the streets once and for all, our educational system will greatly improve, and Oregon's small businesses will thrive!
I humbly ask for your support in this campaign.
---
| | | [JOIN ME](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sMLqXLc3RIbgGWTJfWzPBaK52LD2VmF2GXrvP0d4RX2Gir_3O7Qejvrp6gqG4lzkr-pOK46DiyApEhCUy9TvhCBoJSRMErxJ5cIWRJDIqgfDwHbZWdqcFUqWdKU_QLVDnpUkc501RMcmLsBCkRc_rtHSkKOSMFdycwkoCHSJ7d-oyTOAvJXqHJh4H91Q_m0pLFKsIKodbc0zabdcP4ScPQ==&c=HDZAxTuEKv63oCFF-N6CDD3vIeRj4r8xif1jutlZEzRxyA3QShamdA==&ch=vIOlK6ImNOtr4QQD_KvLtEs36hxGGIMuEXKq6cmvYR2IQ1QLADqA1Q==)
---
| Sincerely, Dr. Bud Pierce
---
| | |
---
| Bud Pierce for Governor | budpierce.org
---

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Build Crack Better
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ

| | | Peter,

We’ve moved the date of our [**Field Kickoff & Rally to Saturday, March 5th at 10 am!**](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=d28d408245&e=de8b2615ea) Our campaign is excited to have you join us for our first big in-person event. We’ll gather in **[Washington Park](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=023035e73a&e=de8b2615ea)** at the Olive Tree picnic area on the corner of Carolan and Burlingame Avenue.

Join us for an energizing (and brief) rally — then grab a sign, campaign handouts, and hit the sidewalk to help us knock on doors! We can’t do this without your help.

**[Sign up today. Don’t miss out on our first in-person event of the year!](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=7a284cc89a&e=de8b2615ea)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Nuestro=20PAC?=
subject: Why the Country Has its Eyes on Texas
body:
How you can help us deliver wins in Texas | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/nuestropac/why-the-country-has-its-eyes-on-texas?e=b8f90417f9)
---
| |
---
| | -
Early voting in Texas began on Monday, February 14th, but, unfortunately, many Texans who vote by mail will not have their vote counted. As a matter of fact, [4 in 10 ballots will be flagged for rejection.](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=decc1b40ac&e=b8f90417f9) Why is this happening? This alarming rate of rejection is happening because Texas Republicans wrote, supported, and passed SB1.

In September 2021, Texas’ Republican Governor, Greg Abbott, signed SB1—a voter suppression bill into law. In addition to SB1 [increasing early voting hours in smaller, mostly Republican counties](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=757e6a8330&e=b8f90417f9), the bill bans drive-thru voting, outlaws 24-hour voting, bans the distribution of mail-in ballot applications, imposes new, strict ID requirements for voting by mail, and [includes many more restrictions.](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=664371c9b3&e=b8f90417f9) SB1 [disproportionately harms and suppresses vulnerable communities](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=2be363d46d&e=b8f90417f9), especially voters with disabilities, voters of color, and elderly voters.

**Texas Republicans must be stopped.**

The country has its eyes on the Texas primary and general elections. We are asking for your support to create effective and bilingual messaging and run multilayered paid communications strategies to win victories for Texas Democrats in 2022.

[Please consider sharing our efforts and making a contribution](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=a4b72dd70b&e=b8f90417f9) to help us send out mail, digital ads, calls, texts, TV, and radio ads across Texas.

---

As a matter of fact, Why is this happening? This alarming rate of rejection is happening because Texas Republicans wrote, supported, and passed SB1. In September 2021, Texas’ Republican Governor, Greg Abbott, signed SB1—a voter suppression bill into law. In addition to SB1 , the bill bans drive-thru voting, outlaws 24-hour voting, bans the distribution of mail-in ballot applications, imposes new, strict ID requirements for voting by mail, and SB1 , especially voters with disabilities, voters of color, and elderly voters. Texas Republicans must be stopped. The country has its eyes on the Texas primary and general elections. We are asking for your support to create effective and bilingual messaging and run multilayered paid communications strategies to win victories for Texas Democrats in 2022. to help us send out mail, digital ads, calls, texts, TV, and radio ads across Texas. | | | With much appreciation, \- Nuestro PAC | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Nuestro PAC, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: P.O. Box 15845 Washington, D.C. 20003 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

clean_body: [1] video attachment Peter, Nothing is more important to Alabama’s future than our children. That’s why it’s so important to fight for their access to quality education in classrooms where they feel comfortable and engaged. And that’s why the past two years have been so disastrous. I’m tired of getting lectured by liberal elites like Joe Biden and Anthony Fauci and their “rules for thee but not for me” hypocrisy. Our state, and most importantly, our CHILDREN deserve better. That’s why I’m running to STOP Biden’s harmful agenda and protect our freedoms. It’s time to start investing in Alabama’s future again, and that starts with our children. Thank you, Katie Britt Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

Here’s the thing: when you’re investing in a House race, you’re investing in a 1/435 share that may or may not be in the majority this time next year.

But by betting on a governor — even a dark horse race — you’re investing in expanding healthcare to 800,000 people who do not currently have access to Medicaid. This race means a lot for those people, a lot for the people who are sick of having their voting rights stomped on by McMaster, and a lot for Democrats in the South.

**So much is under threat and it’s all going to come down to governors to make these massive decisions. The stakes couldn't be higher. Will you donate now to become a founding member of the team?**

subject: Where do you stand?
body:
We need Truckers |

https://secure.winred.com/ramirez-for-virginia-inc/freedom-convoy?amount=17.76&utm_source=mc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20220215_truckersfortina_freedom-convoy
Friend,

Let us be clear, Tina STANDS WITH TRUCKERS.

The Freedom Convoy that is driving between America and Canada is being dismantled due to Canada's socialist leadership and Biden’s failed policies.

Right now, hundreds of thousands of truckers are protesting the COVID-19 policies put in place by Democrats in America. While the media may be trying to hide the truth, we need to show our support!

Join us in STANDING firm with the Truck Drivers of America by making a contribution of $17.76 to represent their Freedom Convoy! >> (https://secure.winred.com/ramirez-for-virginia-inc/freedom-convoy?amount=17.76&utm_source=mc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20220215_truckersfortina_freedom-convoy)

CONTRIBUTE $250 (https://secure.winred.com/ramirez-for-virginia-inc/freedom-convoy?amount=250&utm_source=mc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20220215_truckersfortina_freedom-convoy)

CONTRIBUTE $100 (https://secure.winred.com/ramirez-for-virginia-inc/freedom-convoy?amount=100&utm_source=mc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20220215_truckersfortina_freedom-convoy)

CONTRIBUTE $50 (https://secure.winred.com/ramirez-for-virginia-inc/freedom-convoy?amount=50&utm_source=mc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20220215_truckersfortina_freedom-convoy)

CONTRIBUTE $25 (https://secure.winred.com/ramirez-for-virginia-inc/freedom-convoy?amount=25&utm_source=mc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20220215_truckersfortina_freedom-convoy)

CONTRIBUTE $17.76 (https://secure.winred.com/ramirez-for-virginia-inc/freedom-convoy?amount=17.76&utm_source=mc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20220215_truckersfortina_freedom-convoy)

The Truck Drivers of this nation are the backbone of this economy. Without them medical supplies cannot be delivered, food doesn’t get on our shelves, and everyday goods we rely on are missing.

Stand firm with the Truck Drivers of America TODAY! (https://secure.winred.com/ramirez-for-virginia-inc/freedom-convoy?amount=17.76&utm_source=mc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20220215_truckersfortina_freedom-convoy)

Thank you,

Truckers for Tina

name: BREAKING (via Team West)
subject: We need to elect a climate scientist to the halls of Congress. You in, friend?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Matt West for Congress
body:
ABC News just reported an emergency. | **_ABC NEWS:_ “Southwest experiencing driest conditions in at least 1,200 years due to climate change, new study finds.”** Whew — whether it’s record-shattering heatwaves here in Oregon or a severe megadrought plaguing California, we can agree that our window of opportunity to act on the climate crisis is nearly closed shut. **[We desperately need leaders like Matt West who are willing to sound the alarm and use science-based solutions to save the planet. That’s why we’re calling on 50 pro-science Democrats to chip in today to help Matt get the job done>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41921890/330897790/2035722763?refcode=ea.4a57e843-3590-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.4a57e843-3590-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTU3ZTg0My0zNTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9gWukZWLo1CgKJfX6a-20IqjPEpzc3162l9HBEsq7yg=)** Matt has a Ph.D. in alternative energy production — and spent years studying and working to find the answers to climate change. There is no longer time to just “study the issue.” No time for half-measures. It’s time for bold action from leaders who know actually what the hell they’re talking about! Nothing short of a massive, sustained, crisis-level investment — coordinated with the rest of the world — can hope to save us. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41921895/330897796/2035722763?refcode=ea.4a57e843-3590-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.4a57e843-3590-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTU3ZTg0My0zNTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9gWukZWLo1CgKJfX6a-20IqjPEpzc3162l9HBEsq7yg=) This fight is bigger than simply protecting our treasured forests, our public lands, and the beautiful trails of Oregon’s sixth district, friend. The future of our planet is in literal jeopardy, and Congress will NEVER be able to solve this crisis without leaders who understand it. **The climate crisis is here and now, and we hope you’ll join Matt in the fight to make real progress — before it’s too late. My job on the campaign is to make sure every aspect of the campaign is not only running smoothly but that we’re hitting the benchmarks for growth that are necessary for building up a campaign that can win in our toss up district that will determine control of Congress.

**[Let’s show we have what it takes to build our campaign. The reason I came to work for Dan is that I’ve seen how passionate he is about doing right by his community. He’s focused on bringing good-paying jobs to our region and helped write and pass the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law to rebuild Michigan’s roads, repair bridges, replace lead pipes and expand high-speed broadband internet.

Now, he’s leading the fight to lower everyday costs for families by passing legislation to fix supply chain issues and bring back manufacturing jobs to Michigan. He’s working to lower the cost of prescription drugs and ensure affordable and clean drinking water for all, free from PFAS chemicals and lead.

I believe that Dan represents the best of our leaders and I want to do everything in my power to keep him fighting for us.

**Please chip in so we can do so:**

**[https://go.dankildee.com/a/feb22-goal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41921875/330897775/1546385125?amount=15&contactdata=JZLzYvA0p6sUstPHwy0TJfylOaFNP87fx8OBdGEAQbtTRvNS9iLHnzSlm%2FmHW5Xzito4lucPBUZ%2BP5Hee%2Bw4DciLBz1SyPpMyk4VidO3VXDzJvTihwRyz9BkkkoslLs%2BvU92%2FAdq2MiTsJXbmc9%2F9w%3D%3D&refcode2=4557e843-3590-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&refcode=DK_EM_FR_3MO_20220217_1_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTU3ZTg0My0zNTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Qp5m5M959QsgG9jHBmnf2qNvAfOYrLBP_wqLYDvl1M=)**

Danya Rafiqi
_Campaign Manager, Dan Kildee for Congress_

Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. clean_body: | Hi! I’m excited to meet you. I’m Danya, the new Campaign Manager here at Kildee HQ! My job on the campaign is to make sure every aspect of the campaign is not only running smoothly but that we’re hitting the benchmarks for growth that are necessary for building up a campaign that can win in our toss up district that will determine control of Congress. = If you saved your payment information with ActBlue Express clicking a button below will cause your donation to process instantly = = = = =** The reason I came to work for Dan is that I’ve seen how passionate he is about doing right by his community. He’s focused on bringing good-paying jobs to our region and helped write and pass the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law to rebuild Michigan’s roads, repair bridges, replace lead pipes and expand high-speed broadband internet. Now, he’s leading the fight to lower everyday costs for families by passing legislation to fix supply chain issues and bring back manufacturing jobs to Michigan. He’s working to lower the cost of prescription drugs and ensure affordable and clean drinking water for all, free from PFAS chemicals and lead. I believe that Dan represents the best of our leaders and I want to do everything in my power to keep him fighting for us. Please chip in so we can do so: = Thank you, Danya Rafiqi Campaign Manager, Dan Kildee for Congress Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. # U.S. Representative Jack Bergman Endorsement
---
| Congressman Jack Bergman of Michigan's First District has endorsed Republican Congressional candidate and decorated army veteran Erik Aadland in bid for Colorado's District 7.
Jack Bergman serves on the House Armed Services Committee and the Veterans' Affairs Committee. Prior to taking office in January of 2017, Congressman Bergman was a small business owner, commercial airline pilot for 22 years, and a United States Marine Corps officer.
As a fellow veteran, Bergman said Erik's leadership experience will serve him, and the people of Colorado, well in office.
"Erik has seen combat and has led soldiers in one of the most elite troops in the military," said Bergman. "The experience of working through tough situations, and helping his fellow soldiers do the same, is the kind of tenacity we need in Washington."
Congressman Bergman retired from the Marine Corps in December 2009 at the rank of Lieutenant General. He is the highest-ranking combat veteran ever elected to Congress.

---
| |
---
| "It is a distinct honor to have the support of this highly accomplished Congressman and Marine Corps flag-officer who has courageously and devotedly served our country for decades in peacetime and war, both in and out of military service" said Aadland. "Congressman Bergman continues to honor his oath to the US Constitution by serving our country in Congress, and I will be privileged to follow in his footsteps."
---

name: American Update
subject: Free government requires informed citizens
body:
Hillsdale College was founded in 1844 with a mission to provide “all who wish to learn” the education necessary to preserve the civil and religious liberties of America. They understood, like the founders of our great nation, that free government requires independent, virtuous, and knowledgeable citizens. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9587%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=vcRz2DL2lNqQIGchjJXIyA&sysid=1)
| |
---
| | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
---
Hillsdale College was founded in 1844 with a mission to provide “all who wish to learn” the education necessary to preserve the civil and religious liberties of America. They understood, like the founders of our great nation, that free government requires independent, virtuous, and knowledgeable citizens.
In 2011 Hillsdale launched its online courses program to extend this mission and to teach the core subjects of a Hillsdale education free of charge. Since that time, more than 2.8 million Americans have partnered with us in this effort.
Today, we’d like to invite you to study our nation’s founding documents--the documents that secure liberty for you and all Americans--absolutely free of charge.
Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen ‘09
Director of Online Learning, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844
---

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Democrats CAN win in Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2362%2E3611125%2E0CcaUU ][IMG]

As a Democrat in Ohio, I’ve spent my career proving the pundits wrong—and
I’ve learned enough to know that Tim Ryan has what it takes to win Ohio’s
open Senate seat.

Tim knows the Buckeye State inside and out, and he’ll always put the needs
of working families first. His millionaire GOP opponents are a different
story.

Special interest groups already have way too much power in Washington, and
if a Republican candidate wins this seat, they’ll be a reliable vote for
big corporations and the wealthy and well-connected—not Ohio.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7640?t=1015&amount=25&akid=2362%2E3611125%2E0CcaUU ]Can you step up and chip in to give us another Senator who will fight
to do what’s right for working families?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7640?t=1016&amount=25&akid=2362%2E3611125%2E0CcaUU ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7640?t=1017&amount=50&akid=2362%2E3611125%2E0CcaUU ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7640?t=1018&amount=100&akid=2362%2E3611125%2E0CcaUU ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7640?t=1019&amount=200&akid=2362%2E3611125%2E0CcaUU ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7640?t=1020&amount=250&akid=2362%2E3611125%2E0CcaUU ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7640?t=1021&amount=30&akid=2362%2E3611125%2E0CcaUU ]Other Amount

Not only can Democrats win in Ohio, but if we hope to get anything
accomplished in the Senate, we simply have to.

With a 50-50 split in the Senate, there are too many obstacles to passing
important legislation. We need to expand our Democratic majority and Tim
is our best shot.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7640?t=1022&amount=25&akid=2362%2E3611125%2E0CcaUU ]Can I count on you to help us break the gridlock in the Senate by
electing Tim Ryan and expanding our Democratic majority?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7640?t=1009&amount=25&akid=2362%2E3611125%2E0CcaUU ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7640?t=1010&amount=50&akid=2362%2E3611125%2E0CcaUU ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7640?t=1011&amount=100&akid=2362%2E3611125%2E0CcaUU ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7640?t=1012&amount=200&akid=2362%2E3611125%2E0CcaUU ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7640?t=1013&amount=250&akid=2362%2E3611125%2E0CcaUU ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7640?t=1014&amount=30&akid=2362%2E3611125%2E0CcaUU ]Other Amount

With gratitude,

Sherrod Brown

Tim knows the Buckeye State inside and out, and he’ll always put the needs of working families first. His millionaire GOP opponents are a different story. Special interest groups already have way too much power in Washington, and if a Republican candidate wins this seat, they’ll be a reliable vote for big corporations and the wealthy and well-connected—not Ohio. [ ]Can you step up and chip in to give us another Senator who will fight to do what’s right for working families? name: Tom Fitton
subject: I Need to Hear From You!
body:
Already, this early into the New Year – Judicial Watch’s work is exploding in volume and growing in historic importance.

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

**Do you support Judicial Watch continuing to fight for honest elections?**
This is a very serious and urgent matter, so please hear me out.
Americans have come to believe that the U.S. election system has serious problems, and that voter fraud is real, widespread and substantial to the point that it can and does decide the outcome of elections.
And the integrity of our electoral process is being gutted by the failure of President Joe Biden and other public officials to enforce our immigration laws and honor the principle that ONLY AMERICAN CITIZENS should be allowed to vote in U.S. elections.
Judicial Watch believes that our elections should be conducted honestly and by the letter of the law.
And although it is easy to complain about the Left's efforts to oppose election integrity laws and make it easier for illegal aliens to vote in our elections... _Judicial Watch is doing far_ _more than complaining_!
**[I ask for your personal approval for us to continue our investigations and lawsuits to fight for honest elections, as well as to fight against public corruption!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57925&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)**
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57925&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)
---

I also ask you to back up your approval [with a special tax-deductible contribution.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57925&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)

Thanks to the commitment of Judicial Watch supporters, we have scored a remarkable series of courtroom victories upholding the rule of law and honest elections in states including **Florida, Missouri, West Virginia, South** **Carolina, Ohio, Indiana, Kentucky** and **California**!

We are currently suing **Colorado, Illinois, North Carolina** and **Pennsylvania** over their failure to clean their voter lists... _" dirty lists" increase the opportunities for voter fraud and can mean dirty_ _elections_.

And we have warned 14 counties and five states regarding evident violations of the voter list cleaning provisions of the **National Voter Registration Act** ...and we will sue them, too, if they do not correct these violations in a timely fashion!

If the U.S. Department of Justice were to do its job, this is how election law should be enforced.

But the Biden Justice Department is run by appointees actively hostile to list maintenance and other election integrity efforts.

And they are attacking states that are passing commonsense laws like voter ID to ensure honest elections and make certain that only eligible U.S. citizens are allowed to vote.

That job is up to Judicial Watch, because when it comes to honest elections, your Judicial Watch is the only game in town.

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57925&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)
---

So, again I ask you:

**Do you support Judicial Watch continuing to fight for honest elections?**

[Your best contribution now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57925&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=) will help us continue using the courts to reaffirm our commitment to the rule of law and to the American people's "right to know."

We're currently pursuing a record number of lawsuits against several branches of the federal government, _and we anticipate filing more lawsuits against state and county officials who fail to take legally required actions to take reasonable steps to clean their voter rolls_ , [which is why your approval and special contribution](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57925&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=) are so important!

Thank you for helping us!

Sincerely,

Tom Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57925&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)

body:

| | | Friend, One of the great strengths of the state of New Hampshire comes from our motto... **Our**** _“Live Free or Die”_****mindset is one of many reasons why we’ve become the envy of the rest of the country!** **We want low taxes and more FREEDOM** \- and as State Senate President, that’s what I’ve worked to deliver. [**Will you help me get to work bringing these priorities to Washington?**](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODg3Nzg1NDI3ODgwOTA5NzA3JmM9YTlxNSZlPTAmYj05MTI1MzExNTImZD1yM3o0ZTlt.hb6GjSUMe6NasBUTnaxgIRCa_vYPs6Nfsjra6GbvByw)____

---
---
| | | [ ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODg3Nzg1NDI3ODgwOTA5NzA3JmM9YTlxNSZlPTAmYj05MTI1MzEyMDYmZD1lMHoyeDRm.DN3Ub_ngeszs7ONnx4vTYxec8BvOBK44olYJkPv-jNg)
---
| | | **_[Send the Message: Less Taxes, More Freedom! →](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODg3Nzg1NDI3ODgwOTA5NzA3JmM9YTlxNSZlPTAmYj05MTI1MzEyNTQmZD1hN3g1ajVn.M9A_Ui42ipDmPA9msHTCGOGYutaYtVuKAouwAJ7WtoU)_** Unfortunately, our current federal delegation in D.C. has been happy to let our “Live Free or Die” motto play second fiddle to the progressive Democrat agenda. **Instead of low taxes and more freedom, we’re being given far-left priorities that threaten the American Dream!** I’m not sitting on the sidelines any longer... **Instead, I’m standing up for the 603, and running to unseat Maggie Hassan in the Senate so that “Live Free or Die” continues to ring true here in the great state of New Hampshire!** If you want to help me fight for an agenda of _LESS_ taxes and _MORE_ freedom, let me know right now!
---
---
| |
---
| | [YES, I SUPPORT THE FIGHT!](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODg3Nzg1NDI3ODgwOTA5NzA3JmM9YTlxNSZlPTAmYj05MTI1MzEzNDcmZD1yOG41YTJl.1QmjGDGOLrHE6AnDMCNYYygA1HcEHkzyquhHfbssupg)
---
---
| |
---
| Thank you for the continued support, _Chuck Morse_
PS - If we don’t speak out, the priorities of Washington are soon going to be the norm in New Hampshire and every state in America! __[With the stakes this high, can I count on you to be on my team in the months ahead?](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODg3Nzg1NDI3ODgwOTA5NzA3JmM9YTlxNSZlPTAmYj05MTI1MzEzNzcmZD14OGU4Zzhw.2MA3HCzjHUj7CAd9sL1Xj7Bu-Lors-Vf837yElhovdY)__ __**_[](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODg3Nzg1NDI3ODgwOTA5NzA3JmM9YTlxNSZlPTAmYj05MTI1MzE0MTkmZD10MHcwcDB6.NDUeJyQUvG5BxxPcPuoi1k5Q0qJ289qyu2U9tfKX4fA)_**

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: You’re assigned → Maricopa County, 80.51% turnout in 2020, 1,064,396 votes for Mark.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
If we can turn out our voters, we’re going to win. If we can’t... well, let’s just turn them out.
#

Friends -
There are 2,651,539 registered voters in Maricopa County, and in the last election 80.51% of them showed up to vote.
Mark got 51.90% of those votes.
It was a close race last time. Mark won with only 51% of the votes statewide.
If we’re going to win in November, we have to turn out the same 1,064,396 people who voted for Mark last time.
But we need the resources to do that, just like we had last time. So, we have to ask:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to Mark’s re-election campaign before our end of month fundraising deadline? Help us turn out the voters who cast a ballot for Mark in 2020.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-feb22?refcode=em220217-1-subs&t=4&refcode2=2138_6688874_i4cnNb&akid=2138%2E6688874%2Ei4cnNb)
**We’re assigning you Maricopa County. Here’s what you need to know.**
**County:** Maricopa County
**Registered voters:** 2,651,539

**2020 Turnout:** 80.51%
**Voted for Mark:** 51.90%

**Estimated Cost to Turn Them Out:** $7,954,617
**Suggested Donation (from you):[$3**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-feb22?refcode=em220217-1-subs&t=5&refcode2=2138_6688874_i4cnNb&akid=2138%2E6688874%2Ei4cnNb)
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-feb22?refcode=em220217-1-subs&t=6&refcode2=2138_6688874_i4cnNb&akid=2138%2E6688874%2Ei4cnNb)**
If we can turn out our voters, we’re going to win. If we can’t... well, let’s just turn them out. But Mark can’t do it alone, so we appreciate you chipping in whatever you can here.
Thank you in advance,
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=7&akid=2138%2E6688874%2Ei4cnNb).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Abel?=
subject: Abel needs your help at the polls
body:
We are 4 days into early voting and we need all hands on deck! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/abelfortexas.com/abel-needs-your-help-at-the-polls?e=2dc92facb0)
---
|
---
# Polls Greeters Needed for Abel
Hello Peter,
We are 3 days into early voting and we need all hands on deck! Many voters are going to their polling place not knowing who they are going to vote for. This is why it’s important that we have as many poll greeters as possible to make sure every voter knows about Abel and his vision for District 30.

As a poll greeter, all you need to do is hand out campaign literature and make the case for Abel to voters before they cast their vote. Poll greeters are the first person voters see when they arrive at their polling location and are the last chance to persuade voters to support Abel. The volunteer schedule for poll greeting is incredibly flexible. You can volunteer for any amount of time at an early polling location between the hours of 7 AM and 5 PM. This election is going to be incredibly close, so if you’re able to spend an hour and convince 2-3 people to support Abel, that could be the difference.
| [POLL GREETING SIGN UP](https://abelfortexas.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6097af3608cb27432006e1b74&id=f4224a1f9e&e=2dc92facb0)
---
If you are unable to poll greet during those times then you can also help out by calling voters virtually from home!
| [PHONE BANKING SIGN UP](https://abelfortexas.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6097af3608cb27432006e1b74&id=1bf7d9740f&e=2dc92facb0)

Winning this race will not be easy, but with your help and support we know we will prevail on March 1st.Thank you,Team Abel

The problem is that the GOP is stacking the cards against me because they KNOW this race is Democrats' best chance to expand our Senate majority. **I'm looking at my fundraising numbers now, and I won't be able to defend myself from these GOP attacks if I don't reach my goal in the next few hours.**

body:
He knows our race decides the fate of the House.
| [](https://links.flipthehouse22.com/u/click?_t=3e09d8a0fcd046cf906b0e348c474854&_m=c88b442653684f8bbfd5994c528e0588&_e=aNeHOSptsR9NwSeucUfZLsz0nFyPIQ6yt8p26ld3YPH6Lf0Tr1f8Ghb1usYf1qpm6P1d8oTM165ot0wYyppLzthjz7a_bBx5fMcDhss4OG4ir7SmIpCw4jleea0uPvB0c2El17P__H7AqlNulVVFFhB87wXCtAehrK1NshJuUp6KrHDzDnMp42NCKZxA6mv2H1m7IPbPyQB1Gtgr0QBOw7sK8QIsMFGw2U8WtyEV-jbckrpYkXNFBk7rYNxQZpaJhUrp8UAZp2JT79uyMI9C6LNdL5kQ1A5dP5iepUtmrPYCogxvzqnSwa0my3jk0YpHqGc3a3eAn7ZXlTA7qXm1vbDb_fVPnJH5Hfd0CHJtAviroIyxr1orjFoYID16xzFXheVSNFQTR-2M6aymWyZt9rFvRzr19Gs27va48AjpLqU%3D)
---
Peter,
---
We’re already having to counter Pelosi’s $30 million voter registration campaign in these final weeks before election day...
---
**_...And now, George Soros just poured $125 MILLION into his Super PAC to try and crush our momentum and save Pelosi’s majority at the final hour._**
---
Soros knows that this race for Texas’ brand-new 38th congressional district will determine which party controls the House.
---

Donald Trump violated the Constitution and his duty to our country when he tried to overturn the results of the 2020 election and incited his supporters to violence - with lies, tweets, and conspiracy theories. **These threats still remain. In fact, there are more QAnon conspiracy theorists running for office than ever before. It 's a real danger. name: SarahforWisconsin.com
subject: We’re running behind on an important goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
After running the numbers, we found out that we’re running behind on an important fundraising goal. February is the shortest month of the year, which means we don’t have a lot of time to get back on track. Can you help?

**[Based on the number of people who usually open our emails, if everyone reading this can make a small contribution of just $1, we'll be able to make up for this temporary lapse in no time. clean_body: Friends, we're transforming Congress with service-oriented leaders. | | | = ***TLDR: We only have 12 DAYS until the primary election, and Jessica just received a critical endorsement from Serve America. We've got to blast this message out to energize and turnout voters on time if we're going to elect a true progressive, working-class champion in Texas' 30th Congressional District. = If you've saved payment with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through instantly: = = I am SO overwhelmed with gratitude, friends. After already receiving endorsements from Vote Vets, Honor Bound, and New Politics, Serve America has just joined the list of major veteran organizations that have officially endorsed my campaign for Congress! = Founded by Rep. Seth Moulton , Serve America's mission is to transform Congress by electing a new generation of leaders from diverse service backgrounds -- because they know we will always put the interests of the American people before our own. It gives me such immense pride to be acknowledged by Congressman Moulton and Serve America for my service-oriented record, and I’m looking forward to bringing our shared people-first values to Washington. With less than two weeks until the primary election, I’m hoping that this incredible endorsement will give our campaign the extra boost we need to make it to the finish line and stand out from the rest. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ******=**** = | | ****=**** | ****=**** = | | ****=**** | ****=**** = | | ****=**** = In Solidarity, Jessica = ************************EXPRESS DONATE to Jessica Mason for Congress********************** **********************If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:********************** **********************= ""********************** | **********************= "="********************** | **********************= "="********************** | **********************= "="********************** ---|---|---|--- Jessica Mason was born and raised in Dallas and has experienced firsthand the socioeconomic barriers and systemic inequities that impede the success of Texas working families. As a former Navy medic, Jessica received her Master's Degree in Public Administration so that she could pursue her passion for public service. She's running for Congress to represent Texas' 30th District because she's tired of seeing everyday people left behind. TX-30 deserves policies that are designed for the success of the people who live here. That starts with new leadership that sees our humanness and understands our struggles. And that starts right here, with Jessica Mason. = __= | || || ** Jessica Mason for Congress PO Box 271183 Dallas, TX 75227 United States | |

| Team, did you see this _Washington Post_ opinion piece? it makes a crucial argument: that D.C. Statehood isn’t just a D.C. issue. It’s a voting rights issue.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41923370/330904335/1238814011?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGNjOTAzZS0zYzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ae-fQW5F6_CulOAL7t1g0iVrP3gId_Zj_eW0akIflik=&emci=37c33a20-718f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=94cc903e-3c90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=26828920)
**The nation’s 51st state would come with two new Senators, who could turn the tide of vital legislation in Congress and help us end the filibuster.**

Right now, close to 700,000 tax-paying residents are being denied full representation, just so Republicans can maintain power.

**We need to keep the pressure on, team!**

[If you think Congress should finally make Washington, D.C. a state take action TODAY and sign our petition immediately! >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41923371/330904336/1238814011?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGNjOTAzZS0zYzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ae-fQW5F6_CulOAL7t1g0iVrP3gId_Zj_eW0akIflik=&emci=37c33a20-718f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=94cc903e-3c90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=26828920)
