name: Official AOC Campaign
subject: Introduction
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Together, we can grow the Squad.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220217-2802-header&t=1&akid=2802%2E2526796%2EInbrB4)
The Texas primary election is just _12 days_ away and we have **a massive opportunity to elect two progressive champions** who will fight for Medicare for All, reproductive rights, a Green New Deal, and much more.
[Before we share a bit more about them, if you already know Jessica and Greg and are able to chip in to help mobilize voters at this critical moment, please split a $6 donation between our campaigns here.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220217?refcode=em20220217-2802-P_FND_SPL_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2802_2526796_InbrB4&akid=2802%2E2526796%2EInbrB4)
**[Contribute $6](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220217?refcode=em20220217-2802-P_FND_SPL_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2802_2526796_InbrB4&akid=2802%2E2526796%2EInbrB4)**
**If you’re not convinced yet, keep reading...**
**First, meet Jessica running in TX-28:**
Jessica was born and raised in Laredo, Texas right on the border. Her parents immigrated to Texas to start a new home for her family. Even as a child growing up, she saw the issues impacting her family and her community. Jessica wanted to be part of solving the problems she saw up close – so she became an immigration and human rights attorney.
While most people in her district are Democrats, Texas’ 28th has been represented by Rep. Henry Cuellar, a “Democrat” who voted for Trump’s border wall _twice_ and is proudly anti-choice. He’s been in Congress for 16 years and voted almost 70% of the time with Donald Trump. **It’s time for him to go.**
**Last year, Jess came within just a few percentage points of defeating Henry Cuellar.** Despite being outspent by $700,000 and opposed by the Koch network and major corporate PACs, we nearly pulled off a massive upset. This year we will.
Jessica is running because we need a representative who’ll fight for a path to citizenship, Medicare for All, and a Green New Deal. She’s running because we need to get big money out of politics and stop letting corporate donors stack the deck in D.C. This past week, she was endorsed by Sen. Bernie Sanders.
**Next, meet Greg running in TX-35:**
Greg is a born-and-raised Texan and son of Mexican immigrants. He has represented Austin, Texas in the City Council since 2014 where he’s fought for working Texans on issues of labor rights, reproductive justice, immigration reform, civil rights, and more.
He successfully raised wages for thousands of workers, ended all personal marijuana arrests in his city, and closed inexcusable tax loopholes for the wealthiest.
**Greg is running in an open Democratic primary for Texas’ 35th district, but he still faces well-funded opponents.** Greg was not only endorsed by Alexandria, but also Sens. Elizabeth Warren and Bernie Sanders.
Casar is running to support working families and is deeply committed to Medicare for All, fixing the power grid, raising the minimum wage, and taking bold action on the climate crisis.
* * *
These candidates are the reason why Alexandria traveled to San Antonio and Austin this past weekend to help get out the vote before early voting started on Monday, and meet with organizers on the ground.
Alexandria is working around the clock to grow progressive power in Congress, but it will take a mass-mobilization of grassroots support to win in Texas. [If you’re able to, can you chip in $6 right now to support Jess, Greg, and our work to mobilize voters in Texas before the primary on March 1?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220217?refcode=em20220217-2802-P_FND_SPL_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2802_2526796_InbrB4&akid=2802%2E2526796%2EInbrB4)
**[Contribute $6](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220217?refcode=em20220217-2802-P_FND_SPL_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&refcode2=2802_2526796_InbrB4&akid=2802%2E2526796%2EInbrB4)**
It’s crucial that we support these campaigns $5, $10, $50 at a time so they can knock on as many doors as possible to energize voters and set a record for voter turnout.
Thank you for stepping up.
– Team AOC
P.S. We need volunteers to help contact voters in Texas! If you’re able to, please sign up to [**join a Jess Cisneros phone bank here**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10404?source=aoc-em20220217-2802&utm_source=aoc-em20220217-2802&t=24&akid=2802%2E2526796%2EInbrB4) or a [**Greg Casar phone bank here**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10405?source=aoc-em20220217-2802&utm_source=aoc-em20220217-2802&t=25&akid=2802%2E2526796%2EInbrB4).

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220217?refcode=em20220217-2802-P_FND_SPL_END&t=26&refcode2=2802_2526796_InbrB4&akid=2802%2E2526796%2EInbrB4)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220217-2802-P_FND_SPL_END&t=27&akid=2802%2E2526796%2EInbrB4)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=28&akid=2802%2E2526796%2EInbrB4) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=29&akid=2802%2E2526796%2EInbrB4) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=30&akid=2802%2E2526796%2EInbrB4)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=31&akid=2802%2E2526796%2EInbrB4)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=32&akid=2802%2E2526796%2EInbrB4)

name: Governor Scott Walker
subject: Our chance to take back Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Rebecca
body:
Rebecca Kleefisch is the only person I trust to fire Tony Evers.
| Friend,
---
Tony Evers has failed Wisconsin.
---
He sided with rioters while Kenosha was set ablaze, he sided with liberal unions cronies over your children’s education, and in the end, he had the gall to tell you it was best for you.
---
_I won’t beat around the bush, if we don’t FIRE Tony Evers this November, then we too will have failed Wisconsin, Friend._
---
**And there’s only one person I trust to finish the job – my very own Lieutenant Governor, Rebecca Kleefisch.**

clean_body: Rebecca Kleefisch is the only person I trust to fire Tony Evers. | Friend, Tony Evers has failed Wisconsin. He sided with rioters while Kenosha was set ablaze, he sided with liberal unions cronies over your children’s education, and in the end, he had the gall to tell you it was best for you. I won’t beat around the bush, if we don’t FIRE Tony Evers this November, then we too will have failed Wisconsin, Friend. And there’s only one person I trust to finish the job – my very own Lieutenant Governor, Rebecca Kleefisch. I hate to admit it, but this toss-up governor’s race is going to come down to fundraising. The DGA has already amassed a warchest of over $54 million to prop up Evers along with his $10.5 million in cash on hand. His entire reelection strategy has become buying this race, and it’s clear why... The latest polling shows that a majority of Wisconsin voters would NOT vote to reelect him. But if Rebecca falls behind on even one of her monthly fundraising goals, we risk giving Evers the upper hand. We simply can’t afford to waste our chance to return to better times, Friend. You’ve always been a loyal supporter of both Rebecca and me, but now more than ever, we’re counting on YOUR help once again. Thank you, Scott Walker 45th Governor of Wisconsin Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

clean_body: | | | Peter, Last month, after Kyrsten Sinema betrayed the American people and voted in support of the filibuster, we had our single biggest day of fundraising yet. We're grateful for the thousands of grassroots donors who are fueling our early efforts to defeat Kyrsten Sinema. But this movement is bigger than one moment, Peter, and our fundraising hasn't kept pace with what we need in order to beat Kyrsten Sinema and her corporate-backed campaign war chest. Our mission is not just to build this movement, but to ensure that Sinema's obstruction doesn't prevent Democrats from holding onto Arizona in the midterms. Together, we're making sure our partner organizations on the ground have everything they need to continue doing their vital work. But February is off to a slow start — and we need your help to catch up. With gratitude, The Primary Sinema team | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. body:
I'm in... how about you? [](http://links.rothforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=02b27e2d3ee04bddb740d46a229389f1&_m=e7b377cd457047188b5328a12d275670&_e=PWu9HrstBhwNaDhqWd0f2IOjYgLCI-pbRW_K6W7OOLjFEanUzA7zFRtbtx3Sa-Vk4niArFEH8_icaW2zI1ON25e6dUoxtJKDvZXxIJZaevb5sdFgjcv69UcQlkZKQdbP9_1A119lQpMFLYEkMKqshw-lldirCQHaRPDX0xn1so95lOaneSAASn5LsB4r_iLr1CGgWXGykAlI_cu-Tq9_P2UAWftVjX4NzFiu-ZsMfYf3FTJlOYBDDlFUCfIQCHc2jna8WXLemdtg4hW9s9gLMbxRj5MJNvwBG87ghlVIyR-HXE-CJO_CY_oLgCG1Wz_8JEXpq4NYLYSk3ZvkIRswzw%3D%3D) My friend, I'm officially announcing my candidacy for Wisconsin's next Lieutenant Governor, **and I wanted you to be one of the first to know!** [_**Will you join my team on Day One, by adding your name to my grassroots supporter list?**_](http://links.rothforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=02b27e2d3ee04bddb740d46a229389f1&_m=e7b377cd457047188b5328a12d275670&_e=PWu9HrstBhwNaDhqWd0f2IOjYgLCI-pbRW_K6W7OOLjFEanUzA7zFRtbtx3Sa-Vk4niArFEH8_icaW2zI1ON25e6dUoxtJKDvZXxIJZaevb5sdFgjcv69UcQlkZKQdbPxiFIZ-GZFDtheBTIaxc4Yad0KrIlcAVHGa6CMq2i3XAItjTBWm8Jb0CPvJxyYk5dZlBUCG_nYNDXMpWwfHlnEhGq0iLIz8ub7-BnUwTku_lHm-fqGqS-u77ywISV7-nK6aE0LKUpS_mbkxbZi4S8mG2iJbbr3-ZmB8tT_TuDQzo---Fv01hv3oxf7-9CJhdjxkIcSgv6KtXxFDvt7OBClQ%3D%3D) _I'm in._ _ARE YOU?_ [**Add Your Name as a Day-One Supporter!**](http://links.rothforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=02b27e2d3ee04bddb740d46a229389f1&_m=e7b377cd457047188b5328a12d275670&_e=PWu9HrstBhwNaDhqWd0f2IOjYgLCI-pbRW_K6W7OOLjFEanUzA7zFRtbtx3Sa-Vk4niArFEH8_icaW2zI1ON25e6dUoxtJKDvZXxIJZaevb5sdFgjcv69UcQlkZKQdbPIHF3JqEAw7znO7IKppO4Sv2xmwwZYCbcS-WZklcpqWrVchzgmQZmlGT-D5895F3kdbv6cKEF0URoOX2t4VB1Np_2D3hExP5aKeTyVaVSqIxOq6PvYJ-vf_H2JalaFl1IC1kXO6F9ZSR315hLx_GZs9b1eBe8GPVjFPPPROjtpYHxurNbwPVhdrmTSYeopJ2RRpq4LJNpGNyYMrY40n72fw%3D%3D) [](http://links.rothforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=02b27e2d3ee04bddb740d46a229389f1&_m=e7b377cd457047188b5328a12d275670&_e=PWu9HrstBhwNaDhqWd0f2IOjYgLCI-pbRW_K6W7OOLjFEanUzA7zFRtbtx3Sa-Vk4niArFEH8_icaW2zI1ON25e6dUoxtJKDvZXxIJZaevb5sdFgjcv69UcQlkZKQdbP500w11MWLXX5H9LoifZeN-r_yJWv_k1DdDL327BDiFXLYat2pzhShXzaJcEe41xeuNC4YM3lX6md7G7TOoLpXsw7cGGEKdpY6YZ7PDbxRUImQXtHBK8MUfQT2e29V6sGJRNMlOzIctgJ1eVfLlkDstFRTJS2K2T9OwqeOzYH5EU_qde7PQaKh_zXgrNkM1159f6JCT8vqbkHlWOzERLjdA%3D%3D) [**We want to hit the ground running with momentum and enthusiasm from every part of Wisconsin –– can I count on you?**](http://links.rothforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=02b27e2d3ee04bddb740d46a229389f1&_m=e7b377cd457047188b5328a12d275670&_e=PWu9HrstBhwNaDhqWd0f2IOjYgLCI-pbRW_K6W7OOLjFEanUzA7zFRtbtx3Sa-Vk4niArFEH8_icaW2zI1ON25e6dUoxtJKDvZXxIJZaevb5sdFgjcv69UcQlkZKQdbPPQh9KKKRloKPKAqWTciAVR6WVD9O6vaKG7mi8VjXoaOaFxNE5-1ZMM0I6QySQdDp3_2mNrperr9MFBhv64PLwf28zWdOFG6L4wY6ZOpLsIwhqp6mCK2cfbvn-XYC25myhGtjFUXdNrgZMhO3dmKztnjs7UV-coqttuhZhBjT4AIUU6qPZjsDo0-FgMgWYCjvs4vhDPum658FAE2HmP-QvA%3D%3D) As a State Senator, I have **defended our elections** against fraud and incompetence. I have kept our budget balanced even in the worst of times, and I introduced the bill to **eliminate Wisconsin's income tax**. And I've stood up for Wisconsin families, by fighting to **expand school choice** statewide. Today, I'm running to take those successes to the next level as your next Lieutenant Governor. **Tony Evers has been an embarrassing failure, and I can't wait until the people of Wisconsin vote him out of office in November. ** But that's won't be enough to undo the damage he and the Biden administration have done in the past four years. We need the RIGHT leaders, fighting for our RIGHT policies, if we have any chance of taking back our state! [_**Will you show me that you have my back by signing my petition at the very start of this campaign?**_](http://links.rothforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=02b27e2d3ee04bddb740d46a229389f1&_m=e7b377cd457047188b5328a12d275670&_e=PWu9HrstBhwNaDhqWd0f2IOjYgLCI-pbRW_K6W7OOLjFEanUzA7zFRtbtx3Sa-Vk4niArFEH8_icaW2zI1ON25e6dUoxtJKDvZXxIJZaevb5sdFgjcv69UcQlkZKQdbPiqomg9X3O3sDI8FmB-7dZ6vWKAFwG5fh1OT2CGnqO3WB8ZWfvavftk1R4ShjEgPQcZmdxBc3Y6uv5ZY_17gKy9WL1XNjovCtd-RG1lrM7jvY40TLbCLVbrsjm23MlQBOIBK47L_S0I-gzSuniPUIzXhXqRsZzoJM98pKp9Ax99EkSI-8ryaV4LcRxTsVGmM8ypSSPHbWIg0Nt1rXlKtqeg%3D%3D) Thank you, Roger Roth [**Sign HERE**](http://links.rothforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=02b27e2d3ee04bddb740d46a229389f1&_m=e7b377cd457047188b5328a12d275670&_e=PWu9HrstBhwNaDhqWd0f2IOjYgLCI-pbRW_K6W7OOLjFEanUzA7zFRtbtx3Sa-Vk4niArFEH8_icaW2zI1ON25e6dUoxtJKDvZXxIJZaevb5sdFgjcv69UcQlkZKQdbP-W5oQtb5TIqZpQphEUNPxGBc41rUanlgSqPegou5XHSh5dVZ2Ddd98UNXSS3aFb9_3ybWMl1REhv7H23_aaQXCBRK9P_LUlMIDHxKfupo4PjzV6URcg-YiTASeJzbfrDxYxtrinf3oe1E31pw3AZBW_RuZI3GYEurRroTGFodhWx87sVKfcEdFC5BPdb8qq2Rn9c_gYraolC6a2FGIUTWA%3D%3D) Paid for by Roth for Wisconsin _Use of military images or rank does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Department of Defense or the U.S. Air Force._ [Please click here to unsubscribe](http://links.rothforwisconsin.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=02b27e2d3ee04bddb740d46a229389f1&_s=e7b377cd457047188b5328a12d275670&_t=uBAGoE5x5899UIiiCE4YcV0trdBwXS30QI-9HSJMI2lNefpVTkI0qkjH9GoYfURvWcC9wHVjhIURr-cQ1PLz-FnLG07-0UFayMZqCOXKPC_LY4XY9KqxmaGfm--xsDg1auNkNHkfMF_5J9m_fFvCn7e9hvk65oVz4pPdfXjGIxQ%3D) [**Learn More**](http://links.rothforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=02b27e2d3ee04bddb740d46a229389f1&_m=e7b377cd457047188b5328a12d275670&_e=PWu9HrstBhwNaDhqWd0f2BwxC1r8NV6K9fr5JI1cWxe-6i6oxtAEZUCYpWiU9FHSb9v2SpIJwAt7FljsMC_7VOQi9O0a2otSPSoxz5RxH-WbOchwMPPhxkFWsSY8ywx-0XIzcHcbqooeLRpYBT-d99shLm4wZb2Dy5X7YBnb0Pv1DSSHpcZ8Rwk8WBE-F60zPweHN1AXZwK9cqOq-CtHL5wJdcbzX0NFtZ9NyGepXpWgGgs8mu4yzI5Oi8bBtF8gQZ-ZklK_cNZJoLZ2KXWrtQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: I'm in... how about you? My friend, I'm officially announcing my candidacy for Wisconsin's next Lieutenant Governor, and I wanted you to be one of the first to know! I'm in. ARE YOU? As a State Senator, I have defended our elections against fraud and incompetence. I have kept our budget balanced even in the worst of times, and I introduced the bill to eliminate Wisconsin's income tax. And I've stood up for Wisconsin families, by fighting to expand school choice statewide. Today, I'm running to take those successes to the next level as your next Lieutenant Governor. Tony Evers has been an embarrassing failure, and I can't wait until the people of Wisconsin vote him out of office in November. But that's won't be enough to undo the damage he and the Biden administration have done in the past four years. We need the RIGHT leaders, fighting for our RIGHT policies, if we have any chance of taking back our state! subject: a free moment

body:
A message from Senator Maggie Hassan
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41924184/330907845/-1829049351?refcode=jtk675-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGVlZGE1NS0zZTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5S65MqpYjSltapgiLSKCcVP04TerGWjqV966jXJauFs=)
---
Hi there –
I had a free moment and wanted to take the time to explain why your support matters so much, especially now.
In 2016, I was one of only two Democrats to unseat a Republican incumbent, and I owe it all to grassroots donors like you. Your support helped us narrowly flip this seat, and I know your support is going to help us keep this seat blue in November.
But here's the thing, 2022 is shaping up to be an uphill battle. The Senate is split 50-50, meaning if Democrats lose even one seat, we will lose our majority. Mitch McConnell sees New Hampshire as his best chance at taking back the Senate, and he's willing to do whatever it takes.
McConnell and his dark money allies have spent over $7.5 million attacking me, but our resources to fight back are limited. If we're going to stand up to their attacks and win this race, it's going to take an army of grassroots supporters.
**[_Can I count on you to make a donation right now to my reelection campaign?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41924185/330907846/-947982778?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk675-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGVlZGE1NS0zZTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5S65MqpYjSltapgiLSKCcVP04TerGWjqV966jXJauFs=)**
We can't match Republican mega-donors and their million-dollar checks, but we can show the strength of this campaign with people like you chipping in $5 or more whenever you can.
**[_I know we can take on the tough fight ahead and keep New Hampshire's seat blue this November with you on our team._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41924186/330907847/-947982778?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk675-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGVlZGE1NS0zZTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5S65MqpYjSltapgiLSKCcVP04TerGWjqV966jXJauFs=)**
Thank you so much for your support – it means the world.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

clean_body: She’s officially coming after me. | Peter, The DCCC has released their official list of 2022 targets, and my district is front and center: Nancy Pelosi is looking for revenge after we defeated her radical puppet Donna Shalala in the biggest upset in the country in 2020. I need grassroots Americans like YOU to help marshal the funds we need to defend this critical district here in South Florida. Nancy Pelosi and the Left hate me because I embody the very values they’re trying to destroy. I’ve lived the American dream, and I’m a relentless fighter for free markets, individual liberty, and limited government. Pelosi also knows that her only hope of remaining Speaker is to now focus her energy -- and money \-- on attacking vulnerable Republicans like me in battleground races. These two factors have made me one of her top offensive targets in 2022. Every dollar is critical in the fight to defend this seat. I hope you’ll step up and support me as soon as possible. Thank you, María Elvira Salazar Florida’s 27th Congressional District Paid for by Salazar for Congress P.O. Box 431332, Miami, FL 33243

body:
Check out the campaign's latest information below!

| | Friend - Thank you for your continued support of Wes Moore! Team Moore-Miller had another exciting week, and here're some key updates from the field. Our **[Baltimore City Office](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41924370/330908590/-1843335491?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGNkODg0Zi0zZjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sju6AH0jno825zFYIaDHnHyU75SH7lAA86lZ_KdV-DE=&emci=3b109d81-2b90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=a0cd884f-3f90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635485)** is open and we are having volunteers knocking on doors, making calls, and reaching out to voters in the community. [**We are counting on your help to make sure we are able to reach out to the critical voters**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41924371/330908591/-412686488?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGNkODg0Zi0zZjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sju6AH0jno825zFYIaDHnHyU75SH7lAA86lZ_KdV-DE=&emci=3b109d81-2b90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=a0cd884f-3f90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635485). Last week, we were in Southern Maryland, where Wes met with folks in Charles County, [attended a meet & greet in St. Mary's County](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41924372/330908592/-216480132?s=20&t=JhG9ZGoiDFTsNulaPZZalA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGNkODg0Zi0zZjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sju6AH0jno825zFYIaDHnHyU75SH7lAA86lZ_KdV-DE=&emci=3b109d81-2b90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=a0cd884f-3f90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635485), and visited some community leaders in Calvert County. Earlier this week, the campaign released a c**[omprehensive plan to break the cycle of violent crime and improve public safety](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41924373/330908593/-1739185580?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGNkODg0Zi0zZjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sju6AH0jno825zFYIaDHnHyU75SH7lAA86lZ_KdV-DE=&emci=3b109d81-2b90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=a0cd884f-3f90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635485)**. This plan is addresses some urgent steps include a ban on ghost guns, stronger community-police relations, violence intervention, probation and parole reform, and improved re-entry. We are excited to build this coalition with you-- thank you for all your support! Saif Ratul Director of Engagement Wes Moore for Maryland
* * *
_**Talking Points:**_** ****_Public Safety & Criminal Justice_**
* Our state has experienced a failure of executive leadership on public safety. The Wes Moore for Maryland Governor Campaign released a public safety and criminal plan that recognizes the urgency of this moment and provides the leadership to put an end to this crisis.
* The Moore-Miller public safety and criminal justice plan will swiftly and aggressively combat violent crime in our communities, interrupt cycles of violence and promote rehabilitation, and reform our criminal justice system.
* Wes Moore's plan focuses on investing in proven community-based violence intervention programs and building strong partnerships with communities and law enforcement to ensure the safety of every Marylander. The plan will prevent crime and recidivism by connecting people to necessary resources and services, and will increase accountability and transparency in law enforcement.

* * *

Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. We know you receive a lot of emails -- but that’s because winning this race is going to take a massive grassroots campaign. We need to educate, empower, and register thousands of new Democrats. We need to turn out every voter in every corner of Maryland. clean_body: Check out the campaign's latest information below! | | Friend - Thank you for your continued support of Wes Moore! Team Moore-Miller had another exciting week, and here're some key updates from the field. Our is open and we are having volunteers knocking on doors, making calls, and reaching out to voters in the community. . Last week, we were in Southern Maryland, where Wes met with folks in Charles County, , and visited some community leaders in Calvert County. Earlier this week, the campaign released a c. This plan is addresses some urgent steps include a ban on ghost guns, stronger community-police relations, violence intervention, probation and parole reform, and improved re-entry. We are excited to build this coalition with you-- thank you for all your support! Saif Ratul Director of Engagement Wes Moore for Maryland Talking Points: **Public Safety & Criminal Justice Our state has experienced a failure of executive leadership on public safety. The Wes Moore for Maryland Governor Campaign released a public safety and criminal plan that recognizes the urgency of this moment and provides the leadership to put an end to this crisis. The Moore-Miller public safety and criminal justice plan will swiftly and aggressively combat violent crime in our communities, interrupt cycles of violence and promote rehabilitation, and reform our criminal justice system. Wes Moore's plan focuses on investing in proven community-based violence intervention programs and building strong partnerships with communities and law enforcement to ensure the safety of every Marylander. The plan will prevent crime and recidivism by connecting people to necessary resources and services, and will increase accountability and transparency in law enforcement. Save the Date Please check out our upcoming events and opportunities to get involved with Wes Moore's gubernatorial campaign! Reach out to with any questions or for more details! [[Clergy for Wes] Join the Launch Event w/ the Clergy for Wes]() [[Office Opening] Prince George's County Office Opening]() [In-Person] Knock Doors for Wes Moore [[Weekly-Virtual] Make Calls to Critical Voters](=) [[Weekly-Virtual] Send Texts to Critical Voters](=) What people are saying - highlights from the press: Democratic Candidate for Maryland Governor Wes Moore speaks to NBC's Zerlina Maxwell about the need to protect access to the ballot box and the momentum the historic ticket with Aruna Miller has generated in Maryland’s gubernatorial race. As former Baltimore County executives, we know the importance for local officials to have a partner in Annapolis. Whether responding to a public health crisis, renovating and building schools, making our neighborhoods safe by leveraging every state resource to drive crime down, rebuilding aging infrastructure, improving transportation access — leadership in Annapolis matters. name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Support the "End Child Poverty Act" today!
body:
The pandemic has exposed systemic inequities in our society.
#
Become a grassroots co-signer of my new bill, the _End Child Poverty Act_ , which would dramatically cut child poverty by providing families with a universal benefit from children’s birth through their teenage years.**[Add your name](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/94643?t=1&akid=22020%2E1203867%2ENi8_mn)**
---
Peter,
The People’s Policy Project calls my new bill “by far the best child allowance proposal introduced in Congress.”1
Last year, when Congress expanded the Child Tax Credit to be available to all families with young kids, we cut child poverty by 40%. **We made an incredible difference in the lives of millions of families!**
But, as the U.S. Senate has failed to extend the expanded Child Tax Credit, **millions of low- and no-income families are at risk of falling back into poverty.** My new bill, the _End Child Poverty Act_ , would replace the Child Tax Credit and cover all children, including the lowest-wealth families who are traditionally left out of the tax credit system.
**This new legislation would create a universal, monthly child allowance of nearly $400 per child.** Since each child will be automatically enrolled at birth when they apply for their Social Security Number, there is no need for annual paperwork. This benefit will simply continue every month until a child’s 19th birthday, ensuring that families and children have an opportunity to thrive.
[Sign now to become a grassroots co-signer of the _End Child Poverty Act_ , which would dramatically cut child poverty by providing families with a universal benefit from children’s birth through their teenage years.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/94643?t=2&akid=22020%2E1203867%2ENi8_mn)
**[Sign Now](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/94643?t=3&akid=22020%2E1203867%2ENi8_mn)**
Programs like the _End Child Poverty Act_ have been a proven success in countries like Denmark, Sweden, Norway, and Finland, which have some of the lowest childhood poverty rates in the world. **The People’s Policy Project estimates that this bill would cut child poverty by 64% and cut deep child poverty by 70%.**
The pandemic has exposed systemic inequities in our society, with billionaires getting wealthier as poorer people are falling further behind. So many people already lived paycheck-to-paycheck even before the pandemic. But many of my colleagues in Congress don't understand that urgency. That's why we've got to demonstrate public support for this new legislation!
[Will you join me in fighting child poverty by becoming a grassroots co-signer of my new bill, the _End Child Poverty Act_ , today?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/94643?t=4&akid=22020%2E1203867%2ENi8_mn)
Together, let’s create a future where every child has the opportunity to thrive.
Thank you,
U.S. Rep. Rashida Tlaib

1"Rashida Tlaib Just Introduced a Landmark Bill to Dramatically Slash Child Poverty" _Jacobin Magazine_ , February 5, 2022

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=5&akid=22020%2E1203867%2ENi8_mn) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=6&akid=22020%2E1203867%2ENi8_mn) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220217-22020-footer&t=7&refcode2=22020_1203867_Ni8_mn&akid=22020%2E1203867%2ENi8_mn)**
---
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Federal candidates or officeholders mentioned above are not asking for more than $5,000 per calendar year from individuals or other federally permissible sources, nor are they asking for any funds from corporations, labor unions, or any other federally prohibited sources.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: [us@justicedemocrats.com](mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=8&akid=22020%2E1203867%2ENi8_mn)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=22020%2E1203867%2ENi8_mn)

The People’s Policy Project estimates that this bill would cut child poverty by 64% and cut deep child poverty by 70%. The pandemic has exposed systemic inequities in our society, with billionaires getting wealthier as poorer people are falling further behind. So many people already lived paycheck-to-paycheck even before the pandemic. But many of my colleagues in Congress don't understand that urgency. That's why we've got to demonstrate public support for this new legislation! Together, let’s create a future where every child has the opportunity to thrive. Thank you, U.S. Rep. Rashida Tlaib 1"Rashida Tlaib Just Introduced a Landmark Bill to Dramatically Slash Child Poverty" Jacobin Magazine , February 5, 2022 Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the and your state public health department. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Federal candidates or officeholders mentioned above are not asking for more than $5,000 per calendar year from individuals or other federally permissible sources, nor are they asking for any funds from corporations, labor unions, or any other federally prohibited sources. JusticeDemocrats.com 10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932 Email us: mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com

lobbyists](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6DF-ifSGN9grWu_UXzyrGzFYhmUQEDSFNUonM4J-uBr1RAVc6PIc2XLx0N_kMLS9XElo6Zvi0M82_Ka9hfNyFo0uIjqgrVsWPe0eDPdL02TaW71c5jhH5Vu33gjATHCN_LIMW5F7bvriPhwP4uhn3ffJsgmxjqT-kdfid43kf2k_1KTzScVNjsuWMqWI6VP8n5ON-vN3V10L6l5NEEsQy8dA7n2JnUAdzDPMEw2EAKhJcASg16Kqd3JPTKMye8qPcoCsshtK8NV6pZgdN3FvCpLEqAR7ZFovi09tdjFMEnTGHcdcTFmf7m3a4fM5yigtUV1f49nzfMyco3_7xKB4k-QDqAfQcvjCSkmCHAUV1qvyajkza0RynvEEPEAKKheNg1ZIw1FXESyaSgpkEUK-NoSXRyh6w2bkQ-7oeu5O5hILsl8gnWnqI7zyQ8ZjtHi1CYDazD9IriWrV0waFpR-Enc/3jn/gC9j1HhzTluIzGCOTcJeCg/h2/m-CEtBmxBNOrzjTTJqN4gf9rl636o7Ggx4v9YumLs6A) which is specifically targeting our campaign. [When it was created](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDDUV27dB1SLFWpo-Uwox6EODrskgpTYgbK2iA8PZcs9XiLNDwPcTpaQ2xG7CfpOZXhJNI_QV8LYyJEG3EoKA4W9dZHQQMYW6pxZlprU5IAbe3B6OjBSsl3FsKfrUjzEeae5YCugsw8XYr0qs8YVwBq4_M_1B7sL0nQQ1lcYju4Tf3hUZm0vf7meltmDxGfckbMQLl469sWOSMKhjqNywEMr2_P16Q_T4sWzL6bEXtGOUUbTDiFf-uD1RoAZDH8I3vGpCpu_blwaTN05ag38inroTnWVbsxRMHCggOaPrRdRELe5n8yNADXwd9v2LnYrRJ0pi5RTWQiiv6VMOxSsXpM3ahw-PkHXBariSlycZ3MkRJqTrCGtKuNDYmEJv4VunWxuvuEh-zaduRSQjrAG-dHTohE0nHVEomN-RL5XA_YuluDF9BqH75wDivCG726-JhJd1gPQ3NrGgy16oljCB_5JIn-Z1eEQm7ja0mF9oC1P3k6DKEMm0lfURBeZxdmY7gA/3jn/gC9j1HhzTluIzGCOTcJeCg/h3/p2E0foAOibCCLQZshuzp-as4bShcBzrgJqoY0sm7l3A), they literally mentioned my name. Rolling Stone Magazine asked me to comment and here’s what I said: _Democratic leadership should be spending every dime of our party’s resources on helping frontline incumbents in swing districts and protecting our majority instead of coming into a deep-blue district that is clamoring for new leadership._ **Our leaders in Congress need to stop wasting money protecting absentee corporate politicians, when they should be using their resources to save our razor-thin majority.** [**Corporations can’t buy my silence - will you donate $7 to help us take on the machine and fight for people?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESEo_Iz1lNZ8OJK6-cXUqLpkp1T0b40U8oeUZNga-oKpOGNKcwzw18SoECEGuVdsmIDLzU2bw_8xrIH66FQ964JxG0a6QL0nlelRDOCkJn8e5xObHd-jN1JJ3H1Ck7-VKOZspwSfhsKOvWE75iaRJOKm7R6wPqTJXbFWM47jJLsZVTNCGj04ObDoRpIRWy0qGtUuvKT9LEWLjLjI3Rq1ddjGHJym48Dm4XQhjSvNAA5qIO7h_idk0asdmW8sYlZtYlwM1s9pwBHrrkpwh0wmiI6wScXFnNPP3tqpw8ExVsguv3-ypXOxwTwq_jctvQCEb6Iur1X-TgkpJ5f87yiDVqmkg_xt0kYQl7lr0CaJ06-JNls7ovRMFlkmGA7bw4UO1W/3jn/gC9j1HhzTluIzGCOTcJeCg/h4/Uq7yDftJbq9eDXjISMsf6vrvBrQwtkzHq0GJpVl3g6E)**** [Donate](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESuWBAvTk8tbxUx_4fGhKEAKI6FcUYoAz1ok_hefI37IqFYRNoDfZHtwluTEjBWXLYK71SvNux9nMk5F1E8zkHKWDosjskRheunciihFXOH0x4GYNf_SZDSZlA1LqRfCeTH9OLaLEy0pB6cqyNPU9pLH4s-fkJFVRveUJBWexVnDx82vZS34T4GaLh8B-7GUcdIjCEE2Qoj0yZA4Mwwl9E6AT37fj5QKbBnyxUxqYDy4ncKVhPzuPl3o4F9sXqB_5BC4-WqKYBa3d5cYYndANBAsudlqCE_l8AmNgtSebfqOxe7oqmOeVsUZTOWJLslnKUcRRaNMKCnUSB32r59ulploC4dtBJgSgKYnLcuShLgXiHztEnL5WARCGeQWprgbdB/3jn/gC9j1HhzTluIzGCOTcJeCg/h5/CF6Z-O9VCSsjKHaTj13d7uEaJ-doiTACMgey9zKvWzQ) I believe in the Democratic Party, and I know we can win a stronger majority in 2022. But not until we elect leaders who take action. Leaders who keep their promises. The path to winning in 2022 is clear: Cancel student debt, end the filibuster, pass voting rights protections, expand the Child Tax Credit, protect our reproductive rights, fund our schools, and invest in healthcare, housing, and jobs for everyone. But as long as corporations and lobbyists are financing backroom operations to protect politicians in power, the Democratic party is trapped. Held hostage by the highest bidder. **Instead of spending corporate dollars to attack Democratic challengers like me, our party’s leadership should be arming frontline representatives, actually at risk of losing their seats to Republicans, with the most powerful weapon of all–progress.** [**Donate $7 to help us win back the Democratic Party from corporate insiders and make it what it always should have been–the party of the people.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxES0z9GVjwZefh-QNtcyrM1dumLBzizQss7iW4MBDlE5YzttN-MbbkRmbIt6iUf_PpTEWRALeV0yx0gBC4uVYQF-ZyKG1xLa99oss6bFrGhfEY_0o5LFctKxGlBp9jpu2ipCrVfR5pnBK0ooP5e7x4qQM5rmIEof2JQCLf5RQhIADclovW2-WUzmRvSxvn7E_erhklwWZ4b_vUSALIQEiL3B_Rddb8nb_WuBUdcCcpvrtdG7FdagQmRVOfUWtxVJiQHWIR_Z9wUNn5WxhbC7de7HWQVXIfV2EFASg0KyUeG0OwTWZFJqwbsXX_bsx8sMWRfkyA1-wSf3ZRhLmO8_Xh5hsTrqMJx9HwpIShcEqp15o8GcBnCZaxoDidi7790bmpZ/3jn/gC9j1HhzTluIzGCOTcJeCg/h6/Yik_N7jclmVrYQVXCPUUOIlIYjjeKQVCbzY_UKKECzA) In solidarity, Kina Collins

clean_body: Why are DC insiders spending money on anything but protecting our majority? | | | Team, Yesterday, released an exposé about Team Blue PAC, a Super PAC almost which is specifically targeting our campaign. , they literally mentioned my name. Rolling Stone Magazine asked me to comment and here’s what I said: Democratic leadership should be spending every dime of our party’s resources on helping frontline incumbents in swing districts and protecting our majority instead of coming into a deep-blue district that is clamoring for new leadership. Our leaders in Congress need to stop wasting money protecting absentee corporate politicians, when they should be using their resources to save our razor-thin majority. ** I believe in the Democratic Party, and I know we can win a stronger majority in 2022. But not until we elect leaders who take action. Leaders who keep their promises. The path to winning in 2022 is clear: Cancel student debt, end the filibuster, pass voting rights protections, expand the Child Tax Credit, protect our reproductive rights, fund our schools, and invest in healthcare, housing, and jobs for everyone. But as long as corporations and lobbyists are financing backroom operations to protect politicians in power, the Democratic party is trapped. Held hostage by the highest bidder. Instead of spending corporate dollars to attack Democratic challengers like me, our party’s leadership should be arming frontline representatives, actually at risk of losing their seats to Republicans, with the most powerful weapon of all–progress.** In solidarity, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. I’m DISGUSTED. Attacks on Dr. Fauci are beyond politics: they threaten our entire public health apparatus. Dr. Fauci’s long-time colleagues have even said this is the most visibly hurt they’ve seen him – he needs our support now more than ever! | As a Congressman and as a doctor myself, I’ve seen the devastating impacts of COVID-19 on our country. I can confidently say that Dr. Fauci’s leadership has been essential in leading us through this pandemic. But anti-science Republicans like Rand Paul will do ANYTHING to destroy his reputation and spread misinformation. So it’s up to us to protect Dr. Fauci’s legacy and continue our fight against COVID-19. Thank you for your support, Dr. Raul Ruiz Cincinnati.com: Rand Paul calls Anthony Fauci a 'menace;' latest in increasingly personal feud | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Electrifying America’s Future (petition)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
Add your name >> [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41924916/330910729/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_PET_GEN_AC_20220217_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTVjNmY3OC00MTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vaT9Hl7KTGF6UFifEzKe4Sq_v4rV_SfDpvC1QPkjcpo=&emci=1e31b9ca-3790-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=e15c6f78-4190-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=252045)
---
Folks, electrification is the future of New Mexico and America — and it’s been decades in the making. My love for electrification goes way back. It started when I was a kid, the son of a lineman and IBEW member. It continued into my days as a college student, when I helped design a carbon fiber solar car that we raced from Dallas, Texas, to Minneapolis, Minnesota: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41924918/330910731/443305572?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_PET_GEN_AC_20220217_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTVjNmY3OC00MTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vaT9Hl7KTGF6UFifEzKe4Sq_v4rV_SfDpvC1QPkjcpo=&emci=1e31b9ca-3790-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=e15c6f78-4190-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=252045) And it continues today. **Electrification of vehicles, households, and more has already and will continue to create good-paying jobs. It’s also one of the most practical ways we can act on climate change.** That’s why I’ve dedicated so much time to finding affordable, efficient ways to electrify our homes and communities. We just brought $38 million in formula funding to New Mexico to expand our electric vehicle charging system across the state, thanks to measures I fought for in the bipartisan infrastructure bill. I’m also working every day alongside my colleagues in the Electrification Caucus to pass policies that make widespread electrification a reality — including my plans to help families get rebates for electrifying their homes. The climate crisis is growing worse every day, and it’s more important than ever that we advance legislation to electrify America. [**Can you help build support for widespread electrification by adding your name below?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41924920/330910733/443305572?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_PET_GEN_AC_20220217_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTVjNmY3OC00MTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vaT9Hl7KTGF6UFifEzKe4Sq_v4rV_SfDpvC1QPkjcpo=&emci=1e31b9ca-3790-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=e15c6f78-4190-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=252045) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41924922/330910735/443305572?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_PET_GEN_AC_20220217_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTVjNmY3OC00MTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vaT9Hl7KTGF6UFifEzKe4Sq_v4rV_SfDpvC1QPkjcpo=&emci=1e31b9ca-3790-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=e15c6f78-4190-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=252045)
---
Thank you for making your voice heard on this critical issue.
— Martin
| Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
---
Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. If you would like to stay in touch but receive fewer emails from us, [click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41924924/330910737/1737618405?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_PET_GEN_AC_20220217_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTVjNmY3OC00MTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vaT9Hl7KTGF6UFifEzKe4Sq_v4rV_SfDpvC1QPkjcpo=&emci=1e31b9ca-3790-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=e15c6f78-4190-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=252045). body:

name: JR Majewski
subject: Help this Veteran flip Ohio's most Winnable Seat!
body:
My name is JR Majewski. I’m very excited to write to you today as we kick off a brand new year with brand new opportunities.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zrq0e1fprgt79jniphrrgc5inph8t5nav6hnmmno_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkpqj3cpiekor9d1jmoqjcd9jm5p78cdjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicboeeptgm6o7adtmckorfd1l65h6ccdicdir6s3jelgred5km5hj4t3km1i39d1n6v970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66libbc70earmcd30mdj3fc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5im8pj7c1h6coh5u)
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zb0d64tlo24eiff0jkuvbsp6ja3k5ld6v0ff6gmo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chj6eo32cph2bs) Dear Patriot, My name is JR Majewski. I'm very excited to write to you today as we kick off a brand new year with brand new opportunities. Not the least of which is to take back the House for Conservatives and show "President" Biden and his administration that the People have the right to say NO to craziness. **In short, we have the opportunity to change the direction of America in 2022.** _And all of that starts with Ohio 's 9th district._ **Marcy Kaptur has been the Socialist misrepresenting my home district for 38 years. And after 38 years, Ohio is fighting back.** _Our Governor signed into law new congressional maps that change Ohio 's 9th from a Democrat Stronghold to a lean Republican District._ **And I am the only candidate that is running in this race that was in it from the beginning, back when it was batting against a Democrat fortress.** But now that this is a Republican district, this means that we WILL flip this seat, we WILL flip the House, and I WILL be Ohio's 9th district's representative. **[But none of this happens without your help.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zth22ud9j0kmlkvb7ebmbr6ajeb6c3vrmtchaa3o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chj6eo32cph2bs)** I am incredibly optimistic about where we are heading this year. _And I am incredibly excited about what I will do when I am elected._ **A Unique Calling** I am a US Air Force Veteran turned Nuclear Energy Executive. How did I get on that path? **Well, right after my time in the Air Force, I served in security for a Nuclear Power Plant. I worked incredibly hard, picking up 12 hour shifts after 12 hour shifts.** _I was promoted to an Assistant Project Manager and then Project Manager where I oversaw many multiple million dollar project._ **_And now I am an Executive Director overseeing the spent fuel of about 25 nuclear reactors, oversee a 4 billion dollar budget, and about 750 employees._** With Biden and company's extreme pressure for the Green New Deal and a fake "Infrastructure" Bill, I am uniquely positioned to be one of the only people in Congress who can refute the Leftist lies on the subject of American Energy Independence and Infrastructure from the perspective of an expert and executive in the industry. **American energy is just like American infrastructure and the American people: Fewer regulations and fewer taxes enable and empower the United States to harness the unique resources and capabilities of our great nation: abundant national resources and ambitious, intelligent, hard-working folks around the nation.** _And this is the message I will bring to Congress, because I live it every day. Right now, America is the United States' greatest untapped resource._ **Do we want a better economy? Do we want a better infrastructure? Do we want cheaper energy?** _The answer is simple: Don 't look to Socialism look home._ I am running for Congress in Ohio's 9th district to fight for the people and to fight for continued and strengthened American Independence. **But to do this I need your help.** ** ** **_[Can you help out with a generous donation today? Please contribute $25, $50, $100 or more today. With your help, we can flip the House and flip Ohio's 9th!](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z2nbb32m50fm7jl87mpr0vctkrj65ce45iph1r70_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chj6eo32cph2bs)_** Thank you and God Bless. J.R. Majewski Patriot Husband Air Force Veteran | | [DONATE TODAY](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z1mgn2jj2vuvggknn04ob8v2s5fmjbeg7l1arhb0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chj6eo32cph2bs)
---

clean_body: My name is JR Majewski. I’m very excited to write to you today as we kick off a brand new year with brand new opportunities. Dear Patriot, My name is JR Majewski. I'm very excited to write to you today as we kick off a brand new year with brand new opportunities. Not the least of which is to take back the House for Conservatives and show "President" Biden and his administration that the People have the right to say NO to craziness. In short, we have the opportunity to change the direction of America in 2022. And all of that starts with Ohio 's 9th district. Marcy Kaptur has been the Socialist misrepresenting my home district for 38 years. And after 38 years, Ohio is fighting back. Our Governor signed into law new congressional maps that change Ohio 's 9th from a Democrat Stronghold to a lean Republican District. And I am the only candidate that is running in this race that was in it from the beginning, back when it was batting against a Democrat fortress. But now that this is a Republican district, this means that we WILL flip this seat, we WILL flip the House, and I WILL be Ohio's 9th district's representative. I am incredibly optimistic about where we are heading this year. And I am incredibly excited about what I will do when I am elected. A Unique Calling I am a US Air Force Veteran turned Nuclear Energy Executive. How did I get on that path? Well, right after my time in the Air Force, I served in security for a Nuclear Power Plant. I worked incredibly hard, picking up 12 hour shifts after 12 hour shifts. I was promoted to an Assistant Project Manager and then Project Manager where I oversaw many multiple million dollar project. And now I am an Executive Director overseeing the spent fuel of about 25 nuclear reactors, oversee a 4 billion dollar budget, and about 750 employees. With Biden and company's extreme pressure for the Green New Deal and a fake "Infrastructure" Bill, I am uniquely positioned to be one of the only people in Congress who can refute the Leftist lies on the subject of American Energy Independence and Infrastructure from the perspective of an expert and executive in the industry. American energy is just like American infrastructure and the American people: Fewer regulations and fewer taxes enable and empower the United States to harness the unique resources and capabilities of our great nation: abundant national resources and ambitious, intelligent, hard-working folks around the nation. And this is the message I will bring to Congress, because I live it every day. Right now, America is the United States' greatest untapped resource. Do we want a better economy? Do we want a better infrastructure? Do we want cheaper energy? The answer is simple: Don 't look to Socialism look home. I am running for Congress in Ohio's 9th district to fight for the people and to fight for continued and strengthened American Independence. But to do this I need your help. Thank you and God Bless. J.R. Majewski Patriot Husband Air Force Veteran | | If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Self Reliance Central, . 1602 Belle View Blvd #381, Alexandria, VA 22307

name: Tony Vargas
subject: I need your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress
body:
My first 50 endorsements ...

|
---

| | [**_I’ve just been endorsed by 50 individuals and organizations in my campaign for Congress! I’m so humbled to receive all of this support -- now I need to keep up this momentum and show everyone that I have what it takes to win this race for Democrats. I need 5,000 endorsements from my top supporters before midnight \-- can I count on your endorsement at this pivotal moment? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41925145/330911574/743744551?source=20220217_em_pet_b1_tony_30_rs_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjU2MjE0MC00MjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9cjjW0eaK6KUCppxRmCNSD1-L8bmypPCdYkCXRS1u3g=&emci=9995d63f-3b90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=92562140-4290-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=19927889)

I could not have made it this far without your support. But now, more than anything, I need your personal endorsement to keep this momentum going. [**_If you already know me and have my back, go ahead and sign your name here. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41925146/330911575/743744551?source=20220217_em_pet_b1_tony_30_rs_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjU2MjE0MC00MjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9cjjW0eaK6KUCppxRmCNSD1-L8bmypPCdYkCXRS1u3g=&emci=9995d63f-3b90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=92562140-4290-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=19927889)[** If you’re not sure yet, please give me the chance to earn your support.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41925147/330911576/743744551?source=20220217_em_pet_b1_tony_30_rs_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjU2MjE0MC00MjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9cjjW0eaK6KUCppxRmCNSD1-L8bmypPCdYkCXRS1u3g=&emci=9995d63f-3b90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=92562140-4290-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=19927889) Let me tell you a little bit about my backstory: I grew up in a working class family. My parents immigrated here in hopes of creating a good life for me and my brothers. It wasn’t easy living paycheck to paycheck and facing housing instability. But they believed in the American Dream, never gave up, and their hard work paid off. That is why I have made it my life’s mission to serve others and help countless Americans achieve their dreams. [**_Everyone deserves a shot at the American Dream. But my opponent, Congressman Don Bacon, has never supported people like you and me -- he voted to cut taxes for the wealthy and left working class folks in the dust. That is why I’m running for Congress -- to advocate for hardworking folks. But I can’t do it alone. I need 5,000 endorsements before midnight to prove I have what it takes to win, so will you add your name now? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41925149/330911577/743744551?source=20220217_em_pet_b1_tony_30_rs_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjU2MjE0MC00MjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9cjjW0eaK6KUCppxRmCNSD1-L8bmypPCdYkCXRS1u3g=&emci=9995d63f-3b90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=92562140-4290-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=19927889) I’ll be honest: winning this race isn’t going to be easy. But endorsements like yours will help me take my grassroots campaign further than it has ever gone before. In exchange for your endorsement, I promise you this: I will have your back everyday in Washington. [**_50 individuals and organizations have already shown interest in my campaign. I’m just hoping you’ll show your support too with your personal endorsement. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41925150/330911578/743744551?source=20220217_em_pet_b1_tony_30_rs_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjU2MjE0MC00MjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9cjjW0eaK6KUCppxRmCNSD1-L8bmypPCdYkCXRS1u3g=&emci=9995d63f-3b90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=92562140-4290-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=19927889) Thank you from the bottom of my heart, Tony [**P.S. My endorsements include:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41925151/330911579/743744551?source=20220217_em_pet_b1_tony_30_rs_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjU2MjE0MC00MjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9cjjW0eaK6KUCppxRmCNSD1-L8bmypPCdYkCXRS1u3g=&emci=9995d63f-3b90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=92562140-4290-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=19927889) [**BOLD Democrats (Congressional Hispanic Caucus)**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41925152/330911580/743744551?source=20220217_em_pet_b1_tony_30_rs_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjU2MjE0MC00MjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9cjjW0eaK6KUCppxRmCNSD1-L8bmypPCdYkCXRS1u3g=&emci=9995d63f-3b90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=92562140-4290-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=19927889)

Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon.

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

Tony is proud to be endorsed by 314 Action Fund, BOLD Democrats, and Latino Victory Fund.

Email is the best way for Tony to keep his supporters up-to-date with happenings from the campaign trail. We know we send a lot of fundraising emails -- but that’s because his campaign is fueled by grassroots donations from folks like you. clean_body: My first 50 endorsements ... | | | I could not have made it this far without your support. But now, more than anything, I need your personal endorsement to keep this momentum going. Let me tell you a little bit about my backstory: I grew up in a working class family. My parents immigrated here in hopes of creating a good life for me and my brothers. It wasn’t easy living paycheck to paycheck and facing housing instability. But they believed in the American Dream, never gave up, and their hard work paid off. That is why I have made it my life’s mission to serve others and help countless Americans achieve their dreams. I’ll be honest: winning this race isn’t going to be easy. But endorsements like yours will help me take my grassroots campaign further than it has ever gone before. In exchange for your endorsement, I promise you this: I will have your back everyday in Washington. Thank you from the bottom of my heart, Tony | Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon. name: MalcolmKenyatta.com
subject: This isn't any ordinary race. Malcolm isn't an ordinary candidate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Emails like these are so important to our success
#

Hey,
We’re about to ask you to chip in $3 to Malcolm Kenyatta’s campaign for U.S. Senate. But first, we’d like to take a minute to explain why emails like these are so important to our success.
**This isn't any ordinary race.** Pennsylvania is the most important battleground state in the country. That's because it’s Democrats’ best chance to defend our razor-thin Senate majority.
**Malcolm isn't an ordinary candidate.** He's a working person who knows what it's like to wait in line at a food bank, suffer the weight of student debt, and work a minimum wage job.
**This is an extraordinary moment.** It's time for working people to have a seat of our own at the table — to finally ensure our government works for us.
But it's going to take all of us coming together to elect Malcolm as the champion working families need in the Senate. That's why emails like this one are so important.
Malcolm isn’t taking any corporate PAC money, so we rely on donations from supporters like you to fuel this campaign.
And we’re a bit behind on our fundraising for the month, which means we need a surge of support today to catch up. That’s why we’re asking:
[Can you rush a $3 contribution to Malcolm Kenyatta’s campaign for U.S. Senate today? Anything you are able to give will go a long way in fueling our fight for working families.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41925783/330912818/-358086307?refcode2=f950006e-4390-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220217-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTUwMDA2ZS00MzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8WITD34UbX2hqMd3htlLNDS0Ltkf17nFVuHi8Pf6dP8=)

Thank you,
Team Malcolm

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Did you see Jesse White’s endorsement?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
Join us in electing our first woman Secretary of State.
#
Peter,
I asked for your help for Anna Valencia’s campaign – and so many of you are stepping up and supporting Anna in her bid to become Illinois’ first woman Secretary of State.
I wanted to make sure you saw the latest game-changing development in this race:
**Jesse White – our most effective Secretary of State and hands down the most popular Democratic statewide official in modern history – has thrown his support behind Anna.**
My good friend Senator Tammy Duckworth and I are both supporting Anna’s campaign, too.
This is a critical moment. Peter, we need your name on the list of Anna’s supporters.
**[Contribute $5 or whatever you can now to elect our first woman Secretary of State.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41925827/330913057/341643644?refcode=dd_em_220217_2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGZjMGNmMy00MzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HdlXKwpsbgVI1YZfE4fY5k1ObggGF2X_ST4pE7367BA=)**
My best,
Dick Durbin

I wanted to make sure you saw the latest game-changing development in this race: Jesse White – our most effective Secretary of State and hands down the most popular Democratic statewide official in modern history – has thrown his support behind Anna. body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8778165acfb5/your-help-is-needed-6776722?e=e67cbb3f92)
---
| [ ](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=9e72809370&e=e67cbb3f92)
---
| | **Dear Friend,

We are at a critical moment in history, when people are reaching for something better for our country and for our world. And we’re looking for new leaders to take us there.

An incumbent who has been in Congress for 25 years - supported by corporate donors such as big pharmaceutical and health insurance companies - is not the kind of leader we need now. Colorado’s District 1 has been led by such a person for more than two decades; it's time to give the reins to someone new.

Neal Walia is perfect for that job, primarily because he has a visceral understanding of the challenges faced by people in his district. Despite his extensive education - two master degrees, plus experience working in former Governor Hickenlooper’s office as well as for the National Governors Association in DC working on homelessness, housing, homeland security and public safety issues - he too has crushing college loan debt, cannot afford to own a home in the city he loves, and worry about the exorbitant costs of child care should he and his wife choose to have a child.

Such a situation as Neal’s - a combination of doing everything you’re supposed to do to achieve the American dream in America, plus the inability to do so because of structural realities that make it too difficult - is widespread not only for the people of CO district 1 but throughout America. People like Neale have the experience, skill and compassion needed to change that.

The system is rigged against candidates like Neal, however. Gargantuan establishment and corporate power resist the kinds of changes that a new generation of leaders represent, and we need to override that power.

He is a candidate ready to help provide solutions, but we need to get him into Congress so he can.

Please donate as much as you can to his race so we can override the corporate chokehold that’s keeping this country from moving on. People who have presided over an era of decline in America are not the ones who will lift us up now. **

**[Can I count on you to donate $50, $250, $500, or $1000 to help Neal win this primary election?](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=82435dfcdf&e=e67cbb3f92)

The task at hand isn’t easy, but it’s doable and it's worth doing. We need Neal Walia to help repair this country, and Neal needs us to help him so he can.

All my best,** **Marianne Williamson**
---

Educators and Allies Educators and Allies, It's no secret that dangerous extremists and conspiracy theorists are running for local school boards all over America this year. They won't be easy to defeat, but we're committed to taking them on, exposing their delusions, and educating voters everywhere we can. Just this week in Wisconsin, educators scored an important victory: former English teacher Liz Szilagyi led a six candidate field, advancing to the general election and knocking out vaccine conspiracy theorist Matt Tooke. **[Join us in helping elect great educators like Liz Szilagyi, and defeating dangerous conspiracy-theorists like Matt Tooke.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41913851/330861585/1894729551?refcode=em_2022wisb_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkMjQ5YzBiLTFiOTAtZWMxMS1hNTA3LTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zEHSO2YmLJkfHTLqJlv-xQc_eAV2ZaPM9PkQ-6EjtP0=) ** **** | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41913852/330861586/397479554?refcode=em_2021118bohannan_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkMjQ5YzBiLTFiOTAtZWMxMS1hNTA3LTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zEHSO2YmLJkfHTLqJlv-xQc_eAV2ZaPM9PkQ-6EjtP0=)
_Right-Wing School Board Candidate Matt Tooke
protesting outside of an elementary school_
---
Matt Tooke is no ordinary school board candidate: he protested outside an elementary school, spreading disinformation about vaccines, and tried to scare parents and their kids out of receiving life-saving medical care.
He promised to look into banning books he didn't like, even though he admitted he had no idea what books were actually in the school libraries.
For the nearly 10,000 students in the Oshkosh school district, the prospect of having such an out-of-touch, extremist on the School Board must have been frightful. Thankfully, educator Liz Szilagyi and a coalition of educators and parents ended Matt's campaign and knocked him out of the general election.
But now, Liz faces two opponents who campaigned with Matt Tooke, and who attack educators and promote the right-wing, inaccurate nonsense about 'critical race theory.'
Let's be clear: Matt Tooke losing is a great thing for students in Oshkosh. [**But we can't be complacent now, or his allies and people who support Matt Tooke will elect two of their own extremists.** ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41913853/330861587/1894729551?refcode=em_2022wisb_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkMjQ5YzBiLTFiOTAtZWMxMS1hNTA3LTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zEHSO2YmLJkfHTLqJlv-xQc_eAV2ZaPM9PkQ-6EjtP0=)
Liz, and educators like her all over the country, badly need our help to win their elections and continue working for students, parents, and educators.

Let's be clear: Matt Tooke losing is a great thing for students in Oshkosh. = Liz, and educators like her all over the country, badly need our help to win their elections and continue working for students, parents, and educators. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for your support, Elect Educators Everywhere | Elect Educators Everywhere is designed to help elect teachers, school counselors, college faculty, and all types of public educators to office from coast to coast. With your help, we can ensure that educators have a seat at the table when it comes to making policy decisions in this country. | = | Paid for by Elect Educators Everywhere PAC Contributions or gifts to Elect Educators Everywhere are not tax deductible. | With the state legislature here in Oklahoma DEAD SET on limiting our reproductive healthcare access with anti-women bills, it’s clear we have to get strong leaders in place to take action on the most critical issues facing Oklahomans.

James Lankford and his powerful extremist friends haven’t stood up for our state—that’s why we’re at the bottom on health care and education nationwide. _Here’s the thing:_ I’m not a career politician and I get what everyday Oklahomans are going through because I’m one of them.

| Peter, our Democracy is at stake.

Supreme Court decisions, like _Shelby County v. Holder_ , gutted key provisions of the Voting Rights Act and opened the door to restrictive voting laws, especially targeting communities of color.

This is unacceptable. **We should be making it easier to vote – not harder.**

[_**That’s why we’re reaching out today.**Peter, w** ill you sign our petition to demand Congress take action and restore and strengthen the Voting Rights Act's key provisions? →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41926020/330913923/-1026004337?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTMxODYzYS00NTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=56YFH94l3GXRDoN1nbwEYMxQwpr0HZM3gfj1Y5fbd_o=&emci=71c771e6-2490-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=4531863a-4590-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=4588596)

Josh served as counsel on the U.S. Senate Judiciary Committee when the Supreme Court handed down its decision in _Shelby County v. Holder_ , **and his team immediately went to work on legislation to restore it.**

Josh has a proven track record of defending our Democracy and fighting for everyone’s voice to be heard. **But our work won’t be done until:**
1. Election Day is a federal holiday.
2. Same-day voter registration is available to all.
3. Absentee voting by mail is a right.
4. Those who are convicted of crimes have their right to vote restored once they have paid their debts to society.
5. And we fix our broken campaign finance system.

name: Team Holly
subject: Join our Silent Auction NOW!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter, l ast week I spent time volunteering at the Community Resource Center of Chattooga. Their food bank fills a need we have struggled with in GA-14 for many years, and being there to help showed me once again why I'm running for Congress.
While sorting and handing out food, I had the opportunity to talk with the founder who began the program 8 years ago. She felt compelled to start the food bank because she knew people in her life would go hungry without it. When she isn't at the food bank, she spends most of her time fostering teenagers and workshopping resumes with the young women leaving the foster system.
People like this are what hold our community together. Her struggles and triumphs remind me why this race is so important.
This work is especially touching for me, because my family has had to rely on food banks before. I know that our community's struggles go beyond party lines. We need to get back to the basics of helping one another and that starts with better representation. We need legislators who understand the problems and can fight for solutions.
It doesn't matter what side of the aisle you are on, we can find common ground in fighting for our community. That’s why our Rural Revival Plan is so special. I am fighting for resources that will help all of GA-14. The issues we face are not too hard to fix. We need a representative who is working for the people, not against them.
With your donation, we can make a difference today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em0211b]
We can do this,
Holly McCormack.

clean_body: [] Peter, l ast week I spent time volunteering at the Community Resource Center of Chattooga. Their food bank fills a need we have struggled with in GA-14 for many years, and being there to help showed me once again why I'm running for Congress. While sorting and handing out food, I had the opportunity to talk with the founder who began the program 8 years ago. She felt compelled to start the food bank because she knew people in her life would go hungry without it. When she isn't at the food bank, she spends most of her time fostering teenagers and workshopping resumes with the young women leaving the foster system. People like this are what hold our community together. Her struggles and triumphs remind me why this race is so important. This work is especially touching for me, because my family has had to rely on food banks before. I know that our community's struggles go beyond party lines. We need to get back to the basics of helping one another and that starts with better representation. We need legislators who understand the problems and can fight for solutions. It doesn't matter what side of the aisle you are on, we can find common ground in fighting for our community. That’s why our Rural Revival Plan is so special. I am fighting for resources that will help all of GA-14. The issues we face are not too hard to fix. We need a representative who is working for the people, not against them. With your donation, we can make a difference today. [] We can do this, Holly McCormack. name: Adam Schiff
subject: re: Sean Hannity
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
This is getting out of hand, Derek. Sean Hannity spent Monday night attacking Hillary Clinton... and me. That’s right. In an effort to cover for Trump’s own attacks on our democracy, they pushed out the same bogus smears against us and tried, once again, to relitigate Russian assistance in their 2016 election. It’s truly pathetic. Just take a look at this: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41926328/330915555/2106225420?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20220217_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjMxODYzYS00NTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rIFOrOhat7Itb1T3K24j8U056ybQGbIse5yoi2R73wU=) “Adam Schiff, or you know, whatever we want to call you, the congenital liar. If you really care about election interference, is it okay when Hillary Clinton does it? Because Adam Schiff on that January 6 committee is the biggest purveyor of election fraud lies ever. We need an investigation into him.” – Sean Hannity This isn’t the first time, or second time, or even third time that Sean Hannity has called for me to be investigated or prosecuted for made up crimes. But it does have real consequences. Because millions of his viewers believe his lies. The millions who watch it online after the fact believe him. And guess what? Every other Republican who lacks character but holds power, from Kevin McCarthy to Marjorie Taylor Greene, is spewing the same attacks and promising retribution on me if they take over. That’s how their misinformation machine works, and how it manipulates public opinion. It’s textbook propaganda. And we cannot stand idly by as it spreads. **Will you make a donation to my re-election campaign right now so we can stand up to these vicious liars? The only way to counter misinformation is with the truth. The more resources we have, the more we’ll be able to reach voters. We cannot let the Republican misinformation machine shape the narrative.
