name: Letitia James
subject: FWD: Will you help me make history again?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | |
---
Did you see the exciting news, Peter?

**Today, I was officially nominated by the New York Democrats to serve as your attorney general for another four years.** I’m incredibly honored to receive this nomination – especially because I won’t be ready to stop serving New York until every last person is defended from the powerful and wealthy.

Peter, in 2018 we made history together when I became the first Black woman elected to hold statewide office – will you help me make history again?

Following the official nomination, my team set a goal of 1,000 donations before midnight. **We only need 39 more donations to reach our critical goal – so will you please rush a donation of $5 or more right now to power my re-election campaign?**

Here’s the best link to give: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jamesforny -22**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41926693/330916774/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk354-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTY0MGUwNi00NjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tJDeWSRuFKvXbbexzppLIUNeWkQP2ogyuxvtOHfUbYw=)

Thank you for making history with me, Peter.
Letitia
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Letitia James**
Date: Thu, Feb 17, 2022
Subject: The New York Democrats nominated me
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41926694/330916775/-1805987699?refcode=jtk354-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTY0MGUwNi00NjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tJDeWSRuFKvXbbexzppLIUNeWkQP2ogyuxvtOHfUbYw=)
---
It’s official, Peter.

**Today, at the New York State Democratic Convention, I was honored to receive an official nomination for attorney general.**
| | [Contribute to my re-election campaign](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41926695/330916776/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk354-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTY0MGUwNi00NjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tJDeWSRuFKvXbbexzppLIUNeWkQP2ogyuxvtOHfUbYw=)
---
I have spent every moment of my time as your attorney general fighting to defend the rights of the voiceless and vulnerable – even against some of the most powerful forces in the nation. I’ve taken fights to Big Pharma for their role in the opioid crisis, I’ve held corrupt politicians accountable, and protected Americans' right to choose – **because I refuse to be bought or intimidated.**

It would be the honor of my career to serve as New York’s attorney general for another four years, but I can’t do this alone. **That’s why we set a goal to receive at least 1,000 donations before midnight tonight.**

**[With Election Day mere months away, it’s absolutely critical that we hit every fundraising goal between now and then. Can I count on you to chip in $5 right now to help us meet our 1,000 donations goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41926696/330916777/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk354-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTY0MGUwNi00NjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tJDeWSRuFKvXbbexzppLIUNeWkQP2ogyuxvtOHfUbYw=)**
| | [Contribute to my re-election campaign](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41926697/330916778/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk354-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTY0MGUwNi00NjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tJDeWSRuFKvXbbexzppLIUNeWkQP2ogyuxvtOHfUbYw=)
---
Together we made history in 2018 when I became the first Black woman to be elected to hold statewide office. **And now, we have the opportunity to make history again by getting me re-elected.**

But, Peter, I didn’t run for attorney general to make history – I ran because I knew that I had the grit and determination needed to make a positive difference for New York. And I’m running for re-election because I’m not done fighting for the vulnerable and voiceless.

**I’m incredibly honored to receive an official nomination from the New York Democrats for attorney general – now I need your help to take advantage of this momentum and make history with me again.[I’m still 385 donors short of my midnight goal – will you rush a donation of $5 or more to help power my re-election campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41926698/330916779/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk354-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTY0MGUwNi00NjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tJDeWSRuFKvXbbexzppLIUNeWkQP2ogyuxvtOHfUbYw=)**
| | [Contribute to my re-election campaign](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41926699/330916780/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk354-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTY0MGUwNi00NjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tJDeWSRuFKvXbbexzppLIUNeWkQP2ogyuxvtOHfUbYw=)

Thanks for standing with me,

Letitia

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41926725/330916836/145944154?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzY0MGUwNi00NjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F_VB02W73TqubuQ8EQ_Ot13Yl0jPiJ04g8re83S3LI0=)

name: Shontel Brown
subject: Nobody should go without health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
We need high-quality, affordable health care today.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41926993/330917720/-1588987764?refcode=EM_FR_220217M4A_N_SB_ALL_4_NG_TESTB_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmE3Yjg4OS00NzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FhNU7OyqFJ0U8AP7jP_xGmImvp53Z4cCSm4bacWLtXw=) Peter,

It’s clear to us all. **Too many Americans can’t afford their health.** From skyrocketing prescription drug prices to high premiums with little to no coverage, _our health care system needs to be revitalized._

In the richest country on earth, nobody should go without health care. **That’s why I proudly support Medicare for All.** I’m working every day to bring high-quality health care to every Ohioan, but I need your help.

[**_We need 500 grassroots supporters by 11:59 PM to stand up for Medicare for All and tell Congress it’s time every American had access to quality health care by signing our petition now! ➡_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41926994/330917721/-907693143?refcode=EM_FR_220217M4A_N_SB_ALL_4_NG_TESTB_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmE3Yjg4OS00NzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FhNU7OyqFJ0U8AP7jP_xGmImvp53Z4cCSm4bacWLtXw=&emci=5035c168-4290-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=1ba7b889-4790-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=23746811) [Sign Our Petition
Pass Medicare for All!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41926995/330917722/-907693143?refcode=EM_FR_220217M4A_N_SB_ALL_4_NG_TESTB_b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmE3Yjg4OS00NzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FhNU7OyqFJ0U8AP7jP_xGmImvp53Z4cCSm4bacWLtXw=&emci=5035c168-4290-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=1ba7b889-4790-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=23746811) We can’t afford to wait. We need high-quality, affordable health care today.

Thanks for your support,

Shontel Brown | As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. clean_body: We need high-quality, affordable health care today. = Peter, It’s clear to us all. Too many Americans can’t afford their health. From skyrocketing prescription drug prices to high premiums with little to no coverage, our health care system needs to be revitalized. In the richest country on earth, nobody should go without health care. That’s why I proudly support Medicare for All. I’m working every day to bring high-quality health care to every Ohioan, but I need your help. We can’t afford to wait. We need high-quality, affordable health care today. clean_body: Did you see Elaine Luria’s recent vote? She voted against reaffirming the voting rights of American citizens. | | | | | ---|---|--- Did you see Elaine Luria’s recent vote? Elaine voted to federalize our state elections! She also voted against removing illegal immigrants from states’ voter rolls. She voted against election integrity, plain and simple. A donation to my campaign is an investment in election integrity | Meanwhile, I introduced legislation to remove deceased voters from Virginia's voter rolls to protect the integrity of our elections. While Elaine Luria is voting against securing our elections, I am proactively taking steps to protect them. That is the difference in representation you will continue to see when I get to Washington. Help Secure our elections. Donate TODAY to help restore election integrity. | | | Free and fair elections are the cornerstone on which this country was founded. I want every American to feel secure in our electoral process again. Elaine Luria clearly can’t say the same. Let’s put real leaders with real solutions back in Washington. With gratitude, Team Kiggans | | | | Jen Kiggans is a veteran of the US Navy. name: Sen. Cortez Masto
subject: If we lose Nevada, we lose the Senate.
body:
Derek, our chances of defending the Senate just dropped dramatically.

National Journal just named me the most vulnerable Senator on the ballot, which means Mitch McConnell will be zeroing in on Nevada as the one seat he needs to flip the Senate. If we lose Nevada, we lose the Senate.

I'm no stranger to a tough race – but this is going to be the closest Senate race of the year. The entire force of the GOP is coming after me, so I can’t do this alone. I’ve got to be honest, Derek: I’m facing a major fundraising gap and I need your immediate help. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220217_CGVA_CCM]
The GOP is already blanketing Nevada with more than $4 million in attack ads to defeat me. We just ran the numbers and I need to raise at least $25,000 by midnight to have the resources to fight back – but right now I'm falling short.
Please, Derek, can you help me turn this around before it's too late? Here's the best link to make your donation: secure.actblue.com/donate/CGVAForCCM [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220217_CGVA_CCM]
Any amount makes a difference in our fight to defend the Senate. Thanks for giving what you can.

¡La lucha sigue! The fight continues!

Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto, Nevada

Common Good Virginia
PO Box 26112
Arlington, VA 22215
If you would like to opt-out of future emails from Common Good Virginia, click unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/809c18df-4790-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/fde24c0a-4890-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGUyNGMwYS00ODkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZC_TS5ZOBho5NftBCnzKRcCDNqPsCf6N3TR7FGOAzNc=&id=108609855 .

name: Kathi, Campaign Manager
subject: Will you help us keep Ohio red?
body:
ICYMI: The momentum is on our side, but we need your help to keep it going
| | | | Dear Peter,
In case you missed it, I wanted to make sure you saw the below email from Devin Bilski about volunteer opportunities on Team Dolan.
Thanks,
Kathi Paroska Campaign Manager Dolan for Ohio
---
| |
---
| FROM: Devin, Political Director DATE: February 14, 2022
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LqbC_-azO714TNOUK4NRkb6PHDEJ5m2Zt_9xOKofngcjiL4ZgmMp2ZAcwEYg1QKRBgvSeOYJC3hAmL7LKfxlZQK5thUJJwpd3JWtaWZYmfHkNEBPDczxV9-AmQug7bDP5f8tFfpIjtzkxFlrddZSAw==&c=e0nkPZfo2M08uEr9aViaxLp6ixsm28-6ynnB2Njp-ZlzUmZr6tnB-Q==&ch=z1bwdf9eB14GWE5nHzhwAK7qGZajiHwvykQubQYZl4t91CD6MKHp6A==)
---
| Peter, My name is Devin and I'm the Political Director for Senator Matt Dolan's campaign for United States Senate.
With the weather warming up, we need your help to keep up the momentum and continue to spread Matt's #OhioMatters message to Republican voters across the state. Can I add you to our list so that we can keep you updated on opportunities to help in your area?
---
| | [SIGN UP NOW!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LqbC_-azO714TNOUK4NRkb6PHDEJ5m2Zt_9xOKofngcjiL4ZgmMp2biuW1VVgBthErzX8ogRBhbpw6xCD7Xz9cvTd05L7Ir_qx7sCnKIXs7gej8hILRelWeq402qRaJFtJri8PfSU1OFd72JYRr-g7i3lK3XGl8BBghXUxU0d-7LZwGT_DZZMdeb4AbPe3fSOVkL3gay3rvsD7yvWym3wqTbfaxLj-B3Ci1u-kotF0nPMn_-zra-k-jWj6Uqwuoc&c=e0nkPZfo2M08uEr9aViaxLp6ixsm28-6ynnB2Njp-ZlzUmZr6tnB-Q==&ch=z1bwdf9eB14GWE5nHzhwAK7qGZajiHwvykQubQYZl4t91CD6MKHp6A==)
---
| You can help by...
1) Signing up to reach Republican voters by:
* Knocking doors
* Making phone calls
* Putting up a yard sign
* Helping at events

2) Forwarding this email to 5 family members, friends, and colleagues urging them to also sign up to help out.

| Thank you in advance for your help. body:

Fellow American,

We knew it was coming. According to a new report, now there's proof:

| "**Hollywood's famous faces are pouring money into key 2022 Senate races, aiming to give a star-studded boost to Democrats** fighting to hold on to their razor-thin majority in the midterm elections. For many celebrity donors, **the spotlight is on Sen. Raphael Warnock's (D-Ga.) campaign.** " _- The Hill, 2/9/2022_
---

Many of Hollywood's top celebrity activists are funneling thousands of dollars each into the campaign account of our opponent.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=cd8cae3e842143d084c4d66f53a278d0&_e=CDs6A7dLrTQ-ACeTsk2CTQtTGyrVCujEr20aW631dXCr3opJr2aYT9Xq49xh2zhoBSHLp-Vc9knS3R1o1M-oV9pPy1-4UbQ-pAHf8-uJQsdbeVzXIwjwClVOtPJDzinCxijfp-tHFgXwXYVCtRsOVHT3MbPhl4TatHjqke2JS_sBOkgusuGQmJ_e7PBjo7rZvPQmzqHbEc9-9w6QqcFcSBi58NCnDdyOjLW19ZTwRZR3nWORELY8ZDXeD1ypwDh9ZOIL2eR9kdzwNQ5qxDVw0Lwjnj6rS7Ha217i1WmXElAG69QRaDEnYhJ7lBJ-7el3CJ0bb_NW61IwymgtC_r74ItObOKG7JZEKvJtHjcFaqRuAUoJR44Hj24MU8b0_zLBmlu2z0YMs-XqMLbXDu_MDLLShFQnDE-d8aYUBHvAaH53SGEbL2Y-GzeTkKXMWdMVKLWixZTGyjmAGarv6fiphwD3JgxvZdxZOWuvQcddGW0%3D)
**It's clear we're only beginning to see the impact Hollywood is going to have on this critical Senate race.** More deep-pocketed Hollywood celebrities are going to send max-out contributions with the intent of keeping their favorite Democrat in the Senate.

**_[Here is our ask of you today: will you chip in $7 today to help us offset Hollywood's support of our opponent?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=cd8cae3e842143d084c4d66f53a278d0&_e=CDs6A7dLrTQ-ACeTsk2CTQtTGyrVCujEr20aW631dXCr3opJr2aYT9Xq49xh2zhoBSHLp-Vc9knS3R1o1M-oV9pPy1-4UbQ-pAHf8-uJQsdbeVzXIwjwClVOtPJDzinCxijfp-tHFgXwXYVCtRsOVHT3MbPhl4TatHjqke2JS_sBOkgusuGQmJ_e7PBjo7rZvPQmzqHbEc9-9w6QqcFcSBi58NCnDdyOjLW19ZTwRZR3nWORELY8ZDXeD1ypwDh9ZOIL2eR9kdzwNQ5qxDVw0GREIUMOEoVHuVA1R9aSozTujXk_ttlSuGgMbM0sB3YANXcoGovX91SbKlfLPkIPg3AxSEjRXgb-eyihhk9932JGhaFPLVZ5B7rghvrfUg3x1KxX3ZUkipcwt3PTfZVnf8fN6492V-Oz2cWb_dvNVPGvYRAqWYXD4JD9Y4Ti_KCgU3HnneLS4Dx6a5arHTwAHMAoU0TdEvs3NPpuAsA0-ME%3D)_**

**We've set a goal of raising an additional $35,000 before midnight tonight and could use your help.**

That may sound like an arbitrary number, but it's the amount of money we need to be raising - DAILY - to run the most competitive campaign possible.

[** SEND A MESSAGE TO HOLLYWOOD
DONATE $7 TODAY -> **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=cd8cae3e842143d084c4d66f53a278d0&_e=CDs6A7dLrTQ-ACeTsk2CTQtTGyrVCujEr20aW631dXCr3opJr2aYT9Xq49xh2zhoBSHLp-Vc9knS3R1o1M-oV9pPy1-4UbQ-pAHf8-uJQsdbeVzXIwjwClVOtPJDzinCxijfp-tHFgXwXYVCtRsOVHT3MbPhl4TatHjqke2JS_sBOkgusuGQmJ_e7PBjo7rZvPQmzqHbEc9-9w6QqcFcSBi58NCnDdyOjLW19ZTwRZR3nWORELY8ZDXeD1ypwDh9ZOIL2eR9kdzwNQ5qxDVw0ITL0vcKo4pjADGkLmDNkcKAvq4iGeQHqeoUFckXrfrPWg-8Tv84VffP_mBUZaYAZP7OcGYLoP6HK-v0WbfARyf5_zuBuN2Xw2_a32mjiDMjRXQkmXGTV2bA0-0rBnHTgLmkOx_RNrqJsToshe5AFgCj4aulOq73iDbGoX2BjC0bfOzZOK4lfU4UWM4v5TXqNGTsLeZPhmn71fd_zxrnTJU%3D)

Have you ever believed in something so strongly, that you’re willing to give up everything?

**_My family did and I am thankful every day for their sacrifice._**

I was born in Havana, Cuba, and escaped Castro's Communist Revolution with my family in 1960. I grew up watching a communist dictator destroy my native country. Our family friends who remained were forced to ration food and were oppressed every single day. But Fellow Conservative, I’ve always believed that my life is blessed – and I am grateful every day that my parents risked everything to make sure that we grew up in America where we could be free! They took a chance and together, we made it to the United States.

My parents came here with nothing but through hard work they were able to provide the example and the foundation for me to live the American Dream.

**I am living proof that the American dream is real!**

[**My name is Leora Levy and I’m running for the United States Senate.**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=6e30ec63ad324d9cae9fd8ba4594a9b8&_e=ZRKKlfNsm4J_FdwJ69bpE2Tk8371r5JQWZO_swRCY70YXCOC2ittHKyzjNppxdLWhwUy8eLELdQNinWkvYXERFSaZirU9uswV2_7xKSPa0Yn_yXcHcHb242eXG4uNVfhuBoYrKHg_SF-E_fij9J1xM2Ekz1QjcJ-3lhBd_crJbmpM7DOrikhXGkOSejselYM_QTuj9gVvj2JsKqko2orAaSYktJyyLxeCAOc3MTRBIMlfXFR73pAxPwjp2YpggTBpo8Xtu4mD71-J4jd6wN0qif1LP15scJWfYf0hAEzS25OUBd3HkbcoaNo3rsngYRCRPC4L7MaruqK2LRj1iBdKic95RJumV_l4LWkTGqgooQsukfcyHNhXJNhmuSHdBbueOAtKqruaA9VQ00uQft42T4vxOo0AEh5QCSBueH5Tzg5zTXgfOGhgUySBimhel9-5J3waGkc_er9VRSd7YHniQ%3D%3D) I am running to lead the fight for freedom and to take on the far-left who want to make our country look more like Communist Cuba than the United States.

[**Will you join my team with a contribution to my campaign of $10, $25, $50, or $75 so we can win the fight for freedom together?**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=6e30ec63ad324d9cae9fd8ba4594a9b8&_e=ZRKKlfNsm4J_FdwJ69bpE2Tk8371r5JQWZO_swRCY70YXCOC2ittHKyzjNppxdLWhwUy8eLELdQNinWkvYXERFSaZirU9uswV2_7xKSPa0Yn_yXcHcHb242eXG4uNVfhuBoYrKHg_SF-E_fij9J1xM2Ekz1QjcJ-3lhBd_crJbmpM7DOrikhXGkOSejselYM_QTuj9gVvj2JsKqko2orAaSYktJyyLxeCAOc3MTRBIMlfXFR73pAxPwjp2YpggTBfThy-EV_cSBY0B0X2pmWzMR1CAhDtQuLbLfuo1xIgALhxRCUih6GPx7mDPoW7qOghdb9gN74pb2aA3zrMTDxhsJGPLYQeLXI6XtyL1zSjfIwdn8Oq4RyueUyhuKKrsjNKN_hX7eKL6JxfSbn82E9KiYlhj3y4EbL2R2WhdQ-p1xIWIKeBNB92yaDtipEVD6MThPYzVuoxEoygMNJelmKHg%3D%3D)

[ _**DONATE**_ >> ](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=6e30ec63ad324d9cae9fd8ba4594a9b8&_e=ZRKKlfNsm4J_FdwJ69bpE2Tk8371r5JQWZO_swRCY70YXCOC2ittHKyzjNppxdLWhwUy8eLELdQNinWkvYXERFSaZirU9uswV2_7xKSPa0Yn_yXcHcHb242eXG4uNVfhuBoYrKHg_SF-E_fij9J1xM2Ekz1QjcJ-3lhBd_crJbmpM7DOrikhXGkOSejselYM_QTuj9gVvj2JsKqko2orAaSYktJyyLxeCAOc3MTRBIMlfXFR73pAxPwjp2YpggTBax1Y9avWJrVF8xMbZcM90da4jAaUYhc9Q7R08wr509vYNjQKaTbcTwmtki9h8scznA21uL1nvDL0aEfF8j4cfG_hy7lFVp_fNZ7l-csB499laJhn7qUwQI7a0ZofaBUy6DpKuyaS5rfSulv_09maqnMiI4P5chX8CwGq_CkLJmOqkEWWeBggAH0P9ZKP5EWfD4SJAw2ZMQ7Jnz3bZC2OWQ%3D%3D)

For too long, Democrats in Congress have sought to undermine our freedoms and destroy the very fabric of America. I am committed to leading the fight for American Freedom promised to us by our Constitution - because I know first-hand what it’s like when you lose it.

Think about this: in the first year of Joe Biden’s presidency, we have experienced record-setting inflation and fuel prices, and encountered utter disregard for our country's founding principles, faced a humiliating and deadly retreat from Afghanistan, leaving Americans behind and losing 13 brave American soldiers... _and this is just the beginning._

There’s no doubt that radical Democrats will continue to implement their left-wing agenda - _the same agenda my family once escaped from in Cuba._ [**This is why we need your help to win back the Senate and stop Joe Biden’s assault on our values.**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=6e30ec63ad324d9cae9fd8ba4594a9b8&_e=ZRKKlfNsm4J_FdwJ69bpE2Tk8371r5JQWZO_swRCY70YXCOC2ittHKyzjNppxdLWhwUy8eLELdQNinWkvYXERFSaZirU9uswV2_7xKSPa0Yn_yXcHcHb242eXG4uNVfhuBoYrKHg_SF-E_fij9J1xM2Ekz1QjcJ-3lhBd_crJbmpM7DOrikhXGkOSejselYM_QTuj9gVvj2JsKqko2orAaSYktJyyLxeCAOc3MTRBIMlfXFR73pAxPwjp2YpggTB_VzJcu5SEDboH7dzjKvUjgmWs5GVRzvP1Ez3d5u3X-eaxewNoyH7JD6thqymvWWEwGf3vxtc2YbDXke8zTZ6tbfyyYOYH60r5LT8KOcW_bXYmjF3wzVZR6GjbsuydLOsne7tZfHbcQCmdvGNVSiYrJVSROjoJxg_BrQQJ4xCuaxGBdItVni0fueyg610fClUtcNKj1L4woI6JB56hrti6g%3D%3D)

[ _**DONATE**_ >> ](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=6e30ec63ad324d9cae9fd8ba4594a9b8&_e=ZRKKlfNsm4J_FdwJ69bpE2Tk8371r5JQWZO_swRCY70YXCOC2ittHKyzjNppxdLWhwUy8eLELdQNinWkvYXERFSaZirU9uswV2_7xKSPa0Yn_yXcHcHb242eXG4uNVfhuBoYrKHg_SF-E_fij9J1xM2Ekz1QjcJ-3lhBd_crJbmpM7DOrikhXGkOSejselYM_QTuj9gVvj2JsKqko2orAaSYktJyyLxeCAOc3MTRBIMlfXFR73pAxPwjp2YpggTBRCOZ4nM15bwSi7Xfvm74Qm8hz_XUr5Bo0jqeoogzMA0u0O5ihOhxHf_6km5d2NbnEpDZtmHjHZMag-59HnZYDW9zuaQ5l7PnfALm5G_Wku3GhSei_fuFnFiRx85pTl9vMQE2iyJEVir168vmKT2Rz8i4IP4N9oY1zZ3fN_KbCDER3mzEAnMYzoZvm9FyAsuWkzi9PaEpA3Ym7qAtlOXvog%3D%3D)

To live our shared American values, we need strong leadership that is willing to stand firm against the advance of far-left socialist, Marxist policies in our country. What we don’t need is another squishy moderate who will abandon or betray us when it comes down to the important votes.

Know this, Fellow Conservative - Joe Biden may not be on the ballot in November, but his policies are. The way to **Beat Back Biden** is to beat Dick Blumenthal and I am the conservative candidate who can get it done. We must restore a Republican majority in the Senate!

[**I hope I can count on you to join me taking our country back.**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=6e30ec63ad324d9cae9fd8ba4594a9b8&_e=ZRKKlfNsm4J_FdwJ69bpE2Tk8371r5JQWZO_swRCY70YXCOC2ittHKyzjNppxdLWhwUy8eLELdQNinWkvYXERFSaZirU9uswV2_7xKSPa0Yn_yXcHcHb242eXG4uNVfhuBoYrKHg_SF-E_fij9J1xM2Ekz1QjcJ-3lhBd_crJbmpM7DOrikhXGkOSejselYM_QTuj9gVvj2JsKqko2orAaSYktJyyLxeCAOc3MTRBIMlfXFR73pAxPwjp2YpggTB_A_jy6Ug8oHYgJ5Ew0qJE4FheztOL4pV3hYLC7rrMtAB5zELABRV7A0QNzK-1vymHh89kUA8MAXoIcwfpM6jZGZ1FBBGMzETgvxBnYZt-Og9BQ7RQyJGkc6aSWguL5XgpYFH0XPNQQFIdPpoNHqqnntw66GPMm_BbEuNDcVhJZhb2mOmlxTowWLNLWHGPLzkATRLqH8RgchubBtG3OlFmg%3D%3D)

For America and for freedom,
Leora Levy

| | **About Leora**
_I am running to take on the far-left whose policies will make our country look more like the Communist Cuba my family and I escaped in 1960 than the United States we have all known and loved. I am running for Senate to lead the fight for freedom. Joe Biden isn't on the ballot in November, but his policies are. The way to beat back Biden is to beat Dick Blumenthal, and I am the conservative candidate who can get it done._

name: CheriBeasley.com
subject: NBC highlighted Cheri as one of the candidates best positioned to win statewide and make history!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
“I know what it's like to hear the doubters and those who are skeptical that people of color can't win”
#

NBC News recently reported on Cheri’s historic run for U.S. Senate — highlighting our campaign as one of the ones best positioned to win this seat and increase representation for Black women in statewide offices.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-feb22?refcode=em220217-1-t1&refcode2=425.357359.bFbp4a&t=1&akid=425%2E357359%2EbFbp4a)
Cheri knows that representation matters. It matters — for policy outcomes and our children — that the voices and perspectives within our government reflect the diversity of our nation.
But NBC reported that obstacles still exist. And Cheri knows that firsthand. Here’s what she said when they asked about it.
_“I know what it's like to hear the doubters and those who are skeptical that people of color can't win, because it's not what we're used to or who we envision in positions of power” - Cheri Beasley_
That’s why Cheri is so grateful for this grassroots team. Thanks to the outpouring of support, we’ve been able to prove the naysayers wrong.
But if we’re going to send Cheri to the U.S. Senate and make history, we cannot slow down now. If each of us does our part, NBC says “there’s hope 2022 could be a historic year, despite the political headwinds that Democrats face.”
[**Can you chip in $3 to help us flip North Carolina and elect Cheri Beasley? At a moment when there are zero Black women in the U.S. Senate, Cheri can make history as North Carolina’s first Black Senator.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-feb22?refcode=em220217-1-t1&refcode2=425.357359.bFbp4a&noskip=true&t=2&akid=425%2E357359%2EbFbp4a)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-feb22?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em220217-1-t1&refcode2=425.357359.bFbp4a&t=21&akid=425%2E357359%2EbFbp4a)**

****
| **[Donate $10](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-feb22?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em220217-1-t1&refcode2=425.357359.bFbp4a&t=22&akid=425%2E357359%2EbFbp4a)**

****
| | **[Donate $20.22](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-feb22?express_lane=true&amount=20.22&refcode=em220217-1-t1&refcode2=425.357359.bFbp4a&t=23&akid=425%2E357359%2EbFbp4a)**

****

Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611

Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=425%2E357359%2EbFbp4a). name: Alex Lasry
subject: We launched our campaign one year ago, and here’s where we’re at now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin **[alexlasry
body:
We need a fresh perspective at this moment for our state and for our country. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41927312/330919017/-1436015341?refcode=EM_FR_220217oneyear_N_AL_90DA_8_G_B_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjFhM2ZjYi00OTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uj9SHKQJAWiz7peq-WAxuqspY9u_HGFG5-2jUeFeHVY=)
---
Peter,

One year ago, I announced my candidacy to be Wisconsin’s next Senator, and we’ve been on an incredible journey since then. Take a look at some of the headlines reporters have written about our campaign: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41927313/330919018/-1436015341?refcode=EM_FR_220217oneyear_N_AL_90DA_8_G_B_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjFhM2ZjYi00OTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uj9SHKQJAWiz7peq-WAxuqspY9u_HGFG5-2jUeFeHVY=) When I launched my campaign, I said I was running to beat Ron Johnson, show progressive values are good for our economy, and partner with Tammy Baldwin to bring real change to Wisconsin. And my message hasn’t changed.

**[I’m working hard to win this tossup race, and deliver results for Wisconsin. If you’re ready to flip this seat blue, make a donation of $10 or more today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41927314/330919019/-1436015341?refcode=EM_FR_220217oneyear_N_AL_90DA_8_G_B_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjFhM2ZjYi00OTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uj9SHKQJAWiz7peq-WAxuqspY9u_HGFG5-2jUeFeHVY=)**

We need a fresh perspective at this moment for our state and for our country. I'm fed up with politicians like Ron Johnson who use public office to put themselves and their corporate donors above what's right for the people.

From spreading lies and misinformation about COVID to saying things like Wisconsin has “enough jobs” and being opposed to childcare, Ron Johnson is wrong for our state.

When you vote to end health insurance for pre-existing conditions, when you oppose economic relief for families struggling in a pandemic, when you vote to defund Planned Parenthood, when you oppose giving folks a living wage, and when you spend your time going on Fox News to boost Donald Trump's dangerous lies about election fraud, you are not fighting for Wisconsin.

I’ve shown that progressive values are good for business and our state, and I want to go to Washington to put money back in the pockets of the people of Wisconsin, not corporate donors.

**[I will beat Ron Johnson by building a coalition of Wisconsinites from all walks of life and all parts of the state. clean_body: We need a fresh perspective at this moment for our state and for our country. | | = Peter, One year ago, I announced my candidacy to be Wisconsin’s next Senator, and we’ve been on an incredible journey since then. Take a look at some of the headlines reporters have written about our campaign: = When I launched my campaign, I said I was running to beat Ron Johnson, show progressive values are good for our economy, and partner with Tammy Baldwin to bring real change to Wisconsin. And my message hasn’t changed. = We need a fresh perspective at this moment for our state and for our country. I'm fed up with politicians like Ron Johnson who use public office to put themselves and their corporate donors above what's right for the people. From spreading lies and misinformation about COVID to saying things like Wisconsin has “enough jobs” and being opposed to childcare, Ron Johnson is wrong for our state. When you vote to end health insurance for pre-existing conditions, when you oppose economic relief for families struggling in a pandemic, when you vote to defund Planned Parenthood, when you oppose giving folks a living wage, and when you spend your time going on Fox News to boost Donald Trump's dangerous lies about election fraud, you are not fighting for Wisconsin. I’ve shown that progressive values are good for business and our state, and I want to go to Washington to put money back in the pockets of the people of Wisconsin, not corporate donors. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you for all your support over the last year. Let’s take this all the way to November and win. \- Alex Lasry ** | | We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. Alex Lasry has a fresh perspective and record of actually getting things done. We can beat Ron Johnson by building a grassroots coalition, but it will take all of us. Will you pitch in any amount to help us keep the Senate Majority and defeat Ron Johnson? = Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin Stay connected with Alex's campaign to defeat Ron Johnson: Lasry for Wisconsin P.O. name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeanine=20Lawson?=
subject: Congressional Stock Trading Needs to be Banned
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress]( "Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress")
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c08743f4ddfb/congressional-stock-trading-needs-to-be-banned?e=fc83fb200d)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=abccffe787&e=fc83fb200d "Donate")
---
| Dear ,

At a candidate forum last night in Loudoun County, the issue of Congressional stock trading was raised. I believe that this issue is critically important, and I'd like to explain why.

The ban on Congressional stock trading has received broad bipartisan support, driven by well-documented instances of Senators and members of Congress using non-public information to inform their financial investments - essentially insider trading.

This practice is illegal under the Stop Trading on Congressional Knowledge Act of 2012, but enforcement of the STOCK Act has been severely lacking. [Business Insider reported on documented instances of STOCK Act violations that most offenders receive minor $200 fines, or in some cases are even exonerated by ethics officials within Congress.](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=ec14b27b9c&e=fc83fb200d)

Overall, Business Insider found [57 members of Congress and 182 senior congressional staff who traded illegally. ](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=92584bfd49&e=fc83fb200d)

Right now, these elected officials and their staff are not being punished for trading based on insider knowledge, and they are not being deterred from continuing the practice. The threat to our nation posed by national leaders making decisions based other own financial interests cannot be understated.

Just recently, Representative Chip Roy made headlines with his support for this very legislation. As your representative, I will support a full ban on Congressional stock trading to ensure that our leaders are not making national legislative decisions based on their portfolios.

I've been involved in the Republican Party for decades, have served in elected office for seven years, and I'm committed to flipping this seat and ousting Jennifer Wexton.

As a woman, experienced elected public servant, and a life-long active Republican, I believe that I have the best chance of winning both the Republican Party nomination, as well as the general election against Wexton in November.

I'm excited to get to work on your behalf, but I need your help. Democrats are going to fight hard to keep this seat. We need to send a Republican representative to Congress who will serve the people of Virginia's 10th District and put an end to illegal trading based on non-public information.

**[Will you please consider chipping in with $100, $50, $25, or even $10 to help me take back the 10th District and give you the representation you deserve?](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=44c5d79fad&e=fc83fb200d)**

---

For love of country,

Jeanine Lawson
Candidate for Virginia's 10th Congressional District

name: Team Schmidt
subject: GOV MUST ACT: Derek calls on Gov. Kelly to fight Biden’s vax mandate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
Derek has been fighting every step of the way against Biden's vaccine mandates. He's already won a huge victory at the U.S. Supreme Court blocking the Friend, Derek has been fighting every step of the way against Biden's vaccine mandates. He's already won a huge victory at the U.S. Supreme Court blocking the OSHA mandate that would have applied to nearly every worker in America, and he has both the federal contractor mandate and Head Start mandate blocked by Court order. He's still fighting to block the CMS mandate for healthcare workers. But the courts can take a long time to make decisions. In the short term, Derek has uncovered a solution to protect understaffed rural hospitals from losing even more of their employees. So far, three other states have applied for a waiver at CMS that would exempt their rural hospitals and nursing homes that face a staffing crisis from the Biden mandate. This waiver would shield hospitals from having to close their doors and would prevent doctors and nurses from having to choose between a job or jab - or at least make sure the Biden administration honors Kansas religious and medical protections. The Biden administration is signaling it might work with states to give relief to hospitals and nursing homes - but _to get help, states have to ask_. **Kansas needs Governor Kelly to do her job like other governors in rural states and****ask for this waiver. ** Derek sent a letter this week asking Governor Kelly to add Kansas to the group of states seeking waivers to **protect our small Kansas hospitals and nursing homes.** **Help us get the word out by****sharing Derek's posts about his work to protect rural communities on**[**Facebook**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=c7d7bf055c994b5193ac89d17acab51b&_e=gyCW_EYjO-flPsH6Ud_9tYWE52d9y8M5iE7LKy0wr7uZt77S-518Y-9hGH-izD-uokAUdHnngi0afN9ap4GTQb4G_G6NmSu2MxMU7QHnaMNN3zTDHx0koD5JgH9vGHWHdOHvBMxB51Deh2-S935Tbrw4rbp3OsaXdl9QQ1gyrggDLKdXhEOLsEDMlWbGwZwhda97tnOaZ-Wkm3LDEUfdDSCRbgWZEc4vETNHydttfiYXRR3Z-o4Kdvm0cXJfY9BlnY4PpSoDk9cRr8Xdgi5etAJ8mepaTZahS09_pcwxUJPT4L_dx2RqJeI-4yiMWd_aGVm2SEx-U--At0zmVI7GIEfw3Bep42w992wx8zNivtmcLGYZf_m0TtNwYcfOZOIbabXHwfjP9ZqoZXRLkgCEzBABsfUj8xTOOpqbLsBMY8y9gEKVRrIGx4JBjfZhlyX8IcSkf3oWuyVvLxTDa6uT5YgMIQDy03e1YBJvoY3C6-sS61ZPDMw8eUcci3edFpCHV07S6zd17i5QGt9JWHOcWq6PFiVa0vdcHyA3FXrSdig%3D)**and**[**Twitter**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=c7d7bf055c994b5193ac89d17acab51b&_e=gyCW_EYjO-flPsH6Ud_9tXRX4N_iBeDaeHLy9QkI6wx0Nqon5zNgDXajsfzytTYC1Nz3BjYdOVBFgdiniue6pay9Pzv85ca1MuYrPcMf-UUVLYzj8xvGHMmoROIUQG6bjn9FRRlvCkltw9NprNJTK5ayOOiTvMomHVOwqjAy7FmXLJRQvL8f_sCak5L04YO8vtYSaPqlgRymnfaWSIacgv0RZYXnLZejZw_KippExJp5No_f1ARkw2WYTo8T94Ii6_gzGG3hMbSL5vPuu27WU5s0kB6tYQ4rg4YBx0mzCGVa-OdlVH85ZGBB0_dHzH3f)**. ** Derek will keep fighting for rural hospitals, nursing homes and communities - he'll explore every legal option to protect Kansas from Biden's heavy-handed federal mandates and overreach. He won't back down. As always, thank you for your support. \- Team Schmidt

name: Serve America
subject: Our latest round of endorsements
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41927606/330920284/604255556?refcode=email_20220217_SA_endorsements&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGUxZWE2Zi00YjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UpgEqbdKI5_xd_pwdAtPCFSIjWJI-drJQT5dK1ukMNI=) Friend, We’re excited to introduce you to five exceptional candidates running for Congress this year. Today we are announcing them as our second slate of Serve America Challenger Candidates – and they are running in some of the most important races in the country. **If Democrats are going to hold the House,_these are the races to watch._** Adam Hollier (MI-13)
The product of generations of North End Detroiters, the spirit of service is deeply instilled in Adam. While earning his undergraduate degree at Cornell University, Adam served as a volunteer firefighter. He later enlisted in the United States Army, earning a commission as a distinguished military graduate from officer candidate school. He continues to serve in the United States Army Reserve as a team chief and paratrooper. He also previously served as a relief coordinator in Mississippi after Hurricane Katrina, and as an AmeriCorps member working to improve the infrastructure of Detroit. He was elected to the Michigan Senate in 2018, and—in his first week in office—collaborated with fellow leaders in the successful push to keep an automotive plant open. Now, Factory ZERO is a state of the art plant creating the cars of tomorrow and the jobs of today. Jackie Gordon (NY-01)
Born in Jamaica, raised in Queens, and a Long Island resident for 28 years, Jackie knows firsthand the struggles that many families face and has dedicated her life to giving back to the country that offered opportunity to her and her family. While in college and teaching at local schools, Jackie enlisted in the United States Army Reserve. Over her 29-year career in the Armed Forces, Jackie served overseas as a platoon leader in Germany, as an operations officer at Guantanamo Bay, as a battle captain in Baghdad, and as Commander of the 310th Military Police Battalion in Afghanistan. She retired from the Army Reserve with the rank of Lieutenant Colonel in 2014. She also served on the Babylon Town Council, where she worked to direct resources to veterans and military families and helped to raise nearly $1 million for the Wounded Warriors Project. Max Rose (NY-11)
After running for Congress in 2018 and winning when few thought it was possible, Max Rose was rated one of the most bipartisan representatives in the country. He secured an impressive list of wins, including permanently funding healthcare for our 9/11 heroes, securing millions of dollars for the opioid epidemic, and pioneering an effort to reunite families torn apart by President Trump’s Muslim ban. Prior to his election to Congress, Max served as a decorated Army Infantry Officer. He continues his military service today as an Infantry Officer in the New York National Guard. His decorations include the Ranger tab, the Combat Infantryman Badge, a Bronze Star, and a Purple Heart. After leaving Congress, Max served in the Biden Administration as the Senior Advisor on COVID to the Secretary of Defense. Jessica Mason (TX-30)
Born and raised in South Dallas, Jessica grew up in poverty and struggled to afford a college education. She found a way forward, though, by enlisting in the Navy. She served as a medic, counseling service members ailing with the mental tolls of war, sexual harassment and sexual violence, and substance abuse. She briefly worked in the Virginia General Assembly—but as she saw the corrosive effects of money in politics, she turned her focus to organizing and providing direct support to communities in need. Jessica returned to Dallas at the height of the COVID pandemic to begin working as an affordable housing administrator, and is now running for Congress because she believes we shouldn’t be dependent on the kindness of strangers just to survive. Deb McGrath (WI-03)
Born and raised in western Wisconsin, Deb McGrath is a former Army Captain, CIA officer, and working mother of three children. She and her husband, Colonel Kevin McGrath (U.S. Army, Retired), raised their three children with an emphasis on public and community service. Deb served for 25 years in national security positions, with assignments including West Africa, the former Soviet Union, and the demilitarized zone in Korea. Now, Deb is ready to fight in Congress for the issues that keep America strong. She knows that America’s strength and security starts with a strong economy, great education, and equal opportunity at home. We face challenges at home and abroad, and Deb is a practical problem solver who will tackle these issues with reason and collaboration. Congressman Seth Moulton, founder of Serve America, said: "Adam, Jackie, Max, Jessica and Deb have all answered the call to serve our country in uniform and are ready to lead in the halls of Congress. With our democracy at risk in ways it has never been before, America needs leaders who understand service and are committed to the Constitution and their constituents. I am proud to support these five candidates as they seek to serve America once again.” [**Will you stand with Seth Moulton and Serve America by making a contribution today to help us elect these candidates to Congress in 2022?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41927607/330920285/-491556796?refcode=email_20220217_SA_endorsements&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGUxZWE2Zi00YjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UpgEqbdKI5_xd_pwdAtPCFSIjWJI-drJQT5dK1ukMNI=) To learn more about Serve America’s work and view our full candidate slate, [visit our website here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41927608/330920286/96396629?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGUxZWE2Zi00YjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UpgEqbdKI5_xd_pwdAtPCFSIjWJI-drJQT5dK1ukMNI=&emci=36c35131-ef8f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=2de1ea6f-4b90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=194769). Thank you, Serve America [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41927609/330920287/604255556?refcode=email_20220217_SA_endorsements&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGUxZWE2Zi00YjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UpgEqbdKI5_xd_pwdAtPCFSIjWJI-drJQT5dK1ukMNI=) clean_body: | | | = Friend, We’re excited to introduce you to five exceptional candidates running for Congress this year. Today we are announcing them as our second slate of Serve America Challenger Candidates – and they are running in some of the most important races in the country. If Democrats are going to hold the House,these are the races to watch. Adam Hollier (MI-13) The product of generations of North End Detroiters, the spirit of service is deeply instilled in Adam. While earning his undergraduate degree at Cornell University, Adam served as a volunteer firefighter. He later enlisted in the United States Army, earning a commission as a distinguished military graduate from officer candidate school. He continues to serve in the United States Army Reserve as a team chief and paratrooper. He also previously served as a relief coordinator in Mississippi after Hurricane Katrina, and as an AmeriCorps member working to improve the infrastructure of Detroit. He was elected to the Michigan Senate in 2018, and—in his first week in office—collaborated with fellow leaders in the successful push to keep an automotive plant open. Now, Factory ZERO is a state of the art plant creating the cars of tomorrow and the jobs of today. Jackie Gordon (NY-01) Born in Jamaica, raised in Queens, and a Long Island resident for 28 years, Jackie knows firsthand the struggles that many families face and has dedicated her life to giving back to the country that offered opportunity to her and her family. While in college and teaching at local schools, Jackie enlisted in the United States Army Reserve. Over her 29-year career in the Armed Forces, Jackie served overseas as a platoon leader in Germany, as an operations officer at Guantanamo Bay, as a battle captain in Baghdad, and as Commander of the 310th Military Police Battalion in Afghanistan. She retired from the Army Reserve with the rank of Lieutenant Colonel in 2014. She also served on the Babylon Town Council, where she worked to direct resources to veterans and military families and helped to raise nearly $1 million for the Wounded Warriors Project. Max Rose (NY-11) After running for Congress in 2018 and winning when few thought it was possible, Max Rose was rated one of the most bipartisan representatives in the country. He secured an impressive list of wins, including permanently funding healthcare for our 9/11 heroes, securing millions of dollars for the opioid epidemic, and pioneering an effort to reunite families torn apart by President Trump’s Muslim ban. Prior to his election to Congress, Max served as a decorated Army Infantry Officer. He continues his military service today as an Infantry Officer in the New York National Guard. His decorations include the Ranger tab, the Combat Infantryman Badge, a Bronze Star, and a Purple Heart. After leaving Congress, Max served in the Biden Administration as the Senior Advisor on COVID to the Secretary of Defense. Jessica Mason (TX-30) Born and raised in South Dallas, Jessica grew up in poverty and struggled to afford a college education. She found a way forward, though, by enlisting in the Navy. She served as a medic, counseling service members ailing with the mental tolls of war, sexual harassment and sexual violence, and substance abuse. She briefly worked in the Virginia General Assembly—but as she saw the corrosive effects of money in politics, she turned her focus to organizing and providing direct support to communities in need. Jessica returned to Dallas at the height of the COVID pandemic to begin working as an affordable housing administrator, and is now running for Congress because she believes we shouldn’t be dependent on the kindness of strangers just to survive. Deb McGrath (WI-03) Born and raised in western Wisconsin, Deb McGrath is a former Army Captain, CIA officer, and working mother of three children. She and her husband, Colonel Kevin McGrath (U.S. Army, Retired), raised their three children with an emphasis on public and community service. Deb served for 25 years in national security positions, with assignments including West Africa, the former Soviet Union, and the demilitarized zone in Korea. Now, Deb is ready to fight in Congress for the issues that keep America strong. She knows that America’s strength and security starts with a strong economy, great education, and equal opportunity at home. We face challenges at home and abroad, and Deb is a practical problem solver who will tackle these issues with reason and collaboration. Congressman Seth Moulton, founder of Serve America, said: "Adam, Jackie, Max, Jessica and Deb have all answered the call to serve our country in uniform and are ready to lead in the halls of Congress. With our democracy at risk in ways it has never been before, America needs leaders who understand service and are committed to the Constitution and their constituents. I am proud to support these five candidates as they seek to serve America once again.” = To learn more about Serve America’s work and view our full candidate slate, . Thank you, Serve America = | | | | ---|---|---|--- If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Serve America PAC Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

name: Nan Whaley
subject: We need a governor who will fight for us every single day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
Mike DeWine isn’t putting our interests first.

Hey,
I first ran for mayor of Dayton because I knew then what I know now – Ohioans deserve better.
**Together, we saw so much progress.** From combating the opioid crisis to fixing a broken economy and lifting Ohioans up, I worked with community leaders and experts to find commonsense solutions to the problems we face.
**[Now it’s time to tackle the problems in our state, and I want to work together to get it done. If you’re in, chip in $5 to send a progressive team to Columbus that will fight for Ohioans.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41927667/330920903/-679543169?refcode=nw_em_220217_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTFlOGQ0Ni00YzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t9K-FwG8UfhunDzd5ywd7GkF5KvqFt_T-tGhUIkfBDE=)**
The reality is that leadership in Ohio – particularly Mike DeWine and his deep-pocketed friends – are putting themselves and their own interests ahead of the people of Ohio. It’s why we’ve seen bills like House Bill 6, which bailed out power plants while gutting standards on energy efficiency and renewable energy. Former Speaker of the Ohio House Larry Householder, and other GOP members, including Mike DeWine, received campaign kickbacks to pass this bad policy, while the rest of us footed the bill.
**Mike DeWine has proven time and time again that he flat out will not fight for Ohioans.**
**[Rest assured, I will – it’s why I ran for mayor and it’s why I’m running for governor. Please, chip in $5 to help us create a better future for Ohio.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41927668/330920904/-679543169?refcode=nw_em_220217_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTFlOGQ0Ni00YzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t9K-FwG8UfhunDzd5ywd7GkF5KvqFt_T-tGhUIkfBDE=)**
Onward,
Nan Whaley

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41927669/330920905/-679543169?refcode=nw_em_220217_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTFlOGQ0Ni00YzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t9K-FwG8UfhunDzd5ywd7GkF5KvqFt_T-tGhUIkfBDE=)****

Scott Perry voted against a bipartisan bill that would fund our USPS and improve service for millions of Pennsylvanians. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41927674/330920967/-1055268771?refcode=EM_FR_220217USPS_TE_6_NG_N___Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWQzNDc3MS00YzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5ts92Sb-4ZFEX0Zeae3d2tPNzwL3VQnAd4brKHMjJlk=)

Team,

**Scott Perry has shown his true colors once again.** Just this week, he voted **AGAINST an extremely popular bipartisan bill** to save the U.S. Postal Service, help clear delivery delays, and _improve service to rural Americans_.

**Perry’s buddy Donald Trump tried to destroy the USPS,** and now Perry wants in on the game. While Democrats and reasonable Republicans are fighting to end our supply chain woes, Scott Perry and right-wing radicals want to prolong them **for political gain.** **[This might be a game to Scott Perry, but the Postal Service is vital to millions of Pennsylvanians. Our communities depend on it to deliver food, medicine, and other necessities; small businesses rely on it to deliver goods and services. Scott Perry’s intentional destruction of the USPS is a bridge too far, and he needs to go. Will you chip in $10 to help us deliver his defeat?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41927675/330920968/-1055268771?refcode=EM_FR_220217USPS_TE_6_NG_N___L2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWQzNDc3MS00YzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5ts92Sb-4ZFEX0Zeae3d2tPNzwL3VQnAd4brKHMjJlk=)** **Let’s be clear about what Republican Scott Perry opposes:**
* _Guaranteed_ 6-day delivery
* _Increased_ rural delivery
* _Reliable_ business and medical delivery

body:
It’s higher than you think... [](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=86bf571c1be549dda54dcd8e19539f74&_e=WlUUGyAKefRXaN6WvWP-wQwvUpCjJMPpwl_67LF6PWLNrH7_v2uYA8wUFaT22CXd99itz50eYvybbI_dg9oqMyOnBk5E6WRMQ-EDTKAacfnADky5ZQMl0RwDgVea-jkTVNRClt_Ry6QdWJ5j6zMh_84aOOCWU5JUojqQuQaJB_1Ek68NQyoQ_lQ65EeJZQcOFQv1KNgy1WtrwF7WYxAFxUbeVEkRJqNwZBMynyGgkSyXAQaAb4hn3zTbJpUmodvbhwtxzzOvO85HdqhBdPh3AbSQn2NiATDdBnP3x9sGqne6S0APTeqYJqk3LmWgnuqLxLY94-QZwXnPT94rQe7XKj5URl3Xm6W2Nsrt9tqtKKpeMmZuXB7GY9wooRtTKGjqUsP4AtDYIJGOcv2qzCUw8RB_jPAD94ab3TDgvOqMKbkuIEyois6f4aDnM_twdkgEXLZhcB5CXP9t8rYkCdKBRi2PL8gpLpseZjSu1mXCDRNkoDzmAZHW1Z6jZMnKXnYj) Team, **Did you know that our governor has hiked taxes & fees a whopping 24 TIMES since he's been in office, sucking another $5.24 BILLION from Illinois residents?** _And despite all that... he still can't even balance the budget! _ [**We've had enough. It's time to cut off Chicago's corrupt politicians at the source. No more dipping into our pockets for extra cash. **](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=86bf571c1be549dda54dcd8e19539f74&_e=WlUUGyAKefRXaN6WvWP-wQwvUpCjJMPpwl_67LF6PWLNrH7_v2uYA8wUFaT22CXd99itz50eYvybbI_dg9oqMyOnBk5E6WRMQ-EDTKAacfnADky5ZQMl0RwDgVea-jkTVNRClt_Ry6QdWJ5j6zMh_84aOOCWU5JUojqQuQaJB_1Ek68NQyoQ_lQ65EeJZQcOFQv1KNgy1WtrwF7WYxAFxUbeVEkRJqNwZBMynyGgkSyXAQaAb4hn3zTbJpUmodvbhwtxzzOvO85HdqhBdPh3AcEbKOv5wY3r9Vt7B0rI-pBzhFstOhm3-jJPFBS0-S7TDl-k2YYRBicpUGvhrnPmpoXJZW7EhZD7dDvfUoWDHZSX6J8hjKqMmJHcgUKbbhD7OBcxXiyggPfHywoAc6rt_Qnkhh5Ry42K-QctSo_T1UUdm3TquDnMq4Pezgc9uFO1qp-3VYgrgX3cSBwZFnGw4sGmijyaFh4PGW_fZwl1XA-QcUtXdY0Lfvt5ebjx18aD) But to do that, we need a new leader. I understand that the people of Illinois deserve a thriving economy, NOT crippling taxes. As governor, I will reduce the taxes that make it so hard to afford real estate, hire employees, and invest in growth. I need your support to win. body:

Peter.

We're proud to announce that Seth received the first two union endorsements in the race for Rhode Island’s Second Congressional District!

Yesterday, **Ironworkers Local 37** officially endorsed Seth. Today, **Unite Here Local 26** , which represents 1,200 Rhode Island workers across school cafeterias, hotels, T.F. Green Airport, and Bally’s announced their support. **Here's why they're supporting Seth:**
**Ironworkers Local 37 Business Manager David Langlais:**

"Seth is a proven job creator and champion of working people. Seth’s school construction initiative has put Ironworkers to work around the state as we proudly build and renovate the schools that our own children and our neighbors attend. We know he will fight in Washington for working families and we enthusiastically support him."

**Unite Here Local 26 President Carlos Aramayo:**

"Seth has been an ally to workers since he began as General Treasurer and Unite Here Local 26 is proud to support him in his race for Congress. Seth knows that the American Dream has been out of reach for too many people and we have to expand economic opportunity so that everyone willing to work hard has the opportunity to succeed."
---
Seth is proud to have the support of Rhode Island workers. As a member of Congress, Seth will continue to fight for working people by investing in infrastructure, prioritizing safety standards in the workplace, and protecting the right to organize.

[**Momentum is building, but we need your help to keep it moving forward. name: Admiral Mike Franken
subject: photos of mom and dad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41927936/330922684/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWQzNTNiMi00ZDkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xW7bAbT5q4IxA5d-vGbYeu_0jd85gPa-BWQVUfBhL3I=&emci=d0bed17d-2490-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=35d353b2-4d90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)

Hello,
My mother worked alongside my dad in Lebanon Farm Shop well into their 70s. They refused assistance from their many children even after they lost their life savings in the Savings and Loan debacle of the 1980s. My mom in coveralls, petite as she was, handing tools to my dad is an indelible image I carry with me to this day.
My dad built a business repairing farm implements. In a way, I think he hoped that I’d stick around and take it over, but that wasn’t to be. I joined the Navy after getting a scholarship and my life as a machinist and welder came to a close.
Dad said very little about his service in the Second World War. He had the burns and shrapnel of his first ship sinking, and would provide some quips about surviving a night amongst the flotsam and death off Guadalcanal, but he didn’t dissuade me from enlisting. My mom had the bravery in saying quite simply, “The healthy bird flees the nest.” She wiped her eyes on her apron as I drove up the hill on my way to ‘boot camp.’ It took me some time to understand why.
You could say my mom and dad embodied rural Iowa values in their unique ways: Family, hard work, sacrifice, education, and honesty. And I think of them every day on the campaign trail, because it’s those values that drove me to run for political office.
**After nearly 4 decades serving in the United States Navy, I’m running for Senate against Chuck Grassley because it’s time politicians in Washington fight for everyday people like my folks.**
The early polls all show this will be a close race, so of course, I’m facing down millions of dollars in Super PAC attacks. I don’t come from some political dynasty, and I’m not taking corporate PAC money. Instead, I’m relying entirely on the donations of generous grassroots donors like you.
**There’s just days until our next critical fundrasiing deadline, and right now we’re still short of our $50,000 goal and what we need to defeat Chuck Grassley and win. So I have to ask:**
[**Please, may I count on you to make a donation to my campaign today – before our fundraising deadline? Every dollar you can give today will help me build a campaign to defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41927938/330922686/-42398318?refcode=em20220217pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWQzNTNiMi00ZDkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xW7bAbT5q4IxA5d-vGbYeu_0jd85gPa-BWQVUfBhL3I=)

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Fox News
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Laura Ingraham and Rick Scott are going after John. Why? Because the GOP knows we’re a big threat.
#
Derek, how do we know John Fetterman is winning?
Well, Fox News and the Republican Senate campaign arm (the NRSC) are already launching full-fledged attacks against us.
**GOP leaders are so scared of John Fetterman – whether we’re up against Oz or someone else.** That’s why Laura Ingraham and NRSC Chairman Rick Scott are on primetime Fox calling John the “radical left” and lying about his agenda to rile up their base.
Sadly, Fox News is the most watched cable news channel. That's why we’re asking for your support today to help us get _our_ message across.
**[Will you contribute $5 so we can respond to these Fox News attacks? Every dollar helps us reach more Pennsylvania voters with _our_ message.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44257?refcode=ema20220217-4629&t=1&akid=4629%2E434096%2Evf4Nwl)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44257?refcode=em20220217-4629&amount=5&t=20&akid=4629%2E434096%2Evf4Nwl)**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44257?refcode=ema20220217-4629&t=21&akid=4629%2E434096%2Evf4Nwl)
If the primary were held today, **it would be Democrat John Fetterman versus Republican Dr. Oz.**
That’s a matchup the Republicans think they will lose.
We’re in a strong position to defeat the Republicans in November and flip PA blue. The latest polls show John can beat Oz and everyone else. But we are still months away from the election. And the Republican side is full of self-funding ultra-millionaires who will pour buckets of money into smearing John’s name.
When you combine the power of tens of millions of dollars in attack ads + the Fox News propaganda apparatus + the power of the national Republican Party, that’s a serious threat.
**Grassroots fundraising is how we fight back against Fox News, the self-funders, and the national GOP.[If you can, chip in $5 now to help us respond to these initial attacks and get our own message out to Pennsylvania voters. ](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44257?refcode=ema20220217-4629&t=22&akid=4629%2E434096%2Evf4Nwl)**
Thanks for having John’s back. It means everything.
—Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220217-4629-footer&t=23&refcode2=4629_434096_vf4Nwl&akid=4629%2E434096%2Evf4Nwl)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=4629%2E434096%2Evf4Nwl)

name: Randolph Bracy
subject: $200 MILLION?!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRACY FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter,

As we speak, the Florida Legislature is doing their best to defund public education in Florida. They’re planning to take $200 MILLION away from school districts who stood up against DeSantis’ ban on mask mandates.

This is what we get for trying to keep our children safe — a punitive, unfair, and downright cruel response from Florida’s GOP leadership and now, from our Governor.

Our students deserve a quality education, and if Governor DeSantis and the Florida GOP are going to take that away from them, then we need leaders who will fight for fully funded, high quality, accessible education in Congress.

That’s exactly what I’ll do, Peter. I’ll fight for our students, and with your support, I’ll win. Click here to chip in $25 — or whatever you can — to join my fight for quality education. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?refcode=217education]

Our children aren’t political pawns. They’re the future of our state. And if our leaders insist on auctioning off their chance at success to score points in a political battle, then it’s up to us to rise above their heads and affect change at a higher level.

I’m ready to take the fight for quality public education — the fight for our children’s futures — to Congress. If you’re with me, click here to chip in $25 today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?refcode=217education]

Thank you for standing with me.
— Randolph

PAID FOR BY BRACY FOR CONGRESS
Randolph Bracy for Congress
P.O. Box 3096
Windermere, FL 34786
United States

name: Alex Stovall
subject: The Real Black History of America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY ALEX FOR CONGRESS**
body:
The first Black Americans in the Senate and Congress were Republican |
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=432f016c5b564789a3057f62c8f0a4f0&_e=Ll8xqke7MssjPnSxaVUvp_7n26sPKadaXm_9Ts3bxn79xOpD4G4rTYR3kmF5Gt86eC-Dxc3ylfZc3drn0wFmZWeOOM-KelcGG2k95v86yh2W92X-bLC0fG5tbRh2aAAN6A37Z9vvpTUeIgnIER_VcnKDIx-Xgqd7YVHfHQUpUpT0OvXQffl-jcoaFgyE7dcMDKMdPlkj6rNGkloP5lEVTa_4C6ZQrnfi2LEAcQkEm-LfxxIIuvH1aaFgCOrsOguTOnewDPRfLaMDp66VTXn_q9KLbcn5n2mkuQVIGOLV0tDV9q8rkysU9IHO94_kvEVdexZd-azujlZdzIDAdoRXYX5u433I8RtoPpYDfCwqqRN4FQ-2eh1jifMP2odqHUM9_nM5qSsM5mke8D3mpg5kRK0QULDdpp2q8YaDIzNWN0Y78s-lnZzLOPfKCJmjgXHFfBJ0HaEV2NGbdOQilJu8cQ%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

It’s Black History month, and like always the Democrats are putting on a pageant to show us all how “woke and anti-racist” they are, while telling everyone to educate themselves on Black History.

**Maybe it’s time for the Democrats to get a little education too.**

You see, Fellow Conservative, Democrats want you to learn their history, and ignore the real Black History in America, **like how Abraham Lincoln was a Republican, or how the first Black Americans in the Senate and Congress were Republicans named Hiram Revels and Joseph Rainey.**

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=432f016c5b564789a3057f62c8f0a4f0&_e=Ll8xqke7MssjPnSxaVUvp_7n26sPKadaXm_9Ts3bxn79xOpD4G4rTYR3kmF5Gt86eC-Dxc3ylfZc3drn0wFmZWeOOM-KelcGG2k95v86yh2W92X-bLC0fG5tbRh2aAAN6A37Z9vvpTUeIgnIER_VcnKDIx-Xgqd7YVHfHQUpUpT0OvXQffl-jcoaFgyE7dcMDKMdPlkj6rNGkloP5lEVTa_4C6ZQrnfi2LEAcQkEm-LfxxIIuvH1aaFgCOrsOguT2qvPKMxFP5UJy8reJ7b1wg4Hv8owJrrYIaXFvIz6NzTL2ysrw9abzaYRixOm3gcio7UxgSfKerBYqSJeN1fP_eEW3A56Z2E_gf7w39U_DG2Hhxd7pomYELiwigNgb0xVcPix8JV0vXfnHwGtAvk_7Fq0NHASd09ECp_aU3183fTNCmtIy5jC68rRgvxhHLLrseou-parrXIOiYTnaWKvyQ%3D%3D)

[**HELP MAKE HISTORY >>> ELECT A BLACK REPUBLICAN**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=432f016c5b564789a3057f62c8f0a4f0&_e=Ll8xqke7MssjPnSxaVUvp_7n26sPKadaXm_9Ts3bxn79xOpD4G4rTYR3kmF5Gt86eC-Dxc3ylfZc3drn0wFmZWeOOM-KelcGG2k95v86yh2W92X-bLC0fG5tbRh2aAAN6A37Z9vvpTUeIgnIER_VcnKDIx-Xgqd7YVHfHQUpUpT0OvXQffl-jcoaFgyE7dcMDKMdPlkj6rNGkloP5lEVTa_4C6ZQrnfi2LEAcQkEm-LfxxIIuvH1aaFgCOrsOguTNY85pjnEjymI43sJ-cHPmMnN8RD7QM1KbQ-z-pMbQFR1bYhoRFYjub5tMiO79J7u35a2lL9qBu9WWM3Noup-ZXRTp0J4iVk9TYzPuqvIk4szFZolKSI9__VaekIttNjwv2o_RZfHEMKuUxnD9IyrgmpSsYsbo7oQVkloFerJd9_1cKhGbz_RzQs_3iJ_malhVkOYL8I49hRgNI4Aa6iFog%3D%3D)
**What’s worse is how Democrats always forget to tell anyone that the first 23 Black Americans in Congress were all Republican, or how Factions in the Democratic Party founded the Ku Klux Klan.**

The real Black History shows us that Democrats were the ones that suppressed Black Americans and used violence to stop them from voting or running for office. **The only thing that’s changed is how Democrats just lie to the Black Community about “free things” while doing nothing to actually help them.**

%%First%%, right now we have a chance to make history again, and stop the Democrat monopoly on Black elected officials and Black voters, but I’ll need your help to make it happen. **[Will you help make history happen again by helping elect a Black conservative Republican to congress?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=432f016c5b564789a3057f62c8f0a4f0&_e=Ll8xqke7MssjPnSxaVUvp_7n26sPKadaXm_9Ts3bxn79xOpD4G4rTYR3kmF5Gt86eC-Dxc3ylfZc3drn0wFmZWeOOM-KelcGG2k95v86yh2W92X-bLC0fG5tbRh2aAAN6A37Z9vvpTUeIgnIER_VcnKDIx-Xgqd7YVHfHQUpUpT0OvXQffl-jcoaFgyE7dcMDKMdPlkj6rNGkloP5lEVTa_4C6ZQrnfi2LEAcQkEm-LfxxIIuvH1aaFgCOrsOguTZrsrj2n7sdAzopL2NCe5Zw-Ry37Im1I6gVAH5S7QFhpFEMwDFZzJVMnXwBtcMvktv8LDGPWdlR3H7GEVBnvyKStGAa2C62iBNfTIMDe5Bx8vgI-9D1CYGpXcIwEAyxfkFKx1uDsVOC4HjjjYWjR8P6RPDL7jThw4X_IEPxF8XzXdBlMNTkL7BfNGGSligsiqW3hJoHdHutTdeZv-goXgFA%3D%3D)**

Thank you,
Alex Stovall

Get the latest by following me on social media.

clean_body: The first Black Americans in the Senate and Congress were Republican | Fellow Conservative, It’s Black History month, and like always the Democrats are putting on a pageant to show us all how “woke and anti-racist” they are, while telling everyone to educate themselves on Black History. Maybe it’s time for the Democrats to get a little education too. You see, Fellow Conservative, Democrats want you to learn their history, and ignore the real Black History in America, like how Abraham Lincoln was a Republican, or how the first Black Americans in the Senate and Congress were Republicans named Hiram Revels and Joseph Rainey. What’s worse is how Democrats always forget to tell anyone that the first 23 Black Americans in Congress were all Republican, or how Factions in the Democratic Party founded the Ku Klux Klan. The real Black History shows us that Democrats were the ones that suppressed Black Americans and used violence to stop them from voting or running for office. The only thing that’s changed is how Democrats just lie to the Black Community about “free things” while doing nothing to actually help them. %%First%%, right now we have a chance to make history again, and stop the Democrat monopoly on Black elected officials and Black voters, but I’ll need your help to make it happen. Thank you, Alex Stovall Get the latest by following me on social media. - | | PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY ALEX FOR CONGRESS Use of military rank, insignia, photographs or descriptions of military service on this website does not constitute endorsement by the federal government, U.S. Department of Defense or Department of Homeland Security. name: Brad Pfaff
subject: I hope you'll give this a read – it's quite personal.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pfaff for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail
body:
I wanted to get personal, explain who I am, and why I’m running for Congress.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41928658/330928900/-1995343361?refcode=abd_em_fr_2021.10.04_bX_logo_x__f1_s1_c1__header&amount=25&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.02.17_b1_personal_x_f1_s1_c1__ac_rs&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWZhOTdjZC00ZjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X1B8GkO4Xu6n7lCoSzQAuoyjnaB8NHPaQqSHHSxJz5A=)
---
Friends, I wanted to do something different today. I wanted to get personal, explain who I am, and why I’m running for Congress.

**[I hope you’ll read it all the way through and, if you can, chip in a few of your hard-earned dollars to help me raise the kind of money I need to defeat a Capitol Insurrectionist>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41928659/330928901/-774467147?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.02.17_b1_personal_X_F1_S1_C1__ac_RS&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.02.17_b1_personal_x_f1_s1_c1__ac_rs&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWZhOTdjZC00ZjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X1B8GkO4Xu6n7lCoSzQAuoyjnaB8NHPaQqSHHSxJz5A=)**

Let me start by saying something that some people might consider to be pretty radical.

**Rural America is just as important as anywhere else.** I grew up on the farm and it taught me the values I carry with me to this day.

Life on the farm isn’t fancy. But you sure learn a thing or two. You learn humility. Slipping and falling in manure has a way of keeping you grounded.

And when problems come, as they always do, you don’t complain, you get to work. Because talking doesn’t help the crops to grow, get the produce to market or fix that hole in your fence before the cows get out.

That’s why I am so proud of my time working with Governor Evers leading the Wisconsin Department of Agriculture, Trade and Consumer Protection. I fought to get relief for family farmers struggling to make ends meet every single day. When politicians in Madison told me to pipe down, I stood up. When they told me to be quiet, I spoke up louder. **And when they refused to confirm me in the hopes that I might just leave them alone, I got back in the fight.**

I ran for the State Senate. And I won. Now I’m there every day holding them accountable to the people of Wisconsin.

**But my opponent, Derrick Van Orden? He doesn’t understand any of this in the slightest.**

He’s basically got one approach: pit neighbor against neighbor and hope that in all the anger that generates, voters won’t notice that he doesn’t share our values at all. He was on the Capitol grounds on January 6th. That shameful, deadly day. He’s tried to cover it up because he knows people out here think that was wrong. He attacks people. Like teenage librarians. He’s a bully who can only win if we’re as divided as we’ve ever been. And if that doesn’t sound like it will be much help to you, you’re right. Derrick Van Orden is only in this for himself and to do what he’s told by his Washington backers.

But winning this campaign won’t be easy.

**[To defeat Van Orden, we need to build the most sophisticated campaign Wisconsin has ever seen. We need to register new voters, have authentic one-on-one conversations with voters to tell my story, run sophisticated digital advertisements, radio ads, television ads, and more to persuade everyone to join our campaign. But this effort will be expensive. I’m funding this campaign the right way: from small donations given by people reading emails like this one. So even though I hate to ask for money -- I have a humble request:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41928660/330928902/-774467147?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.02.17_b1_personal_X_F1_S1_C1__ac_RS&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.02.17_b1_personal_x_f1_s1_c1__ac_rs&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWZhOTdjZC00ZjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X1B8GkO4Xu6n7lCoSzQAuoyjnaB8NHPaQqSHHSxJz5A=)**

If you believe in me, if you believe we need to keep fighting, even when it’s hard, if you haven’t given up on the rural places many have forgotten -- join me on this journey. Chip in to this email today: | [GIVE $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41928661/330928903/-774467147?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.02.17_b1_personal_X_F1_S1_C1__ac_RS&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.02.17_b1_personal_x_f1_s1_c1__ac_rs&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWZhOTdjZC00ZjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X1B8GkO4Xu6n7lCoSzQAuoyjnaB8NHPaQqSHHSxJz5A=)

body:
Important redistricting update
We can’t let the curtain close on January just yet!

That’s not just watching a traffic accident; it’s removing the stop sign that could’ve prevented it." We can't let up now! The redistricting deadline is just hours away!
