name: Erica Smith Official
subject: Add your name: support postal banking
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

Today we’re
going to talk about postal banking.

Right now:

* 1 in 13 households is unbanked, or without a bank account.
* 1 in 5 households is underbanked (having a bank account but also using
alternative financial services).
* 1 in 4 households is underserved by traditional banks.

In rural communities like Erica’s, banks aren’t readily available and the
nearest bank is a 30 minute drive away.

There is a clear absence of financial services that isn’t being addressed
and in the vacuum created by lack of public policy, predatory lenders step
in.

Lenders can come in with extremely high interest loans that devastate
families across rural North Carolina.

That’s why it’s a critical need for the Postal Service to offer basic
banking services from check cashing to bill paying to small-dollar loans
at a reasonable rate. [ https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/es_em_20220217_postalbanking_petition?refcode=em20220217-2&t=1001&akid=894%2E3698%2EYujnPp ]If you agree, please add your name next to
Erica’s to support Postal Banking.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/es_em_20220217_postalbanking_petition?refcode=em20220217-2&t=1002&akid=894%2E3698%2EYujnPp ]Add your name

This is an issue of financial inequality — and it needs to be corrected.
Post offices offering critical basic banking services would make a
tangible difference in the lives of working North Carolinians right now.

Rural communities matter.

Working North Carolina families matter.

Folks living paycheck to paycheck matter.

Just because Wall Street deemed our zip codes unworthy of a bank, or us
unworthy of a loan, doesn’t mean we should be robbed of access and
opportunity.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/es_em_20220217_postalbanking_petition?refcode=em20220217-2&t=1003&akid=894%2E3698%2EYujnPp ]Add your name to help us uplift North Carolina’s rural communities and
give everyone equal access to banks and financial services.

Together,

Team Erica Smith

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220217-894-footer&t=1004&refcode2=894_3698_YujnPp&akid=894%2E3698%2EYujnPp

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=894%2E3698%2EYujnPp

PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

# 1,024. That's how many prisoners Kate Brown has released.
---
| Dear Friend,

You and I both know that **the rule of law is central to the health of any republic.** Unfortunately, our state leaders are doing everything they can to push an agenda that makes us less safe. While Kate Brown is occupied with **prematurely releasing prisoners without consulting victims and their families, Salem Democrats are trying to give prisoners the ability to vote.** **_Their priorities are totally backward._**

The chaos and crime in Portland must end, which is why I will form a crime reduction task force that will report directly to the governor with substantive recommendations on how to improve our criminal justice system. We will implement policies that equip our law enforcement officers with the resources they need to do their jobs safely and effectively. And we will ensure justice is served for victims and their families.

**_If you agree that the rule of law should be a top priority for our next governor, will you chip in $10, $25, $50, or whatever amount you can afford to our campaign?_**

---
| [Donate $10](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=37dc8840ab&e=7e91be8cad "Donate $10")
---
| [Donate $25](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=e5ca24b546&e=7e91be8cad "Donate $25")
---

---
| Believe it or not, the primary election is just a few months away. I hope we can count on your support to win this primary and finally send a Republican back to the governor's office this November!

Sincerely,

Jessica Gomez
Republican for Governor

But while the GOP caters to their wealthy donors, Senate Democrats are focused on middle-class families and small businesses. YOU are our priority -- and that's why it's vital to hear from you now.
**So today, I'm inviting the most engaged grassroots Democrats -- that includes you, friend -- to take our Strategic Majority Election Survey.**

subject: what’s in store for Indiana Democrats in 2022

body:

Peter, I know you probably haven’t heard from us in a while, so I wanted to personally reach out and give you a look at what we are working on at the Indiana Democratic Party this cycle. **The Indiana Democratic Party is gearing up for the midterms.** Our team is growing so that we can expand our efforts to elect Democrats to every office in Indiana from the township level all the way to the U.S. Senate. **We’ve been working around the clock to expose the Indiana GOP’s culture wars** and hold the legislature accountable to pass more meaningful legislation that addresses the kitchen-table issues Hoosiers care about most. **The INDems team is traveling around the state talking to Hoosiers about the better economic future the Democrats’ American Rescue Plan and The Jobs Act have delivered for Indiana.** In the past few weeks alone, we’ve stopped in **FIVE** of Indiana’s 92 counties (55 last year!) and we won’t stop until every Hoosier has the opportunity to see how families across Indiana have a brighter future overall because of President Biden, Indiana Democrats, and the Jobs Act. **2022 is going to be a big year for Indiana Democrats, and defeating radical Republicans like Todd Young isn’t possible without help from folks like you, Peter.** **[Can we count on you to chip in to help us continue to grow our Democratic efforts in Indiana? **Friend, there are three things you need to know about where things stand in our fight to flip Arizona blue:**
1\. Donald Trump is narrowing in on Arizona as ground zero in his fight to cling to power and elect extremist candidates.
2\. His handpicked candidate, Kari Lake (R), is the GOP frontrunner and she's committed to pushing Trump's extremist agenda – from voter suppression laws to abortion bans.
3\. While Lake is running to be Trump's protege, Marco Lopez (D) is running to be the governor Arizonans deserve. He's focused on improving education, health care and access to the ballot box. In other words, he's focused on you.
It's critical that we help Marco win – and the experts know he can do it: Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight rated this race a toss-up, and endorsements continue to come through for Marco. **We know the facts – but what we don't know yet is where _you_ stand, friend. **

clean_body: | | | Friend, there are three things you need to know about where things stand in our fight to flip Arizona blue: 1\. Donald Trump is narrowing in on Arizona as ground zero in his fight to cling to power and elect extremist candidates. 2\. His handpicked candidate, Kari Lake (R), is the GOP frontrunner and she's committed to pushing Trump's extremist agenda – from voter suppression laws to abortion bans. 3\. While Lake is running to be Trump's protege, Marco Lopez (D) is running to be the governor Arizonans deserve. He's focused on improving education, health care and access to the ballot box. In other words, he's focused on you. It's critical that we help Marco win – and the experts know he can do it: Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight rated this race a toss-up, and endorsements continue to come through for Marco. We know the facts – but what we don't know yet is where you stand, friend. That's why Marco put together an exclusive digital focus group – and he handpicked you to participate, friend.Your input will determine our strategy, and that strategy will decide Arizona's future – so please, review your record and help us before the midnight deadline: 2022 BLUE ARIZONA FOCUS GROUP SUPPORTER TIER: TOP SUPPORTER SURVEY STATUS: NOT STARTED REQUESTED ACTION: DEADLINE: 11:59 P.M. | | Thank you for doing what it takes to defeat GOP extremism in Arizona, Team Lopez Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:** Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, = Thank you so much. – Marco Lopez | | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Marco Lopez for Governor PO Box 34672 Phoenix, AZ 85067 United States | | © 2022 | Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez

Being on TV is a big deal in a large city like Dallas. Her voice was just amplified x10000 and her race is getting the coverage it deserves. clean_body: With Election Day less than 2 weeks away, help me prove them wrong. | Friend, It’s clear the radical Left is terrified of what our election means for their House majority. The Democrats just sent socialist AOC to campaign in Texas as part of their last-ditch effort to try and stall our momentum in these final weeks. They know that if we win Texas’ NEW 38th district, their House majority is as good as gone. With less than 2 WEEKS to go in our election, let’s show the radical Left that Texas is off limits with the largest surge of grassroots contributions of our entire campaign. AOC claimed that flipping Texas blue is “inevitable,” and that if the Democrats do control the Lone Star State, they will “unionize the hell out of [it].” But what radical leftists like AOC and Beto O'Rourke forget, is that grassroots patriots like YOU will NEVER let that happen. We’ve always defended this state as a bastion of freedom in America – and winning Texas’ brand-new congressional seat is key to continuing that defense. body:
The first Black Americans in the Senate and Congress were Republican |
[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=e834ca1b4f27444e83393b244ae67bb4&_e=g9rvShFleSBnCs9b0grW5W2kKzoAJmY1J2Z2hnwC_hl7-hmYVxAs9e6N6jCzIFQhCPoFjMVAujhwx8ZxJjnd_L6ySL4UEydUb3UCggoz3_vvNdVEG2ATT1rAHzxiYCSc1xvCCGFs9pPoVyZT3FrCbfuqyrPB_eS-1N4fwDQUdBdy93CnrjMlCQRCCKkhkl0liZi5yFtPoYi2reidtMwl25onRMkszNTBx7QjaE7XG78o-vYs0HxYCSckTi1pCY5-1_X6q9EMPJP2TFxVa-WdaE63mls05thAC7rilefCM3ecSGtloDLDlrubjU_ZhVHOouF98hCsyNvNdDf0HoRHPThFlvDvToWsEEk5A9uIRbOKDhXeFBqQ99V95EarerD6RhJaLYb7x1jD0bcvCB5ZdBFjWIRaB9wdjFD2FeLC8P0IQHjtnirTs1bbzinx-CGE74G0bKxM5JLP9rTVvEuBZQ%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

It’s Black History month, and like always the Democrats are putting on a pageant to show us all how “woke and anti-racist” they are, while telling everyone to educate themselves on Black History.

**Maybe it’s time for the Democrats to get a little education too.**

You see, Fellow Conservative, Democrats want you to learn their history, and ignore the real Black History in America, **like how Abraham Lincoln was a Republican, or how the first Black Americans in the Senate and Congress were Republicans named Hiram Revels and Joseph Rainey.**

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=e834ca1b4f27444e83393b244ae67bb4&_e=g9rvShFleSBnCs9b0grW5W2kKzoAJmY1J2Z2hnwC_hl7-hmYVxAs9e6N6jCzIFQhCPoFjMVAujhwx8ZxJjnd_L6ySL4UEydUb3UCggoz3_vvNdVEG2ATT1rAHzxiYCSc1xvCCGFs9pPoVyZT3FrCbfuqyrPB_eS-1N4fwDQUdBdy93CnrjMlCQRCCKkhkl0liZi5yFtPoYi2reidtMwl25onRMkszNTBx7QjaE7XG78o-vYs0HxYCSckTi1pCY5-SRuGCVIsbWT3im419RK12nmt9raByoTOYMJJrbsjy6MRZ2b34FvvG_trAholjPER-m1XF4Rg26AD8B-edvPyU8c0RjXABnUJPrLel2FwZSoq1JnVdq0-foSRaQBenopYj-U_qqj8mgL3A_mC6DNFXxZYeCOIZjJ0vrspTZHus3ZUqHv2xPGYOCOplGnEoz2d_wX5Qcj2BxslKHtG5rPK_g%3D%3D)

[**HELP MAKE HISTORY >>> ELECT A BLACK REPUBLICAN**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=e834ca1b4f27444e83393b244ae67bb4&_e=g9rvShFleSBnCs9b0grW5W2kKzoAJmY1J2Z2hnwC_hl7-hmYVxAs9e6N6jCzIFQhCPoFjMVAujhwx8ZxJjnd_L6ySL4UEydUb3UCggoz3_vvNdVEG2ATT1rAHzxiYCSc1xvCCGFs9pPoVyZT3FrCbfuqyrPB_eS-1N4fwDQUdBdy93CnrjMlCQRCCKkhkl0liZi5yFtPoYi2reidtMwl25onRMkszNTBx7QjaE7XG78o-vYs0HxYCSckTi1pCY5-aI3Jug-VeaWLJ3qxuDdaZrHIIp95SP3enf_GUE1_ftWxAktvV9yiX8QGLrLeO18aDz8TVnLBcEhJcNMjuRsC-PYMaL9kngVhM-5b9kyQJM345fMDNA70nhiYbRdtCqGbGpBzqFq1teY6jICITKRU5JLomGlbtboJEoGo6ZYz1C78xkfcW-jWNGVkGoRJhT0aqkCIwgBFm2uW7inq8rg0iQ%3D%3D)
**What’s worse is how Democrats always forget to tell anyone that the first 23 Black Americans in Congress were all Republican, or how Factions in the Democratic Party founded the Ku Klux Klan.**

The real Black History shows us that Democrats were the ones that suppressed Black Americans and used violence to stop them from voting or running for office. **The only thing that’s changed is how Democrats just lie to the Black Community about “free things” while doing nothing to actually help them.**

%%First%%, right now we have a chance to make history again, and stop the Democrat monopoly on Black elected officials and Black voters, but I’ll need your help to make it happen. **[Will you help make history happen again by helping elect a Black conservative Republican to congress?](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=e834ca1b4f27444e83393b244ae67bb4&_e=g9rvShFleSBnCs9b0grW5W2kKzoAJmY1J2Z2hnwC_hl7-hmYVxAs9e6N6jCzIFQhCPoFjMVAujhwx8ZxJjnd_L6ySL4UEydUb3UCggoz3_vvNdVEG2ATT1rAHzxiYCSc1xvCCGFs9pPoVyZT3FrCbfuqyrPB_eS-1N4fwDQUdBdy93CnrjMlCQRCCKkhkl0liZi5yFtPoYi2reidtMwl25onRMkszNTBx7QjaE7XG78o-vYs0HxYCSckTi1pCY5-TSXfu-SeBHreZX2eXv-N71peZoKHbl5GRRRybdhv4R6IyTW8D_THCgYNWAj2RPeRtKWDJmX-5QVY5hVhAROSr4ohJomGar8i5CnWH5leHhjRf5eCAimQFSE2QZepaO9uogYJOnBPNcaFzgqJiCq86eCwDGIVxSnyuN_n_Kb1huwFIj0afk3uCYncyXUPGEq2pRgux4n2s2onYzVGfuNXIA%3D%3D)**

Thank you,
Alex Stovall

Get the latest by following me on social media.

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=e834ca1b4f27444e83393b244ae67bb4&_e=g9rvShFleSBnCs9b0grW5ecoUEapnlwbUs3azrx2UU9z3f3J5yF4G_8yzSVJcsMIo0PZLj8upOCFjGqkefqEvnNoAk6AhtuFPuVEAaIW2REjjYbXKPsKRKIuO9S1j3cp3v6XUuAYtLCOFKXgcuOQpYaC-9XbP30cJCxPWnbX_qc-3_736BmLocAZ_xTkMggrV9sDZtnTv4Yb2wGBNgpQzX3EpdAnJo-M3j_2c5URcwwdSPMx-wJzSqCBXkFSZktZ2tA75lBp8WPcIS1VDiAI72pvYHxkriv09m6GX2smVYs%3D) [](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=e834ca1b4f27444e83393b244ae67bb4&_e=jvIevKrjF0f_jzkJI8aFE7ekOqXDd0GN7jYzyGDTIeLoMahkyaB29tSTNAjM5v5Znw8ITovnodrJxgoFIOLafwx-k6Ze4s5IDIHfGM64eI607Tu5S4Ykyz-oLZpnyshg6H5_9QVWhGjFyM6PXuzVTZpwwJ5rDU3O9kQ_3dDC3MuAc0B8FHfFX_8nyBiTwVwroagRZX0IwGqDT3dDb_NMlFT2ws38cpIlrXl8D8PByEkCraQGwv0SdWEuB3yK4rmFiWpdtbJG0Bmx3G9T6qj6jw%3D%3D) [](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=e834ca1b4f27444e83393b244ae67bb4&_e=g9rvShFleSBnCs9b0grW5dLdiItPzmz8bXn03ehChYlkxUNj2Xl4FMBEho3WQj9bOsmooaF2ouUiLYOcw58kM1-T1cGHlkMjusZw6J7NDkxFNOhZxuDPmS7NSPx4xJVQvU5898lpt3Zjg-aOZU2Au8VECAreL0eDTI41GIMME73LbHoQeV6MiJ9wMFpQ3EnzaZt3VOE2xYZpCnbmkyzJynl3zmtfy6qINIm0nj_r4iDiXfF-ymO6xQB563ufB9qQdnwHkMQdOPNlCevZcffIKIpW81FDQ2vine6pqeAfHM-PGRe2-T8vz5e8P6khS48N) [](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=e834ca1b4f27444e83393b244ae67bb4&_e=g9rvShFleSBnCs9b0grW5YycvCcjg_lgf_ORJKNzW5cn4Ax5fAk507FM1bdw6vTuHJ7jBmMIu9mUN_ipmIuBm5culVs2HCjLY7pkW68vb0YZ7RRdDyF4yCVBaD_BD7cDJZhl7XlKBxxrKKn6raCrmIn_EUpkW7MAOPwasS_dDyQGqNoLZARBJ-5HJpnedg-3pIdcYiRVuFH3rkiISA5SM0FTmhvJ02mIxbw8VQqHKVO2mLYxOEfDq0y2VSf9Q05h7fDiauaD-jkGEwbER0YLvqB5uXe2_KsTwG9HRSiQ3fU%3D)

body:
theresacoatesellis posted: " GET READY TO VOTE THERESA FOR CONGRESS!“Save the Dates” below. UPDATED 2/17/2022 2:59pm Firehouse Primary (GOP Party Canvass): VOTE at the following balloting stations (some are to be determined) . Saturday, May 21st from 9:00a.m to 4:00p.m" | | |

## New post on **Theresa Coates Ellis for Congress**
|
---|---
| | [](https://theresacoatesellis.com/?author=1) |
## [VOTE Theresa Ellis for Congress May 21st or May 12th GOP Party Nomination! Ongoing Updates!](https://theresacoatesellis.com/2022/02/17/vote-theresa-ellis-for-congress-may-21st-or-may-12th-gop-party-nomination-ongoing-updates/)
by [theresacoatesellis](https://theresacoatesellis.com/?author=1)
---|---
GET READY TO VOTE THERESA FOR CONGRESS!“Save the Dates” below.
UPDATED 2/17/2022 2:59pm
Firehouse Primary (GOP Party Canvass): VOTE at the following balloting stations (some are to be determined)
. Saturday, May 21st from 9:00a.m to 4:00p.m See locations available below at this updated time.
. Early voting one day on Thursday, May 12thfrom 4:00p.m. to 8:00 p.m. The Middleburg Farm 23320 Foxchase Farm Lane Middleburg, VA. Reasons to vote early instead of May 21 include: active duty military, working, out of area that day, personal business or vacation, religious, medical.
VOTE Theresa for Congress!
Saturday May 21st VOTING places by Locality:
. Manassas City: Grace Metz Middle School 9950 Wellington Rd. Manassas City
. Manassas Park (MP): MP Community Center 99 Adams St. Manassas Park
. Fauquier County: Fauquier High School (HS) 705 Waterloo Road, Warrenton
Fairfax County in the 10th District: Clifton Town Hall 12641 Chapel Road, Clifton
. Loudoun County: To be determined
. Prince William County: To be determined
. Rappahannock County: To be determined
. Active U.S. Armed Forces may request an absentee ballot from GOP Congressional 10th District Committee at kristen@kalinafamily.com by April 16, 2022 and return by mail to address provided by May 20, 2022.
Drive-up voting is available.
VOTE Theresa Coates Ellis for U.S. Congress.
To contribute and invest in Theresa: <https://www.TheresaEllisforCongress.com/Contribute>
Thank you!
**[theresacoatesellis](https://theresacoatesellis.com/?author=1)** | February 17, 2022 at 5:33 pm | Categories: [Community](https://theresacoatesellis.com/?taxonomy=category&term=community) | URL: <https://wp.me/p5STuJ-2jZ>

The Republican State Leadership Committee has raised over $33 MILLION to elect anti-democratic, big-lie supporting radicals in November. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_B3_021722_AC_30DO]
Haven’t heard of them before? They’re basically our polar opposites – a group propped up by dark money, big corporations, and extremist activist groups 100% dedicated to electing the far-right to state-level office. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_B3_021722_AC_30DO]

name: Roy Cooper
subject: A note on gerrymandering:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
We can’t allow the GOP to gain disproportionate power through partisan tactics. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41929550/330948546/823540626?refcode=ea.1a19d456-5790-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.1a19d456-5790-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTE5ZDQ1Ni01NzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lyulLSg3PxA0iqyrlphDWrFfbkw33Uahzg1379X353A=&emci=8ad9b3d0-3790-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=1a19d456-5790-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)

* * *
My team and I have emailed you about partisan gerrymandering before, Peter, but I need to give you an update right now:
Republicans in North Carolina and across the country are using their legislative majorities to gerrymander their way into holding power for the next decade — **and they’ve just passed another round of ultra-partisan congressional and legislative maps through the legislature.**
**_We can’t let the GOP win this way._**
**[We have to do everything we can over the next 9 months to elect the leaders North Carolinians deserve — despite gerrymandered maps that aim to shut Democrats out of power. You can help me by rushing a donation of any amount today>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41929552/330948548/435245919?refcode=ea.1a19d456-5790-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.1a19d456-5790-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTE5ZDQ1Ni01NzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lyulLSg3PxA0iqyrlphDWrFfbkw33Uahzg1379X353A=)**
Twice in the last ten years, the NC GOP’s ultra-partisan maps have been thrown out by the courts. **They clearly didn’t learn their lesson.**
Republicans have proven they’ll do anything they can get away with to ensure that some votes count more than others and Democratic candidates won’t stand a chance.
**The GOP knows they can’t actually win on the issues:** Their extreme, right-wing agenda of rolling back rights and holding onto political power at any cost is completely at odds with what most of us really want from our leaders.
**Peter, as Governor, one of the most important things to me is ensuring that the voices of North Carolinians are heard in our electoral process. That’s why I’m advocating for a Nonpartisan Redistricting Commission to draw fair legislative maps in the future.**
But until that Commission becomes a reality, I remain committed to supporting Democrats up and down the ballot who need our help in the face of Republican gerrymandering tactics. We simply can’t allow the GOP to gain disproportionate power through partisan tactics.
**[If you’re in the fight with me, please, chip in any amount today to power our work through this critical midterm election year. Click here to donate whatever is right for you>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41929553/330948549/435245919?refcode=ea.1a19d456-5790-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.1a19d456-5790-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTE5ZDQ1Ni01NzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lyulLSg3PxA0iqyrlphDWrFfbkw33Uahzg1379X353A=)**

body:
| Hey Peter — Emily wrote you a really important note yesterday that I wanted to be sure you saw. Essentially, campaign filings from the first phase of this race confirmed what we knew all along: **Bill Lee is running a campaign for corporations, special interests, the super-wealthy, and his own desperate need to hold onto power at any cost.** Nothing illustrates this better than the fact that he poured _$3 million of his own money_ into his campaign. It’s no surprise that this is an uphill fight. Our campaign doesn’t have millionaires or corporations lining up to write us massive checks. And I wouldn’t have it any other way, because they’re not who this campaign is for. **Since Day One, I pledged to run a campaign for ALL Tennesseans — especially the working families that Bill Lee has left behind again and again.** [**We’re relying on our grassroots supporters to help us raise $25,000 by the end of the month so that we can start to close the gap between our campaign and Lee’s corrupt machine — can you pitch in any amount today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41920244/330890769/1963061330?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220217closegap2_djm_op_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmY0MDZjMy0yZDkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hU7RWtI0TjpIGtiVKCDwQOjYUMpjF7aaSW1UdSCfdQc=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

I have to share some not great news today, Peter.
Earlier this month, campaign filings for the Tennessee governor race were released — and, unsurprisingly, Bill Lee leveraged his corporate donors and personal wealth to outspend our campaign by a _massive_ margin.
It just confirms what we knew all along: **While our campaign to elect Dr. Martin depends on grassroots donations from regular Tennesseans, Gov. Lee is relying on special interests and dark money to stay competitive.**
We know that Tennesseans are fed up with Lee’s corporate cronyism, and we know that we’ve got the people on our side — but Lee doesn’t care about serving Tennessee’s families, only about staying in power. And that means we have to work _even harder_ to keep up the pace.
[**We’ve set a $25,000 goal for this month to help us close the gap — can you make a donation of any amount today to fuel our grassroots movement by and for ALL Tennesseans?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41920252/330890777/1963061330?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220217closegap2_djm_op_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmY0MDZjMy0yZDkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hU7RWtI0TjpIGtiVKCDwQOjYUMpjF7aaSW1UdSCfdQc=)

clean_body: | Hey Peter — Emily wrote you a really important note yesterday that I wanted to be sure you saw. Essentially, campaign filings from the first phase of this race confirmed what we knew all along: Bill Lee is running a campaign for corporations, special interests, the super-wealthy, and his own desperate need to hold onto power at any cost. Nothing illustrates this better than the fact that he poured $3 million of his own money into his campaign. It’s no surprise that this is an uphill fight. Our campaign doesn’t have millionaires or corporations lining up to write us massive checks. And I wouldn’t have it any other way, because they’re not who this campaign is for. Since Day One, I pledged to run a campaign for ALL Tennesseans — especially the working families that Bill Lee has left behind again and again. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = \------Forwarded message------ From: Emily, MartinForTN.com Date: February 15, 2022 Subject: Some not great news... = I have to share some not great news today, Peter. Earlier this month, campaign filings for the Tennessee governor race were released — and, unsurprisingly, Bill Lee leveraged his corporate donors and personal wealth to outspend our campaign by a massive margin. It just confirms what we knew all along: While our campaign to elect Dr. Martin depends on grassroots donations from regular Tennesseans, Gov. Lee is relying on special interests and dark money to stay competitive. We know that Tennesseans are fed up with Lee’s corporate cronyism, and we know that we’ve got the people on our side — but Lee doesn’t care about serving Tennessee’s families, only about staying in power. And that means we have to work even harder to keep up the pace. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks so much, Emily Cupples Campaign Advisor | Dr. Jason Martin is running for Governor because now more than ever Tennessee needs a leader who will start working to meet all of our needs. clean_body: Matt Rosendale continues to advocate for lawlessness and economic damage as he sounded off in support of the Canadian truck convoy a few days ago. The | | | Peter, Matt Rosendale continues to advocate for lawlessness and economic damage as he sounded off in support of the Canadian truck convoy a few days ago. These convoys are not only opposed to vaccine requirements, but have also begun disrupting the supply chain between the US and Canada. Matt Rosendale doesn’t care about Montanans or Americans receiving the goods and services they need in a timely manner. He is instead concerned with making a political publicity stunt for all to see: So much for law and order. This news is unpleasant and disappointing, but we as Montanans have become accustomed to Rep. Rosendale’s political stunts. He voted for economic collapse when he voted against raising the debt ceiling. And he voted against improving Montana’s infrastructure – which is amongst the worst in the nation – when he voted against the bipartisan Infrastructure and Investment Act. Montanans deserve better. Jack is prepared to take on Matt Rosendale and work on solving the issues facing Montanans like broadband access, protection of public lands, and access to affordable healthcare. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ---|--- | | Supporting lawless actions like this trucker convoy is the last thing we need, but this isn’t the first time Rosendale has supported lawless behavior in the name of “freedom”. name: Paul Schimpf
subject: Our second TV ad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P
body:
| [](http://www.schimpf4illinois.com/?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=not_in_the_squad&n=1)
---
### Friend \--
It's easy to get caught up in the noise of campaign season. And, let's face it, there is a LOT of noise out there these days. We remain laser focused on our mission: Substance and Solutions. The signs are positive for our campaign. We still have much to do and need your help in getting our message out there. Our second statewide cable TV ad is set to launch in the next ten days. We filmed my portion of it yesterday (picture below). More and more Republicans who hear our message recognize that Carolyn and I are the only team that can defeat JB Pritzker. As the other candidates in the primary tear each other down, we continue to gain support. But it doesn't matter how good a candidate is if the voters don't know who they are. That's why we are spending $50K a month on statewide cable TV advertising. The advertising is moving the needle, but we cannot keep up that level of spending without your help. We can win without a billionaire benefactor, BUT WE CANNOT WIN WITHOUT YOU! You can help pay for our cable TV ads by donating $25, $50, or $100 [here](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/donate?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=not_in_the_squad&n=2). You can download a copy of our nominating petition for circulation [here](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=x7qo17qR1Kb0lLg85yQYfAbXTC6Z7wxyptuSZemzKnFypGyCaUAwfCQoiTX9r2CwP8dqvAXuciIUkiQkNBFDFJu-589EVczSle-Q50H6dK1OzdpPL-nzCN2sTrMxUoaoA60DS_StFcHh2yN_RHLs95eC6EKEaPb9DaeCOHLs6sXanDYvFinUJbUs9rSveoQ1&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=not_in_the_squad&n=3). If you'd like to host a meet and greet, send an email to events@schimpf4illinois.org As I say in our latest commercial: "Hope is not a plan; anger is not a solution; and outrage cannot unify our state." We have THE MESSAGE that is resonating with voters. Now we need you to help us reach more of them. Make your voice count. Every interaction and every dollar helps. Thanks for reading and Semper Fidelis, Paul Paul Schimpf
[](http://www.schimpf4illinois.com/?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=not_in_the_squad&n=4)[http://www.schimpf4illinois.com/](http://www.schimpf4illinois.com/?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=not_in_the_squad&n=5)
Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P.O. Box 16, Waterloo, IL, 62298\. A copy of our report, filed with the State Board of Elections, Springfield, IL, will be available for download or purchase from them. We do not pay for email addresses. We have your email address either because you signed up for our list at an event, you entered your email address online, or you gave your email address to us or one of our friends.
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/unsubscribe?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=not_in_the_squad&n=6).
You can also keep up with Paul Schimpf on [Twitter](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEGmWwYfQ_yWb41Zx1QyVyU&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=not_in_the_squad&n=7) or [Facebook](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6g5cWifaQHs4q1ylFw89qVcMpLCIQGbbcgOLvTMfF-ic&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=not_in_the_squad&n=8).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=not_in_the_squad&n=9), software for leaders.

name: MaryAnn Pistilli
subject: I'm all in for Laura Loomer!
body:
You may have seen Laura Loomer's email earlier this week about how I'm taking over as Campaign Manager to run the day-to-day operations for her Florida Congressional Campaign.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/JVAHhzlMlIc763dduwpTvWFg/LNlKhfAaRsc72Mco9Nn763Cw)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/JVAHhzlMlIc763dduwpTvWFg/LNlKhfAaRsc72Mco9Nn763Cw) You may have seen Laura Loomer's email earlier this week about how I'm taking over as Campaign Manager to run the day-to-day operations for her Florida Congressional Campaign.

Laura winning a seat in Congress will be a GAME CHANGER for our nation!

Just imagine, a young, fiery, intelligent woman who runs circles around AOC, Ilhan Omar and the Democrat establishment! Now, imagine that same PRINCIPLED woman keeping the GOP leadership in check!

This is what we need for America, and [**I 'm asking that you help us hit our February fundraising goal by donating today**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/JVAHhzlMlIc763dduwpTvWFg/LNlKhfAaRsc72Mco9Nn763Cw).

We're a little past halfway to our goal for this month, but we need to do better if we're going to get Laura to Congress and drive out a five-term career politician.

Fundraising has slowed down and we still have $27,203 to raise before the end of the month!

[**Will you please help?**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/JVAHhzlMlIc763dduwpTvWFg/LNlKhfAaRsc72Mco9Nn763Cw)

I recently ran voter registration drives for the Republican Party of Florida/Victory, and so I know that boots on the ground and an aggressive grassroots campaign is the key to winning. **It 's how I flipped voter registration RED in the ENTIRE state of Florida for the first time in history!**

I know how to win and get boots on the ground for Laura, but I'll need an influx of cash to make that happen.

We have to pay for campaign literature, gas, and a fair rate for the young, enthusiastic Republicans who will be going door-to-door for Laura.

Those expenses add up quickly, and we need to start immediately!

[**If you can make a generous donation today to jumpstart our ground game, I would greatly appreciate it.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/JVAHhzlMlIc763dduwpTvWFg/LNlKhfAaRsc72Mco9Nn763Cw)

Thank you for all that you've done for Laura, and all that you do for our great nation.

With Respect and Gratitude,

MaryAnn Pistilli
Campaign Manager
Laura Loomer for Congress

name: Team Jacobs
subject: Press Release: Matt Jacobs Endorsed by California Republican Party
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress
body:
[](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=277055ff573f43b2ac383f662519993e&_e=JDtGCuRX9VuyoLKHTqF8Mb6OCTMM-20uAXVkQZcr1ZMefzaiA-7AyheFIsFydMJxNpX7wqscvjVc99TjGeQiDRbs-kAkYTYO7mxyvRu80vLqHsUivpNuKRc3DP5qfOsg5XSy0aJZ9DRQflCBE6kPR9pb6PkSFPXQjwf_VFp2XAvL3HUXWnZMS9hhDzphBRannX7UOkYD9I9cozXkZumYTehTSamg7Uo99sdq8bvU97KL_kzQuurfBpVBNUUPLURfDseRYSrjk-g5rIe_wLFkUA%3D%3D) **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** **February 17, 2022** **Contact:[press@mattjacobsforcongress.com](mailto:press@mattjacobsforcongress.com "press@mattjacobsforcongress.com")** **Website:[MattJacobsForCongress.com](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=277055ff573f43b2ac383f662519993e&_e=JDtGCuRX9VuyoLKHTqF8Mb6OCTMM-20uAXVkQZcr1ZMefzaiA-7AyheFIsFydMJxmzRGzNaUzARaGVaADF0cinwPGhg9aYHa04KoiB-dK2XFnpBMPpjs8Lckz34bdP6G8EoSf9yfYAB-P4XmwdsM65B7zPmUooZMAH1Ur05tL6r3AocTrtg7LncnRtVDdU1_rPRmWcx48EbHetuEAHvnoArKdrEu6tw2VUjlA0dymrR5f9zB8c4eD-8KiLa5v1aiHFObHsgQaYCQSq5F0XrzXg%3D%3D)** **Contact:[press@mattjacobsforcongress.com](mailto:press@mattjacobsforcongress.com "press@mattjacobsforcongress.com")** **Website:[MattJacobsForCongress.com](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=277055ff573f43b2ac383f662519993e&_e=JDtGCuRX9VuyoLKHTqF8Mb6OCTMM-20uAXVkQZcr1ZMefzaiA-7AyheFIsFydMJxybzmQcqNC24Aiyz4OZW5M5hENO-8mJEjT1BGEmZiY8zlFDarEW6p1Co-tvOnFs8bK2dAO9yyfPwRxGryn4r_sU9MukEnwyYcKM04HGrbe0Xtu5dqNGwNFQvYMArvi5vFOmrdSLe2NPUnTJU6V6ZmDst9X9sA8yOmdkHPDkjv-OB-FX4vye1kJP06jhI2_AkpwME4Knd-NGFRNtYtMFPjzQ%3D%3D)** **MATT JACOBS ENDORSED BY** **CALIFORNIA REPUBLICAN PARTY** _Jacobs Endorsed by Unanimous Vote_ **Thousand Oaks, CA -** Matt Jacobs, former federal prosecutor who successfully spent his career prosecuting America’s worst enemies - child sex traffickers, mafia bosses, and high-level al-Qaeda terrorists - **received, by unanimous vote, the endorsement of the California Republican Party for the 26th Congressional District. ** **_“I’m honored to have the California Republican Party’s endorsement,”_** said Jacobs. **_CAGOP stands firmly for values we all hold dear – individual liberty, limited government, free enterprise, and equality of opportunity. Their endorsement demonstrates that our campaign has the momentum to take back this seat – record-breaking off-year fundraising, an energetic grassroots ground game getting our message out to thousands of voters at the door, and broad local, statewide and national support. I’m thrilled to work alongside state and local Party leaders who care so deeply about our community and country.”_** In addition to the California Republican Party, Matt Jacobs has been endorsed by: CA DELEGATION ENDORSEMENTS **Rep. Kevin McCarthy** _House Republican Leader _ **Rep. Ken Calvert ** **Rep. Young Kim ** **Rep. Doug LaMalfa ** **Rep. Jay Obernolte ** **Rep. Michelle Steel ** **Rep. David Valadao ** **Former Rep. Mimi Walters ** LOCAL ENDORSEMENTS **Ventura County Republican Party** **Ventura County Deputy Sheriffs’ Association ** **Ventura County Professional Peace Officers’ Association ** **National Latino Peace Officers Association, Advocacy** **Judge Steven Hintz** _Ventura County Treasurer-Tax Collector_ **Kelly Long** _Ventura County Supervisor_ **Keith Mashburn** _Mayor of Simi Valley _ **Mike Judge** _Councilmember of Simi Valley_ **Frank Visco** _Former Chairman of the CAGOP _ **Mike Osborn** _Former Chairman of Ventura County Republican Party _ **Tony Strickland** _Former State Senator _ **Mike Antonovich,**_Former Los Angeles County Supervisor _ **Denis Weber** _Councilmember / Former Mayor of Agoura Hills _ **Mike Morgan** _Former Mayor / Councilmember of Camarillo _ **Barbra Williamson** _Former Councilmember of Simi Valley _ **Dallas Lawrence** _Las Virgenes Unified School District Board Member_ In addition to his strong grassroots organization, Jacobs is the Republican fundraising leader in CA-26 raising $850,000 in 2021 — the most ever by a challenger in CA-26 in the non-election year. Cycle-to-date, Matt Jacobs has outraised incumbent Democrat Julia Brownley in individual contributions. ### **About Matt Jacobs -** As the grandson of a World War II veteran and two Holocaust survivors who came to this country as refugees, Matt has always been deeply proud and grateful to be an American. That pride and gratitude led Matt to pursue a career as a federal prosecutor, where he investigated and prosecuted some of America’s worst enemies and most dangerous criminals – including al-Qaeda terrorists, child sex traffickers, mafia bosses, leaders of violent street gangs, opioid traffickers and many others. For his success in protecting our country and communities, Matt earned “Prosecutor of the Year” and “True American Hero” awards from national law enforcement organizations. Born and raised in Ventura County, Matt attended Conejo Valley public schools and was valedictorian of his Thousand Oaks High School class. He went to UCLA on an academic scholarship (graduating in the top 1% of his class) before earning a master’s degree in public affairs from Princeton and a law degree from NYU. Matt and his wife Julie are blessed to be the parents of Benjamin, Alexander and Abigail. They live in Westlake Village, just miles from Matt’s childhood home in Thousand Oaks. | | [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=277055ff573f43b2ac383f662519993e&_e=JDtGCuRX9VuyoLKHTqF8MdbjAuKsYNyJhyC2xO_kyWKByWrch5WE7IQgZJm6L42tcPIan4QC2OqsE_Tnb7sjN7euA3_8eEf48Ek69BQgju2RthatIZvaZskZnXamCudswJrdX9O_de2__cCiNMMG3HBrFi7nPT1iogA3Z2TFiZ1H-_Md3hgC64tjSiBmwi9qSTIMNHqRK7VXGUkE_PlU6eor5h5MXkSNlx1-hs2AxJDebvz8zs3RzK--AxxHYgoP582hWk9AceKLmo0gK9oyYw%3D%3D) | [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=277055ff573f43b2ac383f662519993e&_e=JDtGCuRX9VuyoLKHTqF8MW9dWOU5E7ENLJ8Kov6GBVJQv__Buzat1Z7ZRvsDYCZBM522l64oDwzuaWBmLTn9B6Q_ILnN3JJGYtWuBWOzKNAxQdYLcyLMgK3MjQf_JRhwcXMpVRiRLdET3Fiqy7IsdW-i0Wbpcm2SwJX1ula4lKB4fnhhTLpdRkRJCYLV7zJ3_w_zp3xU7l1La22N4P0csmx6KmY_Yn7DXdHIFWcpenoKnXK6_JrLseUZuFRAKyD_kQPqTNg59eTteOMwOCVzXA%3D%3D) | [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=277055ff573f43b2ac383f662519993e&_e=JDtGCuRX9VuyoLKHTqF8MY8QmQHozDQIlYce0rWo6_G0CsIEb4SmTTnh7xSXBnyANF_gj1PGD3TvxkSAZt8UHdrKiOY9wwysodmpuIr8m_o4SCpvP52dzCWgYElop03BACqbdnK5t-WZVom3r5C0KlRWLFj9HaWujagqrSG6Dp1pKnBXezJ6532h0d7jfRHmnEENg7UBa3x6KU70ur5vtHlp4RuRaX-S2tXtemciCygMvMBPxA7II8QRf0q6Xpp9WoPEP0SQSPZonCdqwWKFpFVYABZnYTKLFzBbLIen3us%3D) | [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=277055ff573f43b2ac383f662519993e&_e=JDtGCuRX9VuyoLKHTqF8MX_fm65jw43vMyKjrumiF-p58kpcPYe0Zo9UX1LAsSuIm3UNafkKDKsoAqQdUoQlX_YxrBWLKZsJlmtCwfTenLTzsnSLZC12fVvc55dYLoKOfyDfkj-CpT8VbRq7rXfEteEOSoSxb5F3nYq2YttBXRXqfl9J9UQyseCbqSMsyE_shTJlODlzuTqOEDr0oh0ZOYRm6yHgSXwNY9AVyn8R-siof5Wd388clZ3Wa4R8eFORSdg4c5KcJ68k0XXLMOf_3Ax6BaPMcs6M8wYil8CPFaE%3D)

clean_body: FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE February 17, 2022 Contact:mailto:press@mattjacobsforcongress.com "press@mattjacobsforcongress.com" Website: Contact:mailto:press@mattjacobsforcongress.com "press@mattjacobsforcongress.com" Website: MATT JACOBS ENDORSED BY CALIFORNIA REPUBLICAN PARTY Jacobs Endorsed by Unanimous Vote Thousand Oaks, CA - Matt Jacobs, former federal prosecutor who successfully spent his career prosecuting America’s worst enemies - child sex traffickers, mafia bosses, and high-level al-Qaeda terrorists - received, by unanimous vote, the endorsement of the California Republican Party for the 26th Congressional District. “I’m honored to have the California Republican Party’s endorsement,” said Jacobs. CAGOP stands firmly for values we all hold dear – individual liberty, limited government, free enterprise, and equality of opportunity. Their endorsement demonstrates that our campaign has the momentum to take back this seat – record-breaking off-year fundraising, an energetic grassroots ground game getting our message out to thousands of voters at the door, and broad local, statewide and national support. I’m thrilled to work alongside state and local Party leaders who care so deeply about our community and country.” In addition to the California Republican Party, Matt Jacobs has been endorsed by: CA DELEGATION ENDORSEMENTS Rep. Kevin McCarthy House Republican Leader Rep. Ken Calvert Rep. Young Kim Rep. Doug LaMalfa Rep. Jay Obernolte Rep. Michelle Steel Rep. David Valadao Former Rep. Mimi Walters LOCAL ENDORSEMENTS Ventura County Republican Party Ventura County Deputy Sheriffs’ Association Ventura County Professional Peace Officers’ Association National Latino Peace Officers Association, Advocacy Judge Steven Hintz Ventura County Treasurer-Tax Collector Kelly Long Ventura County Supervisor Keith Mashburn Mayor of Simi Valley Mike Judge Councilmember of Simi Valley Frank Visco Former Chairman of the CAGOP Mike Osborn Former Chairman of Ventura County Republican Party Tony Strickland Former State Senator Mike Antonovich,Former Los Angeles County Supervisor Denis Weber Councilmember / Former Mayor of Agoura Hills Mike Morgan Former Mayor / Councilmember of Camarillo Barbra Williamson Former Councilmember of Simi Valley Dallas Lawrence Las Virgenes Unified School District Board Member In addition to his strong grassroots organization, Jacobs is the Republican fundraising leader in CA-26 raising $850,000 in 2021 — the most ever by a challenger in CA-26 in the non-election year. Cycle-to-date, Matt Jacobs has outraised incumbent Democrat Julia Brownley in individual contributions. ### About Matt Jacobs - As the grandson of a World War II veteran and two Holocaust survivors who came to this country as refugees, Matt has always been deeply proud and grateful to be an American. That pride and gratitude led Matt to pursue a career as a federal prosecutor, where he investigated and prosecuted some of America’s worst enemies and most dangerous criminals – including al-Qaeda terrorists, child sex traffickers, mafia bosses, leaders of violent street gangs, opioid traffickers and many others. For his success in protecting our country and communities, Matt earned “Prosecutor of the Year” and “True American Hero” awards from national law enforcement organizations. Born and raised in Ventura County, Matt attended Conejo Valley public schools and was valedictorian of his Thousand Oaks High School class. He went to UCLA on an academic scholarship (graduating in the top 1% of his class) before earning a master’s degree in public affairs from Princeton and a law degree from NYU. Matt and his wife Julie are blessed to be the parents of Benjamin, Alexander and Abigail. name: =?utf-8?Q?Ed=20Thelander=20for=20Congress?=
subject: It's Official! Ed Thelander Earns 1st Spot on 1st Congressional District Ballot
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by The Committee to Elect Ed Thelander for Congress, Inc
body:
Thanks to the many volunteers who collected more than the maximum allowable signatures, Ed Thelander is 1st on the ballot in Maine’s 1st District! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/41c9cbdc287c/a-strong-finish-to-8849954?e=f8a0a76a2b)
---
| | [ ](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=418cd6fc07&e=f8a0a76a2b)
---
| |
> | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:
>
> IT IS OFFICIAL – ED THELANDER IS ON THE BALLOT FOR US CONGRESS!
>
> Augusta ME – For 21 years, retired Navy SEAL, Ed Thelander, defended freedom in foreign lands. Today, he is ready to defend freedom in the halls of the United States Congress.
>
> On Thursday, February 17, 2022, Ed Thelander, his wife Liliana, and Campaign Manager Mike Pajak delivered just over 1,500 certified signatures to the Maine Secretary of State’s Office to secure his place on the ballot as a candidate for the United States Congress in Maine’s First Congressional District. The signatures were gathered in just over 40 days.
>
> As the first Maine citizen to file their signatures in Maine’s First Congressional District for the 2022 election, Thelander’s campaign demonstrated broad support with their signature gathering. Over 100 volunteers gathered signatures in 94 cities and towns that make up the Congressional District.
>
> * * *
>
> **_Liliana and Ed Thelander with the Official Ballot Receipt_**
> * * *
>
> Thelander was humbled by such broad support. “My sincere thanks to the many energized volunteers who gathered the maximum allowed signatures. I am so grateful for their support and their hard work,” said Thelander.
> “Getting on the ballot this early gives us more time to connect with Maine people and hear their concerns about the future of our country. Maine is a patriotic state with one of the highest per capita deployments of Maine soldiers during the Iraq and Afghanistan wars. I know their concerns and I will be their voice in Washington,” continued Thelander.
> “It has been a humbling experience and a great privilege to talk with the people of the First District. Their concerns and challenges are like the concerns and challenges of people all over our country. They want safe communities. They want their children to have a quality education, so they are prepared to compete in a global economy as adults. They want our roads and bridges repaired and they want our border secured.
>
> I served our nation in uniform for 21 years. I know what it’s like to meet challenges head-on and overcome them. It will be my honor to serve the people of Maine’s First Congressional District and bring solutions to the issues we face,” concluded Thelander.
>
> ---
> ###

subject: I'm all in for Laura Loomer!
body:
You may have seen Laura Loomer's email earlier this week about how I'm taking over as Campaign Manager to run the day-to-day operations for her Florida Congressional Campaign.
| | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/L83CV9sNnKykJ3UC8922NcjQ/3wOO3X1DL6VRiHxZiE58926g) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Laura Loomer for Congress.
**We encourage you to[visit their site today](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/L83CV9sNnKykJ3UC8922NcjQ/3wOO3X1DL6VRiHxZiE58926g)**.
---

Patriot,

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/L83CV9sNnKykJ3UC8922NcjQ/3wOO3X1DL6VRiHxZiE58926g) You may have seen Laura Loomer's email earlier this week about how I'm taking over as Campaign Manager to run the day-to-day operations for her Florida Congressional Campaign.

Laura winning a seat in Congress will be a GAME CHANGER for our nation!

Just imagine, a young, fiery, intelligent woman who runs circles around AOC, Ilhan Omar and the Democrat establishment! Now, imagine that same PRINCIPLED woman keeping the GOP leadership in check!

This is what we need for America, and [**I 'm asking that you help us hit our February fundraising goal by donating today**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/L83CV9sNnKykJ3UC8922NcjQ/3wOO3X1DL6VRiHxZiE58926g).

We're a little past halfway to our goal for this month, but we need to do better if we're going to get Laura to Congress and drive out a five-term career politician.

Fundraising has slowed down and we still have $27,203 to raise before the end of the month!

[**Will you please help?**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/L83CV9sNnKykJ3UC8922NcjQ/3wOO3X1DL6VRiHxZiE58926g)

I recently ran voter registration drives for the Republican Party of Florida/Victory, and so I know that boots on the ground and an aggressive grassroots campaign is the key to winning. **It 's how I flipped voter registration RED in the ENTIRE state of Florida for the first time in history!**

I know how to win and get boots on the ground for Laura, but I'll need an influx of cash to make that happen.

We have to pay for campaign literature, gas, and a fair rate for the young, enthusiastic Republicans who will be going door-to-door for Laura.

Those expenses add up quickly, and we need to start immediately!

[**If you can make a generous donation today to jumpstart our ground game, I would greatly appreciate it.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/L83CV9sNnKykJ3UC8922NcjQ/3wOO3X1DL6VRiHxZiE58926g)

Thank you for all that you've done for Laura, and all that you do for our great nation.

With Respect and Gratitude,

MaryAnn Pistilli
Campaign Manager
Laura Loomer for Congress

name: PUBLIC EDUCATION ATTACKED (via DCCC)
subject: 6 local responses requested 📍📱
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Do you OPPOSE banning public school teachers from discussing race and racism in the classroom?
| | | _**NEW YORK TIMES**_**REPORT:**
** After GOP attacks, educators nationwide face RESTRICTIONS on how to teach Black History Month**

---
| **It 's appalling.**

Across the country, radical Republicans are **BANNING** public school teachers from discussing race and racism in classrooms.

While teaching these subjects can mean discussing sensitive and uncomfortable issues...

_... It's critical to ensure our children know their history and are prepared to create a fairer, more inclusive country for ALL Americans._

Democrats are committed to pushing back against these attacks on public education and defeating the dangerous Republicans who support them.

But they can't get the job done without your support.

So we're calling on six grassroots Democrats from your community to let us know before midnight:

name: Giffords.org
subject: Sign Gabby Giffords’ get well card
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
She is getting great care but there is nothing that would lift her spirits more than hearing from her friends and supporters.
#

Friends -
As you may have seen, our founder Gabby Giffords is in the hospital with appendicitis.
She is doing well and getting great care, but there is nothing that would lift her spirits more than hearing from friends and supporters.
So we’ve created a get well card for Gabby and we’ll comb through the responses and send them to her while she’s resting and recovering in the next few days.
So what do you say? Can you sign Gabby’s get well card?
[**Use this link to add your name—and hopefully a comment—to Gabby Giffords’ get well card. We’ll deliver the comments to her over the weekend.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/gabby_get_well_card/?source=em220217-1-15&t=1&akid=1592%2E3935704%2Ek1oRgZ)
**[SIGN THE CARD](https://go.giffords.org/signup/gabby_get_well_card/?source=em220217-1-15&t=2&akid=1592%2E3935704%2Ek1oRgZ)**
Thank you,
The team at Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1592%2E3935704%2Ek1oRgZ) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

subject: Education is a right — Melanie’s education agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Melanie Darrigo
body:
| | | Education is a right, and we need a Congress who will prioritize it for the sake of our children and country.
**[Donate to Melanie D’Arrigo today and elect a fighter for working families in New York’s 3rd District. Melanie is rejecting corporate lobbyist money and fighting for major investments in our childrens’ future.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtR7WNj0Vvrg4HKrNk9USOunoX-04ND2SQFX-pBY04xC90kO-lf3ruri97zimYmNYhXt7YjmpKrxxb3uNcHf2Xm-NrOGFDgu9J9hOngvSEwbDen1E0DXjJJZdQvaF3eGdnX94MOLEE8YacP1jhZ20O2KC_NHNOI92-snUMXPcbgxCC4B9_64YAY_tPcB3yRE6aUxhE_vIF9pBUkzchbdiEsGu2RLIoex56wRhf_jYHTOxPXD3DWfG1qxuSzyxkF6HL06heTKgoWZYiwHMWyX1FWb1uRWSsdMbSUs7J1ERbsjpM8--2IKirFQ1VNbDvU5IJUPK9iAXQ-Qi3HrvTBywfz-8zpu8Xc2hxo0-vaDQP2Gs/3jn/N5_48IthTKiDc9dIUkZTZw/h0/hfb01iDr_Pjy0VIwPtdgLx2HlXs4SXg0J_mwKkkAi4M)**
Melanie D’Arrigo is a product of public school and with the help of student loans, was the first in her family to graduate from college, attending Barnard. As a mom of 3 young children, she understands the need for all children to receive a high-quality education that prioritizes equity so all students can thrive.
**Melanie’s education agenda includes:**
**Increased federal funding to public schools.** Currently, the federal government covers 8% of public school funding, with the rest falling on states, and generally funded by local property taxes. We must increase federal funding for public schools and increase Title 1 funding so every school is able to meet the demands of their students. We must also fully fund the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act to ensure that every child has a right to public education.
**Universal Pre-k and tuition-free public college.** Education is a public service. Melanie supports expanding public education with no-means-tests. Giving everyone a fair shake requires tuition-free public college, trade schools and universal pre-k. Putting a cap on who can qualify negatively impacts families with multiple children and those in areas with a high cost of living.
**Canceling student loan debt.** A quality education shouldn’t leave you in decades of insurmountable debt. Student loan debt prevents young adults from buying homes, starting families and putting money back into local economies. 92% of student loan debt is owned by the U.S. government, so we can cancel it.
**What a child learns is just as important as how they learn.
** We must provide funding for culturally relevant curriculums and Social Emotional Learning as well as increased and updated education on topics critical for children and teens for inclusiveness (gender/orientation, bullying, identifying and stopping hate, eating disorders and depression).

Melanie supports ending charter school expansion and banning for-profit charter schools. We must also eliminate high-stakes testing, encouraging schools to use assessments to demonstrate learning in multiple ways.
**Every child deserves a high quality education.**
******[If you believe that a well-educated America greatly benefits us all and every child deserves the opportunity to thrive, please make a contribution to Melanie D’Arrigo’s campaign today.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtR7WNj0Vvrg4HKrNk9USOunoX-04ND2SQFX-pBY04xC90kO-lf3ruri97zimYmNYhZb5wwoImz2gAQduYmLREttzrrV7sbw1QLEQ-217KgR5P-h_Nsvo9P0YSLprINpzaiOsMFJEk3bIZDK1iF_z9W4_A_Jnr9eI6geHpPQyKMJcYDHXuHfqEvekIPl4MC14AVVVCsRWFbwJgWBVDMPBMbZ_1wphMWXXKLxBTVBKyniuZA_qF3Uh1FEdzv66zwdMVGI3PGhGE6VrZDYmKl4NwpthMuG_tXBIx3_P6TIeRZtVb4B4bYfq_APOmskyxAj3DaU4NsnWmcu2fpmRbypay_bQdldA7Ied41ACo4JaLKac/3jn/N5_48IthTKiDc9dIUkZTZw/h1/-IhjtiVCtKXbvq78pr9Vt5KL3Yj33IyEIJtkx-E2E4U)**
Thank you for building with us.
— Team Melanie

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: What the Maricopa Audit taught us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Time to execute |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5077aff091&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
My name is Mark Finchem. I am the America First Conservative running for Secretary of State in Arizona – and the only candidate nationwide who has developed foolproof currency-grade watermarking for ballots, to make sure that they are secure.

Why do Liz Chaney and Nancy Pelosi hate me? Because I am an America First candidate who has a real solution to making it easy to vote but hard to cheat.

[**And right now we are entering into the main push of our campaign. Our primary is August 2nd, which means we have just about 6 months to make history.**](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=92e169e936&e=44b8c466b0)

[_To do this, I need your help. Please help my campaign with a donation today. It’s go time._](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d2fdc21496&e=44b8c466b0)

What the Maricopa Audit taught us is that process matters. Simplicity matters. Reform isn’t a move towards greater complexity. It is almost always reductive.

Take bloated systems and trim the fat. Take corrupt systems and stop the juice from flowing.

Take chaotic systems and make sure that they are trackable and auditable.

**Reforming our elections is simple. But not easy.**

**_Maricopa showed us that in at least several key counties and precincts in Arizona, the elections were irredeemably flawed._**

Now what?

I want to bring process, order, and transparency back to the office of Secretary of State and to our elections. Much ado has been made about the fact that what once was a largely bureaucratic office is getting so much scrutiny and attention this election cycle.

It doesn’t take a lot to see the answer.

**Bureaucratic jobs are simply bureaucratic when the bureaucracy functions. When the processes are flawed and the system if rife with corruption and fraud, the job becomes one of reform.**

And that is exactly what I will bring to Arizona. Period.
Paper ballots. Hand counting. Establish an Audit Trail.

**It’s that simple. But doing this requires fighting back against an establishment that wants to obfuscate the system in totality, making it impossible to track, impossible to have transparency.**

What the Maricopa Audit taught us is that process matters, and when a process is irredeemably flawed, the result is irredeemable fraud.

**How do you eat an elephant? One bite at a time.**

One of the most crucial things that I am bringing to the table is currency-grade protection and authentication for ballots.
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ff9b1edca2&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Right now, I am petitioning and doing everything in my power to have this adopted in all 50 states. We need ballots as safe and reliable as the US Dollar.

**Currency grade is the only way to make sure that Arizona becomes the Gold Standard for Election Integrity.**

But making this push requires huge amounts of money and we have very little time left. It’s already 2022!

[**Can you help me with a generous donation today?

Anything can help and will go a long way to bringing Election Integrity into reality!**](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b171953daa&e=44b8c466b0)

[Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4ea06252e4&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=1b29da2ccd&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. [Please contribute today.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4fa160a2cf&e=44b8c466b0)

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---

Mark Finchem for Secretary of State15508 W Bell Rd.STE 101-423Surprise, AZ 85374

Why do Liz Chaney and Nancy Pelosi hate me? Because I am an America First candidate who has a real solution to making it easy to vote but hard to cheat. What the Maricopa Audit taught us is that process matters. Simplicity matters. Reform isn’t a move towards greater complexity. It is almost always reductive. Take bloated systems and trim the fat. Take corrupt systems and stop the juice from flowing. Take chaotic systems and make sure that they are trackable and auditable. Reforming our elections is simple. But not easy. Maricopa showed us that in at least several key counties and precincts in Arizona, the elections were irredeemably flawed. Now what? I want to bring process, order, and transparency back to the office of Secretary of State and to our elections. Much ado has been made about the fact that what once was a largely bureaucratic office is getting so much scrutiny and attention this election cycle. It doesn’t take a lot to see the answer. Bureaucratic jobs are simply bureaucratic when the bureaucracy functions. When the processes are flawed and the system if rife with corruption and fraud, the job becomes one of reform. And that is exactly what I will bring to Arizona. Period. Paper ballots. Hand counting. Establish an Audit Trail. It’s that simple. But doing this requires fighting back against an establishment that wants to obfuscate the system in totality, making it impossible to track, impossible to have transparency. What the Maricopa Audit taught us is that process matters, and when a process is irredeemably flawed, the result is irredeemable fraud. How do you eat an elephant? One bite at a time. One of the most crucial things that I am bringing to the table is currency-grade protection and authentication for ballots. | | Right now, I am petitioning and doing everything in my power to have this adopted in all 50 states. We need ballots as safe and reliable as the US Dollar. Currency grade is the only way to make sure that Arizona becomes the Gold Standard for Election Integrity. But making this push requires huge amounts of money and we have very little time left. It’s already 2022! | | Mark Finchem Arizona House of Representatives – District 11 Republican for Arizona Secretary of State Conservative Election Integrity Patriot P.S. PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE | | | Copyright © 2022 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Mark Finchem for Secretary of State15508 W Bell Rd.STE 101-423Surprise, AZ 85374 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

body:
Morgan is officially on the ballot!!
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220217-677-footer-ak&t=2&akid=677%2E90090%2EApsKWm)
Look who officially made it onto the ballot:**
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/26032?t=3&akid=677%2E90090%2EApsKWm)
Yep, that’s us on the ballot for United States Senator. 😎
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/26032?t=4&akid=677%2E90090%2EApsKWm)
[**_Could you make a contribution right now to help us build off our momentum?_**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/26032?t=5&akid=677%2E90090%2EApsKWm)
We couldn’t have done it without YOU. Whether you’ve donated, signed a petition for us, collected petitions, showed up for Morgan on the campaign trail, kept with all of our emails (_we know there’s a lot_), or all of the above! — you’re a big part of the reason we’ve gotten here today.
**Now it’s game time.** We’re 75 days out from the primary and we need to ramp up our campaign to the next level.
We’re on the ballot, but it’s still critical that we get out into the state and in front of more voters so they know why this is the only campaign that will fight for working families of Ohio.
[**_Can you help us out by donating $5 or anything you can today to help us build off the momentum of officially being on the ballot?_**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/26032?t=6&akid=677%2E90090%2EApsKWm)

Thank you for everything you do,
Team Morgan Harper

| Join in on the Campaign!
---
The Greg Lopez for Governor Campaign is calling upon all Game-Changers (Volunteers) to join us on Slack - our official communications platform!
With Slack, you will be able to communicate with our entire operation, see live news, get live updates, view campaign calendars/events, and support Greg Lopez for Governor.
Be part of the conversation and the movement!
---
| |
---
| | [Accept My Slack Invitation](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dP9nPWskTJI2q_VebuyEeyOmOWcD-oFPh4IZFiarjqNKrqOpheveewa-DpjZQ_p8a3HRS5CVUCYowBxcq--AN1Qxou5bGxEP06ur0hukWXJy1u9EbP2BAlNZNRRvT3zEeM8pCZGFfP4SiUHv5E6I6PX4PPzmwM9hZy5vXlsr32ts6CowqWMZ2l1pEajPXxzpfSIBUjbPHciEPO1BleZyO7l2aJ4tWZ6NUo0QIrfsBrU=&c=bhBzCak-zlf8OaD9UbC9UAZZ68n1OC98WZeLmowU0ocnNEZO_2gyGA==&ch=KwZkmHItv6y9XvnD0_DsmTmumAKEutvy0XnIpuwHt5Ad-itG9GjGwQ==)

The above invitation link will expire in 30 days!

| What is Slack? Slack is a Messaging App for organizations such as ours to connect people to the information they want and need. By bringing us all together as one unified team, Slack revolutionizes the way our campaign organizes, communicates, shares information, and completes projects and tasks.
Where Can I Use Slack? Slack can be downloaded and used on PC, Mac, Android Devices, and Apple Devices. It can even be used across all of your own personal devices regardless of platform.
How Do I Use Slack? While Slack is easy-to-use. name: Mia McLeod
subject: South Carolinians deserve to make their own reproductive healthcare decisions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mia for South Carolina
body:
Taking the fight for reproductive freedom to new heights. | | | Team, why is government intervention ok when it comes to abortion but not when it comes to guns or vaccinations or statewide mask mandates? **I joined Planned Parenthood on the steps of the statehouse today to call out the GOP's hypocrisy and protest their proposed abortion trigger ban because South Carolinians deserve to make their own reproductive healthcare decisions without interference — and they deserve a governor who’s willing to fight for this right and more.** **[If you agree, please consider making a contribution to my campaign so I can take our fight for reproductive freedom to new heights.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xOVKxhIUbYt3VKvuRN9Ed6pJAb5hrkufJ9bVGTSyzWW3WwoFaRYBlCgtKVxGJXB0Co6GcROcMkOu0UHX-0dy9Dr6vrkIjDft-frK4Ot8u8IeypbcKxgOR8oOiSakJL_JzUrznfV8Rh2ApVd_M4C5vso4T8Ui1EMGJwq-xk4a_K_NF_zEPaiCsVs2imYwQWwD3N_wBUC3hnWsDnI5QToEFpPBU_-U3fnB_d8PcPntDNlRulmNmo5uD7QKD1FUwx6KLtGqbv95kwpRAmGbWGADpZnZ_34VL15P5qR8JMxtO46c-4SQoNhS_oexsnXA_d32KekkGcYpjz2IexkWiG88uR8OL2RwjwIanYWDTsPrtJI1vCfPmirr5PiP3imuopcRoLBBQcDzl60lnyJbCTXknlT2lAow74sLYt5Bf12t6yh5Wo12SghXd2p43SKMobVeM/3jn/iFot-q-3RFKQJAkhc0vCBA/h0/O6xh335ngKf1Nf0-WzUvmlvhlRJ_A8YVsiOFu5MHuIk)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [donate: $10](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xOVKxhIUbYt3VKvuRN9Ed6pJAb5hrkufJ9bVGTSyzWW3WwoFaRYBlCgtKVxGJXB0Co6GcROcMkOu0UHX-0dy9Dft2L6LyJNBT0IuCfOn2gkXPW-Cy54QuPIdlkGefPUzcr36zSZMdceukVRLoRnQlvoXTrCeXUUCjKU_6H8qL_kKGgtEfI9d1rUD7rfsT-Oz5aUnbt48reaJ7GvTdGljF6aCVfJiYVIpqQmR0IFlE2FVzLTIDiiEEBTIgiBOJ5WAgGNaKVwnX4gbmeA5ROPkr1jA_euMCrfXKJbx6bn41xcmcH6dlT6c5gp37bpogJ5JpMX49FRRN6DP9g-8AW7gXfNC8my19sxvH6OalsUO5XhUTa7M4FN8YEt2ycy8nn9huRGTfw85mBnLUGZ0-6GQKbFooB5zshxRA4Qp6BH3dFHmP5ICB0A8eaein8eSbyzlL-2iymqudeK0fBUHgT-v_2GEbwJoneHDgdsLdUS6U1BA/3jn/iFot-q-3RFKQJAkhc0vCBA/h1/W5Fh81-wYJV50VeDTikUb8mJ48i3J9H8vp4NM8fGsPo)

> So when I learned my Republican colleagues are trying to criminalize abortions and pass a trigger ban, I knew I had to speak out.

clean_body: Taking the fight for reproductive freedom to new heights. | | | Team, why is government intervention ok when it comes to abortion but not when it comes to guns or vaccinations or statewide mask mandates? I joined Planned Parenthood on the steps of the statehouse today to call out the GOP's hypocrisy and protest their proposed abortion trigger ban because South Carolinians deserve to make their own reproductive healthcare decisions without interference — and they deserve a governor who’s willing to fight for this right and more. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | \-------- Previous Email -------- I’ve never been afraid to point out hypocrisy and take on the tough fights, friend. So when I learned my Republican colleagues are trying to criminalize abortions and pass a trigger ban, I knew I had to speak out. Right now, South Carolina Republicans are trying to pass a restrictive anti-abortion bill that would ban ALL abortions immediately if Roe v. Wade is overturned or dismantled at the federal level. This bill calls for the criminal prosecution of any person who obtains an abortion and the medical professionals who provide abortion care. They could be charged with murder and could even face the death penalty. Let me be unequivocally clear: Reproductive healthcare decisions should be between patients and their doctors, not politicians. I’m so frustrated by the hypocrisies and double standards. That’s why I introduced landmark legislation like the Viagra bill and Pro-birth Accountability Act. I’ve spent my career fighting to protect the right to choose and the right to reproductive care for all pregnant people. And as your Governor, you can bet I’ll continue to support reproductive freedom and stand up against any restrictive anti-abortion bills. Thank you for standing with me, — Mia | --- Please, disregard if you are a registered lobbyist. | | | Paid for by Mia for South Carolina | | Sent via . subject: I remember about a year ago when...

body:
$200 monthly| | | Hi there, [**We’re aiming for $200 in new monthly donations by midnight tonight! This will let us budget for hiring essential new team members in field and comms. Can you set up a monthly recurring donation right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41930078/330954396/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzJkYzZmOS02MDkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tdgxzSXTdDxNDp84rl_MQojuMxj95nOYc5dWllbnYEE=) I remember about a year ago when I was at a homeless camp under a bridge in Tacoma's tideflats. It was night, and the only light was from a fire burning in a round metal trash can. The smoke stacks and industry of the port hulked in the background in giant shadows. I was struck silent by the scene, because it could have been 100 years ago. In fact, that camp was literally on top of a homeless camp from 100 years before. Back then, homeless camps were called Hoovervilles. The residents of the current homeless camp used to find remnants of that old Hooverville they were on top of, like a 1920s glass Lysol bottle. So much has changed in the last 100 years, but homelessness remains. What does that tell you? That the problem is systemic. Housing should be treated as a human right, not an opportunity for Wall Street firms, giant multinational corporations, and real estate billionaires to get even richer than they already are. We need to decommodify housing in this country. After all, 11 million homes are empty year-round in the US. Yet 600,000 people are homeless. We’re not going to fix this problem with tiny little fixes around the edges. We need millions of units of social housing around the country, a vacancy and luxury tax on additional homes, and rent caps, among other things. [**Can you set up a small recurring donation now, so I can keep building a winning campaign and fight for Housing for All in Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41930079/330954397/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzJkYzZmOS02MDkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tdgxzSXTdDxNDp84rl_MQojuMxj95nOYc5dWllbnYEE=) clean_body: $200 monthly| | | Hi there, = I remember about a year ago when I was at a homeless camp under a bridge in Tacoma's tideflats. It was night, and the only light was from a fire burning in a round metal trash can. The smoke stacks and industry of the port hulked in the background in giant shadows. I was struck silent by the scene, because it could have been 100 years ago. In fact, that camp was literally on top of a homeless camp from 100 years before. Back then, homeless camps were called Hoovervilles. The residents of the current homeless camp used to find remnants of that old Hooverville they were on top of, like a 1920s glass Lysol bottle. So much has changed in the last 100 years, but homelessness remains. What does that tell you? That the problem is systemic. Housing should be treated as a human right, not an opportunity for Wall Street firms, giant multinational corporations, and real estate billionaires to get even richer than they already are. We need to decommodify housing in this country. After all, 11 million homes are empty year-round in the US. Yet 600,000 people are homeless. We’re not going to fix this problem with tiny little fixes around the edges. We need millions of units of social housing around the country, a vacancy and luxury tax on additional homes, and rent caps, among other things. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = = Thank you, -Rebecca ParsonCandidate for Congress, WA-06 To contribute via check, please address to:Rebecca for WashingtonPO Box 111388Tacoma, WA 98411 | | Rebecca Parson for Congress PO Box 111388 Tacoma, WA 98411 United States | | Paid for by Rebecca for Washington | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=lisa_hanson_running_for_senate&n=1)
---
## Lisa Hanson is Running for MN Senate
### Thursday, February 17th, 2022
Friend, I have good news to deliver. [**Lisa Hanson is running for the Minnesota Senate**](https://www.action4liberty.com/heroic_lisa_hanson_runs_for_minnesota_senate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=lisa_hanson_running_for_senate&n=2) in newly formed Senate District 23. The area covers all of Freeborn County, most of Mower Co and parts of Faribault, Weseca and Steele Counties. As you well know, Lisa recently spent a couple months in Freeborn County jail for the grand sin of opening her bistro and serving coffee against Governor Walz' decree! While being held as a political prisoner, she missed the birth of her newest grandchild, her anniversary with Vern and Christmas with her whole family. Walz and Keith Ellison targeted her because she is a patriot who refused to comply with their unconstitutional lockdowns and business closures. **To right this wrong, she is now running for the open Senate seat to restore our Constitutional government in Minnesota and make sure that Unilateral Emergency Powers NEVER HAPPEN AGAIN!** I view Lisa Hanson as a hero who stood up for what was right. Now she wants to make sure future generations don't lose their liberties to a tyrannical governor. If you want to contact Lisa, you can reach out and thank her for running by emailing her at [LisaHansonforSenate@gmail.com.](mailto:LisaHansonforSenate@gmail.com) **Jake Duesenberg** **Action 4 Liberty** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=lisa_hanson_running_for_senate&n=3 "Support Us") [Support Us](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=lisa_hanson_running_for_senate&n=3)
