Peter, **It’s time. ** It’s time for us to sign Governor Lujan Grisham’s pink slip. Under her leadership _(or lack thereof)_ we have seen unrelenting failure.
We know you’ve noticed it too all throughout New Mexico. A **failing** education system, **skyrocketing crime** , **burdensome** tax rates, and an **open border**. We cannot put up with this any longer. By donating through this email, you agree that the first $5,000 of your contribution will be deposited in House Majority PAC's Contribution Account and the remainder in House Majority PAC's Non-Contribution Account. You may also designate a different allocation formula below. You also agree that this allocation formula may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution to the Contribution Account.

Corporations/Labor Organizations: You may contribute an unlimited amount to House Majority PAC's Non-Contribution Account. You may not contribute to House Majority PAC's Contribution Account.

Contributions or gifts to House Majority PAC are not tax-deductible.

clean_body: | | | Reaching out for your first 2022 donation | | | Team, because of you, we were able to accomplish a lot in 2020. Thanks to donors like you we: Flipped a U.S. Senate seat – that helped give Democrats control of the Senate. Flipped a lot of seats in the legislature. Flipped the state blue in a presidential year for the first time since 1996. But we checked our donor records recently and noticed you haven’t contributed since our big wins. The stakes are as high as ever, team. From waging a war on democracy for Trump, to directly advocating for a return to the 1950s, the AZ GOP has only gotten more radical since 2020. Because of that, winning this year will be even harder than before. If we’re going to continue our momentum, we need everyone on the team to jump back in. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Sincerely, AZ Dems For up-to-date COVID-19 information and guidance, visit ** Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . body:
We need overwhelming majorities in Congress to do whatever it takes to defend Roe v. Wade.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41923141/330903280/1884979347?refcode=BLU-SJC-20220217-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmI0YzlkNS0zYTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5a2c3Qy5bzFc80_uLzyuIjnXCElJuYhwwnO2j2JqfH8=)
---
| We recently observed the 49th anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ , the historic case that guaranteed the right to abortion for all Americans. But we continue to see abortion access limited and functionally eliminated at the state level.

We need overwhelming majorities in Congress to do whatever it takes to defend _Roe v. Wade_ and protect reproductive rights at a federal level — and as a co-chair of recruitment at the DCCC, I’m helping lead the charge to elect more pro-choice members of Congress.

[_**If you have the capacity, please consider contributing to my campaign today to ensure we hold our Democratic majority in Congress and don’t lose the rights we secured nearly 50 years ago.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41923142/330903281/1884979347?refcode=BLU-SJC-20220217-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmI0YzlkNS0zYTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5a2c3Qy5bzFc80_uLzyuIjnXCElJuYhwwnO2j2JqfH8=)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41923143/330903282/1884979347?refcode=BLU-SJC-20220217-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmI0YzlkNS0zYTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5a2c3Qy5bzFc80_uLzyuIjnXCElJuYhwwnO2j2JqfH8=)

ADAMS COUNTY, CO — _**Today, Latino Victory Fund announced its endorsement of Dr. Yadira Caraveo for Congress in Colorado’s 8th Congressional District.**_ Founded in 2014, Latino Victory Fund is one of the largest national Latino organizations dedicated to electing more Latinos to public office. Their efforts to target Latino voters, build candidate and donor pipelines for Latino candidates, and build Latino political power at every level of government fills a critical void in the Latino civic engagement infrastructure. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41923288/330904086/355891186?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220217LVF_press_allop_c_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDI2NzMwZi0zYzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5OG61speScAAqaEyYrb9FAd4HIV3YQ8uK0XD_6m5rwM=)
---
[_**Join Latino Victory Fund in supporting Dr. Caraveo: make a grassroots contribution of $10 or more today!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41923289/330904087/355891186?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220217LVF_press_allop_c_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDI2NzMwZi0zYzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5OG61speScAAqaEyYrb9FAd4HIV3YQ8uK0XD_6m5rwM=)
Nathalie Rayes, Latino Victory Fund president and CEO, said the following about Dr. Caraveo:
_“Latino Victory Fund is thrilled to endorse Dr. Yadira Caraveo’s historic candidacy for Congress in Colorado’s new 8th Congressional district. It’s long past time for a Latina to represent Colorado at the federal level. The new 8th Congressional District presents an exciting opportunity for the Latino community in Colorado to have a voice in Congress — and Dr. Caraveo will be that powerful voice. As the daughter of immigrants from Mexico, Dr. Caraveo’s lived experience as a union representative, pediatrician, and state legislator will make her a strong advocate for Latino working families."_
---
CO-08 is a brand-new seat created through the 2020 redistricting process. Anchored in the north Denver metro area, it includes parts of Adams, Weld and Larimer counties. With explosive growth in the last decade among the Latino population in Colorado centered in the north Denver metro, CO-08 is designed to give a voice to that growing population — **38.5% of the district identifies as Hispanic, far more than any other Colorado congressional district.** Roll Call and other top race raters all identify CO-08 as a toss-up district, and one that “will be among the seats that decide the majority in the House.”
Latino Victory Fund joins EMILY’s List, 314 Action, Elect Democratic Women, PODER PAC, Defend the Vote, and over 40 Colorado elected officials in endorsing Dr. Caraveo for CO-08.
**This movement is growing stronger every day —[can you make a donation of any amount to sustain the momentum behind our campaign to send a voice for the Latino community to Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41923290/330904088/355891186?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220217LVF_press_allop_c_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDI2NzMwZi0zYzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5OG61speScAAqaEyYrb9FAd4HIV3YQ8uK0XD_6m5rwM=)**

| Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. Her parents raised her and her siblings on her father’s construction worker’s salary in Adams County. In the legislature, Dr. Caraveo has delivered for working Coloradans by standing up to the biggest corporate bullies and entrenched special interests.

Now, Dr. Caraveo is running for Congress to stand up for hard-working families she sees falling through the cracks. Dr. Caraveo would be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress and the only physician in Colorado’s congressional delegation. The new 8th Congressional District presents an exciting opportunity for the Latino community in Colorado to have a voice in Congress — and Dr. Caraveo will be that powerful voice. As the daughter of immigrants from Mexico, Dr. Caraveo’s lived experience as a union representative, pediatrician, and state legislator will make her a strong advocate for Latino working families." CO-08 is a brand-new seat created through the 2020 redistricting process. Anchored in the north Denver metro area, it includes parts of Adams, Weld and Larimer counties. With explosive growth in the last decade among the Latino population in Colorado centered in the north Denver metro, CO-08 is designed to give a voice to that growing population — 38.5% of the district identifies as Hispanic, far more than any other Colorado congressional district. Roll Call and other top race raters all identify CO-08 as a toss-up district, and one that “will be among the seats that decide the majority in the House.” Latino Victory Fund joins EMILY’s List, 314 Action, Elect Democratic Women, PODER PAC, Defend the Vote, and over 40 Colorado elected officials in endorsing Dr. Caraveo for CO-08. This movement is growing stronger every day —= = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you! Elana Schrager Campaign Manager Yadira Caraveo for Congress | Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. Her parents raised her and her siblings on her father’s construction worker’s salary in Adams County. In the legislature, Dr. Caraveo has delivered for working Coloradans by standing up to the biggest corporate bullies and entrenched special interests. Now, Dr. Caraveo is running for Congress to stand up for hard-working families she sees falling through the cracks. Dr. Caraveo would be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress and the only physician in Colorado’s congressional delegation. = | = | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS Caraveo for Congress PO Box 953 Eastlake, CO 80614 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41923357/330904321/1642521363?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjAwYjYyZi0zYzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cp4OHT0KqMsZzZ5KyUE105OLiXwK7zWgInaMCawgOnM=&emci=55b27ac9-718f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=8b00b62f-3c90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=26261389)

| | We must restore faith in our leaders and our democracy. **One of my goals in Congress is to do just that by** **keeping every high-ranking public servant, their senior staff, and their families from buying, selling, or owning individual stocks, serving on corporate boards, and from lobbying once they leave office.** We must restore Americans' faith in our public institutions. People deserve to be confident that their elected leaders, cabinet officials, and judges serve them and never prioritize their own bank accounts. **I believe this is how we can begin to heal the divides in our country, by restoring trust.** We need to come together as a grassroots community to urge Congress to start taking action right away by banning representatives from trading and owning individual stocks. clean_body: | | | We must restore faith in our leaders and our democracy. One of my goals in Congress is to do just that by keeping every high-ranking public servant, their senior staff, and their families from buying, selling, or owning individual stocks, serving on corporate boards, and from lobbying once they leave office. We must restore Americans' faith in our public institutions. People deserve to be confident that their elected leaders, cabinet officials, and judges serve them and never prioritize their own bank accounts. I believe this is how we can begin to heal the divides in our country, by restoring trust. We need to come together as a grassroots community to urge Congress to start taking action right away by banning representatives from trading and owning individual stocks. = 2022ConflictedTradingAK&referrer=group-andy-kim-for-congress-2&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-andy-kim-pet-ty%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2022-02-stocktrading-email%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjAwYjYyZi0zYzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cp4OHT0KqMsZzZ5KyUE105OLiXwK7zWgInaMCawgOnM=&emci=55b27ac9-718f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=8b00b62f-3c90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=26261389 = 2022ConflictedTradingAK&referrer=group-andy-kim-for-congress-2&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-andy-kim-pet-ty%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2022-02-stocktrading-email%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjAwYjYyZi0zYzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cp4OHT0KqMsZzZ5KyUE105OLiXwK7zWgInaMCawgOnM=&emci=55b27ac9-718f-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=8b00b62f-3c90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=26261389 Andy Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress. ---|--- | This email was sent by Andy Kim for Congress P.O. Peter,

**We're doing something BIG.**

We're hosting an amazing contest, and one lucky winner from Team Herschel will win a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity.

On March 2, President Donald J. Trump and I are hosting the first annual "Great American Invitational" golf tournament in Palm Beach, and we're giving away one spot to a lucky winner!

In addition to winning a round of golf at President Trump's amazing International Golf Club, our winner will also win the following:
* Photo with President Trump and me.
* Admission to the awards luncheon.
* A commemorative hat signed by President Trump and me.
* Limited edition tournament shirt.
* Roundtrip airfare, ground transportation, and accommodations for one night

clean_body: President Trump and I are hosting the Great American Invitational in Palm Beach. We want to fly one lucky winner to join us in our golf tournament! President Trump and I are hosting the Great American Invitational in Palm Beach. We want to fly one lucky winner to join us in our golf tournament! | Peter, We're doing something BIG. We're hosting an amazing contest, and one lucky winner from Team Herschel will win a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity. On March 2, President Donald J. Trump and I are hosting the first annual "Great American Invitational" golf tournament in Palm Beach, and we're giving away one spot to a lucky winner! In addition to winning a round of golf at President Trump's amazing International Golf Club, our winner will also win the following: Photo with President Trump and me. Admission to the awards luncheon. A commemorative hat signed by President Trump and me. Limited edition tournament shirt. Roundtrip airfare, ground transportation, and accommodations for one night ** Peter, don't miss out. President Trump and I hope to see you at our golf tournament in Palm Beach! Thanks, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution, . To enter without making a contribution, Void where prohibited or otherwise restricted by law. The promotion begins on February 11, 2022, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time and ends on Wednesday, February 23, 2022, at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. All entries must be received by 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time on February 23, 2022. One winner will receive the following prize: a round of golf in the Great American Invitational hosted by President Donald J. Trump and Herschel Walker at the Trump International Golf Club in Palm Beach; a photo with President Trump and Herschel Walker; admission to the awards luncheon with Herschel Walker; a commemorative hat signed by President Trump and Herschel Walker; a limited-edition tournament shirt; and roundtrip airfare for one (1) person, hotel accommodations for one (1) night, and ground transportation. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia, and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. body:
Friend, we're not compromising our values for money | | |

| | | [ ](https://davidcanepa.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30117c826a4caf5ae611c4918&id=55d03294f2&e=296760735e)
---
| | | Friend,

In over a decade of public service, I've seen how special interest groups and big corporations try to influence politicians with campaign contributions.

_**That's why our campaign is swearing off all Corporate PAC donations._(We're the only campaign in the race who can say that.)_**_

It's so encouraging to see how our progressive, people-first message is resonating with voters. From the beginning, our grassroots support has propelled us ahead.

Friend, but here's why I'm worried. The special interest groups supporting my opponent (Big Pharma, Walmart, and other major corporations) know this is a close race. _**The most recent poll has us only up 2% with many undecided voters—big corporate outside spending could send shockwaves through this race.**_

That's why we have to be prepared and keep up the momentum with our grassroots fundraising [Friend, can you contribute today to help our people-powered campaign stand up to the corporate special interests supporting our opponent?](https://davidcanepa.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30117c826a4caf5ae611c4918&id=446209f8b0&e=296760735e)

Politicians in the Lansing Swamp have _never_ been this out of touch with the citizens of Michigan.

This week, [The Detroit News reported](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=f85a61350c&e=fe4b890356) that the Lansing lobbying core spent $44.2 million to influence the decision of Michigan lawmakers - **an all time high.

_Why?_** State government is flushed with cash because of Biden's COVID giveaways, fueling the inflation crisis that is crushing families in Michigan and across the country.

Now, lobbyists are trying to get their hands on that money - **OUR taxpayer dollars** \- to boost their own interests, and the career politicians on both sides the isle are giving in.

This is one of the reasons why Michigan has long been ranked [the most corrupt state in the entire nation](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=eafe62a982&e=fe4b890356) \- with politicians, special interests and the corporate elite doing anything they can to keep power in their hands and keep We the People out of our government.

Our grassroots movement is the political establishment's worst nightmare, Peter.

**I'm not backed by the corporate media or the career politicians - this campaign is fueled by patriotic citizens like you.**
__[Pitch in $25 Now to Defend Freedom](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=e59105c572&e=fe4b890356)__
**We need a Republican nominee who will fight for the people** , not just protect the political class and enforce the failed status-quo.** **_**We are DONE with silver spoon politicians ruling over us.**_

**I need your help to fight back against the political establishment.

[Can you make a contribution of $10, $25 or any amount to support our grassroots campaign today?](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=511eab8637&e=fe4b890356)**

---
| [DONATE](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=7ec8b6eaa2&e=fe4b890356 "DONATE")
---
| What our movement has already been able to achieve is remarkable, Peter, **but we still have a difficult journey ahead of us.**

[A donation of any amount](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=0e5bfeab02&e=fe4b890356) will help expand our grassroots field team and spread our message online and on TV.

The Power of One Leads to the Power of Many,

---
| |
---
| Garrett Soldano
Grassroots Republican for Governor

_P.S. - watch my full Facebook live on the subject by clicking below 👇🏼_
---

subject: I’ve Launched My Campaign For OR-05!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. John Di Paola for Congress 2022
body:
Last month, I officially launched my campaign for Oregon’s 5th Congressional District (OR-05). The response has been truly incredible. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ced39ac8de18/wl0w2dvf9x-15915482?e=b369608f84)
---
| |
---
| | Last month, I officially launched my campaign for Oregon’s 5th Congressional District (OR-05). The response has been truly incredible. I can’t thank you enough for your encouragement and support.

I’ve spent the first four weeks of my campaign traveling across the district and listening to your stories. One thing has been made clear - **Oregonians are ready for change.** The misguided priorities of career politicians have done nothing but place undue burdens on the backs of working families. This must end.

As your Congressman, I will apply all my energy and skills to making the needs of every Oregon family, community and business known in Washington, DC.

**What I’ve Been Up To:**
* **I’ve traveled the district** from Clackamas County to Marion, Linn, and Deschutes Counties where I was able to meet with voters and local elected officials to discuss the challenges facing our country.
* **I had the opportunity to speak with the** [**Wilsonville Spokesman**](https://dipaolaforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=566d5a1c5a0aa7e5f5397f0e6&id=8f2817f91a&e=b369608f84) to discuss why I’m running for Congress and my proposed solutions for OR-05.
* **Our campaign was recognized by the** [**Oregon Catalyst**](https://dipaolaforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=566d5a1c5a0aa7e5f5397f0e6&id=fc44ec9926&e=b369608f84), a statewide publication that posted our announcement.
* **I’ve taken on the Oregon Health Authority and Governor Brown** in response to their overburdensome and unnecessary permanent school mask mandate. As a Medical Doctor, I was astonished by the state's failure to consider the accumulating evidence that these restrictions do more harm than good and [**promptly stood against the states decision.**](https://dipaolaforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=566d5a1c5a0aa7e5f5397f0e6&id=bb96607505&e=b369608f84)
* This announcement gained national attention and I was featured in [**Newsmax**](https://dipaolaforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=566d5a1c5a0aa7e5f5397f0e6&id=ad1cae89cf&e=b369608f84). I will continue to stand with parents and fight for our children who have been unfairly targeted amidst this pandemic.

To learn more about my grassroots campaign, please visit [DiPaolaForCongress.com](https://dipaolaforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=566d5a1c5a0aa7e5f5397f0e6&id=ea59f9fa28&e=b369608f84). You can also follow me on social media on [Twitter](https://dipaolaforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=566d5a1c5a0aa7e5f5397f0e6&id=a96761dd6c&e=b369608f84), [Facebook](https://dipaolaforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=566d5a1c5a0aa7e5f5397f0e6&id=6745ba7462&e=b369608f84), and [Instagram](https://dipaolaforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=566d5a1c5a0aa7e5f5397f0e6&id=22f8a41498&e=b369608f84) to see my latest updates.

Together, we will fight for commonsense solutions that make Oregon’s Fifth District a more prosperous place to live.

Dr. John Di Paola,
---
|
---
| [DONATE HERE](https://dipaolaforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=566d5a1c5a0aa7e5f5397f0e6&id=d3daefcf7f&e=b369608f84 "DONATE HERE")
---
| [Sign Up to Volunteer](https://dipaolaforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=566d5a1c5a0aa7e5f5397f0e6&id=6da54c3093&e=b369608f84 "Sign Up to Volunteer")

clean_body: Last month, I officially launched my campaign for Oregon’s 5th Congressional District (OR-05). The response has been truly incredible. | | | | | | | Last month, I officially launched my campaign for Oregon’s 5th Congressional District (OR-05). The response has been truly incredible. I can’t thank you enough for your encouragement and support. I’ve spent the first four weeks of my campaign traveling across the district and listening to your stories. One thing has been made clear - Oregonians are ready for change. The misguided priorities of career politicians have done nothing but place undue burdens on the backs of working families. This must end. As your Congressman, I will apply all my energy and skills to making the needs of every Oregon family, community and business known in Washington, DC. What I’ve Been Up To: I’ve traveled the district from Clackamas County to Marion, Linn, and Deschutes Counties where I was able to meet with voters and local elected officials to discuss the challenges facing our country. I had the opportunity to speak with the to discuss why I’m running for Congress and my proposed solutions for OR-05. Our campaign was recognized by the , a statewide publication that posted our announcement. I’ve taken on the Oregon Health Authority and Governor Brown in response to their overburdensome and unnecessary permanent school mask mandate. As a Medical Doctor, I was astonished by the state's failure to consider the accumulating evidence that these restrictions do more harm than good and This announcement gained national attention and I was featured in . I will continue to stand with parents and fight for our children who have been unfairly targeted amidst this pandemic. To learn more about my grassroots campaign, please visit . You can also follow me on social media on , , and to see my latest updates. Together, we will fight for commonsense solutions that make Oregon’s Fifth District a more prosperous place to live. Dr. John Di Paola, | | "DONATE HERE" | "Sign Up to Volunteer" | Paid for by Dr. John Di Paola for Congress 2022 | | | | | | | | | | | | | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Di Paola For Congress PO Box 99 Wilsonville, OR 97070-0099 USA

name: Charity Barry

body:
The Latest News From the Barry Campaign
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ephyHwcXVKnn7ZgqyJRmw20-bRKHRgVneSWpAAzi_wUHx_WdQOzgRhpkqsMe6CcNh1j9ps_3l5zS-xglrYvC0mEO7_0zj7yoCD61B_9iOw-jvsTIjrOSkiYYZYOp6vKrI3vKU_kPItRYYSlMgaOEMmvHjrRTC3sB&c=razShI1werapi5Kqlq0m5izGr3sQAE1CbTs5c6rfVfrQ41a0KJfXww==&ch=vMprmoYPaFj9WrXym_4Rt-wwop919g33F8s2kAhNY4DKRW0O9eJvbw==)

|
# Greetings From the Campaign Trail!
---
| | |
---|---
|
Being in the middle of caucus season, we have been busier than ever in our efforts to get the message of freedom out to the many voters of the 2nd District!

In addition to the county caucuses in Rock, Green, and Iowa Counties so far in February, our team has been keeping busy and packing the miles on the cars going to great events like the CareNet fundraising dinner in Monroe, the FAIR Conference in Madison (a great non-partisan group to counteract Critical Theory in our schools and workplace), Patriot Group meetings in Reedsburg, Pints & Politics in Waunakee, a luncheon with Election Integrity Champion Janel Brandtjen in Maple Bluff, and so much more!

Also, this week, we released our first two ads on Facebook! The word is getting out - we have had great responses, more people following our campaign, and even signing up to volunteer because of these ads!
| |
---|---
|
Our message of hope, enthusiasm, and confidence that the people of District 2 don't have to settle for the destructive policies of Mark Pocan just because it's not an easy seat to win is a message that resonates with the voters! We are all ready for new and accurate representation, and we can get it if we work hard, implementing both old and new campaign techniques and leaving no rock unturned. Which is why this is just the start of our digital ad campaign.

As my team and I look forward to all the things ahead of us in the coming weeks, we are excited for the opportunities in store. But to keep the campaign running, we need your help! Please consider a donation today to help us get the word out - meetings take gas money, literature takes printing money, ads take dispersal money. GETTING THE WORD OUT TAKES A TEAM!!!

Thank you so much!

Charity Barry

body:
Jensen doesn't need to play a sport to be a loser, he does it on his own [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=8e1d3b348485434cb8fe1e1766388c20&_e=64t7q950oD4Ke6bjRLI1QQvQFOJCCyxyOWbNQCgIBx_UREucZZBb6-kMayqeXe83NWLSh38SwqWXyw93ue54CkURteqa573OnLcN0u-PmcFHOLNytX-X-9n3UDl0IGdPANrFZnvZrrEWofWWWXzzd81Yf3Qj0vaNRqxreAbjENXQrHMf-z4Z9vQ_8tR8lO0powzT7PrPTOwcYhnDc18J9Ng03i_nGPuvpWqnK0zD3cFPX7x3j0lEFf_uVbsmHIEGlilfzPz-wTafm5KnLTIB4zC8bEKZ3StjGp9ttsNVeqZQfpb7LeeC8ahnYMfuT1HWZ5Wda99gj9pS7cqtwSSShjJkYMbxOPx_A33Wu7i1yR8%3D) My friend, Good thing Scott Jensen isn't playing baseball, because he has more than enough strikes to lose this game. **_Here are Jensen's TOP SEVEN swings and misses: _** ❌ _Scott Jensen abandoned President Trump and [spoke at a rally](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=8e1d3b348485434cb8fe1e1766388c20&_e=64t7q950oD4Ke6bjRLI1QZrNanAf09xBXqN6PM8dzIsOc-L8S9yDBWMd76x4EZhUN2KWhOCQzzowPzsolRTazxEW-FMGj-cWSk2itslTBgQtoA9gyYuE2PncByg-V8jbSKzeTPdotvQXUFjccZwrTw3LzExXAEeK4z-R8efQ31e1dT-1n2FRZzU0ZXWYW4NULk-EPoxkro2SWccr_XgKqJZXNeqAFundQPW9Tes0tg9aogugAY21--Dhhs7yHJqbGiueZ5BYPgmiQCnAQYllxw%3D%3D) for Libertarian candidate, Jo Jorgensen,THREE days before the election!_ ❌ _Scott Jensen is a Second Amendment traitor. As a senator, he proposed two gun control bills, going directly against a promise he had made to the Minnesota Gun Owners Caucus and his own constituents.
_ ❌ _Scott Jensen invited Representative John Thompson to speak with him at an event in Uptown. Do you remember John Thompson? He's the Democrat who encouraged protestors to burn down the towns of Hugo, Falcon Heights, and St. Anthony. Even the Democrats don't want anything to do with him anymore.__
_ ❌ _Scott Jensen interned for Planned Parenthood._ ❌ _Scott Jensen supports ranked-choice voting, which will allow the Democrats to manipulate the elections. It's already not working in Minneapolis, St. Paul, and Bloomington and he wants to bring it to the entire state of Minnesota.
_ ❌ _Scott Jensen tried to legalize recreational marijuana. Now he says he's against it.
_ ❌ _Scott Jensen tried to bring government-run healthcare to Minnesota. Now he says he's against it.
_ [**SUPPORT A WINNER, JOIN MY CAMPAIGN**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=8e1d3b348485434cb8fe1e1766388c20&_e=64t7q950oD4Ke6bjRLI1QQvQFOJCCyxyOWbNQCgIBx_UREucZZBb6-kMayqeXe83NWLSh38SwqWXyw93ue54CkURteqa573OnLcN0u-PmcFHOLNytX-X-9n3UDl0IGdPANrFZnvZrrEWofWWWXzzdwZQmkAW3oirSb8yinxcJ4I8BwYbIE1CfJ4jY8S-kNjN5d9t9oCm6UXK0yWBtvxnds5nsaMD6iyosh19vpzUzLpKZYoMB-dosKO6cI4qd5Lde1Y7xe8T2omE2b81pktdstXnWqr5WvjkOaS5RNzx-aVa4T6qq4ceoGN8l1K1F1irP2zpgPEnD7UoqEEnEhMtUf6ujGDxOB6fG8H0flOQLi4%3D) Scott Jensen is batting ZERO with Minnesota voters, so let's kick him out of our ballpark. If you join my team today, you know you are joining the team of a PROVEN winner with a seasoned record to go all the way. **I don't hide my conservative values like Scott Jensen does.** I proudly campaigned for President Trump. I was honored to receive the highest ratings possible from the NRA and Minnesota Gun Owners Caucus. I back the blue. I am strongly pro-life, and my record proves it as I wrote and passed into law more pro-life bills than another candidate in this race. I am a firm believer in one person, one vote. I made sure marijuana legalization was just a pipe dream. I believe the last two years have made it very clear: Government should have no say in our healthcare! [_**With your support I know we can hit a home run, so make sure you join us and make a donation today!**_](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=8e1d3b348485434cb8fe1e1766388c20&_e=64t7q950oD4Ke6bjRLI1QQvQFOJCCyxyOWbNQCgIBx_UREucZZBb6-kMayqeXe83NWLSh38SwqWXyw93ue54CkURteqa573OnLcN0u-PmcFHOLNytX-X-9n3UDl0IGdPANrFZnvZrrEWofWWWXzzdyfa5pTLby9A5eILBU36aJgAfjC3xqaXuqpCX_J9TpUSFCRd9rhIuEwBke5rwkAKZUhf2Hg0fCt7f4uGFgUGWqLEPfoBQgaji5svYM3j8DkjQ56cwOgqaHCf5qxGE23QAaU5zrvnmMIcPhL1fkUXCPJdzwr34dSBiMQmuy3oAa0xj-yhIgtVGoTU6cH62I4glwVSn20ipHAfL74BK2rgDSA%3D) name: Max Steiner
subject: re: recall elections in the North State
body:
As Democrats, we need to recognize that there is a civil war raging for the soul of the Republican Party |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41926367/330915680/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDA4MjM1MS00NTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yFSC4Bmx1O039fUkES3wYQVq-b7Ycq7vKSqMXPdzeiU=)
Friend,

The last few months have been a difficult time for our neighbors in Shasta County. The results are now final and the news is bad. The far-right has run a successful recall campaign and will now control the Shasta Board of Supervisors. This is the future for all of Northern California if we don't start pushing back on this political extremism.

The Recall Shasta movement, which grew out of anti-COVID restriction protests, targeted three moderate Republican County Supervisors. They collected enough signatures to prompt a recall election for one of them: Leonard Moty. Leonard Moty is a career law enforcement officer, a life-long Republican, and a strong supporter of the Second Amendment. In normal times, he would face zero chance of being recalled. Nevertheless, he lost his job because he wasn't right-wing "enough."

**Doug LaMalfa refused to take a position on the recall: probably because he's a spineless coward who was more afraid of his base than of even sticking up for his own friends.**

We have a problem in the North State. Voters are angry. Those who voted for the Shasta recall feel that they are not being served by the status quo politicians on the moderate right, and that is why they voted against Moty.

**As Democrats, we need to recognize that there is a civil war raging for the soul of the Republican Party, and we need to be there, with open arms and moderate policies, to welcome those "political refugees" into the Democratic fold. As a politically moderate combat veteran, I am well-placed to rally these voters to our side.**

We have a window of opportunity in the North State. To exploit it, I'm going to need your support.

**[Please consider donating $10 or $35 a month to my campaign. Help me reach the disaffected voters of Shasta County and turn the North State blue. We cannot let the far right use this real anger to take control of our communities.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41926368/330915681/360059203?refcode=em-2.17.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDA4MjM1MS00NTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yFSC4Bmx1O039fUkES3wYQVq-b7Ycq7vKSqMXPdzeiU=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41926370/330915683/360059203?refcode=em-2.17.22-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDA4MjM1MS00NTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yFSC4Bmx1O039fUkES3wYQVq-b7Ycq7vKSqMXPdzeiU=)

**House Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy endorses Harriet Hageman**
---
Leader Kevin McCarthy, the Republican Leader in the U.S. House of Representatives, has endorsed Harriet Hageman in her campaign against Rep. Liz Cheney. McCarthy joins President Donald J. Trump and Senator Rand Paul of Kentucky with his bold and historic endorsement of Harriet. McCarthy today issued the following statement:
_“I am proud to endorse Harriet Hageman for Congress._ _
_ _“Raised on a family ranch outside of Fort Laramie, Harriet and her family have resided in Wyoming for generations.
_
_“The most successful Representatives in Congress focus on the needs of their constituents, and throughout her career, Harriet has championed America's natural resources and helped the people of Wyoming reject burdensome and onerous government overreach.
_
_“I look forward to welcoming Harriet to a Republican majority next Congress, where together, we will hold the Biden Administration accountable and deliver much-needed solutions for the American people.” _ Hageman issued the following statement: _“I am very grateful for Leader McCarthy’s strong support, and I pledge that when I am Wyoming’s congresswoman, I will always stand up for our beautiful state and do the job I was sent there to do. I look forward to representing Wyoming's interests in Congress.
_
_“Liz Cheney has completely lost the ability to do her job of representing Wyoming as our only member of the House of Representatives. The Democrats in Washington, D.C. only see her as a temporary but useful tool to achieve their partisan goals, and the Republicans want nothing to do with her. It is her responsibility to fight for Wyoming and represent our values, and she has completely abandoned that. Wyoming deserves a congresswoman who will combat the disastrous Biden administration and hold them accountable for their policies which are ravaging our energy industries, destroying our sovereignty by obliterating our southern border, robbing our citizens of prosperity through catastrophic inflation, and encroaching on our constitutional rights. Cheney is doing nothing to help us, she is actively damaging the Republican Party – both in Wyoming and nationally – and it’s time for her to go."_

###

clean_body: | | | | House Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy endorses Harriet Hageman Leader Kevin McCarthy, the Republican Leader in the U.S. House of Representatives, has endorsed Harriet Hageman in her campaign against Rep. Liz Cheney. McCarthy joins President Donald J. Trump and Senator Rand Paul of Kentucky with his bold and historic endorsement of Harriet. McCarthy today issued the following statement: “I am proud to endorse Harriet Hageman for Congress. “Raised on a family ranch outside of Fort Laramie, Harriet and her family have resided in Wyoming for generations. “The most successful Representatives in Congress focus on the needs of their constituents, and throughout her career, Harriet has championed America's natural resources and helped the people of Wyoming reject burdensome and onerous government overreach. “I look forward to welcoming Harriet to a Republican majority next Congress, where together, we will hold the Biden Administration accountable and deliver much-needed solutions for the American people.” Hageman issued the following statement: “I am very grateful for Leader McCarthy’s strong support, and I pledge that when I am Wyoming’s congresswoman, I will always stand up for our beautiful state and do the job I was sent there to do. I look forward to representing Wyoming's interests in Congress. “Liz Cheney has completely lost the ability to do her job of representing Wyoming as our only member of the House of Representatives. The Democrats in Washington, D.C. only see her as a temporary but useful tool to achieve their partisan goals, and the Republicans want nothing to do with her. It is her responsibility to fight for Wyoming and represent our values, and she has completely abandoned that. Wyoming deserves a congresswoman who will combat the disastrous Biden administration and hold them accountable for their policies which are ravaging our energy industries, destroying our sovereignty by obliterating our southern border, robbing our citizens of prosperity through catastrophic inflation, and encroaching on our constitutional rights. Cheney is doing nothing to help us, she is actively damaging the Republican Party – both in Wyoming and nationally – and it’s time for her to go." | | | |

| | Dear Patriot:

We found out last week that the CIA is collecting bulk data on every single American—illegally spying on the very people it claims to protect.

Special Counsel John Durham released more information about how Hillary Clinton and the DNC illegally spied on President Trump and his campaign during and after the 2016 election.

Republican Rep. Troy Nehls revealed that the Leftist assassination squad known as the U.S. Capitol Police broke into his Congressional office and photographed confidential material in an attempt to intimidate him.

Canada, our neighbor to the north—our largest trading partner—declared martial law and brutally broke up peaceful protests against its draconian and tyrannical Plandemic lockdowns, mandates, and internal passports.

And all of that was just in the last few days.

**Meanwhile, where is our Republican Party? Where are our self-proclaimed conservative “fighters,” our “warriors,” the people who tell us they represent us?**

They’re **__nowhere__** to be found.

They’re **_absolutely silent_** —just like they were silent when Communists stole the 2020 election.

My RINO opponent, Deep State Steve Womack, hasn’t said **__one word__** about the Deep State spying on his constituents.

He hasn’t said **__one word__** about the Democrats’ Russia hoax or their illegal espionage against President Trump.

He hasn’t said **__one word__** about the rogue Feds breaking into his own colleague’s office and intimidating him.

He hasn’t said _**_a single thing_**_ to support the heroic Canadian truckers fighting for their freedom, and he hasn’t said anything about Prime Minister Trudeau declaring martial law and suspending Canadians’ civil and human rights.

He only talks about “human rights” when it gives him the pretext to incite war in far-flung places like Ukraine so he can please his Deep State Military-Industrial Complex donors.

**Steve Womack doesn’t care about what happened to President Trump—he undermined Trump at every turn, blamed Trump for January 6 th, and called Trump supporters, along with anyone who tells the truth about election fraud, “un-patriotic, un-American extremists.”**

_My opponent isn’t alone, though. Almost the entire Republican Party is AWOL, fiddling on the roof while our country is turned into a totalitarian police state._

_It’s time to get these worthless jellyfish out of office and replace them with warriors who will stand up against the Deep State and FIGHT for the people._

**We’re running out of time—we might only have 1 or 2 elections left to turn this ship around before we really do lose it forever.**

**[_Step 1 in taking our country back is to REPLACE every single one of the toothless RINOs that keep holding us back_ _._

_I will FIGHT the Deep State, and they know it. That's why the __Establishment_ _ is doing everything it can to stop me._](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=5522a17309&e=eda539b26b)**

[**_Help me tell the GOP Establishment that the people are DONE with their cowardice_ _ \-- Chip into my election campaign right away and show them the power of the America First movement_**](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=e8c606ad48&e=eda539b26b) _._

_We need PATRIOTS who will**FIGHT** for the **AMERICAN** people, who aren't going to tuck tail and run when they get called mean names._

[_**Your contributions to my campaign will help me purchase TV and radio ads, yard signs, and other campaign materials so I can fight the worthless GOP, retire a weak RINO, and replace him with a fierce America First Warrior**_.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=4ae65d7126&e=eda539b26b)

Thank you in advance for your generous support. For America,
Neil Robinson Kumar
_Republican for U.S. Congress, AR-03_

**P.S. The Republican Party of Arkansas is pulling out all the stops to kill my authentic America First campaign. ** [_**I know you're ready to replace these worthless RINOs with America First conservatives like me, and that's why I'm counting on your contribution of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or more today**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=61ca0c40d2&e=eda539b26b)** _._**

name: John Fetterman
subject: re: Team Fetterman yard signs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I still have to pinch myself when I drive past these signs.
#
Derek, I still have to pinch myself when I drive around PA and see one of **our official Team Fetterman yard signs. 😍**
I'd truly love for you to have one of your own to display — in your yard, window, or literally wherever you want! All you have to do is donate $15 or more today, and our team will send an official Team Fetterman yard sign straight to your door.
**So I’ve gotta ask:[Will you kick in $15 or more using this link for an official Team Fetterman yard sign? ](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44266?refcode=ema20220217-4632&first_name=Derek&t=1&akid=4632%2E434096%2EwrA2mL)** 🙏
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44266?refcode=ema20220217-4632&first_name=Derek&t=2&akid=4632%2E434096%2EwrA2mL)
**[Get A Yard Sign →](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44266?refcode=em20220217-4632&amount=5&t=3&akid=4632%2E434096%2EwrA2mL)**
Look, Gisele + I aren’t the only ones who love these signs. The kids also get super excited “finding dad’s signs” when we’re out and about. 💛
But seriously, Derek, getting these signs out is about a whole lot more than seeing our name plastered everywhere. Yard signs are one of the simplest ways to show Pennsylvanians that there’s a whole grassroots movement behind us.
**[Don’t miss out, Derek. Donate $15 or more using this link, and we'll send you an official Team Fetterman yard sign.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44266?refcode=ema20220217-4632&first_name=Derek&t=7&akid=4632%2E434096%2EwrA2mL)**
**[Chip in now →](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44266?refcode=em20220217-4632&amount=5&t=8&akid=4632%2E434096%2EwrA2mL)**
Thank you and have an AMAZING week.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220217-4632-footer&t=11&refcode2=4632_434096_wrA2mL&akid=4632%2E434096%2EwrA2mL)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

name: Karl Rove
subject: Jeremy Hunt is a WINNER
body:
Peter, We’ve watched as President Biden and this Democratic Congress made some of the worst bone-headed decisions we’ve ever seen.

As inflation pummels every American family at the grocery and the pump, Democrats want to pile on trillions in new spending that will push prices higher.

And while they want the biggest expansion of the welfare state in history, Democrats oppose giving our military what it needs to deter our adversaries in China and Russia.

We must provide a check-and-balance on President Biden by electing a Republican majority in the House.

**Jeremy Hunt is a strong new leader who can help put our country on the right course.**

He’s a U.S. Army intelligence officer who’ll stand up for America, its values, and our free enterprise system.

**_Jeremy faced America’s enemies abroad: this veteran will have no_**
** _trouble taking on Washington._**

A strong and effective new leader, this American hero will flip a long-time Democrat seat in southwest Georgia and help put the GOP back in charge of Congress.

_We have a chance to more than double the number of Black Republicans_
_in the House and Senate and Jeremy Hunt is key to that strategy._

**Please, will you join me in backing this bold conservative?**

[**Pitch in TODAY to support Jeremy Hunt for Congress and send an Army veteran to Congress who’ll fight for our conservative beliefs.**](http://links.huntforgeorgia.com/u/click?_t=af56c613b6e04613b0408d69d59cb1ec&_m=8735f25f650a47b6b09de16cccf5cf60&_e=5PnHKtIdQ5vS2dqF0YB4-H2p5QlEO2pLq6FJU83wNa88a3Nq3YAGUAZviVU2MxWp8JabqDVl0qnmZY9uqKQD7_4AnyO29ppQiqsWKYtCBxsoqwUrY20w9D1rQ0whNZRX0fEslawog4sRuJpU9-kLMypUI08HMvFkOkCUeUrSq5PZ5IzM5d7upv9ZPQxgKnwg1rfGtGhUF0-wTxfW9wzHH2nFyrUjpplMih3SRKuKJ-sVqaC_90GbrXodbsK2J9WOzGsGo1Q_kUS61NATj9EQxFzO2DpzMk78t1YQnkGMA2GePFsJ5waViEFZMC7580QWBjmUW1QQfj_3_vSJSvo81bxSUW1p2bosYr2dKWy2S-PdFMnd8qD-Ed3YuQruyoxO7rf2IR_ofgKM8ZcK98xENA%3D%3D) Hunt For Congress,
clean_body: Peter, We’ve watched as President Biden and this Democratic Congress made some of the worst bone-headed decisions we’ve ever seen. As inflation pummels every American family at the grocery and the pump, Democrats want to pile on trillions in new spending that will push prices higher. And while they want the biggest expansion of the welfare state in history, Democrats oppose giving our military what it needs to deter our adversaries in China and Russia. We must provide a check-and-balance on President Biden by electing a Republican majority in the House. Jeremy Hunt is a strong new leader who can help put our country on the right course. He’s a U.S. Army intelligence officer who’ll stand up for America, its values, and our free enterprise system. Jeremy faced America’s enemies abroad: this veteran will have no trouble taking on Washington. A strong and effective new leader, this American hero will flip a long-time Democrat seat in southwest Georgia and help put the GOP back in charge of Congress. We have a chance to more than double the number of Black Republicans in the House and Senate and Jeremy Hunt is key to that strategy. Please, will you join me in backing this bold conservative? Thank you, Karl Rove Paid for by Jeremy for Georgia Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. I’m fortunate that they are both old enough to understand the gravity of the situation in our country, but can’t imagine parents who have babies and toddlers who are forced to wear masks and can’t understand why. I need YOUR HELP to get to Washington and ensure that our country is never put in this position again.
